PART XIII.

Service Lists

OF THE

SERVICES OF ALL CIVILIANS ARRANGED IN THE
ORDER OF THE PROVINCIAL LISTS.

I.—GOVERNMENT OF INDIA.
II.—LOWER BENGAL.
III.—NORTH-WEST PROVINCES.
IV.—PANJAB.
V.—CENTRAL PROVINCES.

VI.—ASSAM.
VII.—BRITISH BARMAH.
VIII.—MADRAS.
IX.—BOMBAY.

IGOVERNMENT OF INDIA.

ROBERT BARCLAY CHAPMAN, c.s.l., (Barrister-at-Law).—Arrd 6th Mar 1850; Under Secy Govt of India, Home and Finance 15th Jan 1858, on Rs 1,250, also Offg in Forgn Dept 29th Jan 1858; Leave on M C 3 months from 8th July 1859; Furl for 3 years from 10th Apr 1860; Offg Mag Pabna, 21st Mar 1863, on Rs 1,298; Jr Secy Bd of Rev 1st July 1863, on Rs 2,000; Offg Secy Bd of Rev 24th June 1863, on Rs 2,333; Secy Bd of Rev 24th July 1863, on Rs 2,500; Offg Comr Nadia, 13th Nov 1866, on Rs 2,916; Offg Secy Govt of India Finl Dept 16th Jan 1869, on Rs 3,611; confirmed 17th Apr 1871, on Rs 4,166; furl 6 months from 3rd June 1874, returned 10th Dec 1874.

WILLIAM WATERFIELD.—Arrd 19th Nov 1852; Jt Mag 2nd gr 25th Mar 1857, on Rs 700; Supt 2nd or S Div of Survey 18th Apr 1857, on Rs 900; Offg Supt No Div of Survey 27th Apr 1858; 1st Asst Acct Genl Madras, 3rd Mar 1859, on Rs 1,000; Govt of India 9th Sep 1859, on Rs 1,500; Offg Acct Genl of Bengal 31st May 1860, on Rs 2,000; Offg Civil Auditor Madras, 10th Jan 1868, on Rs 2,000; Offg Dy Civil Auditor and Acct Genl Bengal 27th July 1861; on Rs 2000; leave for 3 months from 15th Nov 1862, Offg Civil Paymaster Bombay, on Rs 2,000; furl for 18 months from 14th May 1863; Civil Paymaster N W P 26th Nov 1864, on Rs 1,600; Offg Dy Acct Genl N W P 30th Nov 1864, on Rs 2,000; Dy Acct Genl, Offg Acct Genl N W Pro, 5th July 1865, on Rs 2,000, Rs 2,450 from 1st Oct 1866; Acct Genl N W P, 14th June 1867, on Rs 2,500; furl for 19 months from 14th Apr 1873; returned 14th Nov 1874, on Rs 2,500; Offg Comptr Genl and Hd Comr of Currency 7th Mar 1877, on Rs 3,500; confirmed 3rd Jan 1880; furl 21st Apr 1880.

JAMES DAVIDSON GORDON, c.s.l.—Arrd 10th Nov 1854; Magt Monghyr, 25th Jan 1865; Offg Judge Purneah, 7th Apr 1865; Dinagepur, 15th May 1865; Murshidabad, 25th May 1865; Offg Collr of Customs Calcutta 30th June 1865; services placed at the disposal of the Govt of India, Home Dept 23rd Jan 1866; Judl Comr Maisur and Kurg, Chief Comr Maisur and Kurg, 1st May 1878.

JOHN DOUGLAS SANDFORD, (Bar-at-Law)—Arrd 22nd Oct 1856; Attd to Ben 12th Aug 1857; Asst Tipperah, Aug 1857; services placed at the disposal of Govt of India, Home Dept and attached to N W P Nov 1858; Asst Mag Fatehpur, 24th Dec 1858; Offg Asst Secy to Govt N W P 1st Apr 1859; confirmed, but Offg Under Secy 1st Sept 1859; confirmed Feb 1862; Offg Secy to Govt from 13th Dec 1862 to 19th Mar 1863; on spl duty as Ag Secy to the Police Comr from 6th June to 15th Aug 1868; Jr Secy to Govt N W P Sept 1864; Offg Regtr Sadr Diwani Nizamut Adalat N W P 8th Apr 1865; Jr Secy to Govt 18th Nov 1865; Offg Secy to Bd of Rev 18th Apr 1866; reverted 27th Sept 1866; Offg Regtr High Court, N W P 10th Jan 1867; confirmed 25th Mar 1867; furl to Eur 3rd Aug 1868; Regtr High Court 3rd Nov 1870; Offg Mag Azamgarh, 30th Apr 1871; services placed at the disposal of Govt of India, Home Dept Nov 1871; left N W P 9th Nov 1871; Judl Comr British Burmah, 30th Jan 1872; furl 21 months, 3rd May 1875; returned 2nd Feb 1877; Judl Comr Maisur, 8th Feb 1878.

FREDERICK HENVEY.—Arrd 31st Oct 1861; attd to N W P 30th Dec 1862; Asst Mag Muttra 16th Jan 1863; leave on med cer from 1st May to 21st Oct 1864; transferred to Agra 6th May 1865; leave to Eur on private affairs from 10th July 1865 to 30th June 1866; Offg Under Secy to Govt N W P 9th July 1866; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Cawnpore, 12th Oct 1866; Offg Under Secy to Govt 5th May 1867; confirmed 24th July 1867; Offg Secy to Bd of Rev N W P 15th Sept 1868; Under Secy to Govt 25th Oct 1868, Offg Jr Secy 4th Nov 1868; Jt Mag 2nd gr, Offg Jr Secy to Govt 24th Sep 1869; Offg Secy 24th Feb 1870; Offg Jr Secy 21st Apr 1870; Offg Secy to Bd of Rev 2nd May 1870; Offg Jr Secy to Govt 16th Oct 1870; on spl duty for compiling a narrative of the Famine of 1869-70; 1st Apr 1871; furl to Eur from 2nd Dec 1871 to 27th Nov 1873; Offg Jr Secy to Govt N W P 16th Dec 1873; placed at disposal of G I July 1874; Offg Under Secy Foreign Dept 31st July 1874; confirmed 5th May 1875; Offg Resident Nipal 30th Dec 1876; Resident 3rd class Kashmir 16th May 1878.

JAMES WESTLAND.—Arrd 10th Oct 1862; Asst Mag Jessur 8th Dec 1862; Nadia, 17th Dec 1863; 24 Pargs 23rd May 1864; Comr Hazaribagh 8th Aug 1864; Offg Dy Comr Maubhura 27th Feb 1866; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Nadia 27th July 1866; on Rs 700, confirmed 23rd Mar 1867 on Rs 700, Offg 1st gr Nadia 5th May 1868 on Rs 766, Offg

Mag Jessur 16th July 1868 on Rs 1,233 ; Offg 2nd gr 7th Sept 1869 on Rs 1,233, Offg Supt and Remr Legal Affairs 7th June 1870 on Rs 1,900, Under Secy to Govt of India Finl Dept 9th Dec 1870 on Rs 1,500, furl for 1 year 1st Apl 1872 ; Offg Acctt Genl Bengal 26th Mar 1873 on Rs 2,700 ; Dy Acctt Genl Madras, Offg Acctt Genl Bengal 27th Aug 1873 on Rs 2,166 ; Acctt Genl C P Nagpur 13th Nov 1873 on Rs 1,500, on spl duty Home Dept 1st Jan 1876 ; furl for 19 months from 10th Apl 1876 ; Inspr of Local Offices of Acctt 18th Oct 1877 on Rs 2,000 ; on Rs 2,500 ; 1st Apl 1878 Acctt Genl Bengal Offg Comptr Genl and Hd Comr 26th July 1878 on Rs 3,000 ; Reverts 1st Oct 1878 ; Acctt Genl 1st cl Bengal 30th Apl 1879, on Rs 3,000 ; Offg Comtr Genl and Hd Comr currency 14th Aug 1879 on Rs 3,500 ; reverts 24th Oct 1879 ; to officiate as Comt Genl 21st Apl 1880 on Rs 3,500.

EDWIN FELIX THOMAS ATKINSON, B.A.—Arrd 21st Jan 1863 ; Att'd to N W P 17th July 1863 ; Asst Magt Allahabad 3rd Aug 1863 ; Jaunpur 7th Sept 1864 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr Jaunpur 13th Aug 1867 ; Offg Mag 2nd gr 12th Nov 1867 on Rs. 1,366 ; Asst Magt 5th Dec 1867 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 1st Jan 1868 ; Offg Magt 2nd gr 6th Aug 1878 ; on Rs 1,666 ; Offg Jt Mag 6th Oct 1878 ; Offg Judge S C Court Allahabad, 22nd Dec 1868 on Rs 966 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Dehra Dun 4th Apl 1870 ; Jaunpur 28th Oct 1870 ; 1st gr 15th Apl 1871 ; Offg Judge S C Court Allahabad, 3rd May 1871 on Rs 966 ; compiler N W P Gazetteer 28th June 1872 on Rs 1,200 ; Offg Secy Bd of Rev N. W. P 8th Oct 1874 on Rs. 1,666 ; reverted 14th Nov 1874 on Rs. 1,200 ; again offd 10th Feb 1875 ; on Rs 1,666, reverted 28th Mar 1875 on Rs 1,200 ; furl 8th Apl 1876 ; resumed charge of Gazetteer 14th Feb 1877 ; Asst Acctt Genl, Offg Acctt Genl N W P 1st Mar 1877 on Rs 1,833 ; Dy Acctt Genl Bombay, Offg Acctt Genl N W P 28th Aug 1878 on Rs. 2,000 ; Acctt Genl N W P 1st Feb 1880 on Rs 2,250.

THOMAS WILLIAM RAWLINS.—Arrd 11th Jan 1863 ; Att'd to N W Prov, Asst Magt Benares, 25th June 1864 ; Jaunpur, 3rd Feb 1864 ; Asst Magt Allahabad 18th Mar 1868 ; Offg Judge S C Court Allahabad, 23rd Mar 1868, on Rs 966 ; Asst Magt Allahabad 8th July 1870 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 29th Aug 1870 ; Offg Judge S C Court 31st Oct 1870 on Rs 966 ; Asst Mag 16th Nov 1870 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Allahabad, 2nd Apl 1871 ; Merath 17th Apl 1874 ; 1st gr 7th June 1871 on Rs 833 ; 2nd gr 25th Nov 1871 ; Asst Mag 5th Dec 1871 ; Offg Judge S C Court Allahabad, 29th Mar 1872 on Rs 966 ; confirmed 28th Nov 1872 on Rs 1,200 ; furl 1st Apl 1875 ; Judge S C Court Allahabad 9th Nov 1876 on Rs 1,200 ; Asst Acctt Genl Offg Acctt Genl Panjab, 6th Mar 1877 on Rs 1833 ; Asst Acctt Genl N W P, Offg Acctt Genl Panjab, 28th Aug 1878 on Rs 2000 ; Dy Acctt Genl Madras, Offg Acctt Genl Panjab, 30th Apl 1879 on Rs 2,000 ; Acctt Genl Panjab, on Rs 2,250, 1st Feb 1880.

ALFRED COTTERELL TUPP, B.A.—Arrd 29th Nov 1862 ; att'd to N W Pro 9th Oct 1863 ; Asst Magt Allahabad, 1st Nov 1863 ; Fatehpur, 17th Nov 1864 ; on Spl duty in Mahoba case, 1st Dec 1867 ; Asst Magt Fatehpur, 1st June 1868 ; on Spl duty Nani Tal (for Fatehpur Memoir), 26th July 1869 ; Asst Magt Fatehpur, 8th Oct 1869 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 8th June 1870 ; Offg Magt 27th July 1870 on Rs 1,666 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 6th Oct 1870 ; Asst Magt 23rd Dec 1870 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr and Judge S C C Dehra Dun, 7th Apl 1871 ; 1st gr 25th June 1871 ; 2nd gr 2nd Nov 1871 ; Asst Magt 1st Jan 1872 ; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr 7th May 1872 ; 2nd gr 8th June 1872 ; 1st gr 19th Aug 1872 ; 2nd gr 14th Nov 1872 ; Asst Magt 15th Feby 1873 ; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr 21st Apl 1873 ; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr Allahabad, 24th Oct 1873 ; 2nd gr 7th Nov 1873 ; furl 6th Apl 1874 ; Asst Magt Allahabad 18th Jan 1876 ; Offg Compiler Provl Gazetteer, N W P 16th Mar 1876, on Rs 966 ; Jt Magt 2nd gr offg Compiler 15th Apl 1877 ; Jt Magt 1st gr Azamgarh, 8th Aug 1877 on Rs 1,200 ; Offg Magt Azamgarh 7th May 1878 on Rs 1833 ; Jt Magt 1st gr 26th July 1878 on Rs 1,200 ; Asst Acctt Genl Bengal, Offg Dy Acctt Genl Madras 31st Oct 1878 on Rs 1,500 ; Asst Acctt Genl Bengal, Offg Acctt Genl Madras 25th Jan 1879 on Rs 2,000 ; Asst Acctt Genl N W P Offg Acctt Genl Madras, 30th Apl 1879 on Rs 2,000 ; Dy Acctt Genl, Offg Acctt Genl, Madras 1st Feb 1880.

DAVID MILLER BARBOUR, B.A.—Arrd 20th Dec 1863 ; Asst Mag Patna, 12th Apl 1864 ; Shahabad at Bhabna, 1st Aug 1856 ; Perhut at Madhubani, 9th July 1876 ; Offg Magt 1st gr 4th July 1868 on Rs 766 ; 2nd gr 22nd Jan 1869 ; Setamarhi 26th Jan 1869 ; Asst Magt Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr Hugli, 20th May 1869 ; Shahabad 15th Feb 1870 ; Patna 10th Jan 1871 ; Asst Magt Offg Magt 2nd gr Patna, 25th Apl 1871, on Rs 1,233 ; Asst Magt Jt Mag 2nd gr Baxar, 20th July 1871 ; Shahabad, 16th Nov 1871 ; Asst Mag Offg Und Secy Govt of India, Finl Dept 9th Mar 1872 on Rs 1,166 ; confirmed 27th Aug 1873, on Rs 1,300 ; furl 14 months 19th Oct 1874 ; ret'd 1st Dec 1875 ; Under Secy Govt of India, Offg Acctt Genl Bengal, 23rd Feb 1877, on Rs 2,100 ; Under Secy

Govt of India, Offg Secy Govt of Bengal Finl Dept 2nd Apl 1878, on Rs 2,100 ; Gazd to Finl Dept 12th June 1877 ; Acctt Genl Panjab, Offg Finl Secy Bengal 26th July 1878 on Rs 2,250 ; Acctt Genl Panjab 12th June 1879 on Rs 2,350 ; furl for 19 months 5th May 1879 ; Acctt Genl Madras, 1st Feb 1880.

CHARLES JAMES LYALL.—Arrd 4th Dec 1867 ; Attd to N W P 25th Oct 1867 ; Asst Mag Mirath, 19th Dec 1867 ; Bulandshahr, 1st Apl 1869 ; Offg Under Secy to Govt N W P 24th Feb 1870 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 21st Apl 1870 ; Offg Under Secy to Govt N W P 1st Apl 1871 ; Asst Under Secy to Govt of India, Fogn Dept 1st Apl 1872 ; Offg Under Secy to Govt N W P 4th July 1872 ; Offg Jr Secy 31st Oct 1872 ; Offg Under Secy 12th Dec 1872 ; placed at the disposal of the Govt of India, Dept of Rev, Agrl, and Com Apl 1873 ; Left N W P 13th Apl 1873 ; Offg Under Secy Govt of India Rev, and, Agrl Dept 17th Apl 1873 ; confd 1st Oct 1873 ; furl 1½ months 18 Oct 1878.

JAMES WHITE.—Arrd 9th Dec 1868 ; Attd to N W P Dec 1868 ; Asst Mag Bijnor, 12th Jan 1869 ; Fatehpur 21st Mar 1872 ; serv placed at the disposal of the Govt of India, in the Foreign Dept for Pol employment in Rajputana Dec 1873 ; Left N W P 24th Dec 1873 ; Offg Pol Agt Jaipur, Ajmir 1st Jan 1874 ; Asst Mag Benares, 13th Dec 1875 ; to Moradabad, 3rd Feb 1876 ; Offg Dy Comr Ajmir, 12th May 1876 ; Asst Comr Ajmir and Pol Agt 3rd cl, 25th May 1877 ; furl 1st Apl 1880.

EDWARD JAMES SINKINSON.—Arrd 13th Nov 1869 ; Attd to N W P 19th Nov 1869 ; Asst Magt Mirath 13th Dec 1869 ; Benares 26th May 1870 ; Basti, 16th Nov 1871 ; Benares 23rd Apl 1872 ; Allahabad, 24th Mar 1873 ; Left N W P 7 Nov 1873 ; Asst Comr British Burmah 3rd gr, 4th Sep 1874 ; Offg 1st Judge S C Court Rangoon. Offg Asst Secy to Cf Comr 24th Mar 1875 ; Jr Secy to Cf Comr 20th Mar 1876 ; offg Insp Prisons 15th Sep 1876 ; Offg Under Secy G I Finl Dept 23rd Feb 1877 ; confirmed 26th July 1878 ; Offg Acct Genl Punjab 1st Apl 1880.

FREDERICK CLENDON DAUKES.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869 ; Attd to N W P Asst Magt Mirzapur 16th Nov 1869 ; Allahabad, 7th Dec 1870 ; Asst Secy to Govt N W P 2nd Apl 1872 ; asst Magt Allahabad, 6th Aug 1872 ; Asst Secy to Govt N W P 13th Apl 1873 ; 1st Asst Secy 30th Aug 1873 ; Offg Under Secy 16th Sept 1873 ; 1st Asst Secy 16th Oct 1873 ; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr, Banda, 28th Nov 1873 ; Services placed at the disposal of the Govt of India Foreign Dept Dec 1873 ; Left N W P 23rd Dec 1873 ; Sr Attache Foreign Dept G I 4th Sep 1874 ; Offg Asst Secy Foreign Dept 17th Mar 1876 ; Under Secy Govt of India Home, Dept 14th Dec 1877 ; Furl 1 year 13th May 1878 ; Under Secy Home Dept 12th May 1879.

EUSTACE JOHN KITTS.—Arrd 29th Oct 1874 ; Attd to N W P 25th Sep 1874 ; Asst Magt Saharanpur 2nd Nov 1874 ; services placed at the disposal of the Govt of India Foreign Dept for employment in Berar, Aug 1875 ; left N W P 31st Aug 1875.

II.

LOWER BENGAL.

FROM MAY 1865 TO 1879.

HON. LOUIS STEWART JACKSON, c.l.e.—Arrd. 23rd July 1843—Judge High Court, 1st July 1862—Furl. from May 1865 to 4th Dec. 1865—Puisne Judge, High Court, 5th Dec. 1865—Offg. Chief Justice, High Court, 19th Aug. 1878—Judge, High Court, 19th Sept. 1878.

HON. CHARLES THOMAS BUCKLAND.—Arrd. 18th Apl. 1844—Commr. of the Dacca Divn., May 1865—Furl. on med. cert. from 23rd Sept. 1867 to 18th Dec. 1868—Offg. Commr., Bardwan Divn., 29th Dec. 1868—Commr. Rajshahi Divn., Offg. as Commr. of the Bardwan Divn., 6th July 1869—Commr., Bardwan Divn., 18th Mar. 1870—Offg. Mem. of the Board of Rev., 8th Aug., 1870—Commr. of the Bardwan Divn., 12th Nov. 1870—Commr. of the Presy. Divn., 20th Feb. 1876—Offg. Mem. of the Board of Rev., 17th Apl. 1877—Mem. of the Bengal Council, 27th Mar. 1878—Mem., Board of Rev., 29th Apl. 1878.

HON. WILLIAM AINSLIE.—Arrd. 7th Nov. 1845—Judge, Patna, May 1865—On spl. duty as Presdt. to the Tea Commn., 16th Nov. 1867—Judge, Patna, 15th Apl. 1868—Offg. Judge, High Court, 21st Nov. 1870—Judge, High Court, 13th May 1873—Furl. from 25th Jan. 1875 to 19th Apl. 1876—Judge, High Court, 25th Apl. 1876.

HON. HENRY LUCIUS DAMPIER.—Arrd. 18th Sept. 1849—Offg. Jr. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 1st May 1860—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 9th Aug. 1860—Secy. Board of Rev., 22nd Feb. 1861—Commr., Nadia Divn., 5th Dec. 1865—On spl. duty in the Famine Dists., 7th Nov. 1866—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 30th Apl. 1867—Addl. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 1st Nov. 1868—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Rev. and Genl. Depts., 1st Feb. 1869—Furl. from 23rd July 1869 to 22nd Nov. 1871—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Rev. and Genl. Depts., 29th Nov. 1871—Offg. Secy., Govt. of India, Home Dept., 22nd June 1872—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 9th Nov. 1872—Offg. Secy., Govt. of India, Home Dept., 19th Nov. 1872—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 1st Mar. 1873—Offg. Mem., Board of Rev., 13th Aug. 1873—Secy., Govt. of Bengal, 13th Nov. 1873—Offg. Mem., Board of Rev., 15th July 1874—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 7th Nov. 1874—Spl. Mem. of the Bengal Legis. Council, 14th Dec. 1874—Offg. Mem. of the Board of Rev., 12th Mar. 1875—Spl. Mem. of the Bengal Legis. Council, 4th Dec. 1875—Furl. from 11th Apl. 1876 to 23rd Oct. 1877—Mem., Board of Rev., 27th Oct. 1877—Furl. from 12th June 1878 to 5th Nov. 1878—Mem., Board of Rev., 9th Nov. 1878—Furl. from 3rd June 1879.

THOMAS EDWARD RAVENSHAW.—Arrd. 13th June 1849—Magt. of Patna, May 1865—Offg. Judge, Birbhum, 10th May 1865—Offg. Commr., Kattak Divn., 23rd June 1865—Magt. of Rangpur, Offg. as Commr. of Kattak Divn., 9th Dec. 1865—Judge, 1st gr., Jessore, Offg. as Commr. of Kattak Divn., 24th Dec. 1866—Commr., Orissa Divn., 1st Feb. 1869—Furl. from 15th Apl. 1869 to 22nd Apl. 1870—Commr., Orissa Divn., 7th May 1870—On spl. duty at the Presy., 14th Apl. 1877—Offg. Mem. of the Board of Rev., 17th Apl. 1877—Commr., Orissa Divn., 12th Dec. 1877—Furl. from 18th Apl. to 19th Dec. 1878—Commr. of the Bardwan Divn., 21st Dec. 1878.

HON. GEORGE GORDON MORRIS.—Arrd. 7th Dec. 1849—Extr. leave from May 1865 to 12th Dec. 1865—Offg. Regr., High Court, Appte. Side, 2nd Jan. 1866—Magt. of Furreedpore, Offg. as Regr., High Court, Appte. Side, 12th Feb. 1866—Offg. Addl. Judge of Jessore, 14th Mar. 1866—Addl. Judge of Jessore, 7th May 1866—Offd. as Addl. Judge of Hooghly, Bardwan, 24 Pergs. and Howrah, 12th Feb. 1867—Offg. Judge of Patna, 21st May 1867—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affas. 30th Sep. 1867—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 30th Dec. 1867—Addl. Judge, Jessore, 16th Feb. 1878—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 14th Mar. 1868—Judge, 1st gr., Backergunge, 1st Feb. 1869—Furl. from 8th May 1870 to 3rd July 1871—Judge, Backergunge, 2nd Aug.

1871—Offg. Judge of the High Court, 30th June 1873—Judge, High Court, 7th July 1874—Furl. from 18th June to 14th Sep. 1877—Judge, High Court, 15th Sep. 1877—Priv. affrs, leave 15th April 1878 to 11th Oct. 1878—Judge, High Court, 12th Oct. 1878.

HON. WILLIAM FRASER McDONELL, v.c.—Arrd. 10th Jan. 1850—Offg. Addl. Judge of 24 Pergus. May 1865—Offg. Judge, Nadia, 13th Sep. 1865—Magt. 1st gr., Chumparun, 14th Nov. 1865—Offg. Judge, Nadia, 1st Mar. 1866—Magt., Jessore, Offg. as Judge, Nadia, 20th Aug. 1866—Judge, 1st gr., Nadia, 10th Mar. 1868—Offg. Judge, Shahabad, 3rd Dec. 1869—Judge, Nadia, 14th Feb. 1870—Furl. from 3rd July 1870 to 3rd Nov. 1871—Judge, Dinagepore, Offg. as Judge, Patna, 21st Nov. 1871—Judge, Chittagong, Offg. as Judge, Patna, 16th Dec. 1871—Judge, Patna, 20th May 1873—Offg. Judge, High Court, 18th Apr. 1874—Judge, Patna, 31st July 1876—Offg. Addl. Judge, High Court, 14th Aug. 1876—Judge, High Court, 5th Aug. 1878.

HENRY MUSPRATT.—Arrd. 5th Apr. 1850—Asst. Magt. East Burdwan, 21st Dec. 1850—Leave on priv. affs. for one and a half months 20th Jan. 1851—Asst. Magt., Burdwan, 13th May 1853—Actg. Collr. of Beerbhoom, 17th June 1854—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Bankoora, 2nd Oct. 1854—Asst. Magt., 1st Dec. 1854—Asst. Supdt. of Rev. Survey, Eastm. Divn., 18th Dec. 1854—Offg. Supdt. of Rev. Survey, Dacca, 10th Feb. 1855—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., and Supdt. of Rev. Survey, Eastm. Divn., 6th July 1855—Offg. Magt. of Moorshedabad, 11th Dec. 1858—Magt. of Moorshedabad, 6th Apr. 1859—Offg. Magt., Pubna, 9th Dec. 1859—Offg. Joint-Mag., Backergunge, 28th Mar. 1860—Confirmed, 26th Apr. 1860—Offg. Magt., Dacca, 11th May 1860—Confirmed, 1st Oct. 1860—Magt., 2nd gr., Bankoora, 1st Dec. 1860—Furl. for 3 years from 11th Sept. 1861—Offg. Magt., Beerbhoom, 8th Nov. 1864—Offg. Magt. and Salt Agent, Balasore, 29th Jan. 1865—Magt., 2nd gr., Balasore, 25th May 1865—1st gr., 9th Dec. 1865—Magt., Hooghly, 8th May 1867—Offg. Addl. Judge of Hooghly, Burdwan, and 24-Pergus. 18th May 1867—Actg. Judge, Dacca, 26th June 1867—Transferred to Mymensingh, 30th Sept. 1867—Magt., Rungpore, Offg. Judge, Mymensingh, 6th Dec. 1867—Furl. from 11th Oct. 1869 to 7th Mar. 1871—Addl. Judge, Chittagong, and Offg. Judge, Rajshahye, 15th Mar. 1871—Secy. to the Board of Rev., Lower Prov. Offg. as Judge, Rajshahye, 1st Aug. 1871—Offg. Judge, Rungpore, 18th Mar. 1872—Transferred to Sylhet, 13th May 1872—Actg. Ses. Judge of Cachar, 29th Apr. 1874—Judge of Sylhet and Ses. Judge of Cachar, 4th Dec. 1874.

JOHN MANGLES LOWIS.—Arrd. 30th Sep. 1850—Offg. Magt., Beerbhoom, May 1865—Supt. of Stamps, Calcutta, Offg. as Magt., Beerbhoom, 7th Sept. 1865—Magt., 2nd gr., Beerbhoom, 18th Oct. 1865—1st gr., Beerbhoom, 23rd Jan. 1866—Offg. Judge, Hooghly, 23rd Aug. 1866—Magt. of Beerbhoom, 21st Dec. 1866—Offg. Judge of Nuddea, 23th June 1868—Offg. Judge, Jessore, 7th Oct. 1868—Offg. Addl., Judge, Jessore, 7th Dec. 1868—Offg. Judge, Dacca, 18th Jan. 1869—Gya, 14th Mar. 1869—Magt. of Noakholly, Offg. as Judge, Gya, 17th Nov. 1869—Furl. from 10th Apr. 1870 to 8th Apr. 1871—Offg. Magt. Howrah, 20th Apr. 1871—Offg. Judge, Bhagulpore, 2nd Mar. 1872—Actg. Addl. Judge, Bhagulpore, 1st Jan. 1873—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 15th Feb. 1873—Judge, 2nd gr., Bankoora, Offg. as Judge, 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 15th Apr. 1873—Judge, 2nd gr., Bhagulpore, Actg. in the 1st gr., 1st Jan. 1874—Judge, 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 7th Apr. 1874—Furl. from 25th Mar. to 19th Nov. 1878—Judge of Bhagulpore, 26th Nov. 1878.

HON. AUGUSTUS RIVERS THOMPSON, c.s.i.—Arrd. 28th Dec. 1850—Offg. Judge, Nuddea, May 1865—Judge, Nuddea, 1st Aug. 1865—Furl. from 24th Feb. 1866 to 10th Feb. 1868—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 12th Feb. 1868—Magt., 2nd gr., Tipperah, Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 1st Apr. 1868—Magt., 1st gr., Offg. as Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 23rd May 1868—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 12th Jan. 1869—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Rev. and Genl. Depts., 14th Sept. 1869—Addl. Judge of Chittagong, Offg. as Secy., 17th Nov. 1869—Judge, Mymensingh, Offg. as Secy., 18th Mar. 1870—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Judl. and Polit. Depts., 29th Nov. 1871—Furl. from 1st Mar. 1872 to 12th Dec. 1873—Offg. Secy. Judl. and Polit. Depts., 29th Nov. 1871—Furl. from 1st Mar. 1872 to 12th Dec. 1873—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 22nd Dec. 1873—Offg. Chief Commr. of Brit. Burmah, 15th Apr. 1875—Chief Commr. of Brit. Burmah, 1st May 1877—Mem. of the Govr.-Genl's. Council, 18th Apr. 1878.

LORD HENRY ULICK BROWNE.—Arrd. 1st Sept. 1851—Offg. Magt. of Nuddea, May 1865—Supt. of Stamps Offg. Magt. of Nuddea, 18th Oct. 1865—Magt., Nuddea, 2nd gr., 30th Oct. 1865—1st gr., Nuddea, 25th Mar. 1866—Offg. Addl. Judge, Jessore and Nuddea, 4th Feb. 1867—Offg. Commr., Chittagong Divn., 12th Dec. 1867—Commr., Chittagong Divn., 10th Dec. 1869—Furl. from 11th Feb. 1871 to 8th Feb. 1872—Chairman of the Justices of the Peace, Calcutta, 23rd Feb.

1872—Commr., Presy. Divn., Offg. as Chairman of the Justices of the Peace, 4th June 1872—Commr., Presy. Divn., 7th Jan. 1873—Commr. of Rajshahy and Kuch Behar Divn., 1th Mar. 1876—Offg. Mem. Board of Rev., 11th June 1878—Commr., Rajshahy and Kuch Behar Divn., 9th Dec. 1878.

HON. SIR ASHLEY EDEN, K.C.S.I. and C.I.E.—Arrd. 29th May 1852—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, May 1865—Mem. of the Council of Lieut.-Govr. of Bengal, 20th Nov. 1866—Medl. leave from 22nd Mar. 1867 to 24th Nov. 1868—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 26th Nov. 1868—Judl. and Pol. Depts., 1st Feb. 1859—Offg. Chief Commr., Brit. Burmah, 24th Mar. 1871—Chief Commr., Brit. Burmah, 13th Apr. 1873—Temp. Addl. Mem. of the Council of the Govr.-Genl. of India, 28th Apr. 1875—Addl. Mem. of the Council of the Govr.-Genl. of India, 21st Oct. 1875—Furl. from 28th Feb. to 13th Dec. 1876—Addl. Mem. of the Council of the Govr.-Genl., 23rd Dec. 1876—Offg. Lieut. Govr. of Bengal, 5th Jan. 1877—Lieut.-Govr. of Bengal, 1st May 1877—On spl. duty, 15th July 1879.—Lieut.-Govr. 1st Dec. 1879.

ROSS LOWIS MANGLES, v.c.—Arrd. 14th July 1853—Offg. magt., Tipperah, May 1865—Magt., Bhagulpore, Offg. Tipperah, 7th Sept. 1865—Magt., Bhagulpore, 14th Dec. 1865—Offg. Junior Secy. to the Board of Rev., 23rd Aug. 1866—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs 9th Jan. 1868—Offg. Junior Secy., Board of Rev., 12th Feb. 1868—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., 6th Nov. 1868—Offg. Junior Secy., Board of Rev., 5th Jan. 1869—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., 7th Mar. 1870—Offg. Commr., Chittagong Divn., 24th Mar. 1870—Offg. Commr., Dacca Divn., 25th June 1870—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., 28th Sept. 1870—Offg. Judl. Commr., of Mysore and Coorg, 5th Apr. 1873—Furl., from 19th Feb. 1873 to 19th Feb. 1874—Addl. Judge of Tirhoot, 7th Mar. 1874—Offg. Judge, Patna, 13th Apr. 1874—Offg. Commr. of Chittagong Divn., 21st May 1874—Offg. Judge of Hooghly, 13th Mar. 1875—Judge, 1st gr., 17th Mar. 1875—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Judl. and Pol. Depts., 25th Mar. 1875—Magt., 1st gr., Offg. as Secy. 28th June 1876—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 17th Apr. 1877—Commr. of the Bhagulpore Divn., Offg. Presy. Divn., 1st May 1877—Commr., Presy. Divn., 29th Apr. 1878—Offg. Mem., Board of Rev., 6th May 1879—Furl. from 19th Sept. 1879.

ARCHDALE VILLIERS PALMER.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1853—Extr. leave from May 1865 to 8th May 1867—Offg. Judge of Midnapore, 17th May 1867—Depp. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, as Judge, Midnapore, 1st June 1867—Offg. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 5th July 1867—Spl. duty in the Pub. Works Dept., 11th Sept. 1867—Magt., 1st gr., on spl. duty in the Pub. Works Dept., 24th Oct. 1867—Magt., Furreedpore, 6th Dec. 1867—Offg. Magt., Monghyr, 5th Jan. 1868—Magt. of Monghyr, 28th Nov. 1868—Suspended from office, 26th Aug. 1869—Magt., Gya, 11th Dec. 1869—Absent without leave from 7th May to 6th June 1870—Magt., Gya, 7th June 1870—1st gr., Gya, 15th Apr. 1873—Magt., Dinagepore, Offg. as Judge, 1st gr., Shahabad, 10th Apr. 1875—Judge 1st grade, 28th June 1876—Shahabad, 10th July 1876—Judge of Purneah, 2nd June 1879.

HORACE ABEL COCKERELL.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1853—Medl. leave from May 1865 to 10th Dec. 1866—On spl. duty in Calcutta, 11th Dec. 1866—Offg. Magt. of Tirhoot, 8th Mar. 1867—Magt., Tirhoot, 8th May 1868—Offg. Commr., Burdwan Divn., 5th Aug. 1868—Magt., Tirhoot, 9th Jan. 1869—Offg. Chairman of the Justices Calcutta and Commr. of Police, 17th Mar. 1869—Offg. Commr., of the Presy. Divn., 7th Sep. 1869—Offg. Magt., 24-Pergs. 20th Dec. 1869—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 20th Feb. 1870—Magt., 24-Pergs. Offg. as Commr. of the Presy. Divn., 11th July 1870—Offg. Commr., Burdwan Divn., 8th Aug. 1870—Magt. of the 24-Pergs. 16th Nov. 1870—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 23rd Apr. 1871—Commr., Chittagong Divn., Offg. as Commr. of the Presy. Divn., 4th June 1872—Offg. Chairman of the Justices Calcutta, and Commr. of Police, 31st Dec. 1872—Commr., Chittagong Divn., 7th Nov. 1873—Furl. from 12th June 1874 to 9th Dec. 1875—Commr., Dacca Divn., 10th Jan. 1876—Burdwan Divn., 3rd Mar. 1876—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Judl. and Pol. Depts., 8th Aug. 1877—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Judl. and Pol. Depts., 9th Apr. 1878—Mem. of the Lieut.-Govr's Council, 16th Apr. 1878.

SKIPWITH HENRY CHURCHILL TAYLER.—Arrd. 2nd Mar. 1853—Furl. from May 1865 to 28th Dec. 1866—Out of employ from 29th Dec. 1866 to 23rd Feb. 1867—Furl. from 24th Feb. 1867 to 15th Feb. 1870—Offg. Judge of Gya, 4th Apr. 1870—Magt., 1st gr., Bankoora, Offg. as Judge of Gya, 31st Mar. 1871—Judge of Beerbhoom, 2nd gr., and also Addl. Judge of Burdwan, 12th Sept. 1872—Judge, 2nd gr., Beerbhoom, 15th Apr. 1873—1st gr., Beerbhoom, 23rd Mar. 1875.

ANTHONY JOHN RICHARDS BAINBRIDGE.—Arrd. 15 Dec. 1854—Offg. Magt. 24-Perg. May 1865—Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. as Magt., 24-Perg. 4th Apl. 1865—Magt., 1st gr., Offg. as Magt., 24-Perg. 7th Sep. 1865—Magt., of Gya, Offg. as Magt., 24-Perg. 8th Nov. 1865—Magt. Burdwan, 2nd Oct. 1866—Services placed at disposal of Govt. of Bengal, Public Works Dept., Railway Branch, 13th Jan. 1867—Magt., Burdwan, 11th Feb. 1867—Offg. Judge, Dinajapore, 27th Nov. 1868—Offg. Judge, Midnapore, 25th Mar. 1869—Magt. Midnapore, Offg. as Judge, Midnapore, 11th May 1871—Magt. Midnapore, 16th Nov. 1871—Furl. from 22nd Apl. to 2nd Nov. 1872—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 4th Nov. 1872—Offg. Judge 1st gr., Moorshedabad, 18th Feb. 1873—Addl. Judge of Jessore and Backergunge in the 2nd gr., Offg. as Judge, 1st gr., Moorshedabad, 15th Apl. 1873—Judge, Moorshedabad, 1st Jan. 1874—Burdwan, 25th Mar. 1874—Judge, 1st gr., 10th May 1875—Moorshedabad, 11th Dec. 1876.

JOHN FREDERICK BROWNE.—Arrd. 22nd Jan. 1856—Supt. of Survey, 2nd Divn., May 1865—Furl. from 10th Feb. 1866 to 8th Feb. 1868—Out of employ from 9th Feb. to 7th Mar. 1868—Offg. Judge, Dinajapore, 8th Mar. 1868—Temply. Addl. Judge of Bhagulpore, 15th May 1868—Offg. Magt. 1st gr., Moorshedabad, 26th Aug. 1868.—Magt. 2nd gr., Sylhet, Offg. as Magt., 1st gr., Moorshedabad, 28th Sep. 1868—Offg. Addl. Judge of Backergunge, 7th Dec. 1868—Offg. Judge, Gya, 4th July 1869—Magt., 1st gr., Backergunge, Offg. as Judge, Gya, 6th July 1869—Offg. Judge, Nuddea, 5th Nov. 1869—Offg. Judge, Chittagong, 8th Mar. 1870—Spl. duty Munipore and Assam, 13th Dec. 1870—Offg. Judge, Bhagulpore, 18th Apl. 1871—Offg. Judge, Cuttack, 4th Nov. 1871—Judge 2nd gr., Cuttack, 1st July 1873—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., Cuttack, 22nd Aug. 1873—Furl. from 16th Mar. 1875 to 8th Dec. 1876—Judge, 2nd gr., Cuttack, but to act as Judge, Gya, 6th Jan. 1877—Judge, 1st gr., 6th Mar. 1877—Offg. Judge, Patna, 7th Apl. 1877—Judge, Patna, 11th Feb. 1879—Offg. Judge, 24-Perg. 3rd Nov. 1879.

GEORGE NELSON BARLOW, c.s.i.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1855—Magt., Pooree, from May 1865—Magt., 1st gr., Pooree, 31st July 1866—Furl. from 16th Oct. 1866 to 15th Oct. 1869—Extr. leave from 16th Oct. to 10th Nov. 1869—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, 8th Dec. 1869—Offg. Commr. of Kuch Behar, 24th June 1872—Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, 6th Oct. 1872—Offg. Commr., Bhagulpore Divn., 19th Jan. 1873—Magt., Monghyr, 1st gr., Offg. as Commr. of the Bhagulpore Divn., 15th Apl. 1873—Commr. of the Bhagulpore Divn., 15th Apl. 1878.

HON. HENRY THOBY PRINSEP.—Arrd. 7th Dec. 1855—Regr., High Court, May 1865—Magt., 1st gr., Bogra, Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 9th May 1866—Offg. Judge of Moorshedabad, 7th Mar. 1867—Offg. Magt., Hooghly, 3rd July 1868—Furl. from 6th July 1868 to 5th July 1870—Magt., Bogra, Offg. Magt., of the 24-Perg. 20th July 1870—Offg. Judge, Patna, 22nd Nov. 1870—Offg. Judge, Hooghly, 2nd Dec. 1871—Magt., Pooree, Offg. as Judge, Hooghly, 24th Feb. 1872—Magt., 24-Perg. Offg. as Judge, Hooghly, 14th Aug. 1872—Judge, 2nd gr., Dacca, Offg. as Judge, Hooghly, 15th Apl. 1873—Judge, Hooghly, 1st Nov. 1873—Offg. Judl. Commr. of Mysore, 17th Mar. 1875—Judge, 1st gr., 25th Sept. 1875—Judge, Hooghly, 22nd July 1876—Offg. Judge, High Court, 14th April 1877—Offg. Judge, 24-Perg. 24th Sept. 1877—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 1st Jan. 1878—Offg. Judge, High Court, 17th Feb. 1878—Judge, High Court, 22nd Aug. 1878.

JOHN PETER GRANT.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1855.—Depy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, May 1865—Magt., 1st gr., 24th Feb. 1867—Magt., Bankoora, 13th Mar. 1867—Offg. Judge, Gya, 2nd May 1867—Purneah, 12th Aug. 1867—Magt., Bankoora, 1st Oct. 1867—Magt., Bankoora, 4th Nov. 1868—Suspended—Out of employ, 21st Feb. 1871—Offg. Jt. Magt., Nuddea, 2nd July 1871—Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1871—Jt. Magt., Moorshedabad, 27th Sept. 1871—Offg. Addl. Judge of Jessore and Backer-gunge, 22nd June 1873—Offg. Judge Chittagong, 3rd Aug. 1873—Judge, Small Cause Court at Kishnaghur, Offg. as Judge, Chittagong, 4th Apl. 1874—Judge, 2nd gr., 17th Mar. 1875—Judge, Runpore, 19th Jan. 1876—Offg. Judge, Mymensingh, 17th Mar. 1876—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 11th Apl. 1876—Offg. Judge, Hooghly, 5th May 1877—Judge, 1st gr., 1st Jan. 1878—Judge, Hooghly, 11th Feb. 1879.

WILLIAM VANSITTART GRAHAM TAYLER.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1855—Jt. Magt. of Tirhoot, May 1865—Offg. Magt., Burdwan, 16th Sept. 1865—Jt. Magt., Burdwan, Offg. 15th Nov. 1865—Magt. of the 2nd gr., Pubna, 23rd Jan. 1866—Magt., 1st gr., 10th Oct. 1866—Furl. from 16th Aug. 1868 to 3rd Aug. 1870—Magt. of Pubna, 20th Aug. 1870—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 13th May 1873—Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1873—Furl.

from 23rd Apr. 1875 to 14th Apr. 1877—Magt., Pubna, 12th May 1877—Offg. Magt., Nuddea, 2nd July 1878—Magt. of Nuddea, 11th Feb. 1879.

HON. SIR STEUART COLVIN BAYLEY, K.C.S.I.—Arrd. 4th Mar. 1855—Junior Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, May 1865—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 9th Oct. 1865—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 24th Dec. 1865—Med. leave from 23rd Feb. to 11th Dec. 1866—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 12th Dec. 1866—Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, Offg. as Jr. Secy., Govt. of Bengal, 5th Feb. 1867—Offg. Judge, Shahabad, 4th May 1867—Magt., Monghyr, 22nd Nov. 1867—Offg. Addl. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 6th Jan. 1868—Magt. 1st grade, Patna, 3rd Dec. 1868—Offg. Judge, Tirhoot, 19th Apr. 1870—Offg. Commr. Chittagong Divn., 29th Jan. 1871—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 10th Apr. 1871—On spl. duty, 29th Nov. 1871—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 24th Jan. 1872—Offg. Commr., Chittagong Divn. 29th Feb. 1872—Offg. Commr., Patna Divn., 16th Mar. 1872—Magt. 1st gr., Patna, Offg. as Commr., Patna Divn., 15th Apr. 1873—Commr., Dacca Divn., Offg. as Commr., Patna Divn., 1st July 1873—Commr., Patna Divn., 30th Sept. 1873—Furlo. from 3rd Sept. 1875 to 10th Oct. 1876—Commr., Patna Divn., 15th Oct. 1876—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 17th Apr. 1877—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 1st May 1877—Addl. Secy. to the Govt. of India, Financial Dept., 8th Aug. 1877—Personal Asst. to His Exly. the Viceroy for fam. affairs, 27th Sept. 1877—Addl. Secy., Govt. of India, Pub. Works Dept., Fam. Branch, 28th Dec. 1877—Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 1st June 1878—Offg. Chief Commr. of Assam, 23rd June 1878—Offg. Lieut. Gov. of Bengal, retaining charge Chief Commr. of Assam, 15th July 1879.—Offg. Chief Commr., Assam, 1st Dec. 1880.

HON. LOFTUS RICHARD TOTTENHAM.—Arrd. 11th July 1856—Furlo. from May 1865 to 1st Nov. 1865—Extra Jt.-Magt., 24-Perg. 15th Nov. 1865—Supdt. of Stationery, 23rd Jan. 1866—Offg. Regr., High Court, 18th May 1866—Regr., High Court, 15th Dec. 1866—Magt., 1st gr., Howrah, 8th July 1867—Furl. from 12th Jan. to 3rd Feb. 1869—Magt. Howrah, 4th Feb. 1869—Offg. Judge, Dinagepore, 31st Mar. 1869—Furlo. from 23rd July 1870 to 22nd Oct. 1871—Offg. Regr., High Court, 6th Nov. 1871—Magt., Beerbhoom, 23rd Jan. 1872—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Perg. and Hooghly, 27th Feb. 1873—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 17th July 1873—Addl. Judge, Backergunge and Jessore, Offg. as Judge, Backergunge, 1st Jan. 1874—Addl. Judge, Chittagong, Dacca, Backergunge and Tipperah, Offg. as Judge, Backergunge, 17th Mar. 1874—Judge 2nd gr., Backergunge, 2nd Apr. 1874—Offg. Judge, Midnapore, 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Judge, 1st grade, 24th Apr. 1875—Midnapore, 16th Feb. 1876—Offg. Judge, 1st grade, 17th Mar. 1876—Furlo. from 16th May 1877 to 8th Jan. 1878—Judge, 1st grade, Midnapore, 23rd Jan. 1878—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 16th Feb. 1878—Offg. Judge, High Court, 8th Apr. 1878—Judge, Nuddea, 3rd Jan. 1879—Offg. Judge, High Court, 18th Apr. 1879—Judge, High Court, 16th July 1879.

EDMOND ELLIOT LOWIS.—Arrd. 1st Feb. 1857—Offg. Magt. Furreedpore, May 1865—Maldah, 15th Apr. 1867—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Western Dooars, acting Magt., Maldah, 21st Oct. 1867—Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, offg. Magt., Maldah, 24th Oct. 1867—Magt., 2nd grade, Maldah, 11th Dec. 1867—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1868—Offg. Judge, Dinagepore, 7th Aug. 1868—Magt., Maldah, 7th Dec. 1868—Furlo. from 1st Mar. 1870 to 26th Nov. 1871—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Dinagepore, 27th Dec. 1871—Magt., 1st gr., 23rd Aug. 1872—Offg. Magt. Bankoora, 18th Dec. 1872—Offg. Judge, Purneh, 1st May 1873—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Dinagepore, 21st Nov. 1873—Magt., 1st gr., 1st Jan. 1874—Commr., Chittagong Divn., 3rd Mar. 1875—Furlo. from 18th Mar. to 26th Dec. 1878—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., 8th Jan. 1879—Offg. Opium Agent, Behar, 27th Jan. 1879.—reverted.

FREDERICK MYTTON HALLIDAY.—Arrd. 30th Oct. 1856—Joint-Magt., 1st gr., Hooghly, May 1865—Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 22nd Dec. 1865—Offg. Magt., Chumparun, 22nd Feb. 1866—Magt., Sarun, 10th Apr. 1866—Med. leave from 15th Apr. 1868 to 13th Apr. 1869—Offg. Magt., Tirhoot, 25th Apr. 1869—Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 26th Mar. 1870—Offg. Magt., Tirhoot, 30th Mar. 1870—Offg. Judge, Tirhoot, 10th Jan. 1871—Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 11th May 1871—Supdt. of Survey, 10th July 1871—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 15th Apr. 1873—Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 13th May 1873—Furl. from 30th Mar. 1874 to 16th Mar. 1875—Magt. of Gya, 29th Mar. 1875—Offg. Opium Agent, Benares, 15th Sep. 1876—Magt. of Gya, 30th Dec. 1876—Offg. Opium Agent, Benares, 25th Apr. 1877—Magt. of Gya, 14th Nov. 1877—Offg. Commr., Patna Divn., 16th Mar. 1878—Commr., Presidy. Divn., continuing to act as Commr., Patna Divn., 29th Apr. 1878—Commr., Patna Divn., 6th June 1878.

WILLIAM MACPHERSON.—Arrd. 30th Nov. 1856—Joint-Magt., Dinagapore, May 1865—Offg. Magt. of Rungpore, 25th Jan. 1866—Joint-Magt., Hooghly, offg. Magt. of Rungpore, 30th Jan. 1866—Joint-Magt., Moorshedabad, Offg. Magt., Rungpore, 9th Apl. 1866—Magt., 2nd gr., Cuttack, 8th Nov. 1866—Offg. Judge, Cuttack, 10th July 1868—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Cuttack, 8th Jan. 1869—Offg. Judge, Cuttack, 2nd May 1870—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 14th June 1870—Ex. leave from 31st Oct. to 1st Dec. 1871—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Cuttack, 2nd Dec. 1871—Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Feb. 1872—Furl. from 3rd Jan. 1873 to 23rd Nov. 1874—Offg. Judge, 2nd gr., Rungpore, 26th Dec. 1874—Offg. Judge, Cuttack, 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 24th Apl. 1875—Judge, 2nd gr., 1st Dec. 1875—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 3rd Apl. 1877—Judge, 2nd gr., 8th Nov. 1877—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 1st Jan. 1878—Judge, 1st gr., 5th Aug. 1878—Judge, Cuttack, 11th Feb. 1879.

WILLIAM CORNELL.—Arrd. 20th Nov. 1856—Offg. Magt., Howrah, May 1865—Extra Joint-Magt., 24-Pergs., 2nd Jan. 1866—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 12th Jan. 1866—Joint-Magt., Sarun, Offg. as Magt. of Howrah, 31st Jan. 1866—Magt., 2nd gr., Cuttack, 1st Mar. 1866—Joint-Magt., Moorshedabad, but to act as Magt., Cuttack, 27th Sept. 1866—Supdt. of Stamps, 25th Jan. 1867—Offg. Judge, Rungpore, 6th Aug. 1868—Furl. from 29th Apl. 1869 to 24th Feb. 1871—Supdt. of Stamps, 26th Mar. 1871—Offg. Judge, Midnapore, 4th Apl. 1871—Offg. Judge, Mymensingh, 2nd July 1871—Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 18th Mar. 1872—Offg. Addl. Judge of Dacca and Chittagong, 2nd Apl. 1872—Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 30th June 1872—Offg. Reagr., High Court, 17th July 1872—Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 24th Sep 1872—Offg. Judge, Bankoora, 3rd Apl. 1873—Judge, 2nd grade, Bankoora, also Addl. Judge, Burdwan, 5th Mar. 1874—Judge, Bankoora, also Addl. Judge, Burdwan, 29th June 1874—Spl. duty, Rungpore, 31st Aug. 1874—Judge, Bankoora, also Addl. Judge of Burdwan, 24th Sep. 1874—Offg. 2nd Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 20th Jan. 1875—Offg. Judge, Hooghly, 20th Mar. 1875—Furl. from 4th Oct. 1875 to 5th Dec. 1876—Judge, Bankoora, also Addl. Judge of Burdwan, 24th Dec. 1876—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 11th May 1877—Judge, 2nd gr., 30th Sep. 1877—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 9th Feb. 1878—Offg. Judge of Midnapore, 14th Mar. 1878—Judge, 1st gr., 9th July 1878—Judge of Midnapore, 11th Feb. 1879.

HERBERT JOHN REYNOLDS.—Arrd. 24th Sep. 1856—Furl. on med. cer. from May to 14th Oct. 1865—Supdt. of Survey, Dacca, 31st Oct. 1865—Joint-Magt., Mymensingh, 5th Dec. 1865—Offg. Magt., Mymensingh, 12th Jan. 1866—Magt., 2nd gr., 24th Feb. 1866—Offg. Magt., Midnapore, 18th Feb. 1868—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1868—Furl. from 9th Nov. 1869 to 8th Nov. 1871—Magt., 2nd gr., Mymensingh, but to officiate in the 1st gr., 14th Dec. 1871—Magt., 1st gr., 14th June 1872—On special duty, 2nd Nov. 1873—Magt., Mymensingh, 12th Dec. 1873—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 15th July 1874—Sec. to the Board of Rev. in the Dept. of Opium, Customs, and Excise, Offg. as Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 2nd Nov. 1874—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 10th Nov. 1874—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Rev. Dept., 14th Dec. 1874—Secy. to the Board of Rev., L.P., Offg. as Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 5th Mar. 1877—Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 15th May 1877—Furl. from 19th Apl. 1878.—Member of G. G.'s. Legisl. Council, 1st Jan. 1880.

HON. ALEXANDER THOMAS MACLEAN.—Arrd. 3rd Mar. 1857—Joint-Magt., 1st gr., 5th May 1865—Joint-Magt. of Chittagong, Offg. Magt. of Rungpore, 1st June 1865—Offg. Magt., Shahabad, 5th Sept. 1865—Joint-Magt., Monghyr, Off as Magt., Shahabad, 19th Dec. 1865—Offg. Magt., Moorshedabad, 19th Mar. 1866—Offg. Magt., Tirhoot, 19th Apl. 1866—Joint-Magt., 31st July 1866—Offg. Magt., Tirhoot, 18th Aug. 1866—Magt., 2nd gr., Pooree, offg. as Magt., Tirhoot, 16th Oct. 1866—Med. leave from 10th Mar. 1867 to 5th Dec. 1868—Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Dec. 1868—Magt., Furreedpore, Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 18th Jan. 1869—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 10th July 1869—Offg. Addl. Judge of Backergunge, 9th Oct. 1869—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 9th Apl. 1870—Magt., Rajshahye, Offg. as Judge, Backergunge, 6th Mar. 1871—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 13th Aug. 1871—Offg. Addl. Judge, Jessore and Backergunge, 11th Dec. 1871—Offg. Judge of Burdwan, 16th Mar. 1872—Judge, 2nd gr., Burdwan, 13th Mar. 1873—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 4th June 1873—Dacca, but to act as Judge, 1st grade, 24-Pergs., 23rd Mar. 1874—Judge, 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1874—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 17th Apl. 1874—Judge, Sylhet, continuing to act as Judge, 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 18th May 1874—Judge, 24-Pergs., Actg. in the 1st gr., 13th Oct. 1874—Furl. from 10th Apl. 1877 to 26th Mar. 1878—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 2nd Apl. 1878—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 6th Apl. 1878—Offg. Judge, High Court, 17th Apl. 1878—Judge, 1st gr., Offg. as Judge, High Court, 12th May 1878—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 15th Oct. 1878—Judge, 24-Pergs., 1st Jan. 1879—Offg. Judge High Court, Nov. 7th 1879.

FREDERICK BARNES PEACOCK.—Arrd. 1st Feb. 1857—Offg. Magt., Monghyr, May 1865—Med. leave from 24th Oct. 1865 to 23rd Oct. 1868—Regr., High Court, 16th Nov. 1868—Offg. Jr. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 18th Mar. 1870—Regr., High Court, 29th Sep. 1870—Offg. Jr. Secy., Board of Rev., 7th Feb. 1871—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev. 23rd Nov. 1871—Offg. Jr. Secy., Board of Rev., 4th Jan. 1872—Regr., High Court, 16th Jan. 1872—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 5th Jan. 1873—Magt., 3rd gr., 24-Pergs., but to act in the 2nd gr., 15th Apl. 1873—Offg., 1st grade, 13th May 1873—Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1873—Offg. Commr., Dacca Divn., 19th Jan. 1875—Commr., Dacca Divn., 14th Apl. 1878—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 17th July 1878—Commr., Dacca Divn., 5th Nov. 1878—Offg. Commr., Presy. Divn., 6th May 1879.

WILLIAM SUTHERLAND WELLS.—Arrd. 12th Feb. 1857—Magt., Bankoora, May 1865—Magt., Rajshahy, 26th May 1866—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1868—Offg. Magt., Bhagulpore, 30th Oct. 1868—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 12th Jan. 1869—Offg. Judge, Chittagong, 8th Feb. 1869—Offg. Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 8th Mar. 1869—Furl. from 17th Mar. 1869 to 10th Mar. 1871—Magt., Furreedpore, Offg. 1st gr., 5th Apl. 1871—Magt., 3rd gr., and Offg. 2nd gr., 15th Apl. 1873—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1873—Magt. and Collr., 1st gr., 30th Sep. 1873—Offg. Magt., 24-Pergs., 15th Feb. 1875—Magt., Shahabad, 13th Dec. 1875—Magt., Shahabad, 15th Nov. 1876—Offg. Commr., Bhagulpore Divn., 7th Sep. 1877—Magt., Shahabad, 9th Nov. 1877—Offg. Commr., Burdwan Divn., 12th Jan. 1878—Offg. Commr., Rajshahy and Cooch Behar Divn., 1st June 1878—Magt. of the 24-Pergs., 19th Dec., 1878.

JOHN BERNEY WORGAN.—Arrd. 16th Dec. 1856—Furl. from 5th May 1865 to 8th Apl. 1866—Joint-Magt., 1st gr., 13th Apl. 1866—Offg. Magt., Purneah, 2nd May 1866—Joint-Magt., Rangpur, offg. as Magt., Purneah, 7th May 1866—Magt., 2nd gr., Purneah, 25th June 1868—Offg., 1st gr., 20th July 1868—Furl. from 6th May 1872 to 30th Apl. 1874—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 13th May 1874—Offg. Judge, Cuttack, 15th Sep. 1874—Magt., Rangpur, offg. as Judge, Cuttack, 20th Oct. 1877—Offg. Judge, Rajshahi, 10th Jan. 1875—Judge, 2nd gr., 24th May 1876—Judge, Dinajepore, 11th Dec. 1876—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 30th Aug. 1877—Judge, 2nd gr., 28th Sept. 1877—Judge, Saran and Chumparun, 1st Jan. 1878—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 5th Jan. 1878—Judge, 2nd gr., 26th Nov. 1878—Offg., 1st gr., 17th Apl. 1879—Judge, Shahabad, 21st July 1879—1st gr., 18th Sep. 1879.

ALEXANDER SMITH.—Arrd. 16th Dec. 1856—Offg. Magt. of Chittagong, May 1865—Magt., 2nd gr., Chittagong, 27th Oct. 1865—Magt., 24-Pergs., 18th Sept. 1866—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1868—Furl. from 3rd Aug. 1870 to 31st July 1872—Senior Supt. of Survey, 11th Aug. 1872—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 1st Oct. 1872—Magt., 3rd gr., 1st July 1873—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 16th Oct. 1873—Magt., 1st gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Commr., Chittagong Divn., 2nd Sep. 1876—Magt., Jessore, 11th Dec. 1876—Offg. Commr., Bardwan Divn., 9th Aug. 1877—Dacca Divn., 20th Jan. 1878—Orissa Divn., and Supt. of Tributary Mehals, Cuttack, 2nd Apl. 1878.

CHARLES THEOPHILUS METCALFE, c.s.i.—Arrd. 30th Oct. 1857—Dy. Commr., Eastn. Dooars, May 1865—Furl. on medl. cert. from 29th May 1865 to 29th Oct. 1866—Offg. Joint-Magt., Monghyr, 12th Nov. 1866—Joint-Magt., Monghyr, 1st Jan. 1867—Offg. Magt., Monghyr, 7th Feb. 1867—Chumparun, 29th Nov. 1867—1st gr., 20th July 1868—Senior Supt. of Survey, offg. as Magt., 1st gr., Chumparun, 7th May 1869—Magt., 2nd gr., Chumparun, offg. in the 1st gr., 6th July 1869—Magt., 1st gr., 1st June 1871—Magt., Bardwan, 29th Sep. 1871—Offg. Commr., Kuch Behar Divn., 20th Mar. 1873—Magt., 1st gr., offg. as Commr., Behar Divn., 16th Oct. 1873—Addl. Commr., Patna Divn., 5th Mar. 1874—Offg. Commr., Patna Divn., 5th Feb. 1875—Magt. of Mozufferpore, acting as Commr., Patna Divn., 27th Mar. 1875—Offg. Insp.-Genl. of Police, 21st Oct. 1876—Offg. Commr. of Police, Calcutta, 14th Nov. 1876—Furl. from 16th Dec. 1878—Offg. Commr. of Patna, 5th Aug. 1879—Magt., Patna, 21st Oct. 1879.

HENRY FITZMAURICE JOHN KEAN.—Arrd. 30th Oct. 1857—Joint-Magt. of Behar, May 1865—Offg. Joint-Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1865—Joint-Magt., 2nd gr., 29th July 1865—Offg. 1st gr., Gya, 24th Oct. 1865—Joint-Magt., 1st gr., Gya, 9th Dec. 1865—Offg. Magt., Gya, 15th Sept. 1866—Dinajepore, 1st Aug. 1867—Offg. Joint-Magt., Moorshedabad, 2nd Apl. 1868—Medl. leave from 15th Apl. 1868 to 6th Feb. 1870—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Gya, 18th Mar. 1870—Joint-Magt., Gya, 7th June 1870—Offg. Magt., Burdwan, 1st Aug. 1870—Medl. leave from 22nd Oct. to 21st Dec. 1870—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 22nd Dec. 1870—Joint-Magt., Bardwan, Offg. Magt. of Bardwan, 30th June 1871—Joint-Magt., Chumparun, offg. as Magt., Chumparun, 14th Sept. 1871—Magt., 2nd gr., Chumparun, 12th Sept. 1872—Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1874—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 15th July 1874—Furl. from 11th Aug. 1874 to 10th Aug. 1876—

Exty. leave from 11th Aug. to 28th Nov. 1876—Joint-Magt., 1st gr., Gya, 5th Jan. 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Chumparun, 13th Mar. 1877—Magt., 1st gr., 26th Apr. 1877—Spl. leave from 13th Sep. to 23rd Nov. 1877—Offg. Magt. of Chumparun, 24th Nov. 1877—Magt., Monghyr, 21st Mar. 1879.

ALBERT CHAMPION MANGLES—Arrd. 8th Apr. 1858—Asst. Magt., Chumparun, May 1865—Offg. Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 7th Sept. 1865—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 22nd Dec. 1865—Offg. Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 17th Feb. 1866—Joint-Magt., 2nd gr., offg. as Joint-Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 7th May 1867—Offg. Magt., Chumparun, 20th Oct. 1867—Offg. Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 1st Dec. 1867—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Tirhoot, 29th July 1868—Offg. Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 1st gr., 9th Jan. 1869—Offg. Magt., Tirhoot, 5th Mar. 1869—Offg. Joint-Magt., Tirhoot, 28th Apr. 1869—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Gya, 24th Aug. 1869—Spl. duty in the Home Dept. of the Govt. of India, as a Mem. of the Cattle Plague Commn., 24th Nov. 1869—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 9th Aug. 1866—Jt.-Magt., Bardwan, Offg. as Magt. Howrah, 15th Sep. 1866—Jt.-Magt., Bard-

wan, 11th Oct. 1866—Offg. Magt., Bardwan, 13th Jan. 1867—Jt.-Magt., Bardwan, 12th Feb. 1867—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., Bardwan, 19th Feb. 1867—On spl. duty, 11th Mar. 1867—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 21st Mar. 1867—Offg. Jr. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 10th Oct. 1868—Offg. Magt., Burdwan, 12th Nov. 1868—On spl. duty, 23rd Dec. 1868—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 26th Apr. 1869—Furl. from 29th Apr. 1869 to 17th Feb. 1871—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 22nd Feb. 1871—Magt., Rangpur, Offg. as Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 1st Aug. 1871—Offg. Jr. Secy., Board of Rev., 25th Nov. 1871—On spl. duty, 5th Jan. 1872—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 10th June 1872—Magt., 4th gr., Midnapore, Offg. in the 2nd gr., 15th Apr. 1873—Magt., 3rd gr., Midnapore, offg. in the 2nd grade, 16th Oct. 1873—Offg. Magt., 1st grade, 1st Jan. 1874—Also Supt. of Survey, 21st Oct. 1876—Secy. to the Board of Rev., Lower Provs., 11th Jan. 1878—Offg. Secy., Govt. of Bengal, Judl. and Pol. Depts., 1st May 1879—Offg. Secy., Govt. of Bengal, Finl. Dept., 3rd May 1879 furl. 1st January 1880.

ROBERT DOUGLAS HIME.—Arrd. 10th Jan. 1861—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Sasseram, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 14th Sept. 1865—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Purneah, Offg. in the 1st gr., 18th Oct. 1865—Medl. leave from 25th Dec. 1865 to 25th Aug. 1867—Jt.-Magt., Chittagong, Offg. Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, 12th Sept. 1867—Offg. Magt., Bhagulpore, 5th Apr. 1868—Offg. Magt., Tipperah, 29th June 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Dec. 1868—Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 3rd Dec. 1869—Offg. Magt., Tipperah, 22nd Feb. 1870—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Apr. 1870—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Aug. 1870—Furl. from 22nd May 1871 to 10th Nov. 1872—Jt.-Magt. 24-Pergs., 20th Nov. 1872—Offg. Cant. Magt. and Judge, Small Cause Court, Dinapore, 23rd Jan. 1873—Offg. Magt., Birbhum, 5th Aug. 1873—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Sep. 1874—Magt., 3rd gr., actg. in the 2nd gr., 15th Mar. 1875—Magt., Birbhum, Offg. in the 2nd gr., 27th Mar. 1875—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 11th Sep. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 28th Oct. 1879—Magt., 2nd gr., 24th May 1876—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 22nd Aug. 1876—Magt., 2nd gr., 15th Nov. 1876—Furl. from 15th Apr. 1877 to 20th May 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Hooghly, 29th May 1878—Magt., Patna, Offg. as Magt., Hooghly, 11th Feb. 1879—Spl. leave from 3rd May 1879—Magt., Durbhunga, 21st Oct. 1879.

JOHN TWEEDIE.—Arrd. 13th Dec. 1860—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Western Dooars, May 1865—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 1st Jan. 1867—Furl. on medl. cert. from 10th July 1867 to 14th Oct. 1868—Jt.-Magt., Nadia, 28th Oct. 1868—Offg. Magt., Pubna, 16th July 1869—Offg. Postmaster-Genl., Bengal, 25th Aug. 1870—Furl. from 19th Mar. 1873 to 19th Feb. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dinajapore relief works, 2nd Mar. 1874—Offg. Judge, Rajshahi, 1st June 1874—2nd Addl. Judge, 24-Perg. and Hooghly, 13th Aug. 1874—Offg. Addl. Judge, Dacca, and Tipperah, 8th Oct. 1874—Offg. Judge, Bankoora, and Addl. Judge, Bardwan, 4th Jan. 1875—Judge of the Small Cause Courts, Krishnaghur, and Meherpore, ag. as Judge, Bankoora, 18th Oct. 1876—Judge of the Small Cause Courts, Krishnaghur, and Meherpore, 6th Jan. 1877—Offg. Judge, Nuddea, 26th Feb. 1877—Judge, Small Cause Courts, Ranaghat and Meherpore, 15th Mar. 1877—Offg. Addl. Jt.-Ses. Judge, Dacca Divn., 20th Apr. 1877—Offg. Judge, Noakholly, 1st May 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge, Rajshahi, 11th July 1877—Judge, 2nd gr., and Addl. Judge, Rajshahi Divn., 31st Aug. 1877—Offg. Judge, Rajshahi, 2nd Jan. 1878—Offg. Judge, Dacca, 14th Apr. 1879—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 2nd May 1879—Judge of Pubna and Bogra, Offg. as Judge, 1st gr., Dacca, 1st July 1879—Furl., 25th July 1879—Judge, Dacca, 14th Oct. 1879.

THOMAS TAYLOR ALLEN.—Arrd. 7th Feb. 1861—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, May 1865—Asst. Magt., Tipperah, 10th June 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 16th July 1865—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. in the 1st gr., 10th Apr. 1866—Offg. Magt., Tipperah, 14th May 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 14th July 1867—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Jessore, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 11th Dec. 1867—Medl. leave from 23rd Jan. 1868 to 20th Nov. 1869—Jt.-Magt., Monghyr, 4th Dec. 1869—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Birbhum, 15th Mar. 1870—Jt.-Magt., Birbhum, Offg. as Magt., Birbhum, 30th June 1871—Jt.-Magt., Birbhum, 23rd Jan. 1872—Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, 24th Mar. 1872—Offg. Judge, 2nd gr., Shahabad, 8th June 1873—Offg. Judge, Patna, 9th July 1873—Offg. Judge, Tipperah, 22nd Aug. 1873—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Perg. and Hooghly, 18th Nov. 1873—Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, 18th Dec. 1873—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs., 23rd Mar. 1874—Offg. Judge, Patna, 6th Aug. 1874—Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, 12th Dec. 1874—Offg. Addl. Judge, Backergunge and Jessore, 3rd Feb. 1875—Judge, 2nd gr., 23rd Mar. 1875—Offg. Judge Jessore, 3rd Apr. 1875—Furl. from 14th Apr. 1876 to 19th Mar. 1878—Offg. Supt. and Remembr. of Legal Affairs, 17th Apr. 1878—Judge of Rajshahi, 28th Oct. 1878.

LUCAS BURNETT BLACKER KING.—Arrd. 11th Oct. 1860—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., in charge of the Survey Operations, Seebaugor, May 1865—Supt. of Survey, Assam, 31st Aug. 1866—Supt. of Survey Rajshahi Divn., 25th Dec. 1867—Furl. from 21st Mar. 1869 to 18th Mar. 1871—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Noakholly, 10th Apl. 1871—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Noakholly, Offg. as Magt., Noakholly, 30th June 1871—Jr. Supt. of Survey, Offg. as Magt., 4th gr., Noakholly, 18th Apl. 1873—Offg. Magt., Maldah, 20th Feb. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr. 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Judge, Rangpur, 13th Mar. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rajshahi 5th Jan. 1877—Furl. from 1st Mar. 1877 to 23rd Sep. 1878—Judge, 2nd gr., Dinagepore, 6th Oct. 1878—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 21st Oct. 1879.

JAMES CRUICKSHANK GEDDES.—Arrd. 25th Sep. 1861—Asst. Supt. of Survey, 3rd Divn., May 1865—Offg. Depy. Commr., Eastern Dooars, 24th June 1865—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., offg. as Depy. Commr., Eastern Dooars, 9th Dec. 1865—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, offg. as Depy. Commr., Eastern Dooars, 31st July 1866—On spl. duty at Cuttack, 23rd Nov. 1866—Offg. Magt. of Chittagong, 9th Dec. 1867—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Magt., Pooree, 7th Jan. 1869—Furl. from 2nd Jan. 1870 to 24th Dec. 1871—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Pooree, 15th Jan. 1872—Jt.-Magt., Pooree, offg. as Magt., Pooree, 18th Jan. 1872—Offg. Judge, Small Cause Court, Seal-dah, 14th June 1873—On spl. duty Famine, 8th Nov. 1873—Offg. Judge, Gya, 18th Apl. 1874—Offg. Addl. Judge, Tirhoot, 2nd July 1874—Offg. Judge, Tirhoot, 26th July 1874—Offg. Judge, Sarun, 25th Jan. 1875—Jt.-Magt., Shahabad, 11th Feb. 1875—Judge, Small Cause Courts of Kishnaghur, and Mcherpore, Offg. as Judge, Shahabad, 18th Apl. 1875—Offg. Judge, Burdwan, 28th July 1875—Offg. Judge, Moorshedabad, 19th Oct. 1875—On spl. duty in Behar, 5th Dec. 1875—On spl. duty in the High Court, 16th Feb. 1876—Offg. Judge, of Moorshedabad, 19th May 1876—Judge, 2nd gr., 18th Oct. 1876—Offg. Judge, Furreedpore, 14th Nov. 1876—Furl. from 21st May 1877 to 14th July 1878—Offg. Judge, Tipperah, 1st Aug. 1878—Judge, Backergunge, ag. as Judge, Tipperah, 11th Feb. 1879—Offg. Judge, Bardwan, 11th May 1879—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs, 21st July 1879.

WILLIAM ERSKINE WARD.—Arrd. 29th Nov. 1861—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 1st Aug. 1862—Ag. Jt.-Magt., Sarun, 3rd Oct. 1864—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 24th Nov. 1864—Asst. Magt. 24-Perg., Sealdah, 17th Apl. 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Bardwan, 15th May 1865—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 15th Nov. 1865—Asst. Magt., Balasore, 11th Apl. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Midnapore, 17th May 1866—Offg. Under-Secy., Home Dept., 13th Dec. 1866—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Bardwan, Offg. as Under-Secy., Home Dept., 19th Feb. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 8th Apl. 1867—Ag. Magt., Birbhum, 15th June 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1868—Ag. Magt., 2nd gr., Bardwan, 22nd Dec. 1868—Ag. Magt., 2nd gr., Howrah, 5th Aug. 1870—Furl. for two years from 1st Mar. 1871 to 8th Feb. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy., Govt. of India, Dept. of Rev., Agriculture, and Commerce, 4th Mar. 1873—Ag. Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 2nd Apl. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1873—Ag. Magt. 2nd gr., Hooghly, 13th July 1873—Ag. Judge, 2nd gr., Dinagepore, 30th Oct. 1873—Ag. Judge, Hooghly, 6th Apl. 1875—Ag. Judge, Rajshahi, 20th Dec. 1875—Ag. Judge, Dinagepore, 9th Feb. 1876—Offg. Judge of Assam Valley Districts, 10th Apl. 1876—Confirmed as Judge of Assam Valley Dists., 15th July 1876.

EDWARD GEORGE GLAZIER.—Arrd. 25th Sept. 1861—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Backergunge, May 1865—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. in the 1st gr., 10th Feb. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., Mymensingh, 4th May 1866—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Nadia, Offg., as Jt.-Magt., Mymensingh, 10th Aug. 1866—Jt.-Magt., Mymensingh, 11th Jan. 1867—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—Furl. from 12th Apl. 1870 to 15th Nov. 1871—Jt.-Magt., Runpore, 12th Dec. 1871—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Rangpur, 18th Feb. 1873—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 13th Mar. 1873—Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., 16th Oct. 1873—Magt., 3rd gr., Ag. in the 2nd gr., 4th Apl. 1876—Magt. 2nd gr., 5th July 1876—Offg., 1st gr., 6th Sep. 1876—Magt., 2nd gr., 16th Nov. 1876—Furl. from 21st Mar. to 15th Nov. 1877—Magt., Dinagepore, 11th Dec. 1877—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 4th Sept. 1878.

CHARLES CECIL STEVENS.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862—Asst. Magt. of Buxar, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Shahabad, 12th Sep. 1866—Asst. Magt., 12th Dec. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Shahabad, 4th Apl. 1867—Asst. Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Apl. 1874—Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 26th Apl. 1875—Magt., 2nd gr., 27th Nov. 1875—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 22nd Aug. 1876—Magt., 2nd gr., 22nd Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 20th Apl. 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., 12th May 1877—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 30th Aug. 1877—Furl. from 7th Aug. 1878.

JAMES CATTRALL PRICE.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Asst. Magt., Pubna, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Chittagong, 24th Dec. 1865—Offg. Magt., Noakholly, 16th Mar. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 25th May 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Mymensingh, 1st Aug. 1867—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Mymensingh, Offg. as Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., 11th Oct. 1867—Offg. Magt., Mymensingh, 6th Jan. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 16th Nov. 1871—Set. Officer, Midnapore, 11th Dec. 1871—In charge of the demarcation work, 25th June 1872—Set. Officer, Midnapore, 13th Nov. 1873—Also Supt. of Survey, 14th Mar. 1876—Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. as Set. Officer, Midnapore, 11th Aug. 1876—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 8th Jan. 1878—Offg. Set. Officer, Midnapore, 25th Mar. 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. as Set. Officer, Midnapore, 1st Apl. 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 14th Aug. 1878—Offg. Magt. and Dy. Collr., 1st gr., Howrah, 22nd Nov. 1878—Magt., Dacca, Offg. as Magt., 1st gr., Howrah, 11th Feb. 1879—Magt., Dacca, Offg. in the 1st gr., 11th Apl. 1879—Offg. Magt., Midnapore, 14th June 1879.

JOHN WARE EDGAR, C.S.I.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862—Asst. Commr., Cachar, May 1865—Offg. Dy. Commr., Cachar, 15th July 1866—Asst. Commr., 15th Dec. 1866—Offg. Dy. Commr., 25th Apl. 1867—3rd gr., 1st Sep. 1868—4th gr., 14th Sep. 1868—3rd gr., 17th Nov. 1868—On spl. duty at Calcutta, 8th Oct. 1869—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Cachar, 23rd Oct. 1869—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Offg. in the 3rd gr., 6th Nov. 1869—On spl. duty, 18th Dec. 1869—On spl. duty in Calcutta, 17th Apl. 1870—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Cachar, 15th July 1870—Depy. Commr., 3rd gr., 13th Apl. 1871—On spl. duty with the Lushai Expedy. Force, 17th Oct. 1871—Offg. Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 14th June 1872—Offg. Dy. Commr., Darjeeling, 21st Mar. 1873—Offg. 2nd gr., 22nd Mar. 1873—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 15th Mar. 1875—Offg. 2nd gr., 5th May 1876—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 23rd Aug. 1876—Offg. 2nd gr., 5th Oct. 1876—Tempy. Dy. Commr., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1877—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., actg. in the 2nd gr., 13th Nov. 1877—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 1st Jan. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., actg. in the 1st gr., Shahabad, 7th Feb. 1878.

HENRY BEVERLEY.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Offg. Depy. Commr., Darjeeling, May 1865—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 3rd July 1865—Offg. Regr.-Genl. of Assurances, 25th Nov. 1865—Offg. Extra Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 24th Jan. 1866—Offg. Regr.-Genl. of Assurances, 16th July 1866—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. as Regr.-Genl. of Assurances, 31st Aug. 1866—Regr.-Genl. of Assurances, 23rd Mar. 1867—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 8th Aug. 1867—Regr.-Genl. of Assurances, 14th Nov. 1867—Priv. affrs. leave from 15th Apl. to 14th Oct. 1868—Regr.-Genl. of Assurances, 17th Oct. 1868—Offg. Jr. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 5th Dec. 1870—Inspr.-Genl. of Regn, 27th Dec. 1870—Spl. duty, 6th Sep. 1872—Furl. from 6th Jan. 1873 to 29th Dec. 1874—Inspr.-Genl. of Regr., 5th Jan. 1875—Offg. Judge, Nadia, 27th Apl. 1875—Inspr.-Genl. of Regr., 25th Feb. 1876—Offg. Inspr.-Genl. of Jails, Lower Provs. 2nd Aug. 1876—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 8th Dec. 1877—Judge, 2nd gr., and Addl. Judge of 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 11th Dec. 1877—Offg. Judge of 24-Pergs., 25th Dec. 1877—Offg. Judge, 1st gr., 1st Jan. 1878—Judge, 2nd gr., 23rd Jan. 1878—Addl. Judge of 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 28th Apl. 1878.

JOHN BOXWELL—Arrd. 31st December 1861—Asst. Magt. Mymensingh, May 1865—Offg. Inspr. of Schools, North-Eastern Divn., 28th July 1865—Passed the higher standard, 17th Jan. 1866—Asst. Magt., Jamalpore, 12th Mar. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt. of Mymensingh, 27th Dec. 1866—Offg. Dy. Commr. of the Western, Dooars, 21st June 1867—Asst. Magt., Sylhet, 10th Dec. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Sylhet 6th Jan. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Pooree, 25th May 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Pooree, 6th Nov. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Pooree, 7th Jan. 1869—Furl. from 28th Mar. 1870 to 4th Apl. 1872—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, in charge of Serampore, Hooghly, offg. as Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24th Apl. 1872—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., offg. in the 1st gr., 18th Apl. 1873—Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., 1st July 1873—Offg. Dy. Commr., 1st gr., Sonthal Pergs., 4th Aug. 1873—Set. Officer, Midnapore, actg. as Depy. Commr., 1st gr., Sonthal Pergs., 6th Mar. 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., actg. as Dy. Commr., 1st gr., Sonthal Pergs., 1st May 1877—Offg. Dy. Commr., 1st gr., Sonthal Pergs., 4th June 1878—Magt. of Noakholly, actg. as Dy. Commr., Sonthal Pergs., 11th Feb. 1879—Furl. from 7th Apl. 1879.

ALFRED CORBYN BRETT.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Asst. Magt. of Monghyr, May 1865—Purneah, 29th May 866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dinagepore, 29th Apl. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 10th June 1867—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, offg. as Jt.-Magt., Dinagepore, 5th Oct. 1867—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, 8th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 21st Mar. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, 10th July 1868—Asst. Magt., Monghyr, offg. as Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 3rd Feb. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 8th May 1869—Offg. Magt. of Bhagulpore, 31st Aug. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 1st Oct. 1869—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 15th Nov. 1869—Furl. from 1st May 1870 to 13th Apl. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, 29th Apl. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dinagepore, 15th Oct. 1872—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Actg. in the 1st gr., 28th Dec. 1874—Offg. Magt., Rangpur, 5th Feb. 1875—Offg. Judge, Mymensingh, 25th Apl. 1875—Offg. Judge, Furreedpore, 11th Aug. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 14th Feb. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 12th Mar. 1877—Furl. from 7th May 1877 to 10th May 1878—Offg. Judge, Shahabad, 14th May 1878—Judge, 2nd gr., 8th June 1878—Offg. Judge of Hooghly, 7th Aug. 1878—Offg. Judge of Jessore, 23rd Nov. 1878—Judge of Jessore, 11th Feb. 1879.

DAVID ROBERT LYALL.—Arrd. 25th Sep. 1861—Asst. Magt., Dacca, May 1865—Passed the higher standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 5th Apl. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dacca, 7th May 1867—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 31st July 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dacca, 24th Nov. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 1st July 1868—Asst. Magt. of Tipperah, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., 1st grade, Tipperah, 7th July 1869—Offg. Magt., 2d gr., Tipperah, 7th Sep. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 9th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Dacca, Offg. as Magt., 2nd gr., Dacca, 8th Dec. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 24th Feb. 1870—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Dacca, 26th Feb. 1870—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. as Magt., 2nd gr., Dacca, 12th Sep. 1872—Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., 15th Apl. 1873—4th gr., 1st July 1873—3rd gr., 5th Aug. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt 3rd gr., 10th Oct. 1873—Magt., 3rd gr., Dacca, Offg. in the 2nd gr., 8th Apl. 1876—Magt., 2nd grade, 15th May 1877—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 6th Aug. 1877—Offg. Commr., Dacca Divn., 21st Mar. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Apl. 1878—Offg. 1st gr., 22nd Apl. 1878—Offg. Comr., Dacca Divn., 15th July 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 5th Nov. 1878—Magt. Howrah, Offg. as Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 11th Feb. 1879—Furl. from 25th Apl. 1879.

JAMES ANDERSON.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1861—Asst. Magt., Chumparun, May 1865—Tipperah, 27th Dec. 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Rangpur, 27th Nov. 1866—Offg. Magt., Rangpur, 29th Dec. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Rangpur, 24th Jan. 1868—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 22nd May, 1868—Priv. affrs. leave from 25th May to 24th Nov. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2d gr., 25th Nov. 1868—Bhagulpore, 4th Dec. 1868—Jungipore, 4th Jan. 1869—Moorshedabad, 17th Apl. 1869—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Moorshedabad, 31st Mar. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Moorshedabad, 10th Apl. 1870—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Maldah, 21st May 1870—Asst. Magt., Maldah, on spl duty Wahabi case, 21st June 1870—Furl. from 31st Aug. 1870 to 30th Aug. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 1st Oct. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt. of the 1st gr., Sylhet, 9th Oct. 1872—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 13th May 1873—Furl. on medl. cert., from 23rd Sep. to 30th Dec. 1873—Jt.-Magt., Cox's Bazar, Chittagong, 6th Jan. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr. Chittagong Hill Tracts, 27th Apl. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., 2nd gr., 26th June 1876—Offg. in the 3rd gr., 5th Aug. 1876—Temply. Dy. Commr. of the 4th gr., 7th Apl. 1877—Furl. from 13th July 1877 to 19th Nov. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., Furreedpore, 5th Dec. 1878—Offg. Magt., Bankoora, 19th Mar. 1879—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Apl. 1879.

JAMES O'KINEALY.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Jessore, May 1865—Asst. Magt., Jessore, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., Jessore, 29th Jan. 1866—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Jessore, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 23rd Feb. 1867—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr. Maldah, 7th Aug. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Patna, 24th Dec. 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Mymensingh, 3rd July 1869—Spl. duty at the Presy., 28th Apl. 1870—Furl. from 30th Sep. 1871 to 21st Sep. 1873—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs., 1st. Oct. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs. 16th Oct. 1873—Addl. Judge, Bhagulpore, 26th Sep. 1874—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs, 7th Oct. 1874—Addl. Judge, Howrah, 23rd Nov. 1874—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs., 9th Dec. 1874—Addl. Ses. Judge, 24-Perg. 16th Dec. 1874—Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs., 31st Dec. 1874—Judge, 2d gr., Offg. Remembr. of Legal Affrs, 10th May 1875—Offg. 2nd Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 7th Sep. 1876—Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs., Hooghly, 9th Sep. 1876—Offg. Judge, 24-Pergs., 13th July 1877—Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 24th Sep. 1877—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 3rd Dec. 1877—Remembr. of Legal affrs, Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 1st Jan. 1878—Offg. Judge, 24-Pergs. 27th Apl., 1878—Remembr. of Legal Affrs, 1st Jan. 1879.

FREDERICK WYER.—Arrd. 31st Dec. 1861—Asst. Magt., Purneah, May 1865—Passed the higher standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Purneah, 2nd Mar. 1867—Asst. Magt., Kissengunge sub-divn., 15th Apr. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Mag., Purneah, 12th Feb. 1868, 1st gr., 1st July 1868—Furl. from 28th Mar. 1870 to 6th Dec. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Mag., 1st gr., Purneah, 21st Dec. 1871—Jt.-Magt., 2d gr., Offg. 1st gr., 14th Mar. 1873—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Maldah, 16th Aug. 1873—3rd gr., 30th Sep. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 4th Nov. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st Apr. 1874—Offg. Mag., Maldah, 14th May 1874—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Magt., Furreed-pore, 6th Mar. 1875—Furl. from 16th Mar. 1876 to 12th Aug. 1877—Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., Bogra, 29th Aug. 1877—Magt., 3rd gr., Bogra, Offg. as Mag., 2nd gr., 19th Dec. 1877—Offg. Mag., 1st gr., 23rd Dec. 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. in the 1st gr., 9th Mar. 1878—Offg. Magt. of Bardwan, 3rd May 1879.

ROBERT HENRY WILSON.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Chittagong, 5th Apr. 1866—Passed the higher standard 21st May 1866—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 11th Sep. 1866—Offg. Mag., Chittagong, 4th Oct. 1867—Regr. Behar Dt., 24th Dec. 1867—Regr., Presy. Dt., 1st July 1870—Offg. Regr.-Genl. of Assurs., 7th Sep. 1870—Offg. Marriage Regr., Calcutta, also Regr.-Genl. of Assurs., 5th Dec. 1870—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Ben., 27th Dec. 1870—Inspr. of Regtn. Offices, 8th July 1872—Offg. Inspr.-Genl. of Regtn., 6th Sep. 1872—Furl. from 27th Oct. 1873 to 20th Oct. 1875—Offg. Magt., 24-Pergs., 4th Nov. 1875—Offg., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1876—Magt., 3rd gr., Ag. in the 2nd gr., 5th July 1876—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 4th July 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. as Secy., Board of Rev., 19th Dec. 1877—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 11th Feb. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., Midnapore, Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 25th Mar. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Jan. 1879—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 11th Apr. 1879—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., 24th May 1879.

JOHN ARTHUR HOPKINS.—Arrd. 14th Oct. 1861—Asst. Magt., Behar, 1865—Asst. Commr., Manbhoom, June 1865—Asst. Magt., Raneegunge, 5th Feb. 1866—Passed the higher standard 23rd Dec. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—1st gr., Nadia, 4th Aug. 1868—Asst. Magt., Nadia, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 28th Oct. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Magoorah in Jessore, 9th Dec. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Hooghly, 15th Apr. 1869—2nd gr., Serampore, Hooghly, 15th May 1869—1st gr., Midnapore, 2nd Mar. 1871—Asst. Magt., Bardwan, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., at Midnapore, 30th June 1870—Asst. Magt., Cuttack, Offg. as Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Nov. 1871—Asst. Magt., Midnapore, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 11th Dec. 1871—Offg. Dist. Supt. of Police, 1st gr., Midnapore, 28th Mar. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 6th Apr. 1872—Inspr. of Schools, Western Circle, Hooghly, 25th Dec. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Hooghly, 17th Sep. 1874—Inspr. of Schools, Western Circle, 3rd Nov. 1874—Offg. Magt. of Bankoora, temply. in charge of the office of Inspr. of Schools, Western Circle, 16th Apr. 1875—Offg. Inspr.-Genl. of Regtn., 18th July 1875—Inspr. of Schools, Western Circle, 2nd Mar. 1876—Furl. from 10th Apr. 1876 to 29th Jan. 1878—Magt., 3rd gr., Offg., 2nd gr., Purneah, 4th Mar. 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 29th Mar. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. in the 1st gr., 1st May 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Dec. 1878—Magt. of Purneah, 11th Feb. 1879—Offg. 1st gr., 29th Apr. 1879.

THOMAS SMITH.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Asst. Commr. Manbhoom, May 1865—Western Dooars, 14th Aug. 1865—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Cooch Behar, 1st Jan. 1867—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 1st Sep. 1868—Gowalpara, 22nd Sep. 1868—Furl. from 3rd Apr. 1870 to 1st Feb. 1872—Dy. Commr., Cooch Behar, 24th Feb. 1872—Offg. Dy. Commr. 3rd gr., 4th Apr. 1873—Offg. Judge, Dinagepore, 2nd Apr. 1875—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 9th Feb. 1876—Offg. Judge, Dinagepore, 10th Feb. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Hazaribagh, 2nd Jan. 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 19th Jan. 1877—Temply. Dy. Commr. 3rd gr., Offg., Judge, Chittagong, 7th Apr. 1877—Midnapore, 11th May 1877—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Offg. Judge, Midnapore, 13th Nov. 1877—Judge, Tipperah, 11th Dec. 1877—Judge, 2nd gr., 1st Jan. 1878—Offg. Judge, Midnapore, 9th Feb. 1878—Furl. from 25th Mar. 1878 to 12th Feb. 1879—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 28th Feb. 1879.

CHARLES FORTESQUE WORSLEY.—Arrd. 25th Sep. 1861—Asst. Magt., Sarun, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Patna, 21st May 1866—1st gr., 1st July 1868—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. 1st gr., 12th Aug. 1868—Spl. Asst. Commr., Patna, 24th Dec. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Patna, 1st Jan. 1870—2nd gr., Chumparun 1st May 1870—Patna, 7th Aug. 1870—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Tirhoot, 10th Jan. 1871—Jt.-Magt., Patna, Offg. Magt., Patna, 30th June 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Patna, 10th July 1871—Offg. Cantonment Magt., and Judge, Small Cause Court, Dinapore, 20th Sep. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Patna, 19th Nov. 1871—Offg. Mag., Sarun, 22nd Oct. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt.,

Patna Divn. 22nd Nov. 1872—Offg. Magt., 4th gr., Patna, 17th June 1873—Offg. Jt. Magt., Patna, 18th Aug. 1873—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 23rd Sep. 1873—Offg. Jt. Magt., Patna, 26th Oct. 1873—Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th Nov. 1873—On spl. fam. duty in Tirhoot, 1st Dec. 1873—Offg. Magt., Tirhoot, 13th Mar. 1874—Offg. Mag., 2nd gr., 6th Apr. 1874—Mag., 3rd gr., Ag. as 2nd gr., 23rd May 1876—Magt., Mozufferpore, 3rd June 1877—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 7th Oct. 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. in the 1st gr., 29th Apr. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., 4th June 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 2nd July 1878—2nd gr., 20th Dec. 1878—Offg., 1st gr., 2nd May 1879.

PERCIVAL DEBNAM DICKENS.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Asst. Magt., Contai in Midnapore, May 1865—24-Pergs, 14th June 1865—Baraset, 11th Apr. 1866—Passed the higher standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 16th July 1866—On spl. duty, Fam. Commn., 10th Dec. 1866—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 19th May 1867—Offg. Re-gr. Genl. of Assurs., Calcutta, 9th Aug. 1867—Re-gr., Presy. dist., 1st Nov. 1867—Offg. Re-gr. Genl. of Assurs., 20th Apr. 1868—Offg. Under-Secy. Bengal, 17th Oct. 1868—Offg. Conservr. of Forests, 15th Feb. 1869—Re-gr. of the Presy. dist., 25th May 1869—Furl. from 8th July 1870 to 18th Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt., Nadia, in charge of the sub-divn. of Kooshtea, Offg. as Jt.-Mag., 1st gr., 4th Nov. 1872—Offg. Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 7th July 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2d gr., Offg. as Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 16th Aug. 1873—Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 2nd Apr. 1874—Also Judge of the Marine Court, 13th Feb. 1877—Offg. Chief Magt. for Calcutta, 2nd Apr. 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs., 13th July 1877—Offg. Chief Magt. for Calcutta, 1st Oct. 1877—Judge of the Court of Small Causes, Krishnaghur, and Meherpore; Offg. Judge, Cuttack, 5th Jan. 1878—Offg. Judge, Nadia, 22nd Apr. 1878—Judge, 2d gr., 9th July 1878—Judge, Dacca, 16th Jan. 1879—Offg. Judge, Nadia, 17th Apr. 1879.

JOHN JAMES LIVESAY.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1861—Asst. Magt., Pooree, May 1865—Khoordah, 18th Feb. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 11th June 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 17th Apr. 1869—Furl. from 5th Feb. 1870 to 4th Feb. 1873—Asst. Magt., Balasore, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th Mar. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Maldah, for employment on relief duty, 16th Mar. 1874—1st gr., 14th May 1874—Purneah, 9th Oct. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2d gr., offg. 1st gr., 10th May 1875—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 19th Aug. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Purneah, 2nd Dec. 1875—Offg. Dy. Com. Lohardugga, 9th May 1876—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 27th Aug. 1876—Rangpur, 8th Mar. 1877—Magt., 3rd gr., 26th Apr. 1877—Offg. 2nd gr., 29th July 1877—Offg. 1st gr., 8th Jan. 1878—Offg. 2nd gr., 7th Feb. 1878—Offg. 1st gr., 21st Mar. 1878—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., offg. 1st gr., 7th Oct. 1878—Magt., 2nd gr., 14th Nov. 1878—Magt., Rangpur, 11th Feb. 1879—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 3rd May 1879.

ARTHUR WEEKES.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862—Asst. Commr., Manbhoom, May 1865—Leave on priv. affrs. from 3rd Feb. to 26th July 1866—Asst. Commr., Manbhoom, 9th Aug. 1866—Offg. Dy. Commr., Hazaribagh, 9th Oct. 1866—Asst. Commr., 7th Dec. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Sarun, 10th May 1867—Offg. Asst. Commr., Darjeeling, offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 4th Nov. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 7th Mar. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2d gr., 6th Dec. 1871—Furl. from 12th Feb. 1872 to 1st Jan. 1874—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 8th Jan. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Chumparun, on relief duty, 31st Jan. 1874—Offg., 1st gr., 23rd Mar. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., offg. 1st gr., 4th May 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 11th Sep. 1874—Bardwan, 21st Nov. 1874—Offg. Magt., Hooghly, 12th Feb. 1875—2nd gr., 9th Apr. 1875—Rajshahy, 10th Nov. 1875—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 10th Dec. 1875—Hooghly, 22nd Jan. 1876—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 2d gr., 8th Mar. 1876—On famine relief duty at Madras, 17th Feb. 1877—Magt., 3rd gr., Maldah, offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Chumparun, 1st Mar. 1879—Magt., 2d gr., 4th Mar. 1879—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 19th May 1879—Magt., 2nd gr., 20th June 1879.

ROGER HENRY PAWSEY.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Asst. Magt., Bongong, May—1865 Passed the higher standard, 6th Jan. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Hooghly, 3rd Aug. 1866—Balasore, 7th Feb. 1867—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Balasore, 25th July 1868—Chittagong, 2nd Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dacca, 17th Aug. 1869—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 15th June 1870—Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 28th June 1870—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Mymensingh, 31st Jan. 1871—Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 14th Dec. 1871—Furl. from 26th Feb. 1872 to 4th Oct. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Mymensingh, 26th Oct. 1873—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Mymensingh, 2d Nov. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 12th Dec. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 6th Apr. 1874—Offg. Mag., Mymensingh, 1st July 1874—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Spl. leave from 16th May to 23rd Oct. 1877—Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., Mymensingh, 1st Nov. 1877—2d gr., 21st Jan. 1878—Magt., 3d gr., Offg. 2d gr., 15th Apr. 1878—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 14th Aug. 1878—2nd gr., 5th Nov. 1878—Offg. Magt., Sarun, 7th Feb. 1879—Kattak, 20th Nov. 1879.

CHARLES ARTHUR KELLY.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1861—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Chittagong, May 1865—Furl. on medl. cert. from 15th Nov. 1865 to 14th Feb. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Moorshedabad, 28th Feb. 1867—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. 1st gr., 25th June 1868—Offg. Magt., 28th July 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 26th Aug. 1868—Offg. Insp. of Schools, Central Divn., 10th May 1869—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 6th Mar. 1870—Furl. from 26th Apr. 1871 to 10th Jan. 1873—Offg. Judge, Small Cause Court, Sealdah, 21st Jan. 1873—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 2nd July 1873—Offg. Judge, Rangpur, 30th May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rangpur, 26th Dec. 1874—Offg. Judge, Rangpur, 11th Jan. 1875—Judge, Small Cause Court, Bhagulpore, 7th Jan. 1876—Spl. leave from 27th Mar. to 26th Sep. 1876—Offg. Judge, Rangpur, 11th Oct. 1876—Judge, Small Cause Court, Bhagulpore, 10th Dec. 1876—Offg. Judge, Jessore, 12th Apr. 1877—Bankoora, and Addl. Judge, Bardwan, 27th Nov. 1878—Furl. from 27th Jan. to 24th Sep. 1879.

HENRY JAMES NEWBERY.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861—Asst. Magt., Behar, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Asst. Magt., Sasseeram, Shahabad, 5th Apr. 1867—Gya, 4th Dec. 1869—the Shergotty sub-divn., Gya district, 1st Mar. 1870—Passed the higher standard 26th Apr. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Gya, 11th May 1870—2nd gr., Gya, 25th June 1870—Furl. from 18th Mar. 1871 to 14th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., Bhulloah, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2d gr. 14th Dec. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 17th Mar. 1873—1st gr., Bhagulpore, 16th May 1873—Monghyr, 4th Aug. 1873—2d gr., 2nd Mar. 1874—Offg. Magt., Monghyr, 20th May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, 20th July 1874—Offg. Magt., Patna, 23rd Aug. 1874—Offg. Magt. of Purneah, 2d Oct. 1874—Asst. Magt., Monghyr Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 5th Dec. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., ag. 1st gr., 15th July 1876—Offg. Magt., Hooghly, 8th Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 22nd Aug. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 14th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 23rd Nov. 1876—2nd gr., 27th Mar. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., ag. Magt., Chittagong, 1st Apr. 1877—On spl. duty at Calcutta, 2nd Aug. 1877—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Rhagulpore, 22nd Aug. 1877—Magt. 3rd gr., ag. 2nd gr., 14th Apr. 1878—Magt., Bhagulpore, 11th Feb. 1879, 2nd gr., 20th Oct. 1879.

REGINALD PORCH.—Arrd. 29th Nov. 1861—Asst. Magt., Nadia, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Moorshedabad, 16th Oct. 1866—Med. leave from 10th Jan. 1867 to 12th Sep. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 23rd Sep. 1868—Asst. Magt., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Backergunge, Jan. 1869—Offg. Magt., Mymensingh, 24th Mar. 1869—Asst. Magt., Offg. Jt.-Magt., Mymensingh, 3rd July 1869—Spl. leave from 24th Apr. to 22nd Oct. 1870—Asst. Magt., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 3rd Nov. 1870—Offg. Magt., Bardwan, 2nd gr., 3rd Dec. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., 22nd Dec. 1870—Offg. Magt., Bankoora, 21st Feb. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Bankoora, 21st Nov. 1871—Burdwan, 24th Feb. 1872—Furl. from 15th Mar. 1872 to 1st Oct. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Birbhum, 11th Oct. 1873—Jt.-Magt., Pubna, 26th Oct. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st Nov. 1873—Jt.-Magt., Rangpur, 18th Mar. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 4th May 1874—Offg. Magt., Noakholly, 20th Nov. 1874—2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. 3rd gr., 1st Feb., 1878—Offg. Magt. of Maldah, 26th May 1878.

WILLIAM WILSON HUNTER, C.I.E.—Arrd. 10th Nov. 1862—Asst. Magt., Birbhum, May 1865—Asst. Magt. Nadia, 8th July 1865—Asst. Magt., on deputation for compiling history of Birbhum, 14th Mar. 1866—Offg. Insp. of Schools, South-Western Divn., 17th May 1866—Passed the higher standard, 21st May 1866—Med. leave from 10th Nov. 1867 to 7th Dec. 1868—Offg. Supt. of Stamps 21st Dec. 1868—Compiler of Bengal Gazeteers in the Home Dept., 28th July 1869—Compiler of Gazetteers of India, 11th Jan. 1871—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 16th Feb. 1871—Director-Genl. of Statistics, 8th Sept. 1871—Spl. leave from 27th Mar. to 12th Dec. 1872—Director-Genl. of Statistics, 13th Dec. 1872—Director-Genl. of Gazetteers, 1st Nov. 1874—On spl. duty to England for the purpose of compiling the Imperial Gazetteers, 29th Mar. to 17th Dec. 1875, and from 27th Mar. to 15th Dec. 1876—Dir.-Genl. of Gazetteers, 16th Dec. 1876—On spl. duty in England, 26th Mar. 1877, as Dir.-Genl. of Statistics, 31st May 1878.
