ALEXANDER MACKENZIE.—Arrd. 11th Dec. 1862—Asst. Magt., Koosi tea, May 1865—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergunnahs, 1st July 1865—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 23rd Feb. 1866—Under-Secy. 9th Oct. 1866—Offg. Jr. Secy. 10th Oct. 1868—Offg. Secy. 19th July 1869—Offg. Jr. Secy., 14th Sept. 1869—Furl. from 1st Mar. to 17th Nov. 1871—Jr. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal 24th Nov. 1871—Offg. Secy., 14th June 1872—Jr. Secy., 1st Mar. 1873—Offg. Secy., 13th Aug. 1873—Jr. Secy., 13th Nov. 1873—Furl. from 20th May 1874 to 13th Nov. 1875—Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., Lower Provs., 25th Nov. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Moorshedabad, 18th Apr. 1876—Magt.,

3rd gr., Offg. in the 2nd gr., 24th May 1876—Magt., 2nd gr., 5th July 1876—In charge of the Office of the Agent Govr.-Genl., Moorshedabad, 3rd Sep. 1876—Offg. Magt., Moorshedabad, 30th Oct. 1876—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 3rd Mar. 1877—Offg. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, Genl. and Rev. Depts., 4th July 1877—Secy. to the Govt., Finl. Dept., 3rd Oct. 1877—Offg. Secy., Genl. and Rev. Depts., 16th Apl. 1878.

ARTHUR LLOYD CLAY.—Arrd. 29th Nov. 1862—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, May 1865—Moonshigunge sub-divn. of the Dacca Dist., 12th May 1865—Passed the higher standard 7th July 1865—Offg. Jt. Magt., Dacca, 10th Apl. 1866—Offg. Magt., Dacca, 5th Apl. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt. Dacca, 31st July 1867—Chittagong, 5th Dec. 1867—Offg. Depy. Commr., 3rd gr., Manbhum, 17th June 1868—Offg. Magt., 2d gr., Chittagong, 1st Apl. 1871—Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Chittagong, 1st Jan. 1874—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Apl. 1874—Dy. Commr. 1st gr. in Assam, Sylhet, 18th Sep. 1874—Assumed charge of the Sylhet dist., 9th Nov. 1874—Offg. Judge of Sylhet, 24th Mar. 1877—Judge Sylhet, 5th Apl. 1877—Furl. from 13th July 1877 to 7th July 1879—Dy. Commr., 1st gr., Manbhum, 21st July 1879.

THOMAS NORMAN.—Arrd. 21st Jan. 1863—Asst. Magt., Pubna, May 1865—24-Pergs, 4th July 1865—Meherpore, Nadia, Nov. 1865—Passed the higher standard, 6th Jan. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt. Hooghly, 25th Feb. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Rajshahi, 4th Feb. 1868—1st gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 26th Aug. 1868—Asst. Magt., Rajshahi, Offg. Jt.-Magt. 30th Jan. 1869—Offg. Magt. Rajshahi, 19th Mar. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt. of Rajshahi, 23rd Aug. 1869—Offg. Magt. of Rangpur, 6th Apl. 1870—Bogra, 1st Aug. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Midnapore, 11th Oct. 1870—Furl. from 1st Apl. 1871 to 11th Apl. 1873—Asst. Magt., Cuttack, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 30th Apl. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2d gr., Offg. in the 1st gr., 13th May 1873—Offg. Magt., Poorree, 17th May 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Poorree, 30th May 1873—Offg. Magt., Balasore, 3rd Aug. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. Magt., Balasore, 14th Apl. 1874—Offg. Magt. 2d gr., 20th Apl. 1875—Mag. 3rd gr., Offg. 2d gr., 1st May 1878—Magt. Balasore, 11th Feb. 1879.

FREDERICK HUBERT McLAUGHLIN.—Arrd. 21st Jan. 1863—Asst. Magt., Sarun, May 1865—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 23rd May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Magt., Sewan in Sarun, 6th June 1866—Medl. leave from 10th Sept. 1866 to 26th Sept. 1866—Asst. Magt., Howrah, 9th Oct. 1868—Chooadunga in Nadia, 8th Dec. 1868—Nadia, 1st Aug. 1869—Mymensing, 10th Sept. 1869—Passed the higher standard, 25th Feb. 1870—Asst. Magt. of Tipperah, 25th Apl. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Tipperah, 14th Feb. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Dec. 1871—Asst. Magt., Jessore, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Jessore, 17th Mar. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th Apl. 1872—Offg. 2nd gr., 20th Nov. 1872—Furl. from 2nd Apl. 1873 to 9th Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 28th Nov. 1874—Offg. Magt. of Moorshedabad, 29th June 1875—Priv. affs. leave from 22nd July to 10th Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Moorshedabad, 1st gr., 15th Dec. 1875—Offg. Judge of Jessore, 12th Apl. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Jessore, 20th Sept. 1876—Offg. 1st gr., Tipperah, 16th Nov. 1876—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Tipperah, 24th Jan. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 26th Apl. 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge of Chittagong, 1st May 1877—Offg. Judge Noakholly, 27th June 1877—Judge, Noakholly, 16th Apl. 1879.

GEORGE EDWARD PORTER.—Arrd. 11th Dec. 1862—Asst. Magt., Raneegungee, May 1865—Inspr. of Schools, North-Eastern Circle, 16th Feb. 1866—III class, Bengal Educt. Service, 7th Sept. 1866—Passed the higher standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Inspr. of Schools, North-Eastern Div., 13th Aug. 1867—Asst. Magt., Rangpur, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th Nov. 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Rangpur, 2nd July 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Rangpur, 6th Apl. 1870—Furl. from 25th Mar. 1871 to 22nd Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Baraset, 24-Pergs., 17th Dec. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Patna (on famine duty), 11th May 1874—Offg. Dy. Commr., Ward's Estate, Patna, 19th May 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. Dy. Commr., Ward's Estate, 1st Sep. 1874—Dy. Commr., Ward's Estate, 28th Dec. 1874—Offg. Magt., Sarun, 2nd Apl. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr. 19th Apl., 1875—Offg. Judge, Sarun and Chumparun, 19th June 1876—Jt.-Magt., Sarun, 19th Sep. 1876—Shahabad, 24th Oct. 1876—Furl. from 23rd Apl. 1877 to 21st Oct. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Patna, 29th Oct. 1878—Judge, 2nd gr., Noakholly, Offg. at Gya, 9th Apl. 1879 to Mymensing, 19th Sept. 1879.

FREDERICK WILLIAM JOSEPH REES.—Arrd. 11th Jan. 1863—Asst. Magt. of Sylhet, May 1865—Passed the higher standard, 6th Jan. 1866—Asst. Magt. in charge of the Baraset Divn., 24-Pergs., 15th Aug. 1866—Offg. extra Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 11th Apl. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Supt. of Stamps, 28th July 1869—

Furl. from 30th Sep. 1871 to 25th Sep. 1873—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., Offg. Jt.-Mag., 24-Pergs., 30th Sep. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. 1st gr., 9th Oct. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 28th Feb. 1874—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 29th Apl. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 13th May 1874—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 14th Jan. 1875—Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 15th Feb. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Pubna, 9th Apl. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Maldah, 15th May 1877—Moorshedabad, 18th Apl. 1878—Mag., 3rd gr., Ag. 2nd gr., 29th Apl. 1878—Furl. from 22nd Mar. 1879.

WILLIAM MCKINLEY CLAY.—Arrd. 28th Oct. 1862—Asst. Magt., Purneah, May 1865—Asst. Commr., Bhootan Dooars, 24th Oct. 1865—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Commr., Western Dooars, 13th Aug. 1867—Fallacotta sub-divn., 18th Dec. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 11th May 1869—Asst. Magt., Jessore, 29th July 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1870—1st gr., 24-Pergs., 16th Apl. 1870—2nd gr., 6th Oct. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. Asst. Commr. of Darjeeling, 31st Oct. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Rangpur, 1st gr., 7th Mar. 1871—Asst. Mag., Rangpur, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 30th June 1871—Offg. Mag., 2nd gr., Bogra, 1st Sep. 1871—Furl. from 18th Nov. 1871 to 14th Nov. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., on famine duty in the Rajshahi divn., 29th Nov. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st Dec. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Nattore sub-divn. in Rajshahi, 10th July 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Rajshahi, 7th Aprl. 1875—Offg. Mag., Rajshahi, 7th Oct. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 10th Nov. 1875—Offg. Dy. Commr. of Ward's Estate, Patna, 21st June 1876—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. Dy. Commr. of Ward's Estate, Patna, 2nd Apl. 1877—Furl. from 9th Apl. to 28th Nov. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rangpur, 25th Dec. 1877—Offg. Mag., 2nd gr., Backergunge, 20th Mar. 1878—Offg. Magt., Pubna, 17th Aug. 1878—Magt., 3rd gr., Chumparun, Ag., 2nd gr., Pubna, 4th Mar. 1879.

EBENEZER JOHNSTONE BARTON.—Arrd. 10th Nov. 1862—Asst. Mag., Cuttack, May 1865—Khoorda sub-divn., Pooree, Oct. 1865—Passed the higher standard, 6th Jan. 1866—Offg. Mag., Cuttack, 2nd Feb. 1866—Asst. Mag., Pooree, 1st Mar. 1866—Offg. Jt.-Mag., Pooree, 19th Jan. 1867—24-Pergs., 14th June 1868—1st gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Hooghly, 28th July 1868—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 28th Dec. 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Pubna, 15th May 1869—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 21st July 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Jessore, 27th Sep. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 11th Dec. 1869—Offg. Magt., 24-Pergs., 19th Feb. 1870—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 27th Mar. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 12th Apl. 1871—Offg. Supt. of Stamps, 27th Sep. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 30th Oct. 1871—Furl. from 7th Nov. 1871 to 4th Nov. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr. (on famine duty, Rajshahi divn.), 13th Nov. 1873—On spl. famine duty, Bhagulpore divn., 1st Dec. 1873—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 26th May 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. Mag., Bogra, 14th July 1874—Offg. Magt., Backergunge, 3rd Nov. 1874—2nd gr., 16th Apl. 1875—3rd gr., 13th Dec. 1875—Offg. 2nd gr., 20th June 1876—Offg. Magt. and Collr. of Gya, 21st June 1878.

ROBERT MASON TOWERS.—Arrd. 21st Jan. 1863—Asst. Magt., Nadia, May 1865—Passed the higher standard, 21st May 1866—Offg. Judge of the Court of Small Causes, Kishnaghur, 1st July 1867—Offg. Judge of the Court of Small Causes at Howrah, 10th Aug. 1871—Furl. from 26th Apl. 1872 to 20th Apl. 1874—Offg. Judge, Patna, 29th Apl. 1874—Judge, Small Cause Court, Sealdah, Offg. Judge, Patna, 1st May 1874—Offg., Chittagong, 2nd Aug. 1874—Judge, Small Cause Court, Sealdah, 13th Nov. 1874—Judge, Small Cause Court, Bhagulpore and Monghyr, 19th Dec. 1874—Addl. Judge of Chittagong, 14th Jan. 1876—Offg. Judge of Nadia, 8th Apl. 1877—Dacca, 14th Nov. 1877—Offg. Judl. Commr., Chota Nagpore, 8th Jan. 1878—Judge of the Prin. Courts of Small Causes in Nadia and Jessore, Ag. Judl. Commr. of Chota Nagpore, 4th Feb. 1879—Judge, 2nd gr., Tipperah, Offg. Judl. Commr., 27th July 1879.

EDWARD VESEY WESTMACOTT.—Arrd. 8th Jan. 1863—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, May 1865—Asst. Commr., Cachar, 1st July 1865—Hazaribagh, 27th Feb. 1866—Passed the higher standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Commr. of Manbroom, 16th June 1866—In charge of the sub-divn. of Govindpore, 25th Mar. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Mag., Dinagepore, 19th Feb. 1868—Offg., 1st gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Dinagepore, 6th June 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dinagepore, 6th July 1869—Offg. Mag., 2nd gr., Dinagepore, 5th Mar. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 9th May 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dinagepore, 31st Oct. 1871—Furl. from 14th Oct. 1872 to 15th Jan. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rajshahi divn., on famine relief duty at Dinagepore, 21st Jan. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. 1st gr., on famine duty, 6th Apl. 1874—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 10th Jan. 1875—Dinagepore, 12th Feb. 1875—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. Magt., 3rd gr., Dinagepore, 15th Mar. 1875—Offg. Mag., 2nd gr., 12th Apl. 1875—3rd gr., 29th Nov. 1875—2nd gr., 8th Aug. 1876—3rd gr., 15th Nov. 1876—2nd gr., 8th Mar. 1877—Furl. from 9th Jan. 1878.

GEORGE MAINWARING CURRIE.—Arrd. 28th Oct. 1862—Asst. Mag., Purneah, May 1865—Pooree, 12th June 1866—Passed the lower standard, 23rd Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Cuttack, 28th Jan. 1868—Jajpore in Cuttack, Mar. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Feb. 1872—Furl. from 2nd Apl. 1872 to 29th Dec. 1873—Asst. Magt., Monghyr, 8th Jan. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 9th May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Begooserai in Monghyr, 11th Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 13th Apl. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dacca, 8th Nov. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Mag., 2nd gr., 15th Dec. 1875—1st gr., 24th Feb. 1876—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 7th Aug. 1877—Offg., 2nd gr., 14th Aug. 1877—Offg. 3rd gr., 15th Oct. 1877—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 19th Aug. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Chumparun, 19th Dec. 1878—Asst. Magt., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Chumparun, 21st Oct. 1879.

FRANCIS WILLIAM RICE COWLEY.—Arrd. 2nd Dec. 1863—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, May 1865—Passed the higher standard, 21st May 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tirhoot, 9th Sep. 1867—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 9th Oct. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tirhoot, 2nd Nov. 1867—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 1st Dec. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Nadia, 12th Mar. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Chittagong, 2nd June 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Mar. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st Apl. 1871—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Tipperah, 9th May 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Tipperah, 20th Jan. 1872—Services placed at the displ. of the Pub. Works Dept. from 17th Mar. 1873—Dy. Commr., Wards' Estate, Patna, 17th June 1875—Furl. from 30th June 1876 to 17th Jan. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Shahabad, 1st Feb. 1878—Offg. Judge of Bhagulpore, 17th Mar. 1878—Jt.-Mag., Purneah, 5th Dec. 1878—Offg. Judge of Purneah, 20th Apl. 1879.

FREDERICK WILLIAM VOYSEY PETERSON.—Arrd. 17th Dec. 1863—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 1st May 1865—Tirhoot, 23rd May 1865—Passed the higher standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Sylhet, 1st June 1868—1st gr., 1st July 1868—Offg. Magt., 17th Oct. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 17th Dec. 1868—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 10th Feb. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 5th Apl. 1869—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 27th Oct. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st Jan. 1870—Furl. from 1st Oct. 1872 to 26th Sep. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Jessore, 8th Oct. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. in 1st gr., 7th Dec. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 23rd Mar. 1875—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Howrah, 17th Apl. 1875—Jessore, 3rd gr., 9th Aug. 1875—2nd gr., 19th Aug. 1875—Jt.-Magt., Jessore, 9th Nov. 1875—Temply Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Julpigoree, 15th Apl. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., 2nd gr., 23rd Nov. 1876—Temply Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 23rd Jan. 1877—Offg. Judge, Furreedpore, 10th May 1877—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Offg. Judge, Furreedpore, 10th Dec. 1877—Dy. Commr. of Singbhoom, Ag. Judge, Furreedpore, 11th Feb. 1879.

WILLIAM HENRY GRIMLEY.—Arrd. 12th Dec. 1863—Asst. Magt. and Dy. Regr., Bhagulpore, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 6th June 1865—Passed the higher standard, 21st May 1866—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, 14th July 1866—Asst. Magt., 12th Sept. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Hooghly, 5th Mar. 1868—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1868—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 19th Jan. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 27th Jan. 1869—Offg. Supt. of Dearah Surveys in the Rajshahi divn., 27th Feb. 1869—Offg. Jr. Supt. of Survey, 7th May 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Hooghly, 26th Jan. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 12th Feb. 1870—1st gr., 15th Feb. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Hooghly, 5th June 1870—Moorshedabad, 23rd June 1870—Offg. Insp. of School, South-Eastern Divn., 8th Aug. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr. Backergunge, 18th July 1871—Offg. Magt., Backergunge, 23rd July 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24th Nov. 1871—Furl. from 22nd Jan. 1872 to 12th Jan. 1874—On spl. duty connected with Native Civil Service, 15th Jan. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr. (continuing on spl. duty), 6th Apl. 1874—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., Miscellaneous Dept., 18th Apl. 1874—Land Rev. Dept., 25th Apl. 1874—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., Miscellaneous Dept., 30th Apl. 1874—On spl. duty, 15th Dec. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Secy., Board of Rev., 15th July 1876—Jr. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 3rd Oct. 1877—Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. Jr. Secy., to the Board of Rev., 18th Mar. 1879—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 1st May 1879—Furl. from 26th May 1879.

DANIEL WALTER McMULLEN TESTRO.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1863—Asst. Magt., Bogra, May 1865—Dinagepore, 18th Jan. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Serajgunge in Pubna, 9th July 1868—Asst. Magt., Meherpore, Nadia, 1st Aug. 1869—Nadia, Jan. 1870—Cuttack, 21st May 1870—Khoordah, Pooree, 11th June 1870—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, 28th Nov. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, 30th Oct. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Backergunge, 9th Apl. 1872—Furl. from 14th Aug. 1872 to 10th Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt., Bankoora, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 5th Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Mag., Burdwan, 13th Feb. 1875—Offg. Magt., Gya, 6th Sept. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Gya, 30th Dec. 1876

—Offg. Magt., 13th Apl. 1877—2nd gr., 13th July 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 14th Nov. 1877—Offg. Magt., 23rd Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 4th Feb. 1878—Offg. Magt., 7th Mar. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. Magt., 3rd gr., 8th June 1878—Jt.-Magt., Rangpur, 16th Oct. 1878—Furl. from 11th Mar. 1879.

HERBERT MOSLEY.—Arrd. 12th Dec. 1863—Assst. Magt., Chumparun, May 1865—Shahabad, 31st Aug. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Mudhoobani, in Tirhoot, 3rd July 1868—Mymensingh, 23rd Sept. 1871—Passed the higher standard, 30th July 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 27th Nov. 1872—Chittagong, 18th Dec. 1872—Furl. from 10th Apl. 1873 to 12th Mar. 1874—Asst. Magt., Patna Divn., Tirhoot (on famine duty), 15th Mar. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 18th Apl. 1874—Jt.-Magt. of Mudhoobani, Tirhoot, 16th Oct. 1874—1st grade, 20th Oct. 1874—Patna, 23rd Dec. 1874—Offg. Magt., Patna, 13th Apl. 1875—2nd gr., 11th May 1875—3rd gr., 15th June 1875—2nd gr., 29th June 1875—3rd gr., 10th July 1875—2nd gr., 29th Aug. 1875—2nd gr., Shahabad, 26th Oct. 1875—3rd gr., 19th Nov. 1875—Jt. Magt., Setamarhi Divn., Mozufferpore dist., 21st Dec. 1875—Offg. Magt., Maldah, 20th Mar. 1876—2nd gr., 22nd Aug. 1876—3rd gr., 16th Nov. 1876—2nd gr., 20th Apl. 1877—Furl. from 30th May 1877 to 22nd Dec. 1878—Jt.-Magt., Durbhunga, 7th Jan. 1879—Offg. Magt., Moorshedabad, 15th Mar. 1879—2nd gr., 21st Mar. 1879.

THOMAS EDWARD COXHEAD.—Arrd. 11th Jan. 1864—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, May 1865—Nadia, 13th June 1866—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1876—In charge of the sub-divn., Magoorah, Jessore, 14th Apl. 1868—Asst. Magt., Meherpore, in Nadia, 3rd Dec. 1868—Sarun, 16th Aug. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Sarun, 25th June 1870—Gya, 7th Mar. 1871—Asst. Magt., Gya, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 14th Dec. 1871—Furl. from 8th Apl. 1872 to 4th Apl. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 10th Apl. 1874—On famine duty at Tirhoot, 14th Apl. 1874—Asst. Magt., Purneah, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 16th Jan. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dinagepore, 23rd Mar. 1875—Rangpur, 5th July 1875—Offg. Polit. Agent, Hill Tipperah, 26th Feb. 1876—Offg. Magt., Tipperah, 22nd Aug. 1876—Offg. Polit. Agent, Hill Tipperah, 17th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 7th May 1877—Furreedpore, 4th Dec. 1877, 2nd gr., 31st Dec. 1877—Offg. Dy. Commr., Sonthal Pergs., 2nd Mar. 1878—Furl. from 21st June 1878.

WILLIAM MEARNS SOUTTAR.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1863—Asst. Magt., Jessore, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 6th Jan. 1866—In charge of the sub-divn., Magoorah, 10th Apl. 1866—Asst. Magt., Naida, 19th May 1866—In charge of the sub-divn., Nurrail, Jessore, 12th July 1866—In charge of the sub-divn. Magoorah, 12th Nov. 1866—In charge of the sub-divn. Nurrail, Jessore, 19th Jan. 1867—In charge of sub-divn. Magoorah, 28th Feb. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 10th June 1867—Offg. Regr. of the Presy. Divn. 20th Apl. 1868—Offg. Supt. of Stamps and Stationary, 28th July 1868—Offg. Regr. of the Presy. Divn. 21st Dec. 1868—Extra Jt.-Magt. 24-Pergs., 25th May 1869—Asst. Magt., Patna, offg. as Jt.-Magt., Patna, 7th June 1869—Offg. Cant. Magt., Dinapore, 5th Oct. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs. 12th Jan. 1870—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 29th Mar. 1870—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 26th Apl. 1870—Offg. Regr. High Court, Appl. side, 6th Feb. 1871—Offg. Under-Secy., Home Dept., 17th Jan. 1872—Also Collr. of Calcutta, 17th Mar. 1872—Offg. Collr. of Stamps and Supt. of Rev. in Calcutta, 24-Pergs., Hooghly, 19th Mar. 1872—Offg. Regr. High Court, Appl. side, 4th Jan. 1873—Regr. High Court, Appl. side 15th Apl. 1873—Furl. on M. C. from 5th Dec. 1873 to 4th Dec. 1874—Regr. High Court, Appl. side, 12th Dec. 1874—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Bhagulpore, 4th May 1877—24-Pergs. 1st July 1877—Commr. of Police, Calcutta, and Chairman of the Corporation of Calcutta; 10th Nov. 1878.

EDWARD HARDCASTLE RUDDOCK.—Arrd. 2nd Dec. 1863—Asst. Magt., Rungpore, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Magt., Chumparun, 6th July 1866—Durbhunga in Tirhoot, 14th May 1868—Passed the higher standard, 29th June 1870—Asst. Magt., Patna, 2nd Sep. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 18th Sep. 1871—Asst. Magt., 18th Nov. 1871—Tirhoot, 21st Jan. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Burdwan, 19th Mar. 1872—1st gr., 25th June 1873—2nd gr., 15th Dec. 1873—1st gr., 1st June 1874—Furl. from 1st Nov. 1874 to 27th Jan. 1877—Asst. Magt., Rajshahi, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th Feb. 1877—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Chittagong Hill Tracts, 26th June 1877—Asst. Magt., Rajshahi, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Mar. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. 1st gr. 29th Apl. 1878—Offg. Magt., Pubna, 28th July 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rajshahi, 26th Aug. 1878—Offg. Magt., Maldah, 17th Sep. 1878—2nd gr., 20th Sep. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 13th Dec. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Pubna, 28th Dec. 1878—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 17th Jan. 1879—2nd gr., 28th Mar. 1879.

CHARLES CAMPBELL QUINN.—Arrd. 8th Jan. 1864—Asst. Magt., Nadia, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 7th Feb. 1866—Asst. Magt., 24-Perg., 19th Apl. 1866—Nadia, July 1866—Passed the higher standard, 23rd Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt. in charge sub-divn. of Serampore, 30th Mar. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Jessore, 2nd Aug. 1868—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 17th Mar. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 27th Mar. 1870—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 24th Nov. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th Jan. 1872—Furl. from 22nd Apl. 1872 to 13th Oct. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Hooghly, 3rd Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt., Rajshahi, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 21st Dec. 1874—Jt.-Mag., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1875—Offg. Magt., Rajshahi, 7th Mar. 1875—Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, Ag. Magt., 3rd gr., 9th Apl. 1875—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., Rajshahi, 10th May 1875—Offg. Magt., Moorshedabad, 21st July 1875—24-Pergs., 3rd Oct. 1875—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 4th Dec. 1875—Offg. Magt., Durbhunga, 2nd Sep. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 13th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 17th Feb. 1877—2nd gr., Durbhunga, 25th May 1878—Furl. from 14th Apl. 1879.

CHARLES FREDERICK MAGRATH.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1863—Asst. Magt., Bardwan, May 1865—Furl. on M. C. from 4th Oct. 1866 to 25th Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Bardwan, 4th Dec. 1868—Patna, 22nd Dec. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Dec. 1868—Asst. Magt. in charge of the sub-divn. Shergotty, 11th May 1869—in charge of the sub-divn. of Hazipore, Tirhoot, 12th Aug. 1869—Insp. of Regtn. Offices in Bengal, 8th Sept. 1871—Offg. Insp. of Regtn. Offices, 6th Sept. 1872—Offg. Insp.-Genl. of Regtn., 11th Oct. 1873—Offg. Insp. of Regtn. Offices, 20th Oct. 1873—in charge of sub-divn. Madhubani, Tirhoot, on famine duty, 16th Feb. 1874—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 20th Nov. 1874—Jt.-Magt. 2nd gr., Offg. Magt. Bogra, 1st Apl. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., Bogra, 24th May 1876—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Sept. 1876—3rd gr., 22nd Nov. 1876 3rd Bogra, 12th Dec. 1876—2nd gr., 13th Apl. 1877—3rd gr., Monghyr, 26th May 1877—2nd gr., 1st July 1877—Furl. from 31st Mar. 1879.

WILLIAM HENRY VERNER.—Arrd. 2nd Dec. 1863—Asst. Commr., Western Dooars, May 1865—Sick leave from 22nd June to 17th Sept. 1865—Asst. Commr., Bhootan, 18th Sept. 1865—Asst. Magt., Midnapore, 11th Dec. 1865—Passed the lower standard, 19th Jan. 1867—Asst. Magt., Offg. Asst. Secy. Board of Rev., 25th Feb. 1867—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 16th Apl. 1867—Bussirhat, 2nd June 1867—Alipore, 17th June 1867—Raneegunge, 10th July 1867—Sealdah, 16th Aug. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 23rd Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Sealdah, Offg. Jt.-Magt. 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., Rajshahi, 28th Aug. 1868—2nd gr., 30th Jan. 1869—1st gr. 11th Apl. 1869—Asst. Magt., and Dy. Collr., 24-Pergs., Offg. extra Jt.-Magt., 9th August 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 4th July 1870—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 4th Feb. 1871—Spl. duty, 23rd Apl. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 24-Pergs. 13th June 1871—Offg. Postmaster-Genl., Bengal, 20th Aug. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 24-Pergs., 20th Oct. 1871—Offg. 1st gr., 31st Oct. 1871—Offg. Postmaster-Genl., Bengal, 16th Aug. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 17th Sep. 1872—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag., 1st gr., 11th Sep. 1874—Offg. Postmaster-Genl., Bengal, 3rd Aug. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 11th Nov. 1875—Furl. from 27th May 1876 to 31st Oct. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 5th Nov. 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 25th Dec. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Apl. 1878—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 4th Apl. 1878—Addl. Judge, Backergunge, 14th May 1878—Offg. Addl. Judge, Nadia, 23rd July 1878—Offg. Judge, Backergunge, 7th Nov. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 11th Mar. 1879—Offg. Addl. Judge, 24-Pergs. and Hooghly, 3rd May 1879.

TOWNSEND MOLLOY KIRKWOOD.—Arrd. 2nd Dec. 1863—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Magt., Cuttaek, 29th June 1866—Passed the higher standard, 10th June 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Cuttaek, 1st Apl. 1868—1st gr., 1st July 1868—Spl. Asst. Commr., Cuttaek, 4th Jan. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 8th Jan. 1869—1st gr., 23rd Apl. 1869—Services placed at the disp. of the Govt. of Bengal, Pub. Works Dept., 12th Oct. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Cuttaek, 31st Oct. 1872—Furl. from 1st Mar. 1872 to 26th Feb. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Bhagulpore, on famine duty, Offg., 1st gr., 2nd Mar. 1874—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 12th Feb. 1875—2nd gr., 11th Sep. 1875—3rd gr., 11th Nov. 1875—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., 8th Apl. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 9th Aug. 1876—1st gr., Jessore, 26th Aug. 1876—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 6th Aug. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 19th Aug. 1877—Offg. Judge Furreedpore, 14th Jan. 1878—Bankoora, 13th Mar. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Moorshedabad, 27th Apl. 1878—Offg. Judge, Jessore, 8th Oct. 1878—Jt.-Magt., Moorshedabad, 8th Dec. 1878—Offg. Judge, Mozufferpore, 2nd May 1879.

GODFREY JOHN BECTIVE TUITE DALTON.—Arrd. 12th Jan. 1864—Asst. Commr., Chota Nagpore, 22nd May 1865—in charge of the sub-divn. of Gobindpore, in Man-

bhoom, 6th Mar. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Asst. Commr., Lohardugga, 26th Feb. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 1st June 1868—Offg. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 1st Aug. 1868—Asst. Magt., Monghyr, 9th Dec. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th Apl. 1869—1st gr., Monghyr, 19th Mar. 1870—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, Offg. as Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Nov. 1871—Furl. from 30th Mar. 1872 to 21st Jan. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 30th Jan. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 8th Apl. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., Cooch Behar, 4th gr., 10th Apl. 1876—3rd gr., 26th June 1876—4th gr., 23rd Aug. 1876—3rd gr., 5th Oct. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. Dy. Commr., Cooch Behar, 3rd gr., 19th Dec. 1877—Offg. Dy. Commr., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1878—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., offg. 2nd gr., 16th Apl. 1878—Cooch Behar, 11th Feb. 1879—2nd gr., 24th Mar. 1879.

ORMISTON GALLOWAY REID McWILLIAM.—Arrd. 22nd Nov. 1863—Student, Calcutta, from 23rd Nov. 1863—Qualified for the pub. service, 1st July 1864—Asst. Magt., Tipperah, 4th Jan. 1865—Justice of the Peace, 16th Aug. 1866—Temply. placed in charge of the Jamalpore sub-divn., 30th Nov. 1866—In charge of Serajgunge sub-divn., 2nd May 1867—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Cachar, 22nd Mar. 1868—Offg. 1st gr., 1st Sep. 1868—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 8th July 1869—Asst. Commr., 1st gr., 6th Nov. 1869—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 18th Dec. 1869—Asst. Commr., 1st gr., 15th July, 1870—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 10th Dec. 1870—Asst. Commr., 1st gr., 21st Mar. 1871—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., and Pol. Agent, Naga Hills, in charge of the dist. of Cachar, 13th Apl. 1871—Offg. Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Cachar, 30th Jan. 1874—2nd gr., 1st Nov. 1874—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., 15th Dec. 1874—Furl. from 24th Apl. 1876 to 24th Mar. 1878.

HENRY SNEYD BEADON.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1863—Asst. Magt., Birbhum, May 1865—24-Pergs., 15th Jan. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Commr., Darjeeling, 13th June 1866—Also Sub-Regr. of Assurs. of the sub-dist., Darjeeling—Asst. Magt., Nadia, 30th Oct. 1866—Passed the higher standard, 23rd Dec. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 24-Pergs., 20th July 1868—Offg. 2nd gr., 28th Dec. 1868—Offg. Extra Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 3rd Feb. 1869—Offg. Under-Secy. Bengal, 25th Feb. 1869—Offg. Priv. Secy. to the Lt.-Govr. of Bengal, 25th Mar. 1871—Priv. Secy. to the Lt.-Govr. of Bengal, 1st Aug. 1871—Furl. from 22nd Apl. 1872—Under-Secy. Bengal, 7th Jan. 1873—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., 19th Feb. 1873—Offg. Dy. Commr., Hazaribagh, 1st Apl. 1873—2nd gr., 27th Jan. 1874—Offg. Sr. Supt. of Survey, 27th Feb. 1875—1st Insp. of Regtn. Offices, Offg. Sr. Supt. of Survey, 17th July 1876—Offg. Magt., Birbhum, 21st Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 7th Sep. 1876—Offg. Sr. Supt. of Survey, 22nd Sep. 1876—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Oct. 1876—Offg. Sr. Supt. of Survey, 16th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Cuttack, 23rd May 1877—Insp. Genl. of Regtn., Ag. Magt., Cuttack, 2nd gr., 1st Jan. 1878—Furl. from 8th Mar. 1879.

FRANCIS JOHNSTON GRAHAM CAMPBELL.—Arrd. 20th Jan. 1864—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, May 1865—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Asst. Magt., Jamalpore, 18th May 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Sylhet, 28th Oct. 1868—Asst. Magt., Sylhet, 17th Dec. 1868—Kishengunge, Purneah, 6th June 1869—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1870—Asst. Magt., Soopool in Bhagulpore, 30th Nov. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Feb. 1871—1st gr., Monghyr, 22nd May 1871—2nd gr., Jamooi, 1st Aug. 1871—Offg. 1st gr., 23rd Jan. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt. Monghyr, 28th Nov. 1873—1st gr., Jamooi, 15th Jan. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 9th Aug. 1875—Offg. 1st gr., Patna, 22nd Dec. 1875—1st gr., Bettiah, Chumparun, 20th Feb. 1876—1st gr., Chupra, 2nd June 1876—1st gr., in charge Sewan divn., in Sarun, 20th Mar. 1877—Temply. in charge of the Gopalgunge Divn., 1st Apl. 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 17th July 1877—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., offg. Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 8th Jan. 1878—Furl. from 7th Mar. 1878 to 7th Apl. 1879—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dinagepore, 26th Apl. 1879—Offg. Judge, Rangpur, 2nd May 1879.

ROBERT FULTON RAMPINI.—Arrd. 28th Nov. 1864—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 26th July 1865—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Magt., Balasore, 21st June 1866—Bhudruck, 11th Jan. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 10th June 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Balasore, 5th Aug. 1868—Asst. Magt., Dacca, offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 15th Feb. 1870—Offg. Insp. of Schools, Eastern Divn., 10th Sep. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 2nd Dec. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., offg. 1st gr., 14th July 1874—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 1st Nov. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 20th Nov. 1874—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 3rd Feb. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 15th Mar. 1875—Asst. Jt.-Ses. Judge, Darjeeling, Julpigoree, and Cooch Behar, 9th July 1875—Jt.-Ses. Judge, Darjeeling and Julpigoree, 10th Sep. 1875—Offg.

Judge, Dinagepore, 14th Aug. 1876—Jt.-Ses. Judge, Darjeeling and Julpigoree, 4th Dec., 1876—Furl. from 9th Feb. 1877 to 3rd Feb. 1879—Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 5th Mar. 1879.

JOHN REVANS HALLETT.—Arrd. 17th Oct. 1864—Asst. Magt., Bardwan, May 1865—Bankoora, 13th Dec. 1865—Passed the lower standard, 21st May 1866—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 16th June 1866—In charge of the Sub-divn. Bood-Bood, Bardwan, 28th Jan. 1867—In charge of the Cutwa divn., Bardwan dist., 18th May 1867—Passed the higher standard, 23rd Dec. 1867—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—In charge of the Sub-divn. Raneegunge, 30th July 1868—Asst. Magt., Midnapore, 29th July 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 17th Dec. 1869—1st gr., 11th Mar. 1870—Inspr. of Schools, South-Western Divn., 16th Aug. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Balasore, 16th Nov. 1870—Asst. Magt., Balasore, Offg. Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., 30th June 1871—Asst. Magt., Jessore, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Mar. 1873—Furl. from 11th Aug. 1874 to 5th Feb. 1876—Offg. Judge of the Small Cause Courts, Bhagulpore and Monghyr, 2nd Mar. 1876—2nd Inspr. of Regtn. Offices, Offg. Judge of the Small Cause Courts, 6th Mar. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Doomka, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Dec. 1876—Offg. Judge, Gya, 6th Apl. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bardwan, 19th Nov. 1877—Offg. Addl. Judge, Rajshahi, Divn., 1st Dec. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Ag. addl. Judge in the Rajshahi Divn., 16th Apl. 1878—Offg. Judge, Rajshahi, 11th Sep. 1878—Offg. Addl. Judge, Rajshahi Divn., 28th Oct. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rajshahy, 12th Nov. 1878—Offg. Judge, Furreedpore, 2nd May 1879.

HAILTON WINKUP GORDON.—Arrd. 12th Nov. 1864—Asst. Magt., Rajshahi, 6th Jan. 1866—Medl. leave from 9th Aug. 1866 to 24th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Patna, 15th Jan. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Barh sub-divn., Patna, 24th June 1868—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1870—Tirhoot, 13th Apl. 1872—Offg. Inspr. of Schools, South-Western Divn., 11th July 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Tirhoot, 21st Oct. 1872—1st gr., 25th June 1873—2nd gr., 21st Jan. 1874—Furl. from 6th May 1874 to 20th Dec. 1875—Asst. Magt., Bardwan Divn., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bankoora, 4th Jan. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dinagepore, 19th Feb. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Ses. Judge, Darjeeling, and Julpigoree, 3rd May 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Julpigore dist., 4th Dec. 1876—Offg. Jt. Ses. Judge, and Dist. Judge in Darjeeling and Julpigoree, Ag. Prin. Asst. Commr. of the Rajshahi and Kuch Behar Divn., 21st Jan. 1877—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Offg. Asst. Judge and Jt.-Ses. Judge, Julpigoree and Darjeeling, 26th Apl. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dinagepore, 3rd Mar. 1879—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 4th Mar. 1879—Offg. Addl. Judge of all the dists., of the Rajshahi Divn., 7th Apl. 1879.

ALEXANDER MANSON.—Arrd. 12th Nov. 1864—Asst. Magt., Balasore, 7th Sep. 1865—Cuttack, 1st Mar. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 10th June 1867—In charge of the sub-divn., Khoordah, 17th Jan. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 1st June 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—Asst. Magt., 9th Dec. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1869—Asst. Magt., Cuttack, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 29th Jan. 1870—1st gr., Pooree, 23rd May 1870—Asst. Magt., Pooree, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 30th June 1871—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 13th Sep. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 18th Nov. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 15th Jan. 1872—Furl. from 23rd Dec. 1872—Asst. Magt., Tipperah, Ag. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 16th Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Dacca, 2nd Aug. 1875—1st gr., 10th Sep. 1875—Offg. Magt., Noakholy, 30th Oct. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Tipperah, 13th Nov. 1875—Offg. Magt., Pooree, 9th May 1876—2nd Inspr. of Regtn. Offices, Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., Pooree, 11th Aug. 1876—Offg. Magt., Rangpur, 6th Nov. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 27th Nov. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., 1st gr., Sylhet, 4th May 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Dy. Commr., 1st gr., Sylhet, 9th Apl. 1878—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Noakholy, 19th May 1878—Furl. from 9th Apl. 1879.

WILLIAM FITZPATRICK MERES.—Arrd. 29th Nov. 1864—Qualified for the pub. service, 1st Aug. 1865—Asst. Magt., Maldah, Sep. 1865—Balasore, 18th Oct. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Asst. Magt., Howrah, 26th Nov. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 23rd Dec. 1867—Asst. Commr., Doomka, 4th Feb. 1868—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 28th June 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—Backergunge, 31st Aug. 1868—Offg. Mag., Backergunge, 28th Dec. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 15th Jan. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Hooghly, 7th Oct. 1869—1st gr., 5th Mar. 1870—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 30th June 1871—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. 1st gr., 23rd Mar. 1875—Offg. Mag., Birbhum, 12th Apl. 1875—Offg. Judge, Moorshedabad, 17th June 1875—Offg. Magt., Dacca, 10th Sep. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Hooghly, 11th Dec. 1875—Furl. from 16th Feb. 1876 to

12th Dec. 1877—Offg. Judge, Dinagepore, 25th Dec. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Judge, Dinagepore, 1st May 1878—Jt.-Mag., 1st gr., Tipperah, 27th Nov. 1878—Offg. Judge, Tipperah, 23rd Apl. 1879.

GEORGE TOYNBEE.—Arrd. 27th Nov. 1865—Passed in one language, 2nd Apl. 1866—Qualified for the pub. service, 17th Aug. 1866—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 25th Aug. 1866—Pooree, 19th Dec. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 9th Jan. 1868—Asst. Magt., Balasore, 4th Aug. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1870—Offg. Magt., Cuttack, 17th May 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 14th June 1870—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 16th Apl. 1871—Asst. Magt., Cuttack, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 16th July 1871—Supt., Canal Rev., 31st Oct. 1871—On famine relief duty, 13th Nov. 1873—Offg. Secy. to the Board of Rev., Lower Provinces, 14th Dec. 1874—Furl. from 8th Mar. 1875 to 2nd Nov. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Cuttack, 28th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., Cuttack, 9th Jan. 1877—Second Insp. of Regtn. Offices, Offg. Mag., Cuttack, 10th Apl. 1877—Spl. duty connected with compulsory irrigation rate, 23rd May 1877—Offg. Mag., Patna, 10th Aug. 1877—2nd gr., 15th Sep. 1877—3rd gr., 13th Nov. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. Magt., Patna, 11th Dec. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., 12th May 1878—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 14th May 1878—Spl. duty at the Bengal Secretariat, 16th July 1878—Offg. Magt., Patna, 2nd gr., 17th Sep. 1878—3rd gr., 23rd Jan. 1879—2nd gr., 28th Mar. 1879.

JOHN FOSTER STEVENS.—Arrd. 16th Oct. 1865—Passed in one language, 1st Dec. 1865—Qualified for pub. service, 2nd Mar. 1866—Asst. Magt., Patna, 27th Mar. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—In charge of sub-divn. Aurangabad, 14th Feb. 1867—In charge of sub-divn., Nawada, 15th July 1867—Passed the higher standard, 1st June 1868—Sick leave from 17th June to 16th Aug. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Gya 2nd gr., 17th Aug. 1868—Asst. Magt., 18th Dec. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 15th May 1869—1st gr., 3rd Mar. 1870—2nd gr., 7th June 1870—1st gr., 25th July 1870—Furl. on med. cert. from 1st Mar. 1870 to 31st Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt., Pooree, Offg., Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 27th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., Kattak, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 6th Mar. 1873—Offg. Magt., Kattak, 4th gr., 16th Aug. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 15th Nov. 1873—Offg. Magt., Pooree, 1st Apl. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Kattak, 10th May 1875—Offg. Magt., Pooree, 11th Sept. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Kattak, 19th Dec. 1875—Offg. Judge, Moorshedabad, 4th Apl. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 19th May 1876—Offg. Judge, Moorshedabad, 20th May 1876—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. Judge, Moorshedabad, 24th May 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 18th Aug. 1876—Offg. Judge, Tipperah, 1st Jan. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dacca, 11th Aug. 1878—Offg. Judge, Patna, 26th Apl. 1879.

ANTHONY PATRICK MacDONNELL.—Arrd. 3rd Nov. 1865—Passed in one language, 1st Feb. 1866—Qualified for the pub. service, 2nd July 1866—Asst. Magt., Monghyr, 1st August 1866—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Nadia, 3rd June 1868—Asst. Commr., Hazaribagh, 11th Dec. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 21st Apl. 1869—Asst. Magt., Pubna, 9th July 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 31st Aug. 1869—Asst. Magt., Pubna, 9th Dec. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1870—1st gr., Mymensingh, 14th Apl. 1870—Furl. from 5th July 1872 to 18th Oct. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Tirhoot, 1st Nov. 1873—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. in 1st gr., 1st Sept. 1874—Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., Durbhunga, 11th Jan. 1875—On spl. duty in the Bengal Secretariat, 25th May 1875—Offg. Magt., Durbhunga, 9th Mar. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., 3rd gr., Durbhunga, 11th Aug. 1876—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 30th Aug. 1877—Furl. from 15th May 1878.

JOHN GEORGE CHARLES.—Arrd. 15th Dec. 1865—Passed in one language, 1st Feb. 1866—Qualified for the pub. service, 2nd Apl. 1866—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, Apl. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Asst. Magt., Hajipore sub-divn., Tirhoot, Sep. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 22nd Jan. 1868—Asst. Magt., Setamarh. sub-divn., Tirhoot, Feb. 1868—Hajipore sub-divn., Tirhoot, Mar. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1868—Asst. Magt., 7th Jan. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 3rd Apl. 1869—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs. Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th Nov. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st Apl. 1870—Offg. Under-Secy. Bengal, 19th Apl. 1870—On spl. duty (mem. of the Cattle Plague Commn.) 20th June 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Patna, 8th Jan. 1871—Shahabad, 1st gr., 17th Jan. 1871—1st gr., Patna, 4th Apl. 1871—Asst. Magt., Patna, Ag. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 14th July 1871—Offg. Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 24th July 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 22nd Dec. 1871—Offg. Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 22nd Mar. 1872—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 5th July 1872—Offg. Magt. of Police, Calcutta, 17th July 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 27th Sept. 1872—Asst. Magt., Dacca, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr.,

22nd Jan. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Moonshigunge in Dacca, 11th May 1873—Patna, 13th Dec. 1873—Furl. from 20th May 1874 to 17th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., Ag. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 5th Dec. 1875—Offg. Dy. Commr. of Police, Calcutta, 25th Mar. 1876—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. Dy. Commr. of Police, Calcutta, 25th Apr. 1876—Jt.-Magt., Bhagulpore, Offg. 1st gr., 6th Dec. 1877—Offg. Presy. Magt. for the town of Calcutta, Northern Divn., 18th Dec. 1877—Offg. Chief Magt., Calcutta, 9th Mar. 1877—also Judge of the Court for the trial of Pilots—Furl. from 6th May 1879.

JOHN SCOPELL ARMSTRONG.—Arrd. 3rd Mar. 1866—Passed in one language, 1st June 1866—Qualified for the pub. service, 1st Aug. 1866—Asst. Magt. of Bhagulpore, 10th Sep. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 10th June 1867—in charge of the sub-divn. of Mudhypoora, Mar. 1868—Buxar, in Shahabad, 7th July 1868—Passed the higher standard, 17th May 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apr. 1870—1st gr., 31st Mar. 1872—2nd gr., 22nd Nov. 1872—1st gr., 15th Feb. 1873—2nd gr., 14th Mar. 1874—1st gr., 11th Apr. 1874—Furl. from 23rd Nov. 1874 to 18th Apr. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 1st May 1877—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. 1st gr., 22nd Oct. 1877—Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 10th Dec. 1877.

WILLIAM BENJAMIN OLDHAM.—Arrd. 23rd Nov. 1865—Passed in one language, 2nd Jan. 1866—Qualified for the public service, 1st Mar. 1866—Asst. Magt. Birkhoom, 17th Mar. 1866—Kattak, 9th Oct. 1866—Passed the lower standard, 22nd Jan. 1867—Asst. Magt., Kendrapara sub-divn., Kattak, 26th Feb. 1867—Passed the higher standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Chooadanga, Nadia, 19th June 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 14th Aug. 1868—Offg. Asst. Commr., Darjiling, 28th Nov. 1868—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 3rd Apr. 1869—Bettiah, Chumparan, 27th July 1869—Asst. Magt., 15th Nov. 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt. Nadia, 21st Apr. 1870—Offg. Magt. 2nd gr., 4th June 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 4th Sept. 1872—2nd gr., 18th Dec. 1872—1st gr., 28th Jan. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Patna divn., on famine duty, 12th Mar. 1874—Chumparan, 19th Mar. 1874—(on famine relief duty)—Offg. Magt., Chumparan, 1st Aug. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. Magt., Chumparan, 20th Oct. 1874—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. 1st gr., 15th Nov. 1874—Offg. Magt., Midnapore, 26th Nov. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 13th Feb. 1875—Furl. from 29th Mar. 1875 to 12th Dec. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Begooseraï divn., Monghyr, 24th Dec. 1876—Services placed at the displ. of the Govt. of Madras for employment on famine relief duty, 12th Feb. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st Feb. 1879—Offg. Dy. Commr., Sonthal Pergunnahs, 15th Mar. 1879.

CHRISTOPHER HENRY VOWELL.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Jessore, 13th Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Chumparan, 28th Dec. 1868—Passed the higher standard, 17th May 1869—Asst. Magt., Madhubani sub-divn. in Tirhoot, 27th Aug., 1869—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Patna, 5th May 1870—Moorshedabad, 15th Aug. 1870—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 22nd Nov. 1870—1st gr., 30th Jan. 1871—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Apr. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 5th May 1871—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 26th Sept. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Dec. 1871—1st gr., 1st Apr. 1872—2nd gr., 17th Dec. 1872—1st gr., 20th Jan. 1873—Offg. Magt., Shahabad, 3rd May 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 3rd Aug. 1875—Offg. Magt., Shahabad, 6th Sept. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 26th Oct. 1875—Furl. from 11th Mar. 1876 to 7th Nov. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Mozufferpore, Offg. 1st gr., 24th Nov. 1877—Offg. Magt., Rajshahi, 29th Mar. 1877—2nd gr., 30th May 1878—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Mozufferpore, Ag. 1st gr., 30th Dec. 1878—Offg. Magt., Durbhunga, 28th Mar. 1879—2nd gr., 1st Apr. 1879.

ANDREW WILLIAM COCHRAN.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Tipperah, 4th Jan. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 16th Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Noakholly, 4th Mar. 1869—Cox's Bazar sub-divn., Chittagong, 21st Jan. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 1st July 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Oct. 1871—Offg. Dy. Commr., Chittagong Hill tracts, 4th gr., 6th Nov. 1871—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, 6th May 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 4th June 1872—2nd gr., Backergunge, 28th June 1872—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, 22nd Nov. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Sarun, 25th Feb. 1873—Durbhunga, 22nd May 1873—1st gr., 16th Sept. 1873—Asst. Magt., Madhubani sub-divn., Tirhoot, 13th Oct. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Dec. 1873—Midnapore, 9th Mar. 1874—1st gr., 11th Jan. 1875—Furl. from 11th Apr. 1876 to 24th Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Rajshahi, 7th Jan. 1878—Offg. Addl. Judge Chittagong, 14th Mar. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 12th May 1878—Also Addl. Judge Backergunge, 25th Nov. 1878—Jt.-Magt., Dacca, 9th Mar. 1879.

THOMAS DURANT BEIGHTON.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 6th Jan. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 17th May 1869—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Asst. Magt., Culna sub-divn., Burdwan, 13th June 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1870—Burdwan, 22nd Apl. 1871—1st gr., 25th Apl. 1871—Offg. Magt., Burdwan, 2nd gr., 6th Sept. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 29th Sept. 1871—2nd gr., 1st Dec. 1871—Furl. from 6th Apl. 1872 to 29th Dec. 1874—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, Ag. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Serampore sub-divn., 6th Jan. 1875—Offg. 3rd Judge, Small Cause Court, Calcutta, 21st Mar. 1876—Offg. Judge, Hooghly, 20th June 1876—Offg. 3rd Judge Small Cause Court, Calcutta, 27th July 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr. Julpigoree, 3rd gr., 8th May 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Julpigoree, 1st Jan. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. 1st gr., 15th Apl. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Balasore, 1st gr., 21st Aug. 1878—Midnapore, 12th Oct. 1878—Offg. Magt., Midnapore, 19th May 1879.

HENRY JOHN STEDMAN COTTON.—Arrd. 29th Oct. 1867—Asst. Magt., Midnapore, 1st Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 16th Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Chooadanga, 1st Aug. 1869—Passed the higher standard, 5th Dec. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 13th June 1871—Offg. Judge, Small Cause Court, Sealdah, 3rd Apl. 1872—Offg. Asst. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 20th Jan. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 3rd June 1873—Offg. Jr. Secy., 13th Aug. 1873—Offg. Asst. Secy., 13th Nov. 1873—Offg. Regr., High Court, 10th Dec. 1873—Offg. Jr. Secy. Bengal, 22nd Sept. 1874—Asst. Secy. Bengal, Offg. Jr. Secy., 29th June 1875—Jr. Secy., 24th May 1876—Furl. from 13th July 1877 to 14th Nov. 1878—Magt., 3rd gr., 2nd Oct. 1877—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 27th Nov. 1878—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 15th Mar. 1879.

AMBROSE WILLIAM BUSHE POWER.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Beerbhoom, 13th Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., Seetamari sub-divn., Tirhoot, 7th June 1869—Tajpore sub-divn., Tirhoot, 31st Mar. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Tirhoot, 25th June 1870—1st gr., Sylhet, 4th Apl. 1871—2nd gr., 28th June 1871—Dy. Commr. of the 4th gr., and Pol. Agent, Hill Tipperah, 3rd July 1871—Spl. leave from 2nd July to 25th Sep. 1872—Dy. Commr. 4th gr., and Pol. Agent, Hill Tipperah, 4th Oct. 1873—Offg. 3rd gr., Chittagong Hill Tracts, 9th Feb. 1874—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 27th Apl. 1875—Offg. 3rd gr., 20th July 1875—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 20th Oct. 1875—Furl. from 7th May 1876 to 29th Oct. 1878—Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., Lohardugga, 12th Nov. 1878—Offg. 2nd gr., 25th Feb. 1879.

RICHARD MAUNSELL WALLER.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Bankoora, 6th Jan. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 16th Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Jessore, 20th Jan. 1869—Jenidah sub-divn., 5th Aug. 1869—Passed the higher standard, 5th Dec. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 13th June 1871—Asst. Magt., 21st Dec. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1872—Asst. Magt., Bankoora, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Aug. 1873—1st gr., 16th Aug. 1873—2nd gr., 7th Nov. 1873—Furl. from 11th May 1874 to 7th Feb. 1877—Offg. Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 28th Feb. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 22nd Apl. 1877—Offg. Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 25th June 1877—Offg. Magt., Bankoora, 18th Dec. 1877—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Ag. Magt., Bankoora, 14th Apl. 1878—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd July 1878—3rd gr., 20th Dec. 1878—Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Darjeeling, Ag. 3rd gr., 1st Apl. 1879.

JOHN CHARLES VEASEY.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Sylhet, Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 17th May 1869—Asst. Magt., Tipperah, 1st Mar. 1870—Serajgunge sub-divn., Pubna dist., 4th July 1870—Pubna, 15th Sep. 1870—Kissen-gunge sub-divn., in Purneah, 19th Nov. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Mar. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Chittagong, 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1873—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 29th July 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Oct. 1873—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, 21st Jan. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th May 1874—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 1st Oct. 1874—Asst. Set. Officer, 11th Feb. 1875—Offg. Magt., 15th July 1876—Asst. Set. Officer, 23rd Nov. 1876—Furl. from 15th May 1877 to 25th Apl. 1878—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 14th May 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 2nd Sep. 1878—Offg. Magt., Moorshedabad, 20th Sep. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bogra, 2nd Jan. 1879—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 23rd Apl. 1879—2nd gr., 3rd May 1879.

HENRY LUTTMAN JOHNSON.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Nadia, 7th Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 1st June 1868—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 27th Feb. 1869—In charge of sub-divn., Kushtia, 16th Mar. 1869—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1870—1st gr., 24-Pergs., 16th Feb. 1871—Transferred to Gya, 28th Apl. 1871—2nd gr., in charge Durbhunga, 21st July 1871—Offg. Priv. Secy. to the Lieut.-Govr. of Bengal, 1st Apl. 1872—Offg. Priv. Secy.

and Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Sep. 1873—2nd gr., 30th Jan. 1874—Performed the duties of Under-Secy., Govt. of Bengal, Dept. of Scarcity and Relief, from Oct. 1873 to 1st Feb. 1874—Services placed at the disp. of the Govt. of India in the Home Dept., and appointed to be Dy. Commr., 3rd gr., and Secy. to the Chief Commr. of Assam, 7th Feb. 1874—Supy. 3rd gr., May 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., Cachar, 5th June 1876—2nd gr., 2nd Sep. 1876—Furl. from 1st Apl. 1877 to 20th Mar. 1878—Ceased to be supy. 3rd gr., 16th Mar. 1878—Offg. Dy. Commr. Sylhet, 22nd Apl. 1878—2nd gr., 1st July 1878.

JOHN EDWARD BEEVOR JEFFERY.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 14th Dec. 1867—Pubna, 22nd Apl. 1870—Passed the lower standard, 26th Apl. 1870—In charge of the sub-divn. of Arrareah, in Purneah, 28th June 1870—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst. Magt., Diamond Harbour, 23rd Nov. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Feb. 1873—1st gr., 21st July 1873—Serampore, in Hooghly, 9th Aug. 1873—2nd gr., 1st Nov. 1873—Asst. Magt., 2nd Mar. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 29th Apl. 1874—1st gr., 12th Feb. 1875—Durbhunga, 17th Apl. 1875—2nd gr., 4th Jan. 1876—1st gr., 14th Feb. 1876—Furl. from 1st Apl. 1876 to 30th Oct. 1877—Furl. granted in extension in India, from 31st Oct. to 3rd Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 4th Dec. 1877—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 18th May 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 5th Dec. 1878—Offg. Magt., Furreedpore, 7th Mar. 1879.

PHILLIP NOLAN.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Pubna, 22nd Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—In charge of the sub-divn. of Seerajgunge, 11th Mar. 1870—Asst. Magt., Seerajgunge, 8th Sep. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 9th Jan. 1872—Offg. Magt., Pubna, 4th gr., 25th May 1873—Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1873—1st gr., 21st July 1873—2nd gr., 4th Nov. 1873—Asst. Magt., 18th Dec. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st June 1874—Offg. Magt., Pubna, 1st Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Jan. 1875—1st gr., 12th Apl. 1875—On spl. duty at Darjeeling, 22nd Aug. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Pubna, 2nd Oct. 1875—2nd gr., 5th Dec. 1875—Furl. from 13th May 1876 to 14th Nov. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Dinagepore, 3rd Dec. 1877—Offg. Magt., 24-Pergs., 20th Apl. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th July 1878—Offg. Magt., Durbhunga, 1st Oct. 1878—24-Pergs., 10th Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Dec. 1878—Offg. Magt., Kuttak, 9th Mar. 1879.

ARTHUR FORBES.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1867—Asst. Magt., Bardwan, 20th Dec. 1867—Passed the lower standard, 11th May 1869—Asst. Magt., Birbhum, 8th June 1869—Behar sub-divn., 3rd June 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Dec. 1870—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 22nd Mar. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 13th June 1871—Asst. Magt., 14th Dec. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1872—2nd gr., 28th Jan. 1873—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs. offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 22nd Mar. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1873—Offg. Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 26th Sep. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., also Secy. to the Central Relief Committee, 15th Jan. 1874—Asst. Commr., 1st gr., Assam, 22nd Nov. 1874—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 29th Mar. 1875—3rd gr., 15th Aug. 1875—4th gr., 3rd Oct. 1875—On spl. duty at Sibsagar, 8th Jan. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., 25th Mar. 1876—Furl. from 22nd May 1876 to 17th Jan. 1878—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 4th Feb. 1878—Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 12th May 1878—1st gr., 23rd Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Shahabad, 20th Feb. 1879—Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Patna, 1st May 1879—Dacca, 3rd July 1879.

HENRY GRANVILLE SHARP.—Arrd. 27th Jan. 1868—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, 20th Feb. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Baraset, 17th May 1870—Medl. leave from 28th Aug. to 13th Sep. 1870—Asst. Magt., Baraset, 14th Sep. 1870—Behar, 27th Sep. 1870—Sewan in Sarun, 16th Feb. 1871—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 2nd June 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 13th June 1871—Asst. Magt., Sarun, offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 4th Aug. 1871—Asst. Magt., 26th Sep. 1871—Raneegunge, Bardwan, 8th Dec. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st June 1873—1st gr., 1st July 1873—2nd gr., 15th Nov. 1873—Asst. Magt., 14th Mar. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24th Nov. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Gya, 8th Apl. 1875—1st gr., Durbhunga, 20th Jan. 1877—On spl. duty at Madras, for employment on famine relief work, 11th Feb. 1877—Offg. Magt., Chumparun, 13th Sep. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Durbhunga, 10th Dec. 1877—1st gr., Aurungabad, Gya, 31st Dec. 1877—Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., offg. 1st gr., 8th June 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Chittagong, 2nd Sep. 1878—Furl. from 22nd Oct. 1878.

JAMES CRAWFURD.—Arrd. 23rd Dec. 1868—Asst. Magt., Rajshahi, 5th Jan. 1869—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Rangpur, 26th May 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Dec. 1870—Asst. Magt., Gya, in charge of the sub-divn. of Shergotty, 10th Mar. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Gya, 13th June 1871—

Asst. Magt., Gya, 14th Dec. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1872—Durbhunga in Tirhoot, 8th Apl. 1872—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 17th Dec. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Tirhoot, 3rd Jan. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy. Bengal, 19th Aug. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India in the Home Dept., 24th Feb. 1875—Offg. Under-Secy. Bengal, 24th Mar. 1875—Under-Secy. Bengal, 5th July 1876—Offg. Regr., High Court, 23rd Apl. 1877—First Insp. of Regtn. Offices, Offg. Regtr., Appel. side, High Court, 26th Dec. 1877—Regr., High Court, 16th Nov. 1878.

JAMES FRANCIS BRADBURY.—Arrd. 16th Oct. 1868—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 28th Oct. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 17th May 1869—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, 12th June 1869—Backergunge, 29th Sept. 1869—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apl. 1870—Asst. Magt., Magoorah sub-divn., Jessore, 15th Sep. 1870—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 13th June 1871—2nd gr., Backergunge, 30th July 1872—Offg. Magt., 1st gr., Backergunge, 4th Feb. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 10th Mar. 1873—1st gr., 25th June 1873—2nd gr., 1st Dec. 1873—1st gr., 11th May 1874—Offg. Magt., Backergunge, 2nd Oct. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Backergunge, 3rd Nov. 1874—Offg. Pol. Agent, Hill Tipperah, 1st Sep. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Midnapore, 19th Dec. 1876—Offg. Magt. Mymensingh, 15th May 1877—2nd gr., 7th Oct. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 21st Nov. 1877—Offg. Magt. Moorshedabad, 29th Mar. 1878—Offg. Junior Secy. Board of Rev., 19th Apl. 1878—Offg. Magt., Dacca, 23rd July 1878—2nd gr., 4th Sep. 1878—Offg. Magt., Sarun, 28th Nov. 1878—Jt.-Magt. 24-Pergs., Offg. 1st gr., 22nd Feb. 1879—Furl. for one year from 8th Mar. 1879.

CHARLES DESLANDES CHURCH WINTER.—Arrd. 9th Dec. 1868—Asst. Magt., Bankoora, 28th Dec. 1868—Burdwan, 22nd June 1869—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Bankoora, 11th Apl. 1870—Cuttack, 3rd Jan. 1871—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Med. leave from 6th June 1872 to 5th Sep. 1873—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, Offg. Jt.-Magt. 2nd gr., 26th Sep. 1873—Asst. Magt., 2nd Mar. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 17th Apl. 1874—1st gr., 24th Nov. 1874—2nd gr., 6th Dec. 1874—1st gr., 2nd Mar. 1875—1st gr., Jessore, 21st May 1876—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 22nd Aug. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Monghyr, 7th Sep. 1876—Offg., Magt., Monghyr, 20th Apl. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 26th May 1877—Furl. from 27th July 1877 to 11th Nov. 1878—Asst. Magt., Birbhum, 20th Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 15th Feb. 1879—1st gr., 25th Feb. 1879—Addl. Judge, Chittagong, 14th July 1879.

EDWARD AUGUSTUS BRADBURY.—Arrd. 16th Oct. 1868—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 6th Nov. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Manager of the Kuch Behar State, 11th Dec. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Purneah, 16th Aug. 1875—1st gr., in charge of the Gopalgunge divn. of the Sarun dist., 6th Dec. 1875—1st gr., in charge of the Sewan divn., of the Sarun dist. 17th Dec. 1875—On famine relief duty at Cuddapah, 20th Mar. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 15th Aug. 1877—Furl. from 19th Sep. 1877 to 3rd Jan. 1879—Asst. Magt., Serampore, 12th Jan. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th Feb. 1879—1st gr., 7th Mar. 1879—Offg. Magt., Rajshahi, 1st Apl. 1879—2nd gr., 11th Apl. 1879—Offg. Dy. Commr., Kuch Behar, 24th June 1879—Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th Oct. 1879.

JOHN WHITMORE.—Arrd. 31st Dec. 1868—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 20th Jan. 1869—Backergunge, 4th Aug. 1869—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Khoolna, in Jessore, 14th June 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Dec. 1870—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 26th June 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Nov. 1871—Asst., Magt., 2nd Dec. 1871—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 31st Mar. 1872—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 29th Jan. 1873—Furl. from 2nd Feb. 1873 to 16th Oct. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Doomka, 30th Oct. 1875—1st gr., Moorshedabad, 7th Aug. 1876—Offg. Magt., Bogra, 7th Sep. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Doomka, 5th Jan. 1877—Furl. from 21st Mar. 1877 to 20th Mar. 1878—Leave without pay from 21st Mar. to 23rd Oct. 1878—Asst. Magt., Balasore, 19th Nov. 1878—Jt.-Magt. 2nd gr., 13th Dec. 1878—Offg., 1st gr., 17th Jan. 1879—Offg. Magt., Balasore, 20th Mar. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th June 1879.

ALFRED AUGUSTUS WACE.—Arrd. 3rd Dec. 1868—Asst. Magt., Nadia, Dec. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Meherpore, 18th Jan. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 9th Jan. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 4th June 1872—Asst. Magt., 4th Sept. 1872—Tirhoot, 14th Mar. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1873—1st gr., 19th Sep. 1873—2nd gr., 1st Nov. 1873—Asst. Magt., 16th Jan. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 4th May 1874—Asst. Magt., 14th May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th May 1874—Patna, 13th Nov. 1874—Tirhoot, 5th Jan. 1875—Furl. on med.

cert. from 24th Mar. 1875 to 28th Oct. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Bhagulpore, 8th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., 20th Apl. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 4th May 1877—Offg. Magt., 25th June 1877—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 1st Sep. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 22nd Nov. 1878—Offg. Insp.-Genl. of Regtn., 7th Mar. 1879—Offg. Magt., Howrah, 30th Mar. 1879—Magt., Birbhum, 8th July 1879.

TREVOR JOHN CHICHELE PLOWDEN.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1868—Asst. Magt. 24-Pergs., 9th Nov. 1868—Birbhum, 21st June 1869—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt. Bhagulpore, Dec. 1869—Furl. from 12th Apl. to 5th Nov. 1870—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 14th Nov. 1870—Serampore sub-divn., Hooghly Dist., 19th Feb. 1871—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—On spl. duty in the Bengal Sect., 26th Mar. 1872—Offg. Under-Secy Bengal 5th Apl. 1872—On spl. duty in the Bengal Secretariat, 7th Jan. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 15th Feb. 1873—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 16th Dec. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 18th Dec. 1873—Insp. Genl. of Police, Assam, 26th Nov. 1876—On spl. duty as Secy. to the Prison Conference, 12th Jan. 1877—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Foreign Dept. 23rd Jan. 1877—Offg. Secy., 12th Feb. 1878—Offg. Under-Secy., 14th Apl. 1878—Under-Secy. 12th Dec. 1878.

WILLIAM FIDDIAN.—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Kattak, Nov. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst., Magt., Pooree, Mar. 1870—Bhuddruck Divn. Balasore dist., 14th May 1870—Passed the higher standard, 9th Jan. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th Oct. 1873—Asst. Magt., 15th Dec. 1873—Chumparun, on famine duty 17th May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th May 1874—Asst. Magt., 20th July 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr. 1st Aug. 1874—Offg., 2nd gr. Balasore, 5th Dec. 1874—1st gr., 2nd Apl. 1875—2nd gr., 14th Dec. 1875—1st gr., 29th Feb. 1876—Furl. from 7th Dec. 1876 to 27th Nov. 1878—Asst. Magt., Bogra, 14th Dec. 1878—Offg. Commr. of Soonderbuns in 24-Pergs., 4th Jan. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt. 2nd gr., 25th Feb. 1879—1st gr., 7th Mar. 1879—Offg. Magt., Noakholy, 28th Mar. 1879.

CECIL ANSDELL WILKINS.—Arrd. 26th Nov. 1868—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, 1st Dec. 1868—Monghyr, 27th Oct. 1869—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst. Magt., Begooserai divn., of the Monghyr dist. 6th Dec. 1871—Passed the higher standard, 20th Apl. 1874—Asst. Magt., Baraset sub-divn. 24-Pergs., 5th Oct. 1874—Patna, 5th June 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 5th Apl. 1876—1st gr., 9th Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 12th Nov. 1876—Asst. Magt., 20th Dec. 1876—Offg. Magt., Patna, 9th Mar. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Shahabad, 19th Apl. 1877—2nd gr., 28th Apl. 1877—1st gr., 1st May 1877—Offg. Magt., Shahabad, 30th Aug. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 9th Nov. 1877—Offg. Magt., Shahabad, 10th Jan. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 7th Feb. 1878—Furl. from 22nd Mar. 1878.

WILLIAM HUMPHREY PAGE.—Arrd. 10th Dec. 1868—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 29th Dec. 1868—Passed the lower standard, 29th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Moonshigunge sub-divn., 17th May 1870—Goalundo in Furreedpore, 11th May 1871—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Judge, Small Cause Court, Sealdah, 22nd Apl. 1872—Offg. Magt. Calcutta, 2nd May 1872—Asst. Magt., Goalundo, 17th May 1872—Offg. Jt.-Mag., 2nd gr., 15th Feb. 1873—Offg. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Manbloom, 7th Aug. 1873—Offg. Asst. Commr., Darjeeling, 28th Feb. 1874—Furl. from 18th May 1875 to 28th Oct. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Nadia, 16th Nov. 1876—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 19th Aug. 1877—Offg. 2nd gr., 30th Sep. 1878—3rd gr., 1st Nov. 1878—Spl. leave from 30th Jan. 1879—Offg. Insp.-Genl. of Regtn., 5th Aug. 1879.

GEORGE GOODAIR DEY.—Arrd. 25th Oct. 1869—Asst. Magt., Purneah, 1st Nov. 1869—Passed the lower standard, 5th Dec. 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Mar. 1872—Asst. Magt., Sarun, 13th May 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1873—Asst. Magt., 12th Dec. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 16th Jan. 1874—Asst. Magt., 7th Feb. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Mar. 1874—Asst. Magt., 1st May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 5th Oct. 1874—Asst. Magt., 14th Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th Jan. 1875—1st gr., 9th Apl. 1875—2nd gr., 11th Dec. 1875—1st gr., 3rd Mar. 1876—Sasseram divn of the Shahabad dist., 26th Apl. 1876—1st gr., Tajpore, Durbhunga, 10th Apl. 1877—Furl. from 20th Apl. 1878.

HENRY GIRAUD COOKE.—Arrd. 12th Nov. 1869—Asst. Magt., Midnapore, 6th Dec. 1869—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, 8th Jan. 1872—In charge of the Cox's Bazar sub-divn and ex-officio Asst. to the Dy. Commr., Hill Tracts, Chittagong, 18th Apl. 1872—Passed the higher standard, 30th July 1872

—Furl. from 26th Oct 1872 to 16th Oct 1876—Asst Magt, Dinagepore, Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 7th Nov 1876—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 30th Dec 1876—1st gr, 20th Feb 1877—1st gr, Sarun, 29th Mar 1877—Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 2nd Apl 1878—Offg Magt, Bogra, 25th Oct 1879.

JAMES KELLEHER.—Arrd 29th Sep 1869—Asst Magt, Chittagong, 26th Oct 1869—Passed the lower standard, 26th Apl 1870—Passed the higher standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst Magt, Magoorah sub-divn, Jessore dist, 26th June 1871—In charge of the sub-divn of Narrail in Jessore, 17th July 1872—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 25th June 1873—Asst Magt, 16th Dec 1873—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 18th Dec 1873—Asst Magt, 28th Jan 1874—Koooshtea sub-divn, Nuddea dist, 2nd Apl 1874—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 14th May 1874—1st gr, 9th Apl 1875—2nd gr, 21st Dec 1875—1st gr, 28th Feb 1876—1st gr. Bhagulpore, 24th Jan 1878—Offg Magt, Maldah, 16th Apl 1878—Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, Bhagulpore, 29th May 1878—Offg Magt, Pubna, 7th June 1878—Backergunge, 4th Aug 1878—2nd gr, 2nd May 1879—Furl for 2 years from 21st Aug 1879.

JAMES PRATT.—Arrd 12th Oct 1869—Asst Magt, Jessore, 11th Nov 1869—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—Passed the higher standard, 12th Mar 1872—Asst Magt, Deoghur sub-divn, Sonthal Pergus, 26th Apl 1872—Mymensingh, 31st May 1872—Tipperah, 2nd Apl 1873—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 1st July 1873—Asst Magt, 1st Feb 1874—Mymensingh, 15th Aug 1874—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 1st Mar 1875—1st gr, 11th May 1875—2nd gr, 8th Dec 1875—1st gr, 7th Mar 1876—Offg Magt, Mymensingh, 1st Feb 1877—Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 1st Mar 1877—Offg Magt, Mymensingh, 20th Apl 1877—Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 15th May 1877—Furl from 11th Mar 1878.

FRANCIS WILLIAM BADCOCK.—Arrd 24th Nov 1869—Asst Magt, Bardwan, 8th Dec 1869—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—Asst Magt, Bhagulpore, 10th Nov 1871—In charge of the sub-divn of Muddehpoorah, 15th Dec 1871—Monghyr, 28th June 1872—Passed the higher standard, 30th July 1872—In charge of the sub-divn of Begooserai, Monghyr, 20th Sep 1872—Bhagulpore, 20th Nov 1872—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 1st July 1873—On spl duty as Settl Officer of Bhagulpore, Monghyr and Purmeah, 18th July 1873—On settl duty at Bhagulpore, 17th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, on settl duty, 20th Nov 1873—Offg Jt.-Magt, on settl duty, 29th Nov 1873—Asst Magt, 1st Dec 1873—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 12th Feb 1875—1st gr, 11th May 1875—1st gr, Chittagong, 17th Oct 1875—2nd gr, 27th Nov 1875—Asst Magt, 4th Jan 1876—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 14th Feb 1876—1st gr, 1st Apl 1876—2nd gr, 24th Dec 1876—Asst Magt, 2nd Jan 1877—Backergunge, 14th May 1877—Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 18th July 1877—Furl from 8th Dec 1877 to 30th Dec 1878—On spl duty in the office of the Board of Rev, Calcutta, 18th Jan 1879—Asst Magt, 24-Pergus, 10th Mar 1879—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 18th Mar 1879—Offg Inspr.-Genl of Regtn, 30th Mar 1879—Offg Magt and Dy Collr, Howrah, 3rd gr, 19th July 1879.

CHARLES ARCHIBALD SAMUEL, J.S.—Arrd 25th Nov 1869—Asst Magt, Hooghly, 3rd Dec 1869—Chumparun, 2nd Nov 1870—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—Passed the higher standard, 2nd Dec 1872—Offg Magt, Chumparun, 29th Apl 1873—Asst Magt, Chumparun, 29th May 1873—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr., 7th Aug 1873—Asst Magt, 1st Nov 1873—On famine duty at Chumparun, 1st Mar 1874—Asst Magt, Chumparun, 1st Nov 1874—Offg Magt, Chumparun, 16th Jan 1875—Asst Magt, 16th Mar 1875—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 13th Apl 1875—Asst Magt, 15th Dec 1875—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 29th Feb 1876—Beguserai, 14th Mar 1876—1st gr, 5th Apl 1876—2nd gr, 18th Dec 1876—1st gr, 6th Mar 1877—1st gr, Dinagepore, 29th Mar 1877—1st gr, Monghyr, 5th Dec 1877—Offg Magt, Monghyr, 2nd May 1879.

JOSEPH POSFORD.—Arrd 12th Nov 1869—Asst Magt, Sylhet, 1st Jan 1870—Passed the lower standard, 5th Dec 1870—Passed the higher standard, 18th Feb 1873—Asst Magt, Cox's Bazar sub-divn, Chittagong dist, 31st May 1873—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 16th Aug 1873—Sylhet, 27th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, 4th Nov 1873—Offg Asst Commr, 2nd gr, 12th Sep 1874—Asst Magt, Madaripore sub-divn, Furreedpore, 16th Jan 1875—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 12th Apl 1875—Goalundo sub-divn, Furreedpore dist, 9th July 1875—Asst Magt, 5th Dec 1875—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 1st Mar 1876—1st gr, 6th Apl 1876—2nd gr, 19th Dec 1876—1st gr, 23rd Feb 1877—Furl from 13th May 1878.

RICHARD HERBERT GREAVES.—Arrd 19th Jan 1870—Asst Magt, Pooree, 25th Jan 1870—Passed the lower standard, 5th Dec 1870—Passed the higher standard, 5th Mar 1872—Asst Magt, Cuttack, 3rd Jan 1873—Pooree, 16th Mar 1873—In charge of the Khoordah Divn, Mar 1873—Furl from 7th May 1873 to 31st Oct 1874—Asst Magt, Cuttack, 18th Nov 1874—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 22nd Feb 1875—Pooree, 24th Mar 1875—1st gr, 1st Apl 1875—Cuttack, 10th Apl 1875—Kendrapara sub-divn, Cuttack, dist, 15th May 1875—Cuttack, 27th Oct 1875—2nd gr, 10th Dec 1875—Khoordah divn,

Pooree dist., 4th Jan. 1876—1st gr., 7th Mar. 1876—1st gr., Gya, 18th July 1878—Furl. from 25th Apr. 1879.

FRANK HUNTER BARROW.—Arrd. 17th Jan. 1870—Asst. Magt., Nadia, 26th Jan. 1870—Pubna, 1st Dec. 1870—Passed the lower standard, 5th Mar. 1872—Furl. from 11th Sept. 1872 to 5th Nov. 1873—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., and passed the higher standard, 11th Nov. 1873—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, 27th Nov. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 9th Apr. 1875—1st gr., 10th Sept. 1875—2nd gr., 18th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., 21st Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Feb. 1876—1st gr., 3rd Apr. 1876—2nd gr., 20th Dec. 1876—1st gr., 4th Mar. 1877—1st gr., Shahabad, 9th Apr. 1878.

THOMAS JAMES MURRAY.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1869—Asst. Magt., Maldah, 17th Nov. 1869—Moorshedabad, 23rd May 1870—In charge of the sub-divn. of Jamuakandi, 30th Nov. 1871—In charge of the City Moorshedabad sub-divn., 30th Sept. 1872—Asst. Magt., 18th Aug. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 10th Sept. 1873—Asst. Magt., 26th Oct. 1873—Transferred to the Patna Divn. and deputed on the fam. relief work, 21st May 1874—Justice of the Peace, 9th June 1874—In charge of the sub-divn. of Sewan, in Sarun, 18th Sept., 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Apr. 1875—Services placed at the disp. of the Chief Commr. of Assam, 10th Dec. 1875—Made over charge of the Sewan sub-divn., 17th Dec. 1875—Posted to the dist. of Sylhet, 23rd Jan. 1876—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 22nd Mar. 1876—Offg. Asst. Secy. to the Chief Commr. of Assam, 17th Apr. 1876—Asst. Secy. to the Chief Commr. of Assam, 2nd May 1876—Offg. Insp. of Schools and Officer in charge of the Regtn. Dept., Assam, 2nd Mar. 1877—Offg. Secy. to the Chief Commr. of Assam, 6th July 1877—Asst. Secy., 6th Oct. 1877—Asst. Commr., 1st gr., but to continue Asst. Secy. to the Chief Commr., 25th Sept. 1878—Furl. for one year from 22nd Aug. 1879.

GEORGE DOUGLAS BURGESS.—Arrd. 9th Nov. 1870—Apptd. to British Burma Commn.—Posted to Thayetmyo, 8th Dec. 1870—Passed the lower standard in Burmese, Law, and Rev. 22nd Nov. 1871—Posted to Allanmyo, 21st Mar. 1872—Apptd. ex-officio Asst. Collr. of Customs at Allanmyo, 4th July 1872—Passed the higher standard in Law and Rev., 21st Nov. 1872—Magt. of 1st class, 1st Jan. 1873—Magt. of the Allanmyo sub-divn., 1st Jan. 1873—Magt. of Myedai divn. of Thayetmyo dist., 1st Aug. 1873—Ag. Dy. Commr., Thayetmyo dist., 16th Oct. 1873—Justice of the Peace, 25th Feb. 1874—Offg. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 3rd July 1874—1st gr., from 1st to 26th Feb. 1875—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 16th Sept. 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., in charge Rangoon dist., 13th Oct. 1877—Bassein dist., 6th Nov. 1877 to 6th Feb. 1878—Bassein dist., 15th Mar. 1878.

COLMAN PATRICK LOUIS MACAULAY.—Arrd. 28th Oct. 1870—Asst. Magt., Birbhum, 17th Nov. 1870—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—Passed the higher standard, 5th Mar. 1872—Offg. Supt. of Police, Bankoora, 27th Mar. 1872—Offg. Magt., Bankoora, 19th Apr. 1873—Offg. Supt. of Police, Bankoora, 8th May 1873—Supt. of Police, 4th gr., Bankoora, 3rd June 1873—Offg. Supt. of Police, Midnapore, 8th July 1873—3rd gr., 1st Oct. 1873—Supt. of Police, 4th gr., 27th Jan. 1874—Offg. Supt. of Police, 3rd gr., 1st July 1874—On famine duty at Bankoora, 21st July 1874—Offg. Supt. of Police, 3rd gr., Midnapore, 8th Dec. 1874—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 27th Feb. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 24th Mar. 1875—Offg. Dy. Collr. of Customs, Calcutta, 7th Apr. 1875—Offg. Magt., 24-Pergs., 4th Sept. 1875—Offg. Dy. Commr. of Police, Calcutta, 3rd Oct. 1875—On spl. duty in the Bengal Sect. 10th Nov. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 24-Pergs., 28th Feb. 1876—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, in the Dept. of Rev., Agl. and Commerce, 1st Apr. 1876—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 23rd Apr. 1876—On spl. duty in Bengal Secretariat, 15th July 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 24-Pergs., 15th Sept. 1876—Offg. Asst. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 2nd Nov. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 5th Jan. 1877—1st gr., 20th Feb. 1877—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 22nd Apr. 1877—Asst. Secy., Ag. Under-Secy., 1st May 1877—Offg. Jr. Secy., 8th July 1877—Under-Secy., 3rd Oct. 1877—Priv. leave from 31st July to 30th Oct. 1878—Under-Secy., 2nd Nov. 1878—Offg. Secy., 1st Feb. 1879—Jr. Secy., Board of Rev., Ag. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 3rd Mar. 1879—Jr. Secy., Board of Rev., 3rd May 1879—Offg. Secy. to the Govt., Rev. and Genl. Dept., 5th Aug. 1879.

JAMES AUSTIN BOURDILLON.—Arrd. 22nd Nov. 1870—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 7th Dec. 1870—Patna, 22nd June 1871—Passed the lower standard, 10th Oct. 1871—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 14th Dec. 1871—Tirhoot, 6th July 1872—Patna, 25th Oct. 1872—Passed the higher standard, 2nd Dec. 1872—Asst. Magt., Jehanabad sub-divn., Gya dist., 27th Dec. 1872—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 4th Aug. 1873—Asst. Magt., 26th Oct.

1873—Sewan in Sarun, 22nd Aug. 1874—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of India, Finl. Dept., 19th Sept. 1874—Offg. Asst. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 29th Dec. 1875—Offg. Under-Secy. to the India, Home Dept., 27th Mar. 1876—Offg. Asst. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 27th July 1876—Offg. Insp. Genl. of Regn., and in charge of the office of Asst. Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 5th Aug. 1876—Offg. Insp. Genl. of Regn., 7th Aug. 1876—2nd Insp. of Regn. Offices, Ag. Insp. Genl. of Regn., 1st Jan. 1878—1st Insp. of Regn. Offices, Ag. Insp. Genl. of Regn., 16th Nov. 1878—Furl. for one year from 22nd Aug. 1879.

CHARLES EDWARD BUCKLAND.—Arrd. 29th Nov. 1870—Asst Magt, Howrah, Dec 1870—24-Pergs, 14th June 1871—Passed the lower standard, 4th Nov. 1871—Attaché, Foreign Dept, 17th Nov. 1871—Offg. Cant Magt, Barrackpore, and Judge of the Small Cause Court of that Cant, 6th Jan 1874—On spl duty to Behar, 25th Jan 1874—Offg Priv Secy to the Lieut-Govr of Bengal, 5th Mar 1874—On famine duty, 30th Mar 1874—Priv Secy to the Lieut-Govr of Bengal, 9th Apl 1874—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 12th Feb 1875—Offg Jr Secy to the Govt of Bengal, 17th Apl 1875—Priv Secy to the Lieut-Govr of Bengal, Ag Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 17th July 1875—2nd gr, 2nd Dec 1875—1st gr, 25th Mar 1876—Asst Secy to the Govt of Bengal, continuing as Priv Secy to the Lieut-Govr of Bengal, 8th Aug 1876—Priv Secy to Sir Richard Temple during his mission to Madras and Bombay, 8th Jan 1877—Priv Secy to Govr of Bombay, 1st May 1877—Offg. Under-Secy to the Govt of India, Home Dept, 9th May 1878—Priv Secy to the President of the Council of the Govr-Genl of India, 22nd Nov 1878—Offg Under-Secy to the Govt of India, Home Dept, 21st Dec 1878—Offg Press Commr with the Govt of India, 1st Feb 1879.

FRANCIS HENRY BENNET SKRINE.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1870—Asst Magt, Rajshshi, 8th Dec 1870—Passed the lower standard of exmn, 19th Mar 1872—Asst Magt, in charge of the sub-divn of Kooshtea, 12th Jan 1873—Meherpore, 31st Jan 1873—Chooadanga, 4th June 1873—Passed the higher standard of exmn, 20th Apl 1874—Asst Magt, Panta, on relief duty, 13th May 1874—sub-divn of Chooadanga in Nadia, 25th Nov 1874—Offg. Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 6th Apl 1876—1st gr, 7th Aug 1876—2nd gr, 15th Oct. 1876—Asst Magt, 19th Dec 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 6th Mar 1877—1st gr, 25th May 1877—On famine relief duty, Salem, 1st Oct 1877—Furl from 8th Apl 1878.

ALFRED WALLIS PAUL.—Arrd 22nd Nov. 1870—Asst Magt, Dacca, 6th Dec 1870—Passed the lower standard exmn, 13th Oct 1871—Asst Magt, Chittagong, and also in charge of the Cox's Bazar sub-divn, 14th Nov 1871—Chittagong, 18th Apl 1872—Darjiling, 11th Nov 1872—Passed the higher standard exmn, 1st Jan 1873—Offg Asst. Commr, 2nd gr, 1st Apl 1873—2nd gr, Tirhoot, 3rd Mar 1874—2nd gr., Julpigoree, 7th Jan 1875—2nd gr, Darjiling, 21st Apl 1875—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Oct. 1875—Offg. Dy. Commr., Darjeeling, 6th Jan. 1876—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 7th Feb. 1876—Offg. 1st gr., 10th Apl. 1876—Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 23rd Feb. 1877—Offg. 1st gr. 1st Mar. 1877.

ROBERT CORNISH.—Arrd. 22nd Nov. 1870—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 20th Dec. 1870—Passed the lower standard, 17th Aug. 1871—Temp. Asst. Commr., Gwalparra, 6th Nov. 1871—Asst. Magt., Kamroop, 14th Feb. 1872—Sibsaugor, 21st Apl. 1873—Passed the higher standard, 13th May 1873—Asst. Magt., Nadia, to have charge of the Meherpore sub-divn., 30th May 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Aug. 1873—Asst. Magt., 23rd Oct. 1873—Patna, for employment on famine relief work, 18th May 1874—Bardwan, 25th Sep. 1874—Meherpore in Nadia, 3rd Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Apl. 1875—Asst. Magt., 11th Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 3rd Mar. 1876—Furl. from 21st Apl. 1876—to the 14th Apl. 1877—Asst. Magt., Mozuffbpore, 22nd Apl. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 1st May 1877—1st gr., Darjeeling, 20th Oct. 1877—1st gr., Hooghly, 3rd Dec. 1877—Offg. Magt., Hooghly, 29th Apl. 1879.

LEONARD CHARLES ABBOTT.—Arrd. 21st Nov. 1870—Asst. Magt., Naddea, Nov. 1870—Passed the lower standard, 22nd May 1871—On Spl. duty in the Ben. Sect., 14th Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt., Nuddea 13th Jan. 1873—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 18th Feb. 1873—On Spl. duty at the Bengal Secrt., 3rd June 1873—Offg. Priv. Secy. to the Lieut.-Govr. of Bengal, 1st Feb. 1874—On Spl. duty at Behar, 6th Mar. 1874—Addl. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 9th Apl. 1874—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 23rd Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1875—1st gr., 11th May 1875—2nd gr., 6th Dec. 1875—1st gr., 18th Mar. 1876—2nd gr., 5th Jan. 1877—1st gr., 20th Feb. 1877—1st gr., Patna, 3rd Apl. 1877—Offg. Magt., Patna, 13th July 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 10th Aug. 1877—Offg. Magt., 14th July 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 17th Sep. 1878—1st gr., Darjeeling, 25th Oct. 1878.

GEORGE LEVER WEIDEMANN.—Arrd. 22nd Nov. 1870—Arrd. in Rangoon, 7th Dec. 1870—Placed under Dy. Commr., Moulmein, 10th Dec. 1870—Asst. Commr., Thatone, 2nd Sep. 1871—Toungoo, 12th Aug. 1872—Rangoon, 17th Apl. 1873—Bassein, 14th Feb. 1874—Pantanaw, 6th Dec. 1875—Mingyee, 15th Nov. 1876—On Forest Set. 15th Dec. 1877—Asst. Commr., Pouday, 20th Feb. 1878—Mingyee, 19th Mar. 1878—Gyobinhouk, 17th June 1878—2nd gr., 3rd Aug. 1878—Henzada, (in charge of dist.), 19th Sep. 1878.

ROMESH CHUNDER DUTT.—Arrd. 28th Sep. 1871—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 28th Sep. 1871—Passed the lower standard, 12th Mar. 1872—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 7th Nov. 1872—in charge of the sub-divn. of Bongong, 17th Feb. 1873—in charge of the Meherpore sub-divn., 8th May 1874—Bongong, 10th Nov. 1874—Offg.
