Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th May 1875—Asst. Magt., 2nd Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Mar. 1876—1st gr., 23rd Apl. 1876—1st gr., Nadia, 31st Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 28th Nov. 1876—2nd gr. Dukhin Shabazpore Divn. of the Backergunge dist., 29th Nov. 1876—1st gr., 4th Apl. 1877—1st gr., Tipperah, 13th July 1878—1st gr., Bardwan, 12th Dec. 1878—2nd gr., 7th Jan. 1879—1st gr., 21st Mar. 1879.

BEHARY LAL GUPTA.—Arrd. 29th Sep. 1871—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, 22nd Nov. 1871—Passed the higher standard, 13th May 1873—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 19th Aug. 1873—Manbroom, 25th May 1874—Hooghly for employment on relief duty, 18th Sep. 1874—Diamond Harbour, 5th Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 9th Apl. 1875—Asst. Magt., 10th Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Mar. 1876—1st gr., 12th Apl. 1876—Barripore sub-divn., 12th Nov. 1876—2nd gr., 7th Dec. 1876—1st gr., 27th Mar. 1877—Purneah, 21st June 1878—in charge of the Kissengunge divn. of the Purneah dist. 9th Mar. 1879—Offg. Presy. Magt., Calcutta, 17th Sep. 1879.

STEPHEN JACOB.—Arrd. 16th Nov. 1871—Asst Commr, 3rd class, Nagpore, 17th Nov. 1871—3rd class, Chunda, 7th Apl. 1872—Regr. Judl. Commr's. Court, Cen. Prov., 4th Oct. 1873—Asst. Commr., 3rd class, 2nd Apl. 1874—3rd class, Seonf., Dec. 1843—Nagpore, 16th Mar 1876—Offg. 3rd class, 1st Apl. 1876—Offg. Regr., Judl. Commr's. Court, 2nd Apl. 1876—Asst. Commr., Chundwari, to act as 3rd class, 3rd July 1876—Offg. Dy. Commr., Chundwari, 2nd Jan. 1877—Offg. Regr, Judl. Commr's, Court, 30th Jan. 1877—Asst. Magt., Rajshahye, 15th Jan. 1879—Rangpur, 18th Feb. 1879—On spl. duty, Legisl. Dept., 15th Apl. 1879.

WILLIAM HENRY MAFFET GUN.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1871—Asst. Magt., Cuttack 2nd Dec. 1871—Pooree 3rd May 1873—Passed the higher standard, 21st June 1873—Asst. Magt., in charge of the Khoordah sub-divn., 1st July 1873—Cuttack, 30th Sep. 1873—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1875—Asst. Magt., 8th Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Mar. 1876—1st gr., 19th Apl. 1876—Balasore, 9th Dec. 1876—1st gr., 2nd Apl. 1877—Offg. Magt., Balasore, 15th Sep. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 15th Oct. 1877—1st gr., Nadia, 11th May 1878.

HENRY GILLON.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1871—Asst. Magt. Furreedpore, 9th Dec. 1871—Passed the lower standard, 30th July 1872—Asst. Magt., Kooshtea, 14th Mar. 1873—Passed the higher standard, 13th May 1873—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 7th Apl. 1874—Nurail, in Jessore, 3rd Jan. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th May 1875—Asst. Magt., Meherpore in Nadia, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., 6th Dec. 1875—Off. 1st Insp. of Regtn. Offices, 27th Jan. 1876—On famine relief duty at Cuddapah, 27th Feb. 1877—North Arcot, 3rd May 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Nattore Divn., 1st Jan. 1879—1st gr., Rajshahi, 6th Mar. 1879—1st gr., 24-Pergs., 11th July 1879—1st gr., Rajshahi, 2nd Aug. 1879.

HAROLD FRANCIS MATTHEWS.—Arrd. 10th Nov. 1871—Asst. Magt., Dacca 20th Nov. 1871—Leave on medl. cert. from 29th Mar. 1872 to 21st Feb. 1873—Asst. Magt. Birbhum, 9th Mar. 1873—Passed the lower standard, 13th May 1873—Passed the higher standard, 20th Apl. 1874—Asst. Commr., 3rd gr., Assam, 18th Dec. 1874—Posted to Sylhet, 17th Jan. 1875—Offg. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., 18th Jan. 1875—Transferred to Nowgong, 15th July 1875—Transferred Sibsagar, 10th Aug. 1875—Sub-Regr, of Jorhat, 2nd Sep. 1875—in charge of the sub-divn. of Golaghat, 25th Oct. 1875—Transferred to head-quarters Sibsagar, 17th Apl. 1876—Placed in charge of the sub-divn. of Jorhat, 27th May 1876—Justice of the Peace, 3rd July 1876—Offg. Asst. Commr., 1st gr., 4th July 1876—Sub-Regr. of Golaghat, 13th July 1876—in charge of the sub-divn. of Jorhat, and Golaghat, 7th Dec. 1876—2nd gr., Asst. Commr., 22nd Nov. 1876—Transferred to Nowgong, 9th July 1877—Magt. of Police under Act XIII of 1859—Magt. of Nowgong, 9th Aug. 1877—Offg. Dy. Commr., 4th gr., Nowgong, 13th

June 1878—4th gr., Goalpara, 17th Sep. 1878—Offg. Supt. of Emigr. and Embarkn. Agent in the sub-divn. of Dhubri, 12th Sep. 1878—Priv. leave for 3 months from 15th Dec. 1878.

ARTHUR CLIFFORD TUTE.—Arrd. 28th Oct. 1871—Asst. Magt., Patna, 4th Apl. 1872—Sarun, 10th Apl. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 30th July 1872—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, 8th July 1873—Passed the higher standard, 1st Jan. 1874—Asst. Magt., Jung-pore Divn., Moorshedabad dist. 22nd Dec. 1874—Baraset, 12th Aug. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 8th Apl. 1876—2nd gr., Mozufferpore, 10th May 1876—1st gr., 24th Aug. 1876—2nd gr. 20th Sep. 1876—Asst. Magt., 18th Dec. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Mar. 1877—On famine relief duty, Salem 17th Mar. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 18th June 1877—On famine duty, Trichinopoly, 14th Sep. 1877—Furl. from 19th Nov. 1877 to 18th Nov. 1878—Asst. Magt., Mozufferpore, 7th Dec. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 20th Mar. 1879.

CHARLES WALTER BOLTON.—Arrd. 7th Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 30th Oct. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 13th June 1873—Passed the higher standard, 26th May 1874—In charge of the Ramporehat sub-divn., 17th Nov. 1874—Moorshedabad, 8th Apl. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Apl. 1876—Offg. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Doomka, 11th Aug. 1876—Offg. Pol. Agent, Hill Tipperah, 26th Apl. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., Chittagong, 4th Nov. 1878—2nd gr., 12th Dec. 1878—Offg. Under-Secy. to the Govt. of Bengal, 4th Feb. 1879—Under-Secy., 3rd Mar. 1879.

FRANCIS FREDERICK HANDLEY.—Arrd. 7th Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt., Midnapore, 30th Oct. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 30th Apl. 1873—In charge of the Central Jail, Midnapore, 12th June, 1873—Bhagulpore, 21st Feb. 1874—Passed the higher standard, 16th Mar. 1874—Furl. from 13th Apl. 1874 to 2nd Oct. 1875—Asst. Magt., Pooree, offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 27th Oct. 1875—Asst. Magt., 27th Nov. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Mar. 1876—Offg. Magt., Pooree, 8th Apl. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 9th May 1876—2nd gr., 27th Nov. 1876—1st gr., 9th Apl. 1877—1st gr., Cuttack, 13th Apl. 1877—Cuttack, 30th May 1878—1st gr., 23rd July 1878—2nd gr., 1st Jan. 1879—1st gr., 19th Mar. 1879—Offg. Magt., Cuttack, 19th Aug. 1879.

HERBERT JOHN HAMILTON FASSON.—Arrd. 11th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 27th Nov. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 13th June 1873—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, 3rd Mar. 1874—On famine relief duty at Dinagepore, 7th Mar. 1874—Passed the higher standard, 14th Sept. 1874—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 21st Dec. 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1876—2nd gr., Rajshahi, 19th June 1876—1st gr., 8th Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 16th Nov. 1876—Spl. duty in Julpigoree, 10th Feb. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Feb. 1877—Asst. Settlement Officer, Chittagong, 11th June 1877.

ANANDARAM BOROOAH.—Arrd. 9th Sep. 1872—Asst. Dy. Commr., Seesaugor, 11th Dec. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 13th June 1873—Absent without leave from 11th July to 13th Aug. 1873—Asst. to the Dy. Commr., Seesaugor, 14th Aug. 1873—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 9th Mar. 1874—Mymensingh, 19th Apl. 1874—Passed the higher standard, 16th Jan. 1875—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, 14th Sep. 1875—Bardwan, 8th Mar. 1877—In charge of the Raneegunge sub-divn., 4th Oct. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Bardwan, 21st Jan. 1878—In charge of the Culnah divn., 25th Jan. 1878—In charge of the Jehanabad divn., 4th Feb. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Apl. 1878—2nd gr., 30th Dec. 1878—1st gr., 28th Mar. 1879—1st gr., Dinagepore, 24th June 1879.

GEORGE STEVENSON.—Arrd. 11th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 18th Nov. 1872—Pooree, 10th Feb. 1873—Passed the lower standard, 18th May 1873—Passed the higher standard, 4th May 1874—Asst. Magt., Balasore, and to have charge of the Bhudruck divn., 8th May 1874—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 12th Apl. 1873—Offg. Asst. Magt., Balasore, 7th Dec. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Mar. 1877—1st gr., 18th June 1877—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 11th Mar. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Dec. 1878—1st gr., 3rd Apl. 1879.

HENRY MORTIMER DURAND.—Arrd. 3rd Mar. 1873—Asst. Magt. Howrah, 12th Mar. 1873—Passed the lower standard, 9th Sep. 1873—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, 13th Sep. 1873—Passed the higher standard, 20th Apl. 1874—Offg. Attaché in the Foreign Dept., 29th June 1874—Jr. Attaché, 4th Sep. 1874—Offg. Senr. Attaché, 20th Mar. 1876—Offg. Pol. Asst. 1st class, and 1st Asst., to the Agent to the Gov.-Genl., Rajpootana, 14th July 1876—In charge of the office of Agent, Gov.-Genl., Rajpootana, 7th Sep. 1877—Offg. Personal Asst. 1st class, 5th Nov. 1877—Offg. Asst. Secy. to the Govt.,

of India, Foreign Dept., 20th Nov. 1877—Pol. Agent, 1st class, Offg. Asst. Secy. 10th Dec. 1877.

JOHN KNOX WIGHT.—Arrd. 4th Dec. 1872—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, 22nd Dec. 1872—Passed the lower standard 22nd June 1873—Asst. Magt., Bhagulpore, 21st Mar. 1874—Deputed on famine duty, 22nd Apl. 1874—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 11th Nov. 1874—Services placed at the displ. of the Govt., of India, Home Dept., 10th Dec. 1874—Asst. Commr., 3rd gr., Sylhet, 22nd Dec. 1874—Offg., 2nd gr., 14th Jan. 1875—Justice of the Peace, 25th Mar. 1875—Offg. Asst. Commr., 1st gr., 10th Apl. 1875—Asst. Insp. of Immigrants in the dist., of Sylhet, 17th May 1876—Offg. Asst. Commr., 1st gr., 6th July 1876—privilege leave from 17th Nov. 1876 to 16th Feb. 1877—Offg. Asst. Commr., 1st gr., Sylhet 8th Mar. 1877—Offg. Dy., Commr., 4th gr., Sylhet, 5th Apl. 1877—Confirmed 2nd gr., Asst. Commr., 30th Aug. 1877—Sub-divnl. Officer, Habiganj.

JOHN NUGENT.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, 21st Nov. 1872—Passed the lower standard 13th June 1873—Asst. Magt., Bogra, 13th Mar. 1874—Furreedpore, 16th Nov. 1874—Passed the higher standard 28th Dec. 1874—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 1st July 1875—Sarun, 6th Aug. 1875—in charge of the Seetamarhi divn. of the Mozufferpore dist. 6th Dec. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Apl. 1876—in charge of the Bettiah divn. of the Chumparun dist., 17th June 1876—1st gr., 31st Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 15th Sep. 1876—Asst. Magt., 5th Dec. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 6th Mar. 1877—Spl. leave from 21st May to 14th Nov. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Bettiah, 29th Nov. 1877—1st gr., 21st Jan. 1878—2nd gr., 5th Dec. 1878—1st gr., 6th Apl. 1879.

FRANK ROBERT STANLEY COLLIER.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, 15th Nov. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 13th June 1873—Offg. Cant. Magt., Dum-Dum, 25th July 1873—Asst. Magt., Hooghly, 28th Aug. 1873—Offg. Cant. Magt., Dum-Dum, 4th Oct. 1873—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 24th Nov. 1873—Furreedpore, 5th Jan. 1874—Dinagapore, 17th Mar. 1874 (on famine duty)—In charge of the office of the Magt., Bogra, 19th Oct. 1874—Asst. Magt. Rangpur, 17th Dec. 1874—Passed the higher standard 9th Nov. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th June 1877—Asst. Magt., 13th July 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Apl. 1878—1st gr., 11th May 1878—2nd gr., 12th July 1878—2nd gr., Jessore, 11th Aug. 1878—in charge of the Goalundo divn., 17th Sep. 1878—Asst. Magt., 1st Dec. 1878—in charge of the Seetamarhi divn. of the Mozufferpore dist., 26th Dec. 1878—Transferred to the Sadder Station of the Mozufferpore dist., 24th Feb. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 29th Apl. 1879—1st gr., 11th Sep. 1879.

CHARLES RANDALL MARINDIN.—Arrd. 11th Nov. 1872—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs. 15th Nov. 1872—Furreedpore, Oct. 1873—Shahabad, 16th Jan. 1874—Passed the lower standard, 17th Feb. 1874—Asst. Magt. for employment on relief work, Tirhoot, 27th Feb. 1874—Passed the higher standard 4th Apl. 1874—Asst. Magt., Mozufferpore 4th Apl. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 29th Apl. 1876—in charge of the Buxar divn. of the Shahabad dist., 15th May 1876—Asst. Magt. 28th Nov. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Apl. 1877—1st gr., 21st June 1877—2nd gr., 1st Feb. 1878—1st gr., 7th Mar. 1878—1st gr., Bhagulpore, 9th Sep. 1878—2nd gr., 5th Dec. 1878—1st gr., 18th Apl. 1879.

ALFRED HINUBER HAGGARD.—Arrd. 22nd Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt., Bankoora, 31st Oct. 1872—Passed the lower standard 1st May 1873—Asst. Magt., Patna, 10th July 1873—in charge of the Buxar sub-divn, 20th Sep. 1873—Asst. Magt., Patna, 28th Nov. 1873—Tirhoot, 3rd Jan. 1874—Passed the higher standard 28th Jan. 1874—in charge of the Tajpore sub-divn, 3rd Oct. 1874—of the Buxar divn of the Shahabad dist, 11th Jan. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th May 1875—Asst. Magt., 13th Nov. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 25th Mar. 1876—1st gr., 29th Apl. 1876—1st gr., Hooghly, 21st May 1876—2nd gr., 16th Nov. 1876—Asst. Magt., 30th Jan. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Feb. 1877—1st gr., 13th Apl. 1877—1st gr., 15th Feb. 1878—Furl from 9th Apl. to 8th Oct. 1878—Asst. Magt., Serajgunge in Pubna, 29th Oct. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Mar. 1879—1st gr., 1st Apl. 1879—1st gr., Chittagong, 6th Aug. 1879—Offg. Magt., Chittagong, 7th Sep. 1879—Furl for one year, from Oct. 1879.

CHARLES JAMES O'DONNELL.—Arrd. 14th Oct. 1872—Asst. Magt. Jessore, 29th Oct. 1872—Passed the lower standard, 13th June 1873—Asst. Magt., Birbhum, on famine duty, 6th June 1874—Passed the higher standard, 2th Oct. 1874—Asst. Magt., Jenidah subdivn, Jessore dist., 27th Oct. 1874—Asst. to the Dir.-Genl. of Statistics, in the Bengal branch 17th Feb. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 28th Mar. 1876—2nd gr. Mymensingh, 3rd June 1876—1st gr., 9th Aug. 1876—2nd gr., 13th Nov. 1876—Asst. Magt., 30th Dec.

1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 20th Feb 1877—1st gr, 14th Apr 1877—1st gr, Chumparun, 16th May 1877—2nd gr, 25th May 1877—Gya 27th June 1877—1st gr, 18th Sep 1877—2nd gr, 5th Dec 1877—1st gr, 21st Jan 1878—2nd gr, 4th Feb 1878—1st gr, 21st Feb 1878—Sewan sub-divn, Sarun dist, 15th May 1878—Gopalgunge subdivn, Sarun dist, 7th Aug 1878—2nd gr, 20th Dec 1878—1st gr, 2nd Apr 1879.

MICHAEL FINUCANE.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872—Asst Magt, Dinagepore, 6th Dec 1872—Passed the lower standard, 22nd July 1873—Passed the higher standard, 12th Oct 1874—Asst Magt, Monghyr, 27th Oct 1874—Jamooe sub-divn, Monghyr dist, 8th July 1875—Begooseraï sub-divn, Monghyr dist, 27th Sep 1875—Asst Sett'l Officer, Durbhngga, 21st Mar 1876.

KRISHNA GOVINDA GUPTA.—Arrd 24th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, Backergunge, 18th Nov 1873—Dinagepore, 19th Mar 1874—on famine duty at Bogra, 25th Mar 1874—Backergunge, 14th Nov 1874—Passed the lower standard, 27th Nov 1874—Passed the higher standard, 21st Aug 1875—Asst Magt, Patuakhally divn, in the Backergunge dist, 15th Feb 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 5th May 1876—Asst Magt, 27th Nov 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 9th Apr 1877—1st gr, 25th June 1877—Ferozepore div, Backergunge dist, 24th Oct 1877—2nd gr, 4th Dec 1877—2nd gr, 24th Jan 1878—1st gr, 7th March 1878—2nd gr, 5th Dec 1878—Kendraparah divn of the Cuttack dist, 22nd Feb 1879—1st gr, 19th Apr 1879.

HERMANN MICHAEL KISCH, M.A.—Arrd 24th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, Hooghly, 3rd Nov 1873—Patna 19th Mar 1874 (on famine duty)—Passed the lower standard, 28th Apr 1874—Asst Magt, Chittagong, 14th Jan 1875—Asst to the Dr-Gl of Statistics, in the Bengal branch 15th Feb 1875—Passed the higher standard 15th June 1875—Offg Asst Commr, 2nd gr, Manbhoom, 27th Apr 1876—On famine relief duty at Bellary, 27th Feb 1877—Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, continuing on famine duty, 5th July 1877—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, Ag, Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 1st May 1878—Rev and Genl Depts, 3rd May 1878—Jud and Pol Depts, 31st July 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 24-Pergs, 2nd Nov 1878—2nd gr, 3rd Dec 1878—Offg Under-Secy to the Govt of Bengal, Jud and Pol Depts, 1st Feb 1879.

HENRY MURRAY TOBIN.—Arrd 23rd Oct 1873—Asst Commr, Hazaribagh, 3rd Nov 1873—Passed the lower standard, 8th Sep 1874—Asst Commr, Lohardugga, 9th Dec 1874—Asst Magt, Raneegunge sub-divn of the Bardwan dist, 22nd Mar 1875—Passed the higher standard, 11th July 1875—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 10th Apr 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 6th July 1876—Asst Magt, 16th Nov 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 13th Apr 1877—1st gr, 11th July 1877—2nd gr, 24th Nov 1877—2nd gr, Bardwan, 13th Dec 1877—1st gr, 9th Mar 1878—2nd gr, 3rd Dec 1878—1st gr, 23rd Apr 1879—1st gr, Raneegunge sub-divn of the Bardwan dist, 22nd Aug 1879.

HERBERT HOPE RISLEY.—Arrd 24th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, Midnapore, 10th Nov 1873—Passed the lower standard, 26th June 1874—Passed the higher standard, 18th Jan 1875—Asst to the Dir-Genl of Statistics, in the Bengal branch 15th Feb 1875—Offg Asst Secy to the Govt of Bengal, 2nd May 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, Midnapore, 30th July 1876—Offg Asst Secy to the Govt of Bengal, 7th Aug 1876—On spl duty in the Bengal Sect, 2nd Nov 1876—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 1st Feb 1877—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 10th Apr 1877—Offg Asst Secy to the Govt of Bengal, 22nd Apr 1877—Offg Under-Secy 8th July 1877—Asst Secy, Offg Under-Secy, 3rd Oct 1877—Under-Secy to the Govt of Bengal, Rev and Genl Depts, 1st Jan 1878—Offg Under-Secy to the Govt of India in the Home Dept, 1st Feb 1879—Under-Secy to the Govt of Bengal, 26th May 1879—Spl leave from 4th July 1879.

GEORGE ABRAHAM GRIERSON.—Arrd 25th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, Jessore, 28th Oct 1873—Patna on famine duty, 23rd Mar 1874—on famine duty at Sitamarhi divn, 23rd Apr 1874—Passed the lower standard 28th Apr 1874—Asst Magt, Howrah, 27th Oct 1874—Passed the higher standard, 26th Apr 1875—Asst Magt, Moorshedabad, 16th Aug 1875—Rungpore 23rd Feb 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 8th Aug 1876—In charge of Magt's office, 1st Oct 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 6th Nov 1876—Asst Magt, 16th Nov 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 14th Apr 1877—1st gr, 5th July 1877—Bhagulpore, 9th Oct 1877—2nd gr, 24th Nov 1877—2nd gr, Durbhunga, 7th Jan 1878—1st gr, 2nd Apr 1878—2nd gr, 1st Dec 1878—Asst Magt, 7th Jan 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 23rd Apr 1879.

GEORGE GODFREY.—Arrd. 20th Oct. 1873—Asst Magt, Nadia, 23rd Oct 1873—on famine duty, Patna, 8th May 1874—Asst Magt, Mymensingh, 16th Dec 1874—Asst

Commr, 3rd gr, Assam, 18th Dec 1874—Posted to Lukhimpore, 7th Feb 1875—Offg Asst Commr, 2nd gr, 2nd Feb 1875—Justice of the Peace, 20th July 1875—Temply placed in charge of the sub-divn of North Lukhimpore, 12th July 1876—Sub-Regtr, North Lukhimpore, 18th July 1876—Transferred to head-quarters Lukhimpore, 2nd Nov 1876—Sub-Regtr of the Sudder sub-divn of Dibrugarh, 4th Nov 1876—Transferred to head-quarters Khasi and Jaintia Hills, 2nd July 1877—Offg Asst Secy, 5th July 1877—Offg Asst Commr, 1st gr, 22nd Oct 1877—Transferred to Sibsagar, and placed in charge of the sub-divn of Golaghat, 6th Nov 1877—2nd gr, 16th Nov 1877—1st gr, 1st Jan 1878—Transferred to Jorhat, 2nd Sep 1878—Transferred to Golaghat, 20th Oct 1878.

ANDREW WALLACE MACKIE.—Arrd. 20th Oct. 1873—Asst. Mag., 24-Pergs., 27th Oct. 1873—Patna divn. on fam. duty, 10th Mar. 1874—Passed the lower standard, 20th Apl. 1874—Asst. Magt., Nadia, 21st Nov. 1874—Asst. to the Dir. Genl. of Statistics, in the Bengal branch, 17th Feb. 1875—Passed the higher standard, 15th June 1875—Asst. Magt., Purneah, 27th May 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 9th Aug. 1876—Asst. Magt., 13th Nov. 1876—On fam. relief duty, Nellore, 11th Mar. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., continuing on fam. duty, 12th May 1877—1st gr., 18th July 1877—2nd gr., 1st Dec. 1877—2nd gr., Purneah, 3rd Feb. 1878—1st gr., 3rd Apl. 1878—1st gr., Baccergunge, 31st July 1878—2nd gr., 26th Nov. 1878—Asst. Magt., 1st Jan. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1879—1st gr., 24th Apl. 1879.

EDWARD RICHARD HENRY.—Arrd. 5th Nov. 1873, transferred from North-Western Provs.—Asst. Magt., Tirhoot, on fam. duty, 10th Dec. 1873—Passed the lower standard, 12th May 1874—Asst. Magt., Durbhunga, 30th Jan. 1875—Passed the higher standard, 4th Nov. 1875—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Aug. 1876—Asst. Magt. 15th Oct. 1876—Offg. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Rajmehal sub-divn., Sonthal Pergs. 27th Mar. 1877—1st gr., 2nd Apl. 1877—Temp. Asst. Commr., 2nd gr., Agt. 1st gr., 1st Apl. 1878—Spl. leave from 14th Sept. 1878 to 11th Mar. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1879—In charge of the Cant. Magty., Dinapore, 16th Apl. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 1st gr., 29th Apl. 1879—Priv. Secy. to the Lt.-Govr. of Bengal, 15th July 1879.

SAMUEL SIMPSON JONES.—Arrd 24th Oct 1873—Asst Magt, Moorshedabad, 31st Oct 1873—On fam. duty, Kandi, 10th Apl 1874—Passed the lower standard 22nd Apl 1874—Asst Magt Moorshedabad, 23rd Nov 1874—Shahabad, 10th Feb 1875—Passed the higher standard 16th July 1875—Asst Magt, Durbhunga, 28th Apl 1876—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 24th Aug 1876—Asst Magt, 20th Sept 1876—Sitamarhi divn, Moosheperpo dist, 4th Dec 1876—Offg Asst Commr, 2nd gr, Manbhoon, 2nd Apl 1877—Hazaribagh, 16th Apl 1877—Rajmehal, 11th Nov 1878.

LANCELOT HARE.—Arrd 5th Nov 1873—Asst Magt, Dacca 17th Nov 1873—Bankoora on famine relief duty, 29th July 1874—Dacca, 21st Dec 1874—Services placed at the displ of the Govt of India, Home Dept, 25th Mar 1875—at the displ of the Chief Commr of Assam—Offg 2nd gr, Asst Commr, Sylhet 3rd June 1875—Asst Insp of Immigrants, 25th Aug 1875—Justice of the Peace, 24th June 75, within the dist or Sylhet—Transferred to the dist of Khasi and Jaintia Hills, 24th Nov 1875—Sylhet, 7th Apl 1876—Cachar, 9th Nov 1876—Sub-registrar of the sudder divn of Cachar, 11th Nov 1876—Powers of a Moonriff, 17th Jan 1877—Asst Insp of Immigrants within Cachar, 13th Apl 1877—Priv leave from 5th July to 4th Oct 1877—3rd gr Asst Commr, Offg 2nd gr, 1st Jan 1878—In charge of the Dy Commr's office from 1st to 6th Mar 1878—Offg 4th gr Dy Commr, Cachar, from 7th Mar to 14th Apl 1878—Services placed at the displ of the Govt of India, Home Dept, 31st July 1878—of the Govt of Bengal, 18th Oct 1878,—Offg 2nd gr Jt.-Magt, Dinagepore, 1st Nov 1878—Asst Magt, 30th Dec 1878—Asst Secy to the Chief Commr of Assam, 10th Mar 1879.

GEORGE ELDON MANISTY.—Arrd 6th Dec 1873—Asst Magt, Rajshahi, 17th Dec 1873—Relief Officer under the Commr of Rajshahi, 9th Feb 1874—Asst Magt, Rajshahi, 1st Nov 1874—Passed the lower standard 10th Nov 1874—Asst Magt, Nattore, 7th Apl 1875—Passed the higher standard exmn, 6th Nov 1875—Furl on priv affairs, from 9th June 1876 to 14th Nov 1877—Asst Magt, Midnapore, Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 11th Dec 1877—Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 4th Apl 1878—Asst Magt, Tajpore, in Durbhunga, Offg Jt.-Magt, 1st gr, 24th Sept 1878—Asst Magt, 20th Dec 1878—Offg Jt.-Magt, 2nd gr, 2nd Apl 1879—1st gr, 29th Apl 1879.

DAVID BIRD ALLEN.—Arrd 5th Nov 1873—Asst Magt, Patna, 15th Nov 1873—Passed the lower standard 22nd May 1874—Asst Magt, Tirhoot, 27th May 1874—In charge of the Betteah sub-divn of the Chumparrun dist, 16th Jan 1875—Asst to the Dir. Genl of Statistics, 16th Feb 1875—Asst Magt, Nadia, 25th May 1876—Dacca, 18th Dec

1876—24-Pergs, 8th July 1878—Furl from 10th July 1878 to 9th Jan 1879—Asst Magt., Jehanabad sub-divn of the Gya dist, 22nd Jan 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 19th Aug 1879.

JOHN DELABERE GAEL.—Arrd 16th Nov 1874—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 27th Nov 1874—Offg Cant Magt, Dum-Dum, 25th May 1875—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 1st Sept 1875—Passed the lower standard 4th Nov 1875—Asst Magt, Moorshedabad, 16th Nov. 1875—in charge of Ramporehat sub-divn of the Moorshedabad dist, 8th Apr 1876—Passed the higher standard, 25th Apr 1877—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 15th Aug 1877—Asst Magt, 21st Jan 1878—Furl on medl cert, from 5th Mar to 30th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, Pubna, 21st Dec 1878—Meherpore divn, Nadia dist, 22nd Apr 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 2nd May 1879—Sewan and Gopalgunge sub-divns, of the Sarun dist, 31st July 1879—1st gr, 30th Aug 1879.

FRANCIS HENRY HARDING—Arrd. 24th Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad, 3rd Dec. 1874—Passed the lower standard, 25th June 1875—Asst. Magt., Ramporehat, divn., 25th June 1875—Jungypore divn., 20th July 1875—Passed the higher standard, 6th Nov 1875—Asst Magt, 19th Sept 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 12th May 1877—2nd gr, Dacca, 12th Aug 1877—1st gr, 21st Aug 1877—Asst Magt, 21st Nov 1877—Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 21st Jan 1878—Offg Magt, Dacca, 21st Mar 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, Serampore, 26th Apr 1878—2nd gr, 22nd Nov 1878—Asst magt, 20th Dec 1878—Buxar divn, Shahabad dist, 4th Mar 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 29th Mar 1879—1st gr, 1st May 1879.

CECIL MICHAEL WILFORD BRETT.—Arrd 30th Nov 1874—Asst Magt, Dinagepore, 17th Dec 1874—Passed the lower standard, 22nd July 1875—Passed the higher standard, 6th Nov 1875—Asst Magt, Pubna, 15th Jan 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 31st Aug 1876—Asst Magt, 15th Sept 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 1st May 1877—1st gr, 30th Aug 1877—Asst Magt, 20th Nov 1877—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 15th Feb 1878—1st gr, 5th Apr 1878—1st gr, Hazaribagh, 8th Nov 1878—2nd gr, 12th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, 12th Dec 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, Hooghly, 23rd Apr 1879—1st gr, 2nd May 1879—2nd gr, 20th June 1879—1st gr, 1st July 1879.

WILLIAM DUNBAR BLYTH.—Arrd 16th Nov 1874—Asst Magt, Birbhum, 5th Dec 1874—Maldah, 14th June 1875—Passed the lower standard 6th Nov 1875—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1876—Asst Magt, Nattore sub-divn of the Rajshahi dist, 4th June 1876—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 25th June 1877—Rajshahi, 27th July 1877—2nd gr., 24-Pergs, 7th Jan 1878—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 21st Jan 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr., 9th Mar 1878—Asst Magt, 23rd Apr 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 24th Apr 1878—1st gr, 13th May 1878—2nd gr, 20th July 1878—Sealdah, 5th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 3rd Dec 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 23rd Apr 1879—1st gr, 20th July 1879—Offg Jr Secy to the Board of Rev, 20th Aug 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 24-Pergs, 24th Aug 1879.

HENRY SAVAGE.—Arrd 23rd Oct 1874—Asst Magt, Rangpur, 10th Nov 1874—Birbhum—2nd June 1875—Passed the lower standard, 26th July 1875—Passed the higher standard, 8th Mar 1876—Asst Magt, Raneegunge, of the Bardwan, dist, 1st Mar 1877—Offg Magt, 2nd gr, 14th May 1877—1st gr, 15th Aug 1877—Offg Magt, Bankoora, 5th Oct 1877—Asst Magt, Bardwan, 21st Dec 1877—Asst Magt 3rd Feb 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 5th Mar 1878—1st gr, 17th Apr 1878—2nd gr, 9th Sep 1878—1st gr, 13th Sep 1878—2nd gr, 8th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, 5th Dec 1878—Chittagong, 21st Feb 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 6th Apr 1879—1st gr, 3rd May 1879—2nd gr, 1st July 1879.

JOSEPH KENNEDY.—Arrd 23rd Oct 1874—Asst Magt, Jessore, 7th Nov 1874—Passed, the lower standard, 6th Nov 1875—Passed the higher standard 7th —Asst Magt, 21st Jan 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 23rd Apr 1878—On spl duty, Madras, 24th July 1878—Asst Magt, Begooserai, Monghyr, 2nd Mar 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 3rd May 1879—Asst Magt, 20th June 1879—Offg Jt-Magt 2nd gr, 28th June 1879—1st gr, 7th Sep 1879.

HENRY ARTHUR DEUTEROS PHILLIPS.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1874—Asst. Magt., Bala-sore, 17th Nov. 1874—Passed the lower standard 26th Apr 1875—Asst. Magt., and Kendrapara divn., of the Kuttack dist., 26th Oct. 1875—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 16th June 1877—Sarun, 13th July 1877—Asst. Magt., 6th Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Jan., 1878—Asst. Magt., 1st Feb. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Mar. 1878—Asst. Magt. Pooree, Mar. 1878—On famine relief duty, Bellary, 15th Aug. 1878—Asst. Magt. Pooree 27th Jan. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Apr., 1879—3rd gr., 1st July 1879.

ROBERT CARSTAIRS.—Arrd. 16th Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt., Tipperah, 30th Nov. 1874—Passed the lower standard 6th Nov. 1875—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 11th July 1877—Asst. Magt., 5th Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd Apl. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., Goalundo divn., of the Furreedpore dist. 1st gr., 3rd May 1878—2nd gr., 23rd July 1878—Asst. Magt., 17th Dec. 1878—Serampore divn., of the Hooghly dist., 28th Mar. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 24th Apl. 1879—1st gr., 23rd July 1879.

WILLIAM ROBERT MILLAR.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1874.—Asst. Magt., Dacca, 16th Nov. 1874—Passed the lower standard 4th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 7th Mar. 1876—Chupra, in Sarun, 25th Apl. 1876—Passed the higher standard 4th May 1876—Furl. from 16th June 1876.

FREDERICK BEATSON TAYLOR.—Arrd. 30th Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt., Nadia, 9th Dec. 1874—Passed the lower standard 9th Aug. 1875—Passed the higher standard, 6th May 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st June 1877—Asst. Magt., 4th Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Mar. 1878—2nd gr., Jessore, 16th May 1878—Asst. Magt., 5th Dec. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Apl. 1879—Offg. Magt., Jessore, 20th May 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 2nd June 1879—1st gr., 13th July 1879.

DAVID NORTON.—Arrd. 24th Nov. 1874—Asst. Magt. Midnapore, 6th Dec. 1874—Passed the lower standard 6th Nov. 1875—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1876—Asst. Magt., Contai divn., Midnapore dist., Jan. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 5th July 1877—Asst. Magt., 29th Nov. 1877—Spl. leave from 16th Feb. to 15th Aug. 1878—Buxar in Shahabad, 29th Aug. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 9th Sep. 1878—Asst. Magt., 3rd Dec. 1878—Shahabad, 8th Mar. 1879—Furl. from 4th Apl. 1879.

HARRY LEE.—Arrd. 25th Nov. 1874—Asst. magt. Bardwan, 8th Dec. 1874—Passed the lower standard, 6th Nov. 1875—Asst. magt., Howrah, 29th Nov. 1875—Offg. Asst. Secy. of the Govt. of Bengal, 30th Mar. 1876—Asst. Magt., Baraset, 3rd May 1876—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1876—Offg. Cant. Magt., Dum-Dum, and Judge of the Small Cause Court 12th Oct. 1876—Asst. Magt., Baraset, 8th Dec. 1876—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Apl. 1877—Offg. Cant. Magt., Dum-Dum, and Judge of the Small Cause Court 15th June 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 27th July 1877—1st gr., 20th Sep. 1877—Asst. Magt., 20th Nov. 1877—Durbhunga, 15th Dec. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 21st Jan. 1878—1st gr., 2nd May 1878—Offg. Magt., Durbhunga, 8th May 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt. 1st gr., 25th May 1878—Asst. Magt., 5th Dec. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Apl. 1879—1st gr., 19th May 1879—Asst. Magt., 10th June 1879.

BRAJENDRA NATH DE.—Arrd. 6th Sep. 1875—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 27th Sep. 1875—Passed the lower standard 6th May 1876—Asst. Magt., Durbhunga, 22nd Dec. 1876—Passed the higher standard 31st July 1877—Asst. Magt., Bhubooah divn., of the Shahabad dist., 7th Jan. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Apl. 1878—Asst. Magt., 22nd Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 19th May 1879—Asst. Magt., and Collr. 20th June 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1879.

ARTHUR JOHN PRIMROSE.—Arrd. 15th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., Monghyr, 27th Nov. 1875—Passed the lower standard 15th May 1876—Asst. Magt., Hajepore, Mozufferpore, 9th March 1877—Passed the higher standard 21st Aug. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 18th Sep. 1877—Asst. Magt., 24th Nov. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Apl. 1878—1st gr., 11th May 1878—2nd gr., 12th July 1878—Asst. Magt., 26th Nov. 1878—Bagdogra, Rangpur, 13th Dec. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 29th Apl. 1879—1st gr., 19th Aug. 1879—Services placed at the disposal of the Govt., of India, Home, Revenue and Agricultural Dept., 8th Nov. 1879.

FREDERICK EDEN PARGITER.—Arrd. 9th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., Chittagong, 17th Nov. 1875—Passed the lower standard 9th May 1876—Passed the higher standard 3rd July 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Apl. 1878—Dacca, 25th June 1878—Offg. Magt., Dacca, 15th July 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., Dacca, 23rd July 1878—2nd gr. Magoorah, in Jessore, 6th Oct. 1878—Asst. Magt., 12th Nov. 1878—Offg. Commr. of Soonderbund divn., 24-Pergs. 27th Apl. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th May 1879—Asst. Magt., 2nd June 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st July 1879.

HENRY FARRER.—Arrd. 15th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., Cuttack, 2nd Dec. 1875—Passed the lower standard 15th May 1876—In charge of the Japore divn., Cuttack, 7th July 1877—Passed the higher standard 20th July 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 30th Aug. 1877—Asst. Magt., 24th Nov. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Apl. 1878—1st gr., 30th May 1878—2nd gr., 13th July 1878—Asst. Magt., 23rd Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 1st May 1879—Serajunge divn., of the Pubna dist., 27th July 1879.

GEORGE WILLIAM PLACE—Arrd 29th Nov 1875—Posted to Assam 8th Oct 1875—Asst Commr, Kamroop, 28th Dec 1875—3rd gr Asst Commr 17th Jan 1876—Transferred to Sylhet, 6th Oct 1876—Asst Insp of Immgt in Sylhet, 7th Nov 1876—Transferred to Cachar, 31st Jan 1878—Sub-Reg of Silchar, 19th Feb 1878—In charge of Hailakandi sub-divn, 18th July 1878—Asst Insp of Immgt in Cachar, 21st Aug 1878—Justice of the Peace, 10th Oct 1878.

JOHN GERALD RITCHIE—Arrd 28th Oct 1875—Asst Magt 24-Pergs, 4th Nov 1875—Passed the lower standard 6th May 1876—Asst Magt, Diamond Harbour, 9th Aug 1876—Gya, 10th Apr 1877—Bettiah, Chumparun, 14th June 1877—Passed the higher standard 17th Aug 1877—Asst Magt Dhumsong, Darjeeling, 9th Jan 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 13th May 1878—Asst Commr, 3rd gr, Offg 2nd gr, 19th Aug 1878—Asst Magt, Patna, 22nd Nov 1878—Sasseram sub-divn, Shahabad dist, 1st Mar 1879—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 13th July 1879.

HERBERT PARSONS PETERSON—Arrd 10th Nov 1875—Asst Magt, Jessore, 17th Nov 1875—Passed the lower standard 9th Nov 1876—Asst Magt, Khoolna divn, Jessore dist, Feb 1877—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 19th Aug 1879—Goalundo divn of the Fureedpore dist, 20th Aug 1879.

CHARLES RICHARDSON MARRIOTT—Arrd. 29th Nov. 1875—Ass. Magt., Patna, 16th Dec. 1875—Chumparun, 8th Jan. 1876—Passed the lower standard 9th Nov. 1876—Asst. Magt., Sasseram divn., of the Shahabad dist., 6th March 1877—Seetamarhi divn., Mozufferpore dist., 19th Apr. 1877—Passed the higher standard, 6th May 1878—Asst. Magt., Seetamarhi divn. of the Mozufferpore dist., 12th Mar. 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 26th Aug. 1879.

THOMAS CANDY MITCHELL—Arrd. 13th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., Purneah, 25th Nov. 1875—Supernumerary Asst. Commr., British Burmah, 4th May 1876—Services placed at the disposal of the Govt. of India, Home Dept., 5th May 1876—Asst. Commr., Akyab, 25th May 1876—Ag. Asst. Commr., 3rd gr., from 12th to 30th Aug. 1876—in charge of the Yandoon divn. of the Thonkwa dist., 18th Dec. 1876—Asst. Magt., Rangoon, 26th Feb. 1877—in charge of the Yandoon Divn., of the Thonkwa dist., 21st Mar. 1877—Asst. Commr., 4th gr., 27th Dec. 1877.

JAMES DRUMMOND ANDERSON—Arrd. 14th Nov. 1875—Asst. Magt., Mymensingh, 9th Dec. 1875—Passed the lower standard, 9th Nov. 1876—Asst. Magt., Atia sub-divn., Mymensingh dist., 22nd Feb. 1877—Jamalpore divn., Mymensingh dist., 1st July 1877—Passed the higher standard, 16th July 1877—Asst. Magt., Meherpore sub-divn., Nadia dist., 11th Nov. 1877—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 3rd May 1878—Asst. Magt., 8th Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1879.

ROBERT HILDEBRAND ANDERSON—Arrd. 7th Dec. 1876—Asst. Magt., Dacca, Dec. 1876—Mymensingh, 19th Apr. 1877—Passed the lower standard, 28th Aug. 1877—Asst. Magt., Koooshtea Divn., Nadia dist., 6th Feb. 1878—Passed the higher standard, 3rd Apr. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 30th Apr. 1878—Asst. Magt., 12th July 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 12th Sep. 1878—Asst. Magt., 2nd Nov. 1878—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd July 1879.

BERNARD GEORGE GEIDT—Arrd 30th Nov 1876—sst Magt, Bardwan 11th Dec 1876—Services placed at the disposal of Govt of India, 6th Nov 1877—of the Chief Commr of Assam, 26th Oct 1877—Ass-Commr 3rd gr, Sylhet, 10th Nov 1877—Offg Asst Commr, 2nd gr, 23rd Apr 1878—Subt divnal Officer, Karimganj, Sylhet, 1st Aug 1878.

DUNCAN CAMERON—Arrd 30th Nov 1876—Asst Magt, Moorshedabad 11th Dec 1876—Passed the lower standard 9th July 1877—Asst Magt, Nattore, Rajshahi divn, 27th July 1877—Passed the higher standard 12th Feb 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 11th May 1878—Asst Magt, 13th July 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 13th Sep 1878—Asst Magt Rajshahi dist, 18th Sep 1878—Bettiah divn of the Chumparun dist, 10th Sep 1879.

ROBERT BLAIR McCABE—Arrd 30th Nov 1876—Supy wsst Commr, 3rd gr, in Assam, and posted to the sudder station, Dibrugarh, 6th Dec 1876—Sub-regr of the sudder sub-divn of Lakhimpore, 14th June 1877—3rd gr, of Asst Commr, 1st Jan 1877—in charge of the sub-divn, of Jaipore in Lakhimpore, 22nd Mar 1878—Justice of the Peace, 10th July 1878—Offg Asst Commr, 2nd gr, from 10th July 1878—Asst Insp of Immgt Lakhimpore, 8th Dec 1878.

CECIL JOSEPH SALKELD FAULDER—Arrd 9th Dec 1876—Asst Magt, Pubna, 19th Dec 1876—Furl from 11th Jan to 2nd Feb 1877—Asst Magt, Pubna, 3rd Feb 1877—Passed the lower standard 31st July 1877—Asst Magt, in charge of the Gopalgunge

divn, Sarun dist, 30th Dec 1877—Passed the higher standard 6th May 1878—Asst Magt, Moorshedabad, 3rd Oct 1878—Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 30th Aug 1879.

FRANCIS ALEXANDER SLACK—Arrd 8th Dec 1876—Asst Magt, Bogra, 19th Dec 1876—Passed the lower standard 31st July 1877—Asst Magt, Dinagepore, 21st Aug 1877—Bagdogra divn of the Rangpur dist, 16th Mar 1878—Passed the higher standard 15th July 1878—Asst. Magt., Kalimpoong, Darjeeling, 3rd Dec. 1878—Rajshahye 15th June 1879—Julpigoree, 20th July 1879—Offg. Dy. Commr., Julpigoree, 22nd July 1879—Asst. Magt., Julpigoree, 12th Aug., 1879—Offg. Jt.-Magt., 2nd gr., 7th Sep. 1879.

FRANK ST. CLAIR GRIMWOOD—Arrd. 27th Nov. 1876—Asst. Magt., Shahabad, 17th Dec. 1876—In charge Madhubani sub-divn., Durbhunga, 4th Oct. 1877—Transferred to the sudder station of Gya, 16th Jan. 1878—In charge of the Sewan divn., of the Sarun dist., 14th Mar. 1878—In charge of the Tajpore divn., of the Durbhunga dist., 18th Apl. 1878—Services placed at the disposal of the Govt. of India, 23rd July 1878—of the Chief Commr. of Assam, 30th July 1878—Supernumerary Asst. Commr., 3rd gr., Sibsagar, 29th Oct. 1878.

CHARLES STUART BAYLEY—Arrd. 31st Dec. 1877—Asst. Magt., 24-Pergs., 9th Jan. 1878—Passed the lower standard 3rd Sep. 1878—Asst. Magt., Jessore, 23rd Sep. 1878—Raneegunge, Bardwan, 15th Feb. 1879.

EDWARD BRANSON HARRIS—Arrd. 14th Dec. 1877—Asst. Magt., Bardwan, 14th Dec. 1877—Passed the lower standard, 24th July 1878—Asst. Magt., Begooserai divn., Monghyr dist., 13th Aug. 1878—Monghyr, 23rd Jan. 1879—Goalundo sub-divn., Fur, reedpore dist., 26th Mar. 1879.

THOMAS EDWARD VAUGHAN—Arrd. 8th Nov. 1877—Asst. Magt., Moorshedabad—17th Nov. 1877—Passed the lower standard, 18th Nov. 1878—Asst. Magt., Backergunge, 6th Dec. 1878—Nattore divn., of the Rajshahi dist., 29th Aug. 1879.

SHOLTO JAMES DOUGLAS—Arrd. 6th Jan. 1878—Asst. Commr., Sylhet, 29th Jan. 1878.

GEORGE KENNETH LYON—Arrd. 27th Dec. 1877—Asst. Magt., Rampore Bauleah, Rajshahi dist., 17th Jan. 1878—Passed the lower standard, 26th Aug. 1878—Asst. Magt., Dinagepore, 16th Feb. 1879—Passed the higher standard, 12th Mar 1879—Asst Magt, Rangpur, 30th Mar 1879—Bagdogra divn of the Rangpur dist, 20th July 1879.

WILLIAM CHARLES MACPHERSON—Arrd 27th Dec 1877—Asst Magt Patna, 11th Jan 1878—Services placed at the disposal of the Govt of India in the Home Dept, 15th July 1878—Services placed at the disposal of the Chief Commr of Assam, 30th 30th July 1879—Supy Asst Commr, 3rd gr, Sylhet, 27th July 1878—Powers of an Asst Insp of Immigrants, 23rd Nov 1878.

THOMAS LOWTEN LAYTON JENKINS—Arrd 24th Dec 1877—Asst Magt, Dacca, 15th Jan 1878—Passed the lower standard exmn, 3rd Aug 1878—Asst Magt, Gobindpore, divn, Manbhoom dist, 22nd Aug 1878—Pachumba divn of the Hazaribaugh dist—14th Aug 1879

RICHARD TOWNSEND GREER—Arrd 10th Dec 1877—Services placed at the disposal of the Chief Commr of Assam, 10th Dec 1877—Supy Asst Commr, 3rd gr—Kamroop, 21st Dec 1877—Sub-Regr, Kamroop, 12th Mar 1878—On spl duty at Shillong, 12th Oct 1878—Re-transferred to Kamroop, 1st Nov 1878.

OSCAR THEODORE BARROW—Arrd 3rd Dec 1877—Asst Magt, Midnapore, 20th Dec 1877—Passed the lower standard exmn, 18th Nov 1878—Assf Magt, Pooree, 13th Dec 1878—Jajpore divn, Cuttack dist, 18th July 1879.

DUNCAN JOHN ALFRED CAMPBELL—Arrd in Calcutta, 24th Nov 1877—Asst Magt, at Kishnaghur Nuddea, Bengal, 27th Nov—Transferred to Burma and appointed Asst Commr at Moulmein, 20th Aug 1878—Transferred to Akyab, 12th Nov 1878.

HARRY COX—Arrd 28th Dec 1877—Asst Magt, Mozufferpore, 9th Jan 1878—Passed the lower standard exmn, 16th Aug 1878—Asst Magt, in charge of the Buxar divn of the Shahabad dist, 29th Jan 1879—Nowada divn of the Gya dist, 14th March 1879.

CHARLES PETER CASPERSZ—Arrd 21st Dec 1878—Asst Magt, Chittagong, 8th Jan 1879.

DUNCAN JAMES MACPHERSON—Arrd 19th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, Dacca 3rd, Dec 1878—Passed the lower standard 21st Aug 1879.

EDWARD NORMAN BAKER.—Arrd 19th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, Patna, 19th Nov 1878
—Passed the lower standard 20th May 1879—Asst Magt, Gya, 12th Aug 1879.

HUGH FITZJOHN TYRREL MAGUIRE.—Arrd 25th Nov 1878—Asst Magt, Beerbhoom,
6th Dec 1878—Bhagulpore, 28th Mar 1879.

ARTHUR HERBERT COLLINS.—Arrd 1st Jan 1879—Asst Magt, Bankoora, 11th Jan
1879—Rajshahyi, 13th Aug 1879.

EDWARD WOODFIELD COLLIN.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1878—Asst Magt, 24-Pergs, 11th
Dec 1878—Passed the lower standard 6th June 1879.

WILLIAM THOMAS HALL.—Arrd at Rangoon, 5th Dec 1878—Placed under the Dy
Commr of Henzada, 7th Dec 1878.

HENRY SANKEY.—Arrd in the country, 26th Dec 1878—Appointed Supy Asst Commr
and posted to Moulmein, 30th Dec 1878.

ALEXANDER PORTEOUS.—Arrd 16th Jan 1879—Supy Asst Commr, Kamroop, 24th
Jan 1879.

JOHN CAMPBELL ARBUTHNOTT—

ROBERT SCOTT GREENSHIELDS—

KAVASJEE JAMASJEE BADSHAH.—Arrd 12th Nov 1879—Asst Magt, Dacca, 12th
Nov 1879.

HERBERT HOLMWOOD—

RICHARD RODNEY POPE.—Arrd 1st Nov 1879—Asst Magt, Chittagong, 1st Nov 1879

MEMBER OF THE CIVIL SERVICE, APPOINTED UNDER SECTION 6 OF 33 VICTORIA,
CHAP. 3.

KOOMAR RAMESHAWARA SING.—Asst. Magt, Durbhunga, 2nd Mar 1878.

III.NORTH WEST PROVINCES.

[NOTE.—All Officers before whose names there appears an asterick have been allowed the privilege of taking their annuity and furlough a year sooner than they would otherwise be entitled to do, in consideration of their services in the Lucknow garrison.]

CLASS I.—31 YEARS' STANDING.

1839. HON'BLE FRANCIS BOYLE PEARSON.—Arrd., 27th Dec. 1840; attached to N. W. P., 25th June 1841; Asst. Magt., Gházipur, 27th Aug. 1841; Offg. Jt. Magt., Fatehpur, 1st June 1842; Asst. Magt., Fatehpur, 30th June 1844; Offg. Jt. Magt., 28th Oct. 1844; Offg. Jt. Magt., Kalpi (in Hamírpur), 1th Mar. 1845; Jt. Magt., Fatehpur, 15th Feb. 1846; Offg. Jt. Magt., Kalpi, Feb. 1846; Jt. Magt., Kalpi, 30th Jan. 1847; Settlt. Officer, trans-Sutlej territory, Apl. 1849; services at disposal of Govt. N. W. P., Mar. 1850; Regtr, Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, N. W. P., 6th Apl. 1850; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 16th Apl. 1853; Magt., Allahabad, 10th May 1853; furl. to Eur. from 21st Feb. 1855 to 10th Nov. 1857; on subsistence allow 11th Nov. to 22nd Dec. 1857; Offg. Judge, Benares, 23rd Dec. 1857; Offg. Magt., Gházipur, 3rd Feb. 1858; Offg. Judge, Saugor, 13th Mar. 1858; Magt., Gorakhpur, 17th Apl. 1858; Offg. Judge, Saugor, Oct. 1858; Cawnpore, 26th Apl. 1859; on special duty as Comr. for compensation in the Agra Divn. from 15th Nov. 1859; Judge, Cawnpore, 4th Apl. 1860; on special duty at Lucknow, 12th Sept. 1860; Judge, Cawnpore, 28th Sept. 1860; Offg. Judge of the Sadr. Diwání and Nizamat Adalat, N. W. P., 1st Sept. 1862; Offg. Extra Judge of Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, 23rd Dec. 1863; Judge of the Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, 1st Apl. 1864; Judge of the H. Ct. N. W. P., June 1866; leave on M. C. from 4th Dec. 1869 to 27th July 1871; Judge H. Ct. 1st Aug. 1871.

1844. HON'BLE ROBERT SPANKIE.—Arrd. 13th July 1844; attached to N. W. P., July 1845; Asst. Magt. Mainpuri, 16th Sep. 1845; furl. on M. C. 9th Apl. 1846 to 3rd Dec. 1847; Asst., under the Comr. Agra Divn., 28th Dec. 1847; Asst. Magt., Mainpuri, 16th Mar. 1848; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Banda, 27th June; Asst. Magt., Mainpuri, 11th Oct. 1848; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mainpuri, 16th Jan. 1849; Asst. Magt., 20th Feb. 1850; Offg. Jt. Magt., Etawah, 12th Apl. 1850; Asst. Magt., Mainpuri, 9th May 1850; Extra Jt. Magt., Agra, 9th Aug. 1850; Offg. Jt. Magt., Agra, 16th Dec. 1850; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Mar. 1851; 1st. gr., 21st Mar. 1852; leave on M. C. from 20th July to 13th Oct. 1852; Offg. Magt., Hamirpur, 12th Feb. 1853; Jt. Magt., Bulandshahr, Offg. Magt., Hamirpur, Dec. 1853; Offg. Magt., Benares, 19th Oct. 1854; Offg. Magt., Cawnpore, 2nd Dec. 1854; Magt., Cawnpore, 20th Mar. 1855; Magt., Saharanpur, 24th Mar. 1856; leave from 25th July 1856 to 1st Nov. 1857; Offg. Judge, Saháranpur, 15th Sept. 1858, also Spl. Comr., Saháranpur, Sept. 1858; Offg. Judge, Farukhabad, 7th Dec. 1860; Meernut, 10th June 1862; Jaunpur, 14th Jan. 1864; Judge, Jaunpur, 1st Apl. 1864; Offg. Extra Judge, Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, N. W. Prov., 1st May 1864; Judge, Jaunpur, 1st Dec. 1864; Offg. Judge, Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, N. W. P., 23rd Oct. 1865; Offg. Judge H. Ct., June 1866; Judge, Farukhabad, 30th Jan. 1867; Offg. Judge H. Ct., 11th Mar. 1867; Judge H. Ct., Aug. 1867; leave on M. C., from 25th Nov. 1868 to 20th Nov. 1869; Judge H. Ct., 29th Nov. 1869; furl. 6th Apl. to 4th Dec. 1874; Judge, H. Ct., 8th Dec. 1874.

1845. HENRY LUSHINGTON.—Arrd., 14th Mar. 1845; atted. to N. W. P., Feb. 1847; Asst. Magt., Moradabad, 9th Apl. 1847; services placed at the disposal of Cf. Comr., Panjab, July 1848; Asst. to Cf. Comr., Cis and Trans-Sutlej States, and to Resident at Lahore, Aug. 1848; Offg. Asst. Comr., Umballa, Sept. 1848; Asst.

Comr., Kaithal, 9th Nov. 1848; leave on M. C. to Calcutta 21st Nov. 1848 to 9th Feb. 1849; leave on M. C. to England from 10th Feb. 1849 to 8th Jan. 1850; Asst. Magt., Farukhabad, 13th Apl. 1850; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Agra, 14th Aug. 1851; Farukhabad, 14th Dec. 1851; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 15th Feb. 1852; Offg. Magt., 5th Sept. 1853; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 26th Nov. 1853; 1st gr., 6th Mar. 1854; Magt., Mirzapur, 23rd Apl. 1855; furl. 24th Mar. 1857 to 12th Feb. 1858; Feb. 1858; again on furl. 10th Mar. 1858 to 18th Jan. 1860; Offg. Jt. Magt., Azamgarh, 24th Feb. 1860; Offg. Magt., 10th Apl. 1860; Magt., Azamgarh, 21st Nov. 1860; Offg. Judge, Mainpuri, 15th May 1863; Offg. Judge, Agra, 19th June 1863; Offg. Magt., Moradabad, 2nd Jan. 1864; Magt., Bijnor, Offg. Magt., Moradabad, Dec. 1863; Offg. Judge, Shahjahanpur, 22nd Apl. 1864; Offg. Magt., Moradabad, 15th Nov. 1864; Offg. Judge, Ghazipur, 9th Feb. 1865; Judge, Shahjahanpur, Offg. at Ghazipur, Oct. 1865; Judge, Ghazipur, 1st May 1866; leave on urgent private affairs to Eur. from 10th May to 9th Nov. 1867; Judge, Ghazipur, 19th Nov. 1867; furl. to Eur. from 7th Apl. 1871 to 7th Nov. 1872; Judge of Mainpuri, 27th Nov. 1872; Aligarh, 13th Feb. 1873; Allahabad, 10th Aug. 1874; furl. to Eur. from 1st May to 17th Oct. 1878; Judge, Allahabad, 23rd Oct. 1878.

1846. HENRY STEWART REID.—Arrd., 4th May 1846; attached to N. W. P. 23rd Jan. 1847; Asst. Magt., Muttra, 6th Nov. 1847; Offg. Secy. Sadr. Bd. of Rev., N. W. P., 2nd Oct. 1848; Asst. Magt., Saharanpur, 2nd Nov. 1848; Offg. Jt. Magt., Hamirpur, 30th Apl. 1849; Offg. Visitor-Genl. of Schools N. W. P. 27th Feb. 1850; Visitor-Genl. of Schools, 1st Jan. 1851; Dir. of Pub. Instr., 12th Feb. 1855; leave on M. C. from 20th Feb. 1856 to 12th Feb. 1857; Dir. of Pub. Instr., N. W. P., 24th Feb. 1857; furl. 10th Feb. 1862 to 7th Jan. 1864; Offg. Judge of Meerut, 3rd Mar. 1864; Magt., Moradabad, 24th Mar. 1864; Offg. Judge, Farukhabad, 20th May 1864; Allahabad, 15th Nov. 1864; services placed at the disposal of the Govt. of India, For. Dept. for employment in Oudh, Mar. 1865; Comr., Baiswara Divn., 25th Apl. 1865; Fyzabad Divn., 21st Feb. 1866; Offg. Judl. Comr., Oudh, 16th Jan. 1867; Comr., Fyzabad Divn., 2nd Feb. 1867; Lucknow Divn., May 1868; services replaced at the disposal of Govt., N. W. P., July 1868; Jr. Mem. Bd. of Rev., N. W. P., Aug. 1868; Sr. Mem. Bd. of Rev. N. W. P., 24th Nov. 1871.

1846.* HON'BLE SIR GEORGE EBENEZER WILSON COUPER, BART., C.B., K.C.S.I., C.I.E., AND COUNSELLOR OF THE EMPRESS (ex officio)—Arrd., 23rd Sep. 1846; attached to Bengal, Nov. 1847; Asst. Magt. Dinajpur, 1st Nov. 1847; services placed at the disposal of the Govt. of India for employment in the Panjab Mar. 1849; Asst. Comr., Jhelum Divn., 31st Mar. 1849; Pind Dadun Khan, 1st Mar. 1850; Rawul Pindi, May 1851; furl. to Eur. from 3rd Oct. 1851 to 28th Nov. 1852; Asst. Magt., Patna, 26th Jan. 1853; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Patna, 25th June 1853; Under-Secy., to Govt. Home and Finl. Depts, 10th Nov. 1854; trans. to Oudh., Feb. 1856; Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, 11th Feb. 1856; Comr. in Oudh, Ag. Secy. to Cf. Comr. Mar. 1858; leave* on M. C. 25th Apl. 1858 to 10th Apl. 1859; Secy. to Govt., N. W. P., 30th Apl. 1859; Offg. Judl. Comr., Oudh, 15th Dec. 1862; Judl. Comr. Oudh, 14th Apl. 1863; furl. on M. C. 11th Mar. 1866 to 28th Sep. 1867; Judl. Comr., Oudh, 4th Oct. 1867; Addl. Mem. of the Council of the Govr.-Genl., 24th Sep. 1868; Judl. Comr., Oudh, 1st Mar. 1869; special leave on private affairs to Eur. from 1st May to 29th Oct. 1870; Judl. Comr., Oude, 4th Nov. 1870; Offg. Cf. Comr., Oudh, 20th Apl. 1878; Cf. Comr., Oudh, 8th Dec. 1873; furl. 15th Mar. to 9th Nov. 1875; Cf. Comr., Oudh, 6th Nov. 1875; Offg. Lt.-Govr. N.W. P., 26th July 1876; Lt.-Govr., N. W. P., and Cf. Comr., Oudh, 17th Jan. 1877.

1847. JAMES HUNTER PRINSEP.—Arrd., 6th May 1847; attached to the N. W. P., Dec. 1847; Asst. Magt., Panipat, 20th Mar. 1848; Delhi, 14th Apl. 1848; services placed at the disposal of the Govr.-Genl. for employment in the Panjab Apl. 1849; Asst. Comr. in the Panjab, Apl. 1849; Kangra, May 1849; Kangra Dist., Jan. 1850; Asst. Comr., Mooltan, Feb. 1850; leave on M. C. in India, 11th May 1850; placed under the orders of Comr., Lahore Divn., Dec. 1850; Asst. Comr., Wazirabad, 23rd Dec. 1850; Lahore, 24th May 1852; Gurdaspur, 4th Dec. 1852; Gurdaspur Dist., July 1854; Offg. Dy. Comr., Jhelum, 22nd Feb. 1855; furl. to Eur. from 17th Nov. 1855 to 16th Nov. 1856; leave without pay 17th Nov. 1856 to 15th Mar. 1858; on the 16th Mar. 1858 was re-attached to N. W. P.; leave on M. C.

* Allowed to count as service.

in India from 7th July to 14th Oct. 1858; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Meerut, 15th Oct. 1858; Offg. Magt., Aligarh, 21st Apr. 1859; Magt., Aligarh, 1st May 1861; leave on M. C. 24th Apr. 1862 to 11th Dec. 1863; Magt., Aligarh, 16th Jan. 1864; Offg. Judge, Aligarh, 9th Mar. 1866; Magt., Aligarh, 14th Nov. 1866; Offg. Judge, Jaunpur, 29th Mar. 1867; furl. 24th Nov. 1867 to 26th Dec. 1868; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, 22nd Feb. 1869; Magt., Jaunpur, from 1st Mar. 1869; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, Offg. Judge, Farukhabad, 1st May 1869; Mainpuri, as Magt., 11th Oct. 1869; Offg. Judge, Farukhabad, 13th Nov. 1869; Judge, Farukhabad, 23rd Jan. 1871; Cawnpore, 3rd Apr. 1871; on private affairs 8th May to 3rd Nov. 1876; Judge, Cawnpore, 10th Nov. 1876.

1847. HENRY GEORGE KEENE.—Arrd., 3rd Oct. 1847; attached to N. W. P., Feb. 1849; Asst. Magt., Muttra, 13th Apr. 1849; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mainpuri, 26th Aug. 1850; Asst. Supt., Dehra Dún, 4th Jan. 1851; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Hissar, 10th May 1853; Magt., Muzaffarnagar, 6th Mar. to 12th Apr. 1854; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st May 1854; Muzaffarnagar, 20th May 1854; Offg. Magt., Muzaffarnagar, 3rd Mar. 1855; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th Apr. 1855; Offg. Magt., Muzaffarnagar, 13th Sept. 1855; Jt. Magt., 14th Oct. 1855; Offg. Supt., Dehra Dún, 1st Mar. 1856; Supt., Dehra Dún, 1st May 1856; Offg. Magt., Muzaffarnagar, 22nd Mar. 1860; Magt., 10th Apr. 1860; leave on M. C. 10th Apr. 1862 to 1st June 1863; Magt., Agra, Offg. at Mainpuri, 18th June 1863; offg. Judge, Allahabad, 8th Sep. to 2nd Nov. 1863; Offg. Mag., Bulandshahr, 21st Nov. 1863; Magt., Bulandshahr, 1st Dec. 1863; Offg. Judge, Allahabad, 12th July 1864; Magt. 16th Oct. 1864. Bulandshahr, 3rd Nov. 1864; Offg. Judge, Aligarh, 24th Apr. 1865; Offg. Judge, Cawnpore, 7th June 1865; Magt. Hamirpur, 5th Dec. 1865; Muttra, 6th Jan. 1866; Offg. Judge, Farukhabad, 15th Mar. 1866; Offg. Magt., 2nd Feb. 1867; Offg. Judge, 11th Mar. 1867; Judge, Jaunpur, 16th Apr. 1867, Offg. at Farukhabad; leave M. C. 24th July 1867 to 28th Apr. 1868; Offg. Judge, Azamgarh, 29th Apr. 1868; Offg. Judge, Fatehpur, 9th Sep. 1869; Offg. Judge, Saháranpur, 22nd July 1870; Offg. Judge, Fatehpur, 5th Oct. 1870; Judge, Mainpuri, Offg. at Fatehpur, Dec. 1870; Saháranpur, 10th Apr. 1871; Judge, Agra, 1st Nov. 1871; Offg. Comr., Agra divn., 12th Feb. 1872; Judge, Agra, 6th May 1872; Offg. Comr., Allahabad Divn., 28th Sep. 1874; Judge, Agra, 14th Nov. 1874; Offg. Comr., Agra Divn., 7th July 1875; Judge, Agra, 4th Dec. 1875.

1847. RODERICK MACKENZIE EDWARDS.—Arrd. 5th Feb. 1848; attached to N. W. P., May 1849; Asst. Magt., Bijnor, 15th Sep. 1849; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Saháranpur, 2nd Dec. 1850; leave on M. C. 20th Aug. to 1st Dec. 1851; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Panipat, 8th Dec. 1851; Asst. Magt. exercising the powers of Jt. Magt. Rohtak, 8th Feb. 1852; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Saháranpur, 31st May 1852; Offg. Mag., Saháranpur, 21st Sep. 1852; Offg. Jt. Mag., 21st Oct. 1852; Offg. Jt. Offg. Magt., from 15th Sep. to 14th Oct. 1853; Offg. Jt. Magt., 13th Nov. 1853; 2nd gr., 9th Feb. 1854; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th May 1854; Offg. Magt., 18th Sep. 1854; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Oct. 1854; 1st gr., 20th Mar. 1855; Offg. Magt., 19th Sep. 1855; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th Oct. 1855; Offg. Magt., 25th July 1856; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 25th Oct. 1856; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mainpuri, May 1857; Offg. Magt., Muzaffarnagar, 4th July 1857; Magt., Muzaffarnagar, Mar. 1858; furl. to Eur. from 10th Apr. 1860 to 11th Mar. 1862; on subs allow from 12th Mar. to 14th May 1863; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 15th May 1862; Magt., Bánda, Offg. at Bareilly, June 1863; on special duty at Bareilly from 17th Dec. 1863 to 29th Feb. 1864; Offg. Magt., 1st Mar. 1864; Magt., May 1864; Comr., Rohilkhand Divn., from 5th May to 4th June 1865; leave on urgent private affairs from 22nd Feb. to 8th Mar. 1866; leave on M. C. from 3rd Apr. to 25th Nov. 1867; Magt., Bareilly, 11th Dec. 1867; Offg. Judge, Shahjahanpur, 10th Feb. 1868; Magt., Bareilly 5th Sep. 1868; Offg. Judge, Benares, 30th Sep. 1868; Offg. Judge, Jaunpur, 18th Dec. 1868; Offg. Comr., Jhansi Divn., 13th Dec. 1870; Comr., Jhansi Divn., 18th Jan. 1872; Offg. Comr., Agra Divn., 16th Sep. 1872; furl. to Eur. from 1st Dec. 1873 to 26th Dec. 1874; Offg. Comr., Benares Divn., 6th Jan. 1875; Rohilkhand Divn., 15th Jan. 1875; Benares Divn., 24th Jan., 1875; Rohilkhand Divn., 2nd Feb. 1875; Benares Divn., 11th Feb. 1875; Rohilkhand Divn., 20th Feb. 1875; Benares Divn., 1st Mar. 1875; Allahabad Divn., 10th Mar. 1875; Comr., Allahabad Divn., 29th Mar. 1875; Agra Divn., 4th Dec. 1875; Bareilly Divn., 6th Mar. 1876.

CLASS II.—23 YEARS' STANDING.

1848. HON'BLE RICHARD CHARLES OLDFIELD.—Arrd., 9th Nov. 1848; attached to N. W. P., Sep. 1849; Asst. Magt., Mainpuri, 5th Jan. 1850; leave on private

affairs from 22nd Oct. to 22nd Nov. 1850; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mainpuri, 16th Dec. 1850; Asst. Jt. Magt. Patiali, 11th Apl. 1851; Offg. Jt. Magt., Muttra, 12th Aug. 1851; Offg. Magt., 2nd gr., Muttra, 22nd Sep. 1851; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Muttra, 22nd Oct. 1851; leave on M. C. in India from 1st Apl. 1852 to 25th Feb. 1853; in Australia from 26th Feb. to 2nd Nov. 1854; Asst. Magt., Benares, 21st Nov. 1854; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Benares, 29th Dec. 1854; Asst. Magt., Benares, 15th Mar. 1855; Mirzapur, May 1855; Asst. Supt. of the Family Domains of Maharaja of Benares, 16th Nov. 1855; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mirzapur, 11th Feb. 1856; Asst Secy. to Govt. and Asst. to Acct., N.W. Prov., 18th Mar. 1856; Jt. Magt. 1st gr., from 24th Mar. 1857; leave on M. C. in India from 2nd Apl. to 2nd Nov. 1858; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Agra, 3rd Nov. 1858; furl * to Eur. from 10th Apl. 1859 to 9th Nov. 1862; on subsistence allowance (without employ) from 10th Nov. to 18th Dec. 1862; Offg. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 19th Dec. 1862; Farukhabad, 20th Feb. 1863; Magt., Farukhabad, 1st Mar. 1864; on special duty at Cawnpore for the case of Dewan of Chirkhari, Feb. 1866; Magt., Farukhabad, 28th Feb. 1866; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 3rd Mar. to 1st Dec. 1867; Offg. Judge, Moradabad, 13th Dec. 1867; Offg. Magt., Bijnor, 5th Jan. 1869; on special duty under the P. W. D. from Feb. to Mar. 1869; on special duty for investigating the charges brought against Mir Badshah, Munsif of Deoband, from Mar. to May 1869; Offg. Judge, Bareilly, 25th May 1869; Offg. Judge, Azamgarh, 8th Oct. 1869; Addl. Judge, Aligarh, 10th Nov. 1869; Offg. Judge, Azamgarh, 14th Feb. 1870; Offg. Judge, Mainpuri, 18th Mar. 1870; Judge from 18th Jan. 1872; furl. to Eur. from 2nd Dec. 1872 to 30th Nov. 1873; Judge, Allahabad, 2nd Dec. 1873; Offg. Addl. Puisne Judge of the H. Ct., N.W. Prov. 4th Apl. 1874; Addl. Judge H. Ct., N. W. Prov., 8th Dec. 1874.

1848. JAMES WILLIAM POWER.—Arrd., 7th Mar. 1849; attached to Bengal, July 1851; Asst. Mag., Beerbhoom, 16th July 1851; leave on M. C. from 5th Jan. to 4th Feb. 1852; on furl. to Eur. from 10th Feb. 1852 to 9th Feb. 1855; leave without pay from 10th Feb. to 5th Nov. 1855; 13th Nov. 1855, re-attached to Bengal; Asst. Magt., Chittagong, trans. to N. W. P. 4th Jan. 1856; Asst Magt., Mainpuri, 5th Apl. 1856; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mainpuri, 4th June, 1857; Asst to Mr. (now Sir) George Campbell and attached to Col. Greathed's column, 15th Mar. 1858; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 16th Apl. 1858; Bānda, 27th Sep. 1858; Offg. Magt., Fatehpur, 13th Apl. 1859; Magt., and Dy. Comr. of Hamirpur, Ag. Magt., Fatehpur, June 1861; Dy. Comr., 1st class, Jhānsi, from 1st Mar. 1862, Ag. Magt., Fatehpur, leave to Eur on M. C. from 24th Apl. 1864 to 4th Jan. 1866; Offg. Magt., Hamirpur, 16th Jan. 1866; Mag., Hamirpur, 1st May 1866; Fatehpur, 18th Mar. 1867; Offg. Judge, Fatehpur, 19th Apl. 1868; Magt., Fatehpur, 27th Oct. 1868; Offg. Judge, Mirzapur, 19th June 1869; Judge, 30th Aug. 1872; furl. to Eur. from 14th Apl. 1873 to 23rd Feb. 1875; Judge, Ghazipur, 24th Feb. 1875; special leave on private affairs from 16th Apl. to 13th Oct. 1878; Judge, Ghazipur, 14th Oct. 1878.

1884. CHARLES PAGET CARMICHAEL.—Arrd., 7th March 1849; attached to N. W. Prov., Aug. 1849; Asst. Magt., Budaun, 18th Sep. 1849; Asst. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 10th Feb. 1851; leave on M. C. in India from 2nd May to 20th Dec. 1851; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Shahjahanpur, 18th Feb. 1852; 2nd gr., Budaun, 17th Oct. 1852, 2nd gr., Etah, 2nd Dec. 1852; Asst. Magt., Etah, 15th Jan. 1853; Offg. Jt. Magt., Badaun, 14th Feb. 1853; Offg. Asst. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov. and Asst to Acct., 25th June 1853; leave on M. C. in India from 10th Nov. to 4th Dec. 1853; offg., Secy. to Sadr Bd. of Rev., N. W. Prov., from 27th Jan. to 26th Feb. 1854; Asst. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov. from 27th Feb. 1854; Offg.-Regr. of Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, N. W. Prov., but to retain charge as Asst. Secy. to Govt. 10th Apl. 1854; Offg. Cf. Audr., N. W. P. 9th Aug. 1854; Asst Secy. to Govt. 9th Oct. 1854; Jt. Magt. 1st gr. 22nd Jan. 1856; Offg. Asst. Secy. to Govt. on special duty, to Naini Tal, 18th Mar. 1856; Jt. Magt. at Pilibhit, 1st July 1856; services placed at the disposal of the Comr., Kamaun, 1st Feb. 1858; left Naini Tal, 28th Apl. 1858; Offg. Mag. Budaun, 18th May 1858; Magt. Budaun, 15th Feb. 1862; Magt., Budaun, 1st April 1862; leave on private affairs 1st May to 31st Oct. 1863; Magt. Budaun, 1st Nov. 1863; leave on M. C. 9th April 1864; to 3rd Dec. 1865; Magt. Budaun, 13th Dec. 1865; Offg. Comr. Kumaun, Divin 30th May 1867 to 23rd Jan. 1878; resumed charge at Budaun, 4th Feb. Inspr. Genl. of Police N. W. P. 22nd Feb. 1870; Offg. Com.

* 18 months of the furlough allowed to count towards pension.

Allahabad Divn., from 20th Apl. to 19th July 1871; Insp. Genl. of Police, 15th Aug. 1871; Off. Comr. and Agent, Govr. Genl, Benares, 16th Apl. 1873; Comr., Benares Divn. (pro tem), 9th Apl. 1874; Off. Jr. Mem. Bd. of Rev. from 15th Apl. to 9th July 1874; Comr., Benares, 7th Oct. 1874; Judge, but to continue Comr. Benares, Jan. 1877; Comr. of Divn., Mar. 1877; Off. Mem., Bd. of Rev., from 8th Apl. to 12th July 1877; Comr. of Benares, 3rd Aug. 1877; Off. Mem. of the Bd. of Rev., 18th Feb. 1878.

1850. MAYNARD BRODHURST.—Arrd. 15th Oct. 1850; attached to Bengal, 1st Oct. 1851; Asst. Magt., Behar, 12th Nov. 1851; Off. Asst. to Sub-Treasr., Behar, 18th Nov. 1851; Asst. Magt., Behar, 24th Jan. 1852; Burhee sub-divn. Hazaribagh, 1st July 1855; Asst. Magt., Behar, 26th Sep. 1855; Off. Magt., Behar, 21st Nov. 1855; Asst. Magt., Behar, 10th Jan. 1857; Munglepur sub-divn., Bancoora, 2nd Feb. 1857; Off. Mag., Shahabad, 1st Apl. 1858; Asst. Magt., Farukhabad, 11th Dec. 1858; Extra Jt. Magt. 1st gr., Farukhabad, 17th Jan. 1859; Saharanpur, 9th Feb. 1859; Off. Magt., Ghazipur, 14th May 1861; Magt., Ghazipur, 1st May 1862; furl. to Eur. from 25th Apl. 1865 to 27th Dec. 1867; on subsistence allowance (without employ) from 28th Dec. 1867 to 15th Jan. 1868; Off. Mag., Benares, 16th Jan. 1868; Magt., Benares, 16th Apl. 1868; Off. Judge, Benares, 13th Feb. 1870; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 5th May to 30th Oct. 1873; Judge, Benares, 6th Nov. 1873; Addl. Judge of the H. Ct., N. W. Prov., 27th Apl. 1874; Judge, Benares, 17th Dec. 1874; services placed at the disposal of Govt. of India, Home Dept., Apl. 1876; on special duty to Singapore, Apl. 1876; services replaced at the disposal of Govt., N. W. Prov., Aug. 1876; Judge, Benares, 4th Sep. 1876.

1850. HON'BLE BAZETT WETENHALL COLVIN.—Arrd. 29th June 1850; attached to Bengal, March 1851; Asst. Magt., Bhaugulpore, 20th March 1851; leave on private affairs from 20th Apl. to 21st May 1851; leave on M. C. from 28th Jan. 1852 to 27th Jan. 1854; trans. to N. W. Prov., 28th Jan. 1854; Off. Jr. Asst. Comr., Kumaun, 1st May 1854; Asst. in the Rohilkhand Divn, but to continue in Kumaun as Jr. Asst. Comr., Apl. 1854; Jr. Asst. Comr., Kumaun, 16th Apl. 1855; Off. Sr. Asst. Comr., Garhwal, 21st Dec. 1855; Sr. Asst. Comr., Garhwal, 10th Feb. 1856; Off. Sr. Asst. Comr., Kumaun, 16th Sep. 1856; Sr. Asst. Comr., Kumaun, 10th Mar. 1857; Garhwal distr., from 13th June to 5th Sep. 1861; Magt., Moradabad, Off. at Mainpuri, 19th June 1865; Magt., Mainpuri, 1st May 1866; in Agra to conduct the enquiry into the case of Captain Howard in Aug. 1866; furl. to Eur. from 5th Mar. 1869 to 13th Jan. 1871; Off. Magt., Benares, 1st Feb. 1871; Off. Judge, Agra, 18th Mar. 1871; Magt., from 26th Sep. 1871; Farukhabad, 12th Oct. 1871; Off. Judge, Cawnpore, from 21st Apl. to 20th July 1872; Magt., Farukhabad, 30th July 1872; Off. Judge, Allahabad, 3rd Jan. 1873; Off. Comr., Jhansi Divn., 28th Apl. 1873; Off. Comr., Rohilkhand Divn., 22nd Nov. 1873; Judge, 16th Dec. 1875, Mainpuri, 24th idem; on special duty at Agra during the visit of His R. H. the Prince of Wales in Feb. 1876; Off. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov., from 1st May 1876 to 12th Jan. 1877; Comr., Meerut Divn., Jan. 1877; Addl. Mem. of the Council of Gov. Gen., 13th Jan. 1877.

1851. REGINALD FLOYER SAUNDERS.—Arrd. 5th Dec. 1851; on jr. furl. to Eur. on M. C. from 5th June 1852 to 30th Nov. 1853; attached to Panjab, Apl. 1854; Asst. Comr., Simla, 18th May 1854; Dhurumsala, 22nd Mar. 1855; Kangra, 25th July 1855; 2nd class, Kangra, Jan. 1857; 1st class, Kangra, 24th Mar. 1858; Off. Dy. Comr., Kangra, 29th Mar. 1859; Postmaster-Genl., Panjab, 2nd May 1861; furl. to Eur. from 9th July 1863 to 18th Mar. 1866; Off. Magt., Mirzapur, 31st Mar. 1866; Off. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 25th Feb. 1867; Magt., Saharanpur, Off. at Shahjahanpur, July 1867; Magt., Shahjahanpur, from 10th Dec. 1867; furl. to Eur. from 20th Feb. 1871 to 25th Jan. 1872; Magt., Ghazipur, 7th Feb. 1872; Off. Judge, Ghazipur, 24th Mar. 1873; Judge, Ghazipur, 31st July 1874; furl. to Eur. from 1st Mar. to 3rd Nov. 1875; Judge, Azamgarh, 20th Nov. 1875; Farukhabad, 2nd Feb. 1877.

1851.* WILLIAM COPELAND CAPPER.—Arrd. 2nd Jan. 1852; attached to the Panjab, Feb. 1853; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Panjab, 1st Mar. 1853; Gujrat, 12th Apl. 1853; Asst. Comr., 2nd class, Gujrat, 2nd Oct. 1855; Asst. Comr., 1st class, and Lucknow, 13th Feb. 1856; Dy. Comr., 3rd class, Mullawan (Hardoi), 28th Nov. 1859; Off. Jt. Mag. with powers of Spl. Comr., Farukhabad, 27th Dec. 1857; furl. to Eur. on M. C. from 18th May 1858 to 17th June 1859; Dy. Comr., 2nd class, Dariabad, 18th July 1859; 2nd class, Rae Bareli, 1st Oct. 1859; 1st class, Lucknow, 1st Oct. 1861; Off. Comr., Lucknow Divn., 11th Aug. 1863; Dy. Comr., 1st class, Lucknow, 10th Nov. 1863; leave to Eur. on M.C. from 24th July 1865 to 9th Oct. 1866; Off. Comr., Lucknow Divn., 15th Oct. 1866; Dy. Comr., 1st class, Lucknow,

17th Oct. 1867; Offg. Comr., Lucknow Divn., 15th Feb. 1868; Dy. Comr., 1st class, Lucknow, 19th Feb. 1868; Offg. Comr., Rae Bareli Divn., 1st May 1868; Comr., Rae Bareli Divn., Sep. 1868; Offg. Finl. Comr. from 3rd Sep. to 17th Oct. 1869; Comr., Rae Bareli Divn., 9th Jan. 1870; Offg. Judl. Comr., Oudh., 27th Apr. 1870; Comr., Rae Bareli Divn., 4th Nov. 1870; furl. to Eur. from 15th Apr. 1871 to 10th Apr. 1873; Comr., Fyzabad Divn., 19th Apr. 1873; Judl. Comr., Oudh., 2nd Dec. 1877.

1851. HENRY MINCHIN CHASE.—Arrd. 1st Apr. 1852; attached to N. W. Prov., Apr. 1853; Asst., Benares Divn. (unattached), Apr. 1853; furl. to Eur. from 16th Feb. 1854 to 30th Nov. 1856; on subsistence allowance from 1st Dec. 1856 to 20th Jan. 1857; Asst. Magt., Agra, 21st Jan. 1857; Jt. Magt., in the dists. of Agra, Muttra, and Aligarh, June 1857; Jt. Mag., 2nd gr., Agra, 1st Nov. 1857; Asst. to Spl. Comr., accompanying the force of the Maharaja of Pattiala despatched to Dholepur, Nov. 1857; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr. Mainpuri, 9th Jan. 1858; Judge, Mainpuri, from 2nd Aug. to 24th Oct. 1858; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st May 1860; Offg. Magt., 8th June 1860; Jt. Magt., from 5th July 1860; Offg. Magt., 27th May 1862; Jt. Magt., 14th Jan. 1863; Offg. Magt., 8th Aug. 1864; Jt. Magt., 15th Nov. 1864; furl. to Eur. from 11th Apr. 1865 to 11th Nov. 1866; on subsistence allowance from 12th Nov. 1866; Asst. Magt., Etawah, 15th Dec. 1866; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 10th Jan. 1867; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 3rd Mar. 1867; Offg. Magt., 18th Apr. 1867; Magt., 24th July 1867; Offg. Judge, Mainpuri, 28th May 1868; Magt., Etawah, 27th July 1868; Aligarh, 15th Mar. 1869; furl. to Eur. from 1st Feb. 1872 to 13th Jan. 1874; Magt., Janpur, 30th Jan. 1874; Offg. Judge, Azamgarh, 25th Mar. 1874; Judge, Meerut, 30th Mar. 1875; Judge, Agra, 11th Nov. 1875; Aligarh, 24th Nov. 1875, Saharanpur, 29th Mar. 1877; furl. to Eur. on private affairs from 29th April 1878 to 22nd Oct. 1878; Judge, Saharanpur, 31st Oct. 1878.

1852. WILLIAM CHICHELE PLOWDEN.—Arrd. 29th Sep. 1852; attached to N.W. Prov., 12th Nov. 1853; Asst. Magt., Bulandshahr, 21st Jan. 1854; Meerut, 20th Jan. 1855; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Panjab, 1st Jan. 1856; Lahore, 1st Mar. 1856; Gurdaspur, 7th Apr. 1856; Asst. Comr., 2nd class, Gurdaspur, 1st May 1857; 1st class, Gurdaspur, 3rd July 1858; Offg. Dy. Comr., Rohtak, from 4th Aug. 1858 to 15th Sep. 1859; Asst. Comr., 1st class, Gurdaspur, 16th Oct. 1859; Delhi, 7th Mar. 1860; Offg. Dy. Comr., Gurgaon, 3rd May 1860; furl. to Eur. from 23rd Dec. 1860 to 28th Jan. 1863; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Ghazipur, 11th Mar. 1863; Offg. Magt., Muttra, 8th July 1863; Jt. Mag., 1st gr., Muttra, 2nd Feb. 1864; 1st gr., Allahabad, 25th Apr. 1864; Offg. Secy. to Bd. of Rev., N.W. Prov., 19th July 1864; Secy. to Bd. of Rev., 24th July 1864; on special duty for preparing Census Reports of N. W. Prov. from 18th Apr. to 28th Aug. 1866; Magt., Meerut, 8th Mar. 1870; on special duty for compiling the result of Census of 1872 from 10th May 1872 to 14th Nov. 1873; furl. to Eur. from 17th Nov. 1873 to 15th Nov. 1875; Magt., Benares, 24th Nov. 1875; Meerut, 22nd Apr. 1876; Saharanpur, 1st Nov. 1876; Offg. Judge, Moradabad, 21st Nov. 1876; Magt., Aligarh, 9th Feb. 1877; Judge, Saharanpur, 9th Mar. 1877; Offg. Comr., Allahabad Divn., 1st Apr. 1877; on special duty to Calcutta as President of the Census Committee from 10th to 29th Jan. 1878; Offg. Comr. Allahabad, 1st Feb. 1878; Offg. Comr., Meerut Divn., 16th Apr. 1878; Comr., 4th Sep. 1878.

1852. *HENRY DAVIS WILLOCK.—Arrd. 3rd Feb. 1853; attached to N.-W. Prov., 16th Jan. 1854; Asst. Magt., Muttra, 14th Feb. 1854; Etah, 4th Dec. 1855; Allahabad, 9th June 1856; Cawnpore (with General Havelock's force), Jan. 1858; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 28th Apr. 1858; Allahabad, 15th June 1858; 2nd gr., Sháhjahánpur, 20th Nov. 1858; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 5th June to 4th Dec. 1859; leave on private affairs without pay from 5th Dec. 1859 to 19th Jan. 1860; Asst. Magt., Sháhjahánpur, 17th Feb. 1860; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., May 1860; 1st gr., 10th Aug. 1860; Offg. Magt., 18th Feb. 1863; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 5th Mar. 1863; Offg. Magt., 9th Mar. 1864; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 10th June 1864; furl. to Eur. from 24th Mar. 1865 to 11th Mar. 1868; Offg. Judge, Azamgarh, 24th Mar. 1868; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 6th May 1868; Comr., Bareilly, from 3rd to 16th May 1869; Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 23rd Aug. 1869; Magt., Bulandshahr, 23rd Jan. 1871; Offg. Judge, Benares, 7th May 1874; furl. to Eur. from 23rd Nov. 1874 to 7th Nov. 1876; Magt., Azamgarh, 16th Nov. 1876; Offg. Judge, Azamgarh, 26th Jan. 1877; Judge, Azamgarh, 10th Apr. 1877.

1852. WILLIAM STIRLING HALSEY.—Arrd. 18th Mar. 1853; attached to N. W. Prov., May 1854; Asst. Magt., Gházipur, 18th July 1854; Gorakhpur, 15th June 1855; Judge, Gorakhpur, from 31st Oct. to 11th Nov. 1855; leave on M, C, in India

from 13th Apl. 1857 to 8th Apl. 1858 ; to Eur. from 9th Apl. 1858 to 27th Nov. 1859 ; Asst. Magt., Gorakhpur, with powers of Jt. Magt., Dec. 1859 ; Asst. Comr. of Paper Currency and Priv. Secy. to the Finl. Mem. of Council, Apl. 1860 ; Secy. to the Civ. Fin. Commissio July 1860 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mirzapur, 1st Dec. 1860 ; leave to Eur. on M. C. (without pay) from 12th Apl. 1861 to 27th Oct. 1862 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mirzapur, 15th Nov. 1862 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 20th Dec. 1862 ; Benares, 5th Jan. 1863 ; Offg. Magt., Benares, 16th May 1864 ; Cawnpur, 20th Feb. 1865 ; Magt., Cawnpore, 1st Aug. 1866 ; Offg. Cotton Comr., with the Govt. of India, and Hony. Secy. to the Centl. Committee in India for the International Exhibition of 1872, 22nd Apl. 1872 ; furl. to Eur. from 18th June 1863 to 28th Oct. 1874 ; Offg. Judge, Mirzapur, 6th Nov. 1874 ; Hamirpur, 2nd Jan. 1875 ; Offg. Comr. of Inland Customs, 3rd Feb. 1875 ; Insp. Genl. of Registration and Comr. of Excise and Stamps, 30th March 1875 ; Offg. Comr., Inland Customs, 29th July 1876 ; on special duty from 27th Oct. to 14th Dec. 1876 ; Offg. Comr., Inland Customs, 15th Dec. 1876.

1854. HENRY BINNY WEBSTER.—Arrd. 17th June 1854 ; attached to N.-W. Prov., Asst. Magt., Benares, 16th Nov. 1855 ; Ghazipur, 18th Apl. 1856 ; Bánda, 13th Feb. 1857 ; Gopiganj, in the Mirzapur dist., July 1857 ; Allahabad, Sep. 1857 ; Benares, 12th Mar. 1858 ; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 6th May 1858 to 12th Feb. 1860 ; on subsistence allowance from 13th Feb. to 16th Mar. 1860 ; Asst. Magt., Muttra, 17th Mar. 1860 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Muttra, 1st May 1860 ; Aligarh, 2nd July 1861 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 25th June 1861 ; Offg. Magt., 22nd July 1861 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 23rd Nov. 1861 ; Offg. Magt., 7th Apl. 1862 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 21st June 1862 ; Offg. Magt., 20th Mar. 1863 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 27th June 1863 ; Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 9th Nov. 1863 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bulandshahr, 22nd Nov. 1863 ; Offg. Magt., 25th June 1864 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 4th Nov. 1864 ; Offg. Magt., 17th Apl. 1865 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th Dec. 1865 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 1st gr., from 1st Jan. to 28th Feb. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., 1st Mar. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., Saharanpur, 19th Aug. 1867 ; Magt., 24th Nov. 1867 ; Saharanpur, 10th Dec. 1867 ; furl. to Eur. from 25th Apl. 1870 to 2nd Dec. 1871 ; Magt., Gorakhpur, 18th Dec. 1871 ; Meerut, 10th Feb. 1873 ; private affairs to Eur. from 24th Apl. to 18th Oct. 1876 ; Magt., Meerut, 24th Oct. 1876 ; Offg. Comr., Benares Divn., 5th Apl. 1877 ; Agra Divn., 13th Aug. 1877 ; Jhansi Divn., 14th Dec. 1877 ; Comr., Jhansi Divn., 1st Jan. 1878 ; Offg. Comr., Agra Divn., 5th Nov. 1878.

1854. CAIRNES ANTHONY DANIELL.—Arrd. 2nd Nov. 1854 ; att. to Bengal, Mar. 1856 ; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 17th Mar. 1856 to 13th Dec. 1858 ; trans. to N. W. Prov., Jan. 1859 ; Asst. to Supt., Dehra Dun, 25th Mar. 1859 ; settlement duty from 1st June 1861 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 2nd gr., 1st Aug. 1862 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Dehra, 14th Feb. 1864 ; 1st gr., Dehra, 10th Mar. 1864 ; Saharanpur, 26th Apl. 1864 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 1st gr., Dehra Dun, 1st Oct. 1864 ; Offg. Magt., Saharanpur, from 4th July to 3rd Oct. 1865 ; Settl. Officer, Dehra Dun, 24th Oct. 1865 ; Supt., Dehra Dun, 19th Apl. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., Farukhabad, 23rd May 1867 ; Bulandshahr, 17th Oct. 1867 ; Settl. Officer, 1st gr., on Rs. 1,250 per men., Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 3rd June 1868 ; Settl. Officer, 1st gr., on Rs. 2,000 per men., Offg. from 1st Oct. 1868 ; Magt., Moradabad, 13th July 1869 ; Bareilly, 5th Apl. 1872 ; furl. to Eur. from 3rd Mar. 1872 to 5th Feb. 1874 ; Magt., Azamgarh, 18th Feb. 1874 ; Offg. Judge, Gorakhpur, 24th Apl. 1874 ; Judge, 10th Apl. 1877 ; Offg. Comr., Jhansi Divn., 12th May 1877 ; Judge, 14th Dec. 1877, Bareilly ; Offg. Comr. and Agent, Govr. Genl., Benares, 16th Feb. 1878.

1854. JAMES SIMSON (Bar.-at.-Law).—Arrd. 14th Oct. 1854 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 13th Mar. 1855 ; Asst. Magt., Gorakhpur, 22nd Mar. 1855 ; with full powers of Jt. Magt., Azamgarh, 7th Apl. 1856 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mirzapur, 5th June 1857 ; Dy. Supt., Faintly Domains, Maharaja of Benares, 21st Sept. 1857 ; Regtr., Sadr Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, N.-W. Prov., 11th June 1860 ; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 25th Apl. to 28th Oct. 1865 ; Regtr. Sadr. Diwani and Nizamat Adalat, N.-W. Prov., 9th Nov. 1865 ; on special duty connected with the Agra Exhibition from 10th Jan. to 15th Feb. 1867 ; furl. to Eur. from 25th Mar. 1867 to 19th Mar. 1870 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 1st Apl. 1870 ; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 13th Apl. 1870 ; Azamgarh, 3rd Jan. 1871 ; Mirzapur, 6th May 1871 ; Magt., from 1st Aug. 1871 ; Azamgarh, 9th Nov. 1871 ; Magt., Agra, 24th Aug. 1873 ; Offg. Judge, Agra, 26th Sept. 1874 ; Magt., Agra, 10th Oct. 1874 ; Comr., Agra Divn., from 2nd to 14th Mar. 1876 ; Offg. Judge, Agra, 15th Mar. 1876 ; furl. to Eur. from 10th Apl. 1876 to 29th Jan. 1878 ; Judge, Bareilly, 13th Feb. 1878 ; Offg. Comr., Allahabad Divn., 14th Apl. 1878.

1854. WILMOT LANE (Bar.-at.-Law).—Arrd. 13th Jan. 1855 ; attached to N.-W. Prov., Nov. 1855 ; Asst. Magt., Bareilly, 14th Dec. 1855 ; Shahjahanpur, 6th Dec. 1856 ;

Aligarh, 1st Apl. 1857; Jt. Magt., in the dists. of Aligarh, Muttra, and Agra, May 1857; under the direction of the Magt. of Agra, 27th May 1857; joined at Aligarh, 17th Oct 1857; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Aligarh, 5th May 1858; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 24th Apl. to 23rd Oct. 1860; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Aligarh, 10th Nov. 1860; Muza Tarnagar, 6th Dec. 1860; Offg. Magt., Muza Tarnagar, 26th Apl. 1861; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., from 26th June 1861; 1st gr., 15th Feb. 1862; Offg. Dy. Comr., Lucknow, 6th Aug. 1863; furl. to Eur. from 22nd Apl. 1866 to 7th Mar. 1869; on subsistence allowance from 8th Mar. to 26th Apl. 1869; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, 27th Apl. 1869; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 12th Oct. 1869; Offg. Magt., 4th Nov. 1869; Magt., 18th Jan. 1872; Offg. Judge, 14th Apl. 1873; Magt., 14th July 1873; furl. to Eur. from 14th Apl. 1875 to 4th Oct. 1876; Magt., Allahabad, 9th Oct 1876; Offg. Judge. Moradabad, 11th Apl. 1877; Judge, Moradabad, 13th Aug. 1877; Offg. Comr., Rae Bareli Divn., 5th Nov. 1877.

1854. JAMES CASAMAIJOR ROBERTSON.—Arrd. 31st Jan. 1855; attached to N. W. Prov. 14th Jan. 1856; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 22nd Apl. 1856; Asst. Supt., Dehra Dún, 7th Sep. 1856; Offg. Supt., Dehra Dún, from 19th Mar. to 18th Apl. 1860; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Dehra Dún, settlt. duty, May 1860; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Muttra, 21st Mar. 1860; Judge, S. C. Court, Allahabad, 15th July 1861; furl. to Eur. from 10th Feb. 1865 to 2nd Nov. 1867; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 21st Nov. 1867; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 29th Jan. 1868; Comr., Allahabad Divn., from 7th Sep. to 5th Oct. 1868; Magt., Allahabad, 2nd Oct. 1871; Offg. Judge, 21st Apl. 1873; Magt., 8th Nov. 1873; Offg. Judge, 22nd May 1876; Offg. Insp.-Genl. of Regtrn. and Comr. of Excise and Stamps, N. W. Prov., 29th July 1876; also Oudh., 1st Apl. 1877.

1854. EDMUND BENSLEY THORNHILL.—Arrd. 16th Aug. 1854; attached to N. W. Prov., Sep. 1855; Asst. Magt., Moradabad, 31st Oct. 1855; leave on M. C. from 15th May to 31st Dec. 1857; Asst. Magt., Bulandshahr, 11th Jan. 1858; Saháranpur, 20th Feb. 1858; Moradabad, 10th June 1858; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 26th Sep. 1858 to 28th Oct. 1859; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 12th Nov. 1859; Etah, 19th Apl. 1860; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Etah, 10th Aug. 1860; 1st gr., Etah, 25th Feb. 1862; Allahabad, 21st Jan. 1863; Offg. Judge, S. C. Court, Allahabad, 7th Apl. 1863; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 7th July 1863; Offg. Dy. Comr., Fyzabad, 25th Feb. 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 2nd Oct. 1865; Gházipur, 19th Oct. 1865; furl. to Eur. from 10th Oct. 1866 to 9th Oct. 1868; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 16th Oct. 1868; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 10th Mar. 1869; 1st gr., Hamírpur, 23rd Mar. 1869; Offg. Magt., Hamírpur, 13th May 1869; furl. in India on M. C. from 5th Jan. to 5th Apl. 1870; Offg. Magt., Bánda, 6th Apl. 1870; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., Bánda, 15th Nov. 1871; Magt., Bánda, 4th Mar. 1872; Magt., Jaunpur, 16th July 1874; Offg. Judge, Azamgach, 16th Mar. 1875; Magt., from 20th Nov. 1875, Hamírpur, 13th Dec. 1875; Offg. Judge, Bánda, 5th Feb. 1877; Judge, 24th Mar. 1878.

1854. HENRY ANTHONY HARRISON.—Arrd. 3rd Apl. 1855; attached to Bengal, May 1856; Asst. Magt., Cuttack, 23rd May 1856; trans. N. W. Prov., 21st Sep. 1858; Asst. Magt., Benares, 24th Dec. 1858; Azamgarh, 18th Jan. 1859; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Azamgarh, 21st Mar. 1861; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 14th Apl. 1862; Offg. Jt. Magt., Etah, 20th Oct. 1862; Jt. Magt., Etah, 6th Dec. 1863; Asst. 1st gr., Settlt. Dept., but to continue as Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Etah, Feb. 1864; leave on M. C. from 28th May to 31st Oct. 1864; Asst., 1st gr., Settlt. Dept., and Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Etah, 1st Nov. 1864; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 13th May 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Jaunpur, 24th Dec. 1865; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 13th Jan. 1866; furl. to Eur. from 3rd Mar. 1867 to 4th Dec. 1869; on subsistence allowance (without employment) from 5th Dec. 1869 to 6th Mar. 1870; Offg. Magt., Hamírpur, 7th Mar. 1870; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., Hamírpur, Feb. 1872; Magt. (Hamírpur), 8th Mar. 1872; Magt., Farukhabad, 10th Apl. 1872; Sháhjahánpur, 8th Aug. 1872; Hamírpur, 7th Nov. 1872; Farukhabad, 7th Jan. 1873; Settlt. Officer, Farukhabad, Jan. 1874; Offg. Judge, Farukhabad, 11th June 1875; Magt., Farukhabad, 9th Sep. 1875; Offg. Comr., Jhánsi Divn., 30th Sep., 1875; Magt., from 8th Nov. 1875, Farukhabad; 1st Dec. 1875; Offg. Judge, Mirzapur, 4th Apl. 1877; Allahabad, 31st July 1878; Judge, 15th Aug. 1878; Mirzapur, 16th Sep. 1878.

1855. CLARMONT JOHN DANIELLI.—Arrd. 7th Dec. 1855; attached to N. W. Prov. 10th Mar. 1856; Asst. Magt., Agra, 7th June 1856; Etáwah, 22nd Jan. 1857; Aligarh, with powers of Jt. Magt., 15th Oct. 1857; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Etah, 12th Jan. 1858; Under-Secy. to Govt., Offg. Jt. Magt., Etáh, Mar. 1858; Under-

Secy. to Govt., June 1858; leave on M. C. from 13th July to 20th Sep. 1858; furl.* to Eur. on M. C. from 10th Apl. 1859 to 27th Oct. 1860; on subsistence allowance from 28th Oct. to 7th Dec. 1860; Offg. Dy. Comr., Jhānsi, 8th Dec. 1860; Dy. Comr., 3rd class, Jhānsi, 1st Mar. 1862; leave on M. C. from 20th Apl. to 19th July 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Muzaṭarnagar, 1st Aug. 1863; 1st gr., Shāhjahānpur, 29th Feb. 1864; 1st gr., and Asst. Settlt. Dept., Etāh, 25th June 1864; 1st gr. Shāhjahānpur, 17th Nov. 1864; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Shāhjahānpur, 17th Feb. 1865; Offg. Magt., Gorakhpur, 3rd Aug. 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 20th Nov. 1865; Offg. Magt., Shāhjahānpur, 18th Mar. 1866; Benares, 9th Apl. 1867; Jaunpur, 4th Dec. 1867; Farukhabad, 16th Jan. 1869; furl. to Eur. from 8th Mar. 1871 to 21st Mar. 1872; Jt. Mag., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 28th Mar. 1872; Offg. Magt., Cawnpore, 1st Apl. 1872; Magt., 30th Aug. 1872; Offg. Judge, 11th May 1874; Magt., 9th July 1874; Offg. Judge, Mainpuri, 10th Apl. 1877; Magt., Etawah, 21st Dec. 1877; Offg. Judge, Gorakhpur, 8th Jan. 1878; Judge, 4th Sep. 1878.
