1855. ELLIOTT COLVIN.—Arrd. 6th Nov. 1855; attached to N.-W. Prov., 19th Nov. 1856; Asst. Magt., Agra, 10th Dec. 1856; Muttra, 25th May 1857; Aligarh, with powers of Jt. Magt., Aug. 1857; leave on M. C. from 19th Oct. to 3rd Dec. 1857; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 4th Dec. 1857; Budaun, 10th June 1858; leave on M. C. from 1st Aug. to 8th Dec. 1858; Asst. Comr., Kumaun, employed in the Tarai Parganas, 9th Dec. 1858; Supt., Tarai Dist., Mar. 1861; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 1st Oct. 1865; Supt., Tarai Parganas, 3rd Nov. 1865; Pilibhit sub-divn., 10th May 1866; settlt. of Pilibhit sub-divn., June 1866; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 20th Mar. 1867; Supt., Tarai (and also Pilibhit), 11th Dec. 1867; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 7th Feb. 1868; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 2nd May to 31st Oct. 1868; Supt., Tarai Dist., 14th Nov. 1868; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 21st Feb. 1869; Supt., Tarai Dist., 15th Mar. 1869; Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., July 1869; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 21st Aug. 1869; fur. to Eur. from 22nd Apl. 1872 to 12th Dec. 1873; Magt., Benares, 20th Dec. 1873; Moradabad, 14th Apl. 1875; on special duty assessment in parganas Jahānabad and Pilibhit from 4th Jan. to 4th Feb. 1876; Magt., Moradabad, 5th Feb. 1876; on special duty with the Camp of H. R. H. the Prince of Wales, from 8th to 29th Feb. 1876; Magt., Moradabad, 1st Mar. 1876; Offg. Comr., Kumaun Divn., 22nd Aug. 1876; Magt., Moradabad, 22nd Nov. 1876; Offg. Comr., Meerut Divn., 22nd Aug. 1877; fur. to Eur. for two years, from 22nd Apl. 1878; Magt., Muzaṭarnagar, 25th Feb. 1880.

1855. CHARLES WILLIAM MOORE.—Arrd. 27th Apl. 1856; attached to N. W. Prov., 16th Jan. 1857; Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 26th Feb. 1857; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 25th Feb. 1858 to 26th Nov. 1859; Asst. Magt., Jaunpur, 7th Dec. 1859; Ghazipur, 31st Jan. 1860; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 20th May to 18th Nov. 1860; Asst. Magt., Ghazipur, 3rd Dec. 1860; Balia Sub-Divn., 13th Feb. 1861; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Balia, Mar. 1861; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1861; Benares, Apl. 1862; Offg. Asst. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov., from 1st May to 11th Oct. 1863; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Benares, 16th Oct. 1863; Muzaṭarnagar, 8th Apl. 1864; 2nd gr. (Bānda), in charge of Kirwi, 27th Apl. 1864; 1st gr., Apl. 1865; 1st gr., Etawah, 2nd Dec. 1865; Agra, 23th Mar. 1866; on special duty to Calcutta, between 15th May and 13th June 1866; Offg. Magt., Agra, 14th June 1866; Muttra, 10th Apl. 1867; Agra, 27th May 1867; Muttra, 16th Sep. 1867; Agra, 4th Nov. 1867; Azamgarh, 19th May 1868; Etawah, 27th Aug. 1869; Bareilly, 13th Feb. 1873; Magt., (Bareilly), 18th Feb. 1873; Offg. Judge, Bareilly, 9th May 1876; furl. to Eur. from 15th Apl. 1877 to Dec. 1878; Magt., Mirzapur, Dec. 1878.

1855. WILLIAM CHARLES TURNER.—Arrd. 1st Feb. 1856; attached to N.-W. Prov., 6th Nov. 1857; Asst. Magt., Jaunpur, 9th Nov. 1857; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 11th Mar. 1858 to 31st Jan. 1860; Asst. Magt., Benares, 23rd Feb. 1860; Azamgarh, 3rd Aug. 1860; Benares, 23rd Mar. 1861; Jaunpur, 30th Apl. 1861; Aligarh, 7th Jan. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Aligarh, 27th Aug. 1863; Ghazipur, 28th Nov. 1863; Asst. Magt., (Ghazipur), Dec. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Ghazipur, 2nd Apl. 1864; Offg. Magt., Ghazipur, 13th Apl. 1864; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. Magt., 1st May 1864; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mirzapur, 13th July 1864; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mirzapur, Apl. 1865; Offg. Magt., 20th Apl. 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 23rd Oct. 1865; Offg. Magt., 19th March 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. Mirzapur, 1st Apl. 1866; furl. to Eur. from 10th Apl. 1867 to 2nd Apl. 1869; on subsistence allowance from 3rd Apl. to 13th May 1869; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Fatehpur, 14th May 1869; Offg. Magt., 14th June 1869; Offg. Judge, 27th July 1870; Offg. Magt., 5th Oct. 1870; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 9th Oct. 1872 to 5th Feb. 1874; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 1st Apl.

* Eighteen months of the furlough allowed to count as residence and service towards pension.

1874 ; Magt., (Bulandshahr), 18th May 1874 ; Offg. Judge, Meerut, 17th July 1877 ; Magt., Bulandshahr, 27th Sep. 1877 ; Offg. Judge, Saharanpur, 23rd Aprl. 1878 ; Mainpuri, 6th Nov. 1878 ; Judge, Dec. 1878.

CLASS III.—18 YEAR'S STANDING.

1856. JOSEPH SLADEN.—Arrd. 16th Nov. 1856 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 17th Nov. 1857 ; Asst. Magt., Jaunpur, 14th Jan. 1858 ; Moradabad, 9th Aug. 1858 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Moradabad, 21st Mar. 1861 ; Asst. Magt., Bijnor, 17th Oct. 1862 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Bijnor, 22nd Feb. 1863 ; Offg. Magt., 21st June 1863 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 21st July 1863 ; Offg. Magt., 30th Aug. 1863 ; Jt. Magt., 30th Sep. 1863 ; furl. to Eur. from 14th Feb. 1864 to 8th Nov. 1865 ; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 23rd Nov. 1865 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 1st Jan. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., 14th Aprl. 1866 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 2nd. Nov. 1866 ; Offg. Supt., Dehra Dún, 4th May 1867 ; Supt. Dehra Dún, 12th June 1868 ; Offg. Magt., Azamgarh, 9th Sep. 1869 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bareilly, Offg. Magt., Azamgarh, Aug. 1869 ; furl. to Eur. from 23rd. Oct. 1870 to 10th Feb. 1872 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Meerut, 1st Mar. 1872 ; Offg. Magt., Meerut, 10th May 1872 ; Muza'farnagar, 17th Feb. 1873 ; Magt., Muza'farnagar, 13th Mar. 1873 ; furl. to Eur. from 19th Aprl. to 17th Nov. 1875 ; Mag. Muza'farnagar, 2nd Dec. 1875 ; Saharanpur, 19th Mar. 1877.

1856. MELVILLE WILLIAM SANDYS.—Arrd. 22nd Oct. 1856 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 12th Feb. 1858 ; Asst. Magt., Cawnpore, 15th Aprl. 1858 ; Etah, 14th Sep. 1858 ; Azamgarh, 5th Jan. 1859 ; Sháhjahánpur, 2nd Nov. 1859 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Sháhjahánpur, 1st Aprl. 1861 ; Asst. Magt., 25th Feb. 1862 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 29th Aprl. 1862 ; Moradabad, 20th Oct. 1862 ; Bijnor, 27th Jan. 1864 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr. 23rd May 1864 ; 1st gr., 11th Aprl. 1865 ; Offg. Magt., Bijnor, 19th July 1866 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th Oct. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., Banda, 5th Oct. 1867 ; furl. to Eur. from 3rd Aprl. 1870 to 29th Mar. 1872 ; Offg. Magt., Banda, 25th Aprl. 1872 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 25th June 1872 ; Offg. Magt., Saharanpur, 25th Aug. 1872 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 25th Oct. 1872, Muza'farnagar, 3rd Nov. 1872 ; Offg. as Magt., Muza'farnagar, from 23th Jan. to 16th Feb. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Budaun, 6th Mar. 1873 ; Offg. Magt., 8th Aprl. 1873 ; Magt., 10th July 1874.

1856. JOHN JAMES FOOTE LUMSDEN.—Arrd. 16th Nov. 1856 ; attached to N. W. Prov. 12th Oct. 1857 ; Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 3rd Nov. 1857 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr. Gorakhpur, 14th July 1858 ; Asst. Settlt. Dept., 21st Aprl. 1860 ; 2nd gr. Asst. Settlt. Dept. 26th May 1862 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., 2nd Dec. 1864 ; Offg. Magt., and also Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr. Gorakhpur, 4th Sep. 1866 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr. Azamgarh, 5th Nov. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., Azamgarh, 25th July 1867 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., 18th Nov. 1867 ; Offg. Magt., 26th Feb. 1868 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., 8th Mar. 1868 ; furl. to Eur. from 29th Aprl. 1868 to 20th Jan. 1871 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bánda, 20th Feb. 1871 ; in charge of sub-divn. of Karwi, Mar. 1871 ; Offg. Magt., Farukhabad, 24th July 1871 ; Benares, 12th Oct. 1871 ; Gorakhpur, 8th Mar. 1873 ; Magt., (Gorakhpur), 30th July 1874 ; on special duty to Naini Tal from 20th July 1875 to 29th Sep. 1875 ; Magt., Gorakhpur, 6th Oct. 1875 ; Mirzapur, 27th Feb. 1877 ; Offg. Comr., Rae Bareilly Divn., 3rd Aprl. 1878 ; Fyzabad Divn., 8th Nov. 1878.

1856. ALEXANDER JOHN LAWRENCE.—Arrd. 10th Nov. 1856 ; attached to N.-W. Prov., 22nd Mar. 1858 ; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 15th Aprl. 1858 ; Muza'farnagar, 1st Feb. 1859 ; Saháranpur, 10th May 1859 ; Muza'farnagar, 11th Sep. 1859 ; Saháranpur, 31st Oct. 1859 ; Meerut, 21st May 1861 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Meerut, 21st June 1862 ; 2nd gr., Saháranpur, 18th Nov. 1862 ; Asst. Magt., Saháranpur, 8th Dec. 1862 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 27th May 1863 ; Asst. Magt., Dec. 1863 ; Settlt. Officer, Bhandara, 4th Aprl. 1864 ; furl. to Eur. from 4th May 1867 to 16th Feb. 1869 ; Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., Etáwah, 11th Mar. 1869 ; 2nd gr., July 1869 ; Offg. Magt., 23rd July 1869 ; Settlt. Officer, 2nd gr., 23th Aug. 1869 ; Offg. Magt., Ghazipur, 7th Dec. 1869 ; Benares, 14th Feb. 1870 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Feb. 1871 ; Offg. Magt., 10th Mar. 1871 ; Mem. of the Commission connected with the several Lawrence Asylums in India, from 7th June to 30th Nov. 1872 ; on special duty with Govt. of India, Home Dept., from 1st Dec. 1872 to 31st Jan. 1873 ; Offg. Magt., Etawah, 3rd Feb. 1873 ; Offg. Judge, Mainpuri, 7th June 1874 ; Offg. Magt., Etawah, 7th July 1874 ; Magt., Etawah, 20th Oct. 1874 ; Agra, 14th Nov. 1876 ; Offg. Comr., Agra Divn., 15th May 1877 ; Magt., Agra, 13th Aug. 1877 ; Settlt. Officer, Aug. 1877 ; Offg. Comr., Agra Divn., 4th Sep. 1878 ; Magt., Agra, 5th Nov. 1878.

1856. HERCULES GREY ROSS.—Arrd. 16th Nov. 1856; attached to N.-W. Prov., 5th Apl. 1858; Asst. Magt., Azamgarh, 20th Mar. 1858; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Bahraich, 19th June 1858; 2nd class, 22nd Oct. 1859; Sultanpur, Oct. 1860; 2nd class, Lucknow, 9th Apl. 1861; Offg. City Magt., Lucknow, 27th Sep. 1861; Asst. Comr., 1st class (Offg. as City Magt.), 22nd Oct. 1861; Offg. Dy. Comr., Mohumdi (Kheri), 1st Mar. 1862; furl. to Eur. on M. C. from 11th Apl. 1863 to 12th Feb. 1865; Asst. Comr., 1st class, Lucknow, 9th Mar. 1865; Offg. City Magt., Lucknow, from 10th Mar. to 12th Apl. 1865; Offg. Dy. Comr., Unao, 12th June 1865; Mohumdi (Kheri), 29th July 1865; Asst. Comr., 1st class, 20th Sep. 1865, Lucknow, Offg. Dy. Comr., Dariabad (Bara Banki), 10th Oct. 1865; Sitapur, 27th Oct. 1865; Asst. Comr., 1st class, 1st May 1866; (Offg. Dy. Comr.); leave on M. C. from 24th Aug. to 23rd Oct. 1867; Offg. Supt., Tarai Parganas and Pilibhit Sub-divn., 29th Feb. 1868; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Supt., Tarai Parganas and Pilibhit Sub-divn. Apl. 1868; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 15th Apl. 1868; Offg. Supt., Tarai Parganas and Pilibhit Sub-divn., 6th May 1868; leave on M. C. from 11th June to 3rd Oct. 1868; Offg. Magt., Bijnor, 4th Oct. 1868; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 6th Jan. 1868; Offg. Magt., 1st Feb. 1869; Offg. Asst. Comr., Naini Tal, 10th Apl. 1869; Offg. Supt., Dehra Dún, 11th Nov. 1869; Supt. Dehra Dún, Dec. 1869; furl. to Eur. from 14th Feb. to 15th Nov. 1876; Supt., Dehra Dún, 23rd Nov. 1876.

1856. ROBERT MOSS KING.—Arrd. 22nd Oct. 1856; attached to Oudh, 6th Mar. 1858; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Purwah (Unao), 12th Apl. 1858; Bahraich, 2nd class, June 1859; Asst. Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, Dec. 1859; Offg. Dy. Comr., Partabgarh, 12th July 1861; Asst. Comr., 1st class, 1st May 1862; Dy. Comr., 3rd class, 1st May 1863; held charge of the settlement of the Partabgarh dist., from 18th Feb. to 28th July 1866; Comr., Baiswara Divn., without leaving Partabgarh, from 20th Mar. to 8th Apl. 1866; Offg. Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, from 2nd Aug. to 31st Oct. 1866; deputed to the Govr.-Genl's durbar, at Agra, in charge of the taluqdars, invested with the Order of the Star of India, Nov. 1866; Dy. Comr., Partabgarh, 27th Nov. 1866; settlt. of Partabgarh from 27th Dec. 1866 to 25th Mar. 1868; Dy. Comr., 2nd gr., 1st July 1868; furl. to Eur. from 20th July 1868 to 1st Apl. 1870; Offg. Dy. Comr., 1st gr., Fyzabad, 23th Apl. 1870; 2nd gr., 6th Nov. 1870; 1st gr., 8th Mar. 1871; Offg. Comr., Lucknow Divn., 27th May 1871; Offg. Dy. Comr., 1st gr., 12th Oct. 1871, Fyzabad; leave on M. C. from 23rd Apl. to 21st Oct. 1872; Offg. Comr., Fyzabad Divn., from 16th Jan. to 8th Feb. 1873; Dy. Comr., 1st gr., (Fyzabad), 8th Dec. 1873; Offg. Comr., Fyzabad Divn., 8th Sep. 1875; Dy. Comr., 1st gr., Fyzabad, 27th Nov. 1875; furl. to Eur. from 15th Mar. 1876 to 17th Nov. 1877; Offg. Magt., Meerut, 28th Nov. 1877; Magt., 1st Jan. 1878; Offg. Judge, 27th Mar. 1878; Magt. 19th Nov. 1878.

1856. ROBERT GEORGE CURRIE.—Arrd. 1st Feb. 1857; attached to N. W. Prov., Jan. 1858; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 25th Jan. 1858; Asst. Settlt. Dept., Bulandshahr, 1st Apl. 1860; 2nd gr., 26th May 1862; 1st gr., 1st Oct. 1864; furl. to Eur. from 25th Apl. 1865 to 24th Apl. 1866; also without pay from 25th Apl. to 29th Oct. 1866; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., Fatehgarh, 15th Nov. 1866; 1st gr., Shahjahanpur, 23rd Nov. 1866; 2nd gr., 1st Oct. 1868; Settlt. Officer of the new 2nd gr., July 1869; 1st gr., 1st Apl. 1870; furl. to Eur. from 29th Apl. to 23rd Dec. 1872; Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., Shahjahanpur, 1st Jan. 1873; in charge of settlt. of the dists. Shahjahanpur and Bareilly, Jan. 1874; Offg. Magt., Shahjahanpur, and also Settlt. Officer, Shahjahanpur and Bareilly, 1st Sept. 1874; Magt., Shahjahanpur, 8th Dec. 1874; furl. to Eur. from 23rd Apl. 1877 to 19th Nov. 1878; Magt., Bareilly, 3rd Dec. 1878.

1856. WILLIAM YOUNG, (Bar.-at-Law).—Arrd. 16th Dec. 1856; attached to N. W. Prov., 5th Feb. 1858; Asst. Magt., Azamgarh, 19th Apl. 1858; Jaunpur, 26th Jan. 1859; Allahabad, 6th Apl. 1861; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 22nd May 1861; Asst. Magt., 5th Dec. 1861; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Mar. 1862; Asst. Magt., 13th Jan. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st May 1863; furl. to Eur. from 24th July 1864 to 23rd July 1865; also without pay from 24th July 1865 to 12th Jan. 1866; on subsistence allowance from 13th Jan. to 13th Feb. 1866; Asst. Magt., Bulandshahr, 14th Feb. 1866; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Feb. 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 25th Apl. 1866; Offg. Magt., 8th May 1867; Jt. Magt., 10th July 1867; Offg. Magt., 19th Aug. 1867; Jt. Magt., 19th Oct. 1867; Offg. Magt., 6th Aug. 1868; Jt. Magt., 5th Oct. 1868; Offg. Magt., 17th Apl. 1869; MuzaTarnagar, 19th May 1869; Bulandshahr, 5th July 1869; Jt. Magt., Bulandshahr, 23rd Aug. 1869; Offg. Magt., Gorakhpur, from 30th Dec. 1869 to 15th Sep. 1870; Jt. Magt., Gorakhpur, 16th Nov. 1870; Offg. Magt., Gorakhpur, 11th Jan. 1871; furl. to Eur. from 15th Jan. 1872 to 13th Oct. 1874; Offg. Magt., Basti, 24th Oct. 1874; Magt., 29th Mar. 1875; Mainpuri, 2nd Apl. 1875; Offg.

Judge, Mainpuri, 6th July 1877; Magt., 14th Aug. 1877; Offg. Judge, 17th Apl. 1878; Moradabad, 18th Nov. 1878.

1856. JAMES WALLACE QUINTON.—Arrd. 16th Nov. 1856; attached to N. W. Prov., 12th Oct. 1857; Asst. Magt., Gházipur, 23th Oct. 1857; in charge of the sub-divn. of Ballia, 10th Mar. 1859; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Gházipur, 6th May 1861; Fatehpur, 21st Jan. 1863; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 21st July 1863; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 1th Mar. 1864; Offg. Magt., Muza'arnagar, 20th Sep. 1864; Meerut, 20th Oct. 1864; Offg. Dy. Comr., 3rd gr., Sitapur, 14th Apl. 1865; 3rd gr., Fyzabad, 30th Oct. 1865; Dy. Comr., 3rd gr., Lucknow, 23rd Feb. 1866; 2nd gr., 1st May 1866, on special duty at Lucknow in Viceroy's darbar from 17th Oct. 1866 to 18th May 1867; Dy. Comr., 2nd gr., Fyzabad, 19th Nov. 1867; Offg. 1st gr., Lucknow, 20th July 1868; Dy. Comr., 2nd gr., 1st Aug. 1868; Offg. 1st gr., 28th Aug. 1868; Offg. Comr., Lucknow Divn., 25th Mar. 1869; Offg. Dy. Comr., 1st gr., Lucknow, 19th Apl. 1869; furl. to Eur. from 1st Apl. 1871 to 24th Mar. 1873; Dy. Comr., 2nd gr., Hardoi, 25th Mar. 1873; Lucknow, 8th July 1873; Offg. Dy. Comr., 1st gr., Lucknow, 2nd Mar. 1875; left Oudh on 7th Apl. 1875; Offg. Judl. Comr., British Burmah, Apl. 1875; left Rangoon on 2nd Mar. 1877 and returned to Oudh as Offg. Dy. Comr., 1st gr., Hardoi, 26th Mar. 1877; Magt., Allahabad, 1st Apl. 1877; Comr. Allahabad, from 9th to 31st Jan. 1878; Offg. Judge, 24th Apl. 1878; on special duty as a mem. of the N. W. Prov. Famine Commission from 31st July to 31st Oct. 1878; Offg. Comr., Jhansi Divn., 12th Nov. 1878.

1856. CHARLES ROBERTSON.—Arrd. 16th Dec. 1856; Asst. Magt., Beerbhoom, 16th June 1857; permitted to proceed to N. W. Prov., left Beerbhoom on 3rd Feb. 1858; Asst. Magt., Fatehgarh, 8th Mar. 1858; Judge, Farukhabad, from 15th Oct. to 30th Nov. 1860; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Fatehgarh, 21st Mar. 1861; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 30th July 1862; Banda sub-divn. of Karwi, 4th Jan. 1863; Offg. Under-Secy. to Govt. N. W. Prov. 22nd Apl. 1864; Offg. Jr. Secy., 30th Mar. 1865; Jt. Mag., 1st gr., Offg. Jr. Secy., May 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., and employed in settling the boundaries of Banda and Allahabad dists., 11th Nov. 1865; Offg. Jr. Secy. to Govt., 12th Mar. 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Agra, 17th Nov. 1866; Offg. Jr. Secy. to Govt., 10th Jan. 1867; Jr. Secy. to Govt., 25th Mar. 1867; furl. to Eur. from 27th Feb. 1869 to 23rd Feb. 1871; Offg. Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Mahárāja of Benares, 7th Mar. 1871; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 13th Apl. 1872; Offg. Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Mahárāja of Benares, 16th Aug. 1872; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 10th Sep. 1872; Offg. Judge, 15th Apl. 1874; Offg. Magt., 21st June 1874; Offg. Judge, 24th Oct. 1874; Offg. Magt., 6th Nov. 1874; furl. to Eur. from 5th Apl. to 4th Dec. 1875; Offg. Magt., 5th Dec. 1875; Magt., 4th July 1876; Offg. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov., 13th Jan. 1877; Secy., to Govt., 7th Oct. 1877.

1856. CHARLES ALFRED ELLIOTT.—Arrd. 30th Nov. 1856; Offg. Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 10th June 1857; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Oudh, Jan. 1858; 2nd class, Oudh, March 1859; Offg. Dy. Comr., Unao, 5th Jan. 1860; Asst. Comr., 2nd class, 17th March 1860; Offg. Dy. Comr., Bahraich, 30th June 1860; Asst. Comr., 1st class, Offg. Dy. Comr., Bahraich, 1st Aug. 1860; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 20th May 1861; Offg. Magt., 1st Aug. 1861; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Nov. 1861; Bijnor, 21st Feb. 1862; Agra, 9th Oct. 1862; Settlt. Officer, Hoshangabad, 6th Mar. 1863; furl. to Eur. from 14th May 1865 to 28th Oct. 1866; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st class, Farukhabad, 27th Nov. 1866; Offg. Magt., Farukhabad, from 10th Oct. to 9th Dec. 1867; from 6th Sep. to 4th Nov. 1868; and from 2nd to 17th Jan. 1869; Settlt. Officer, 2nd gr., Farukhabad, July 1869; 1st gr., 1st Apl. 1870; Offg. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov., 21st Apl. 1870; Secy. to Govt., 30th Mar. 1872; furl. to Eur. from 15th Mar. 1875 to 11th Feb. 1877; Secy. to Govt., 14th Feb. 1877; Offg. Comr., Meerut Divn., 18th Feb. 1877; Comr., 7th Oct. 1877; services placed at the disposal of the Govt. of India, Dept. of Rev., Agriculture, and Commerce, for duty in Madras, Sep. 1877.

1856. RICHARD WALL (Bar.-at-Law).—Arrd. 16th Dec. 1856; attached to Bengal, 9th Jan. 1858; Asst. Magt., Beerbhoom, 15th Jan. 1858; Agra, 26th June 1858; Muttra, 3rd Dec. 1858; Etawah, 21st May 1860; Muttra, 26th July 1861; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 24th Apl. 1862 to 23rd Apl. 1865; without pay from 24th Apl. 1865 to 2nd Jan. 1866; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Etawah, 16th Jan. 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Etawah, 1st May 1866; Offg. Magt., 17th Aug. 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 18th Nov. 1866; Offg. Magt., 20th May 1868; Jt. Mag., 1st gr., 27th July 1868; 1st gr., Moradabad, 18th Jan. 1869; Offg. Magt., 14th May 1869; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th July 1869; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 5th July 1870; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Moradabad,

1st Jan. 1871 ; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 19th Aug. 1872 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Moradabad, 15th Oct. 1872 ; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 4th Apl. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 30th Jan. 1874 ; Offg. Magt., Bānda, 6th Apl. 1874 ; Aligarh, 4th Oct. 1876 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 8th Nov. 1876 ; Offg. Magt., Benares, 20th Nov. 1876 ; Magt., Benares, 19th Feb. 1877 ; Offg. Judge, Gorakhpur, 7th May 1877 ; Magt., Benares, 8th Jan. 1878 ; Offg. Judge, Ghāzipur, from 17th Apl. to 13th Oct. 1878 ; Magt., Benares, 6th Nov. 1878.

1857. AUCKLAND COLVIN.—Arrd. 27th Jan. 1858 ; leave on M. C. from 26th June to 17th Sep. 1858 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 23rd Nov. 1858 ; Asst. Magt., Bijnor, 11th Jan. 1859 ; Asst. to Colr. in the Settlt. Dept., Muzaṛnagar, 12th Apl. 1860 ; 2nd gr., Asst., May 1862 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 2nd gr., Bijnor, Dec. 1863 ; Offg. Under-Secy. to Govt. of India, Home Dept., 12th May 1864 ; Forgn. Dept., 27th Jan. 1865 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., 15th Nov. 1865 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., Etah, 15th Feb. 1866 ; furl. to Eur. from 4th Mar. 1866 to 3rd Mar. 1867 ; leave on M. C. without pay from 4th Mar. 1867 ; on subsistence allowance from 4th Nov. to 8th Dec. 1867 ; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., Allahabad, 9th Dec. 1867 ; 2nd gr., Oct. 1868 ; Settlt. Officer, 2nd gr., July 1869 ; Offg. Magt., from 13th Sep. to 31st Oct. 1869 ; Secy. to Bd. of Rev., N. W. Prov., 5th Mar. 1870 ; on special duty to Naini Tāl in connection with the revision of settlt. in the Allahabad dist. from 2nd June to 15th July 1870 ; Offg. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., Allahabad, 10th Aug. 1872 ; Secy. to Bd. of Rev., 11th Oct. 1872 ; Offg. Secy. to Govt., 6th Apl. 1873 ; Secy. to Bd. of Rev., 6th June 1873 ; Offg. Comr. of Excise and Stamps and Insp.-Genl. of Regtn. N. W. Prov., 26th June 1873 ; Secy. to Bd. of Rev., 28th Sep. 1873 ; furl. to Eur. from 12th Jan. 1874 to 25th Feb. 1875 ; Offg. Secy. to Govt., N. W. Prov., 1st Mar. 1875 ; Mem. of the Commission to investigate the disturbances in the districts of Poona and Ahmadnagar, in Aug. 1875 ; Offg. Secy. to Govt., 17th Nov. 1875 ; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 25th Apl. to 24th Oct. 1876 ; Offg. Magt., Basti, 13th Nov. 1876 ; Magt., 20th Feb. 1877 ; Bijnor, 1st Apl. 1877 ; Offg. Comr. of Inland Customs, 26th Nov. 1877 ; Magt., Bijnor, 19th Feb. 1878.

1857. HARRY JAMES SPARKS.—Arrd. 29th Dec. 1857 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 7th Dec. 1858 ; Asst. Magt., Mainpur, 31st Jan. 1859 ; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Bahraich, 9th June 1859 ; Mohumdi (Kheri), 1st June 1860 ; 2nd gr., 1st Aug. 1860 ; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 9th Sep. 1860 to 23rd Aug. 1862 ; Asst. Comr., 2nd class, Lucknow, 15th Sep. 1862 ; Bahraich, 1st Oct. 1862 ; on special duty in Forest Dept. as Asst. Supt., Oudh Forests, 12th Jan. 1863 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Sitapur, 21st Apl. 1863 ; Asst. Comr., Lucknow, 3rd June 1863 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Hardoi, 15th July 1863 ; Dariabad (Bara Banki), 23rd Oct. 1863 ; Asst. Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, 22nd Jan. 1864 ; also Offg. Supt. of Excise and Stamps, Oudh, 22nd Apl. 1864 ; Jr. Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, 1865 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Mohumdi, 24th Mar. 1866 ; Asst. Comr., 1st gr., 1st May 1866 ; Offg. Dy. Comr. Mohumdi ; Offg. Civil Judge, Lucknow, 1st Dec. 1867 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Lucknow, 19th Feb. 1868 ; Fyzabad, 27th July 1868 ; fur. to Eur. from 1st May to 29th Oct. 1869 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Fyzabad, 5th Nov. 1869 ; Bahraich, 4th May 1870 ; 2nd gr., 21st May 1870 ; Lucknow, 11th Mar. 1871 ; Dy. Comr., 3rd gr., Offg. 2nd gr., 24th Mar. 1871 ; Offg., 1st gr., 27th May 1871 ; 2nd gr., 24th Oct. 1871 ; furl. to Eur. from 1st Apl. 1872 to 14th May 1873 ; Offg. Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, 17th May 1873 ; Dy. Comr., 2nd gr., 20th June 1874 ; Secy. to Cf. Comr., Oudh, 29th Nov. 1877 ; furl. to Eur. from 20th April 1878 ; Comr. in Oudh (while on leave) from 1st Apl. 1878.

1857. GEORGE LUKIS LANG.—Arrd. 2nd Mar. 1858 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 10th Sep. 1858 ; services placed at the disposal of Forgn. Dept. for employment in Oudh, Nov. 1858 ; Supernumy. Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Lucknow, 4th Nov. 1858 ; Unao, May 1859 ; Lucknow, 18th Jan. 1860 ; Asst. Comr., 2nd class, Lucknow, June 1860 ; Dariabad (Bara Banki,) Aug. 1860 ; Sitapur, 1st Nov. 1860 ; Dariabad, Dec. 1860 ; Bahraich, Jan. 1861 ; Lucknow, 1st Oct. 1861 ; leave on M. C. from 19th Feb. to 18th Apl. 1862 ; Asst., Settlt. Dept., Sultanpur, 31st Jan. 1863 ; Rae Bareli, 25th Feb. 1863 ; furl. to Eur. from 25th Apl. 1865 to 24th Apl. 1866, and on leave without pay from 25th Apl. 1866 ; on subsistence allowance from 12th Nov. to 19th Dec. 1866 ; Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 20th Dec. 1866 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Jhānsi, 16th Mar. 1867 ; Dy. Comr., 4th class (Jhānsi), 10th Apl. 1867 ; Offg. 3rd class, Jhānsi, 1st Aug. 1868 ; furl. to Eur. from 7th Oct. 1871 to 18th Sep. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. Magt., Fatehpur, 24th Sep. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 29th Jan. 1874 ; Offg., Magt., 3rd Apl. 1874 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 7th Jan. 1876 ; Offg. Magt., Fatehpur, 3rd Apl. 1876 ; Aligarh 21st Mar. 1877 ; Magt., Aligarh, 10th Apl. 1877 ; Offg. Judge, 6th May 1878 ; Magt., 28th July 1878.

1857. FREDERICK EDEN ELLIOT.—Arrd. 16th Mar. 1858; attached to N. W. Prov., 11th Nov. 1858; Asst. Magt., Bulandshahr, 13th Jan. 1859; Etawah, 8th Mar. 1862; Gorakhpur, 19th Feb. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Gorakhpur, 16th Apr. 1864; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Apr. 1865; 1st gr., June 1865; Offg. Magt., 30th Nov. 1869; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 30th Dec. 1869; Offg. Magt., 15th Sep. 1870; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 16th Nov. 1870; Offg. Magt., Basti, 6th May 1872; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Gorakhpur, 8th June 1872; Offg. Magt., Basti, 21st Oct. 1872; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Gorakhpur, 10th Dec. 1873; Kasia sub-divn. 6th Jan. 1874; Offg. Magt., Basti, 4th Apr. 1874; furl. to Eur. from 9th Nov. 1874 to 7th Nov. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Hamirpur, 7th Dec. 1876; Offg. Magt., 1st Feb. 1877; Magt., Hamirpur, 10th Apr. 1877.

1857. WILLIAM KAYE.—Arrd. 8th Apr. 1858; attached to N. W. Prov. 14th Sep. 1859; Asst. Magt., Agra, 9th Nov. 1859; Mainpuri, 28th Feb. 1860; Muttra, 30th Apr. 1862; Agra, 28th July 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Agra, 13th Apr. 1864; Offg. Magt., Muttra, 20th Apr. 1864; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., (Agra), 15th May 1864; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Agra, Feb. 1865; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, 4th May 1865; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Agra, 26th July 1865; Offg. as Magt., Farukhabad, 17th Sep. 1865; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Agra, 17th Nov. 1865; Offg. Judge, S. C. Court, Allahabad, 1st Apr. 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st May 1866; Offg. Judge, S. C. Court, Allahabad; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 5th May 1867; furl. to Eur. from 10th Nov. 1867 to 11th Mar. 1869; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 2nd Apr. 1869; Bareilly, 22nd Sep. 1869; Offg. Magt., Bareilly, 31st May 1870; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st July 1870; Offg. Magt., 1st Aug. 1870; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Oct. 1870; Offg. Magt., 6th June 1871; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 6th July 1871; Offg. Magt., 1st Apr. 1872; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 5th Apr. 1872; Offg. Magt., Benares, 31st Mar. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Benares, 20th Dec. 1873; Bareilly, 3rd Apr. 1874; Offg. Magt., Hamirpur, 1st May 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Jan. 1875; Offg. Magt., 1st Feb. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th Dec. 1875; Offg. Magt., Agra, 11th May 1876; Etawah, 7th Nov. 1876; Bareilly, 5th Apr. 1877; Magt., Bareilly, 15th Apr. 1877; furl. to Eur. from 8th Apr. 1878.

1857. WILLIAM DUTHOIT.—Arrd. 17th Dec. 1857; attached to N. W. Prov., 10th Sept. 1858; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 14th Oct. 1858; Aligarh, 27th Jan. 1859; leave on M. C. from 9th Aug. to 7th Dec. 1859; Asst., Mag., Muza'arnagar, 29th Oct. 1860; Saharanpur, 31st Jan. 1861; Offg. Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Mahārāja of Benares, 3rd Jan. 1862; Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Mahārāja of Benares, 27th May 1862; Extra Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Apr. 1865; 1st gr., July 1866; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 27th Sept. 1869; Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Maharajah of Benares; 18th Nov. 1869; furl. to Eur. from 1st Apr. 1871 to 27th Mar. 1873; Offg. Magt., Ghazipur, 31st Mar. to 3rd Dec. 1873; Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Maharaja of Benares at Mirzapur, 12th Dec. 1873; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 15th Apr. 1874; Dy. Supt., Family Domains Maharajah of Benares, 21st June 1874; Offg. Magt. Mirzapur, 28th July 1874; Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Maharajah of Benares, 6th Nov. 1874; Offg. Judge, Benares, from 24th Nov. to 15th Dec. 1874; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 23rd Dec. 1874; Offg. Insp. Genl. of Regn. and Comr. of Excise and Stamps, N. W. Prov., 16th Mar. 1875; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 30th Mar. 1875; Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Maharaja of Benares, 5th Dec. 1875; Offg. Magt., Benares, 14th Apr. 1876; special leave on private affairs to Eur. from 11th Aug. 1876 to 10th Feb. 1877; Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 19th Feb. 1877; Dy. Supt., Family Domains, Mahārāja of Benares, 27th Feb. 1877; Offg. Magt., Shāhjahānpur, 9th Apr. 1877; Magt., 15th Apr. 1877; Offg. Judge, Shāhjahānpur, 24th Mar. 1878.

1857. THOMAS BURROWS TRACY.—Arrd. 29th Dec. 1857; attached to N. W. Prov., 11th Nov. 1858; Asst. Magt., Cawnpore, 28th Dec. 1858; Azamgarh, 5th Mar. 1862; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 31st July 1862; Asst. Mag., 24th Nov. 1862; Offg. Jt. Mag., 2nd gr., 5th Sep. 1863; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Dec. 1864; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, from 6th Dec. 1864 to 5th Jan. 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 16th May 1865; leave on M. C. from 2nd Sep. to 31st Oct. 1867; furl. to Eur. from 10th Jan. 1868 to 17th Dec. 1869; Asst. Magt., Cawnpore, 7th Jan. 1870; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Agra, 12th Feb. 1870; Offg. Magt., 5th Sep. 1870; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 5th Nov. 1870; Offg. Magt., 17th Sep. 1872; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 20th Nov. 1872; Offg. Magt., 21st Apr. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th Mar. 1873; Offg. Magt., Muza'arnagar, 27th Aug. 1873; Azamgarh, 10th Oct. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Agra, 10th Nov. 1873; furl. to Eur. from 16th Mar. 1874 to 10th Mar. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mirzapur, 15th Mar. 1875; Offg. Magt., Benares, 2nd Apr. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Benares, 24th Nov. 1875; Agra, 28th Apr. 1876; Offg. Magt., Agra, 2nd May 1876; Bareilly, 13th May 1876; Agra, 7th Aug. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Agra, 14th Nov. 1876;

Offg. Magt., Muttra, 1st Apl. 1877; Magt., Muttra, 24th Apl. 1877; Moradabad, 3rd May 1878.

1857. SEABURNE MAY MOENS.—Arrd. 17th Dec. 1857; attached to N.-W. Prov., 10th Sep. 1858; Asst. Magt., Bareilly, 24th Oct. 1858; Offg. Asst. Secy. to Govt. N.-W. Prov. 12th Mar. 1861; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Bareilly, 1st Mar. 1862; placed in magt charge of Pilibhit, in Bareilly, Oct. 1864; Asst. Settlt. Officer., 2nd gr., 1st Jan. 1866; Offg. Magt., 22nd Feb. 1866; reverted to settlement duty, 9th Mar. 1866; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 10th Oct. 1866, Offg. Asst. Settlt. Officer, 1st gr., (Bareilly); confirmed, 1st Apl. 1867; Settlt. Officer, 2nd gr., Bareilly, 1st Apl. 1870; furl. to Eur. from 1st Nov. 1872 to 27th Oct. 1874; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 3rd Nov. 1874; Saharanpur, 8th Dec. 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Saharanpur, 10th Mar. 1875; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 14th Mar. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 5th Nov. 1875; Offg. Magt., 22nd Mar. 1876; Gorakhpur, 16th Mar. 1877; confirmed, Gorakhpur, 1st May 1877; one year's furl. to Eur. from 11th Mar. 1878.

1858. CHARLES WILLIAM PAXTON WATTS.—Arrd. 10th Jan. 1859; attached to N.-W. Prov. 6th Dec. 1859; services placed at the disposal of the Govt. of Panjab, Jan. 1860; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Ferozepur, 17th Feb. 1860; Jhung, 28th Feb. 1860; Sāhpur, 13th July 1860; Peshawur, 30th Nov. 1861; Jullundhar, 4th June 1862; Offg. Judge, S. C. Court, Jullundhar, 2nd May 1863; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Jullundhar, 20th May 1863; Ferozepur, 10th Feb. 1864; Offg. Judge, S. C. Court, Umritsur, 2nd Nov. 1864; Offg. Dy. Comr. Umritsur, 8th May 1865; Asst. Comr. 3rd class, Ferozepur, 24th Aug. 1865; Judge, S. C. Court, Umritsur, 10th May 1866; 2nd gr., Judge, S. C. Court, Umritsur, 13th Sep. 1866; Asst. Settlt. Officer, 2nd gr., Etah, 19th Nov. 1866; Farukhabad, 24th Dec. 1866; Mainpuri, 9th Apl. 1867; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mainpuri, 24th Apl. 1867; Muttra, 6th Oct. 1867; Offg. Magt., 1st Oct. 1863; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Nov. 1863; Offg. Magt., 5th Oct. 1869; Jt. Magt. 1st gr., 5th Nov. 1869; Farukhabad, 21st May 1872; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, 16th Apl. 1873; Farukhabad, 15th July 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 4th Oct. 1873; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, 6th May 1874; Bareilly, 31st July 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 21st Oct. 1874; Farukhabad, 4th Nov. 1874; Offg. Magt., Azamgarh, 8th March 1875; Farukhabad, 8th Nov. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Dec. 1875; Offg. Magt., Aligarh, 16th May 1876; Farukhabad, 17th July 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 8th Oct. 1876; Offg. Magt., 20th Mar. 1877; confirmed Farukhabad, 6th July 1877; Offg. Judge, 1st June 1878; Magt., 22nd July 1878.

1858. DAVID MASON GARDNER.—Arrd. 12th Feb. 1859; attached to N.-W. Prov. 2nd Feb. 1860; Asst. Magt., Agra, 12th Mar. 1860; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr. Meerut, 1st June 1863; Offg. Jr. Asst. Comr., Kumaun, 30th Nov. 1863; Offg. Sr. Asst. Comr., Garhwal, 19th Nov. 1864; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Moradabad, 12th Mar. 1865; Offg. Sr. Asst. Comr., Garhwal, 19th May 1865; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Moradabad, 22nd Sep. 1867; Benares, 11th Oct. 1867; Offg. Magt., Benares, 4th Dec. 1867; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Benares, 16th Jan. 1868; furl. to Eur. from 10th Mar. 1869 to 5th Jan. 1871; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Jaunpur, 31st Jan. 1871; Offg. Magt., 11th Oct. 1871; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 4th Dec. 1871; Offg. Magt. Azamgarh, 2nd May 1873; Fatehpur, 23rd May 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 24th Sep. 1873; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 7th Oct. 1873; Jaunpur, 17th Oct. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 7th Nov. 1873; Offg. Magt., 1st May 1874; Azamgarh, 14th Aug. 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 10th Nov. 1874, 17th Nov. 1874; furl. to Eur. from 18th Jan. to 17th Nov. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 30th Nov. 1875; Azamgarh, 14th Mar. 1876; Offg. Magt., Azamgarh, 1st Apl. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 16th Nov. 1876; Offg. Magt., 26th Jan. 1877; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Mar. 1877; Offg. Magt., 26th Mar. 1877; confirmed, 13th Aug. 1877.

1858. CHARLES JOHN POWLETT.—Arrd. 12th Feb. 1859; attached to Bengal, 3rd Feb. 1860; Asst. Magt., Backurganj, 24th Feb. 1860; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Delhi, 20th Mar. 1861; Jhung, 4th May 1861; Simla, 10th Dec. 1862; Ludhiana, 30th Mar. 1863; Jhelum, 23rd Oct. 1863; leave on M. C. from 1st Apl. 1864 to 9th Dec. 1866; Asst. Magt., Benares, 21st Jan. 1867; Azamgarh, 22nd Feb. 1867; Offg. Jt. Magt., 3rd Mar. 1867; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th Aug. 1867; Offg. Magt., 6th May 1868; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th May 1868; Gorakhpur, 4th July 1869; furl. to Eur. on M. C. from 19th Feb. 1870 to 10th Feb. 1871; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mirzapur, 2nd Mar. 1871; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 19th June 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mirzapur, 16th July 1874; Offg. Magt., Basti, 24th Mar. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Nov. 1875; Offg. Magt., 10th Aug. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th Nov. 1876; furl. to Eur. from 1st Dec. 1876 to 28th Nov. 1877; Magt., Bijur, 21st Dec. 1877; Basti, 28th Feb. 1878.

1859. WILLIAM TYRRELL.—Arrd. 12th May 1859; attached to the N.-W. Prov., 20th June 1860; Asst. Magt., Cawnpore, 26th July 1860; Fatehpur, 2nd Nov. 1860; leave on M. C. from 10th Apl. to 9th July 1861; Asst. Magt., Farukhabad, 15th Aug. 1862; Offg. Jt. Magt., Farukhabad, Apl. 1864; Allahabad, 18th Mar. 1865; Offg. Under-Secy. to Govt., N.-W. Prov., 29th Mar. 1865; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., from 19th Apl. 1865; Offg. Under-Secy. to Govt., N.-W. Prov., Offg. Judge, S. C. C., Allahabad, 5th May 1867; Jt. Mag., 1st gr., Offg. Judge, S. C. C., Allahabad, 24th July 1867; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 26th Nov. 1867; Offg. Judge, S. C. C., Allahabad, 10th Dec. 1867; Offg. Regr., H. C. of Judicature, N.-W. Prov., 18th Dec. 1868; Regr., 3rd Aug. 1870; Offg. Judge, S. C. C., Allahabad, 4th Nov. 1870; Offg. Regr., H. C. 20th Apl. 1871; Regr., 9th Nov. 1871; Offg. Judge, Ghazipur, 21st Apl. 1877; Bareilly, 6th July 1877; Mainpuri, 21st Dec. 1877; a Magt., from 1st Jan. 1878; Offg. Judge, Bareilly, 8th Apl. 1878.

1860. JAMES ROBERT REID.—Arrd. 13th Dec. 1860; attached to N.-W. Prov., 13th Aug. 1861; Asst. Magt., Benares, 2nd Sep. 1861; Budaun, 1st Jan. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st May 1864; Jt. Magt., Apl. 1865; Offg. Dy. Comr., Dariabad (Bara Banki), 4th Dec. 1865; Lucknow, 6th Oct. 1866; Dariabad, 17th Oct. 1866; Hardoi, 3rd May 1867; Asst. Settl. Officer, 1st gr., Azamgarh, 10th Aug. 1868; Settl. Officer, 2nd gr., Azamgarh, 1st Jan. 1874; Offg. Magt., and Settl. Officer, 8th Aug. 1875; Settl. Officer, 2nd gr., 5th Nov. 1875; 1st gr., 1st Feb. 1877; furl. to Eur. from 18th Apl. 1877.

1860. ARTHUR SELLS.—Arrd. 28th Nov. 1860; attached to the N.-W. Prov., 22nd Nov. 1861; Asst. Magt., Etawah, 15th Jan. 1862; Offg. Jt. Magt., Apl. 1865; Agra, 1st July 1865; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., May 1866; Dehra Dun, 13th Nov. 1866; 1st gr., Meerut, 4th Apl. 1868; Offg. Magt., Meerut, 4th Nov. 1868; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 26th Dec. 1868; Offg. Magt., 17th Sep. 1870; Jt. Magt., 4th Oct. 1870; furl. to Eur. from 11th Mar. 1871 to 6th Feb. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Ghazipur, 15th Feb. 1873; Offg. Magt., 16th Apl. 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 27th June 1874; Offg. Magt., Muzaaffarnagar, 7th Apl. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 2nd Dec. 1875; Offg. Magt., 15th Mar. 1877; Magt., Muzaaffarnagar, 4th Sept. 1878.

1860. WILLIAM MEYMOTT TIDY.—Arrd. 28th Nov. 1860; attached to N.-W. Prov., 5th Aug. 1862; Asst. Magt., Meerut, 24th Sep. 1862; leave on M. C., 16th Sep. to 15th Dec. 1863; furl. to Eur. on M. C. from 11th Mar. 1864 to 27th Jan. 1865; Asst. Magt., Aligarh, 13th Feb. 1865; Etah, May 1866; Offg. Jt. Magt., 21st May 1867; Asst. Magt., 8th Oct. 1867; Saharanpur, 21st Jan. 1868; Offg. Magt., 29th June 1868; Asst. Magt., 29th Aug. 1868; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 5th Dec. 1868; 1st gr., 14th June 1869; Offg. Magt., 2nd Sep. 1869; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 1st Oct. 1869; furl. to Eur. from 29th Apl. 1872 to 26th Feb. 1874; Offg., Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Saharanpur, 15th Mar. 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 16th Apl. 1874; Offg. Magt., Saharanpur, 25th Aug. 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 25th Nov. 1874; Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 1st Sep. 1875; Jt. Magt., Saharanpur, 3rd Oct. 1875; Offg., Magt., 26th Sep. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Nov. 1876; Offg., Magt., Fatehpur, 15th Mar. 1877; special leave on private affairs from 13th to 28th Oct. 1877; furl. to Eur. from 15th Apl. to 30th Oct. 1878; Offg., Magt., Fatehpur, 10th Nov. 1878.

1860. FREDERICK SALMON GROWSE.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1860; attached to N. W. Prov. 9th Dec. 1861; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 9th Jan. 1862; leave on M. C. to Eur. from 23rd Feb. 1862 to 8th Jan. 1864; Asst. Magt., Agra, 29th Jan. 1864; Farukhabad, 27th Feb. 1864; Mainpuri, 6th Aug. 1864; Farukhabad, 21st Sep. 1868; Mainpuri, 12th Oct. 1868; Muttra, 18th Apl. 1870; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 25th June 1871; Asst. Magt., 20th July 1871; furl. to Eur. from 1st Apl. to 30th Sep. 1872; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Muttra, 1st Oct. 1872; Offg. Magt., 21st Apl. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. from 21st May 1873; Offg. Magt., 1st June 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 30th June 1874; Offg. Magt., 30th July 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 24th Nov. 1874; Offg., Magt., 17th May 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 17th Nov. 1875; furl. to Eur. from 15th Apl. to 15th Nov. 1877; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bulandshahr, 30th Nov. 1877; Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 16th Apl. 1878.

1861. JOHN SINCLAIR PORTER.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861; attached to the N. W. Prov. 7th June 1862; Asst. Magt., Budaun, 10th July 1862; Azamgarh, 18th Feb. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., Azamgarh, 27th May 1864; Asst. Settl. Officer, 3rd gr. Meerut, 27th May 1865; 2nd gr., 1st Apl. 1867; Etah, 4th Aug. 1868; furl. to Eur. from 13th July 1870 to 9th July 1872; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr. Balir in Ghazipur, 9th Aug. 1872; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 10th July 1874; Dy. Comr., 3rd class, Lalitpur,

13th Oct. 1874; Offg. 2nd class, 16th Apr. 1875; Dy. Comr., 3rd class, Lalitpur, 14th Oct. 1875; Settl. Officer, 2nd gr. Jhansi, 12th Jan. 1876; Offg. Dy. Comr. 2nd gr. and Settl. Officer, Jhansi, 31st Mar. 1876; Comr., Jhansi, from 1st to 11th May 1877; furl. to Eur. from 29th Apr. to 21st Oct. 1878; Offg. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 5th Nov. 1878.

1861. GEORGE EARNEST WARD.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861; attached to N.-W. Prov. 6th Sep. 1862; Asst. Magt., Saharanpur, 7th Nov. 1862; Asst. Supt., Dehra Dun, 25th May 1864; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd grade, 22nd Aug. 1866; Asst. Supt., 12th Oct. 1866; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st May 1867; Meerut, 27th Nov. 1867; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Meerut, 9th Mar. 1868; Offg., 1st gr., 1st Aug. 1868; Offg. Magt., 19th Sep. 1868; Offg., Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 4th Nov. 1868; Muzaffarnagar, 10th Sep. 1869; Meerut, 20th Sep. 1869; Offg. Cant. Magt., Meerut, from 4th Feb. to 25th Mar. 1870; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr. Fatehgarh, 1st Apr. 1871; Offg. Magt., Farukhabad, 2nd Apr. 1871; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 16th May 1871; Offg. Magt., 25th June 1871; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 24th July 1871; furl. to Eur. from 13th Mar. 1874 to 25th July 1875; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr. Ghazipur, 26th July 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Sep. 1875; Offg. Magt., 7th Sep. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 3rd Nov. 1875; Offg. Magt., 5th Oct. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 5th Nov. 1876; Offg. Magt., Jaunpur, 11th Mar. 1877.

1861. ROBERT DEEY SPEDDING.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1861; attached to N.-W. Prov. 5th Aug. 1862; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 2nd Sep. 1862; Cawnpore, 24th Oct. 1862; Offg. Jt. Magt., Cawnpore, July 1865; Asst. Magt., 15th Nov. 1865; Banda, subdiv. Karwi, 5th Dec. 1865; Offg. Jt. Magt., Karwi, 10th Apr. 1866; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 24th Apr. 1867; 1st gr., 1st Aug. 1868; Offg. Magt., Banda, 28th July 1869; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Karwi, 29th Sep. 1869; Banda, May 1870; furl. to Eur. from 29th Apr. 1871 to 1st Jan. 1873; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Gorakhpur, 22nd Jan. 1873; Offg. Magt., 29th Jan. 1873; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 8th Mar. 1873; Offg. Magt., Basti, 23rd Aug. 1873; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Gorakhpur, 24th Sep. 1873; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 28th July 1874; Offg. Magt., 14th July 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 6th Oct. 1875; Offg. Magt., 22nd Apr. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 22nd July 1876; Kassia, 4th Aug. 1876; Offg. Magt., Gorakhpur, 19th Feb. 1877; Basti, 18th Mar. 1877; Gorakhpur, 28th Feb. 1878.

1861. ROBERT JAMES LEEDS.—Arrd. 25th Sep. 1861; attached to N.-W. Prov., 5th Aug. 1862; Asst. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 15th Sep. 1862; leave on M. C. to Eur. from 5th July 1863 to 30th Mar. 1864; Asst. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 10th Apr. 1864; Muzaffarnagar, 26th May 1864; Offg. Magt., 20th Sep. 1865; Asst. Magt., 19th Oct. 1865; Offg. Magt., 20th Sep. 1866; Asst. Magt., 20th Oct. 1866; Offg. Magt., 24th June 1867; Asst. Magt., 15th Sep. 1867; Offg. Jt. Magt., 8th Nov. 1867; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Mirzapur, 3rd June 1868; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Aug. 1868; Offg. Dy. Supt., Family Domains of the Maharajah of Benares (Mirzapur), 12th July 1869; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 18th Nov. 1869; Banda, 17th Mar. 1871; Jaunpur, 12th Oct. 1871; furl. to Eur. from 18th Mar. 1872 to 9th Jan. 1874; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr. Allahabad, 19th Jan. 1874; Agra, 25th Feb. 1874; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Agra, 30th July 1874; Offg. Magt., 22nd Aug. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 22nd Oct. 1875; Offg. Magt., 15th May 1877; Farukhabad, 18th Aug. 1877; Moradabad, 18th Oct. 1877; Muttra, 3rd May 1878.

1861. HENRY CLEMENTS BARSTOW.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861; attached to the N.-W. Prov., 9th July 1862; Asst. Magt., Agra, 6th Aug. 1862; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd Oct. 1864; Asst. Magt., Nov. 1864; Muttra, Jan. 1865; Agra, 9th Feb. 1865; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Farukhabad, 27th Mar. 1865; Etawah, 8th May 1865; Cawnpore, 25th Nov. 1865; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Cawnpore, 1st May 1866; Saharanpur, 22nd Nov. 1866; Offg. Magt., 15th July 1866; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 19th Aug. 1867; Offg. Magt., Muzaffarnagar, 23rd Sep. 1867; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Saharanpur, 31st Oct. 1867; 1st gr., Etah, 17th Jan. 1868; furl. to Eur. from 8th May 1870 to 1st Feb. 1872; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 14th Feb. 1872; Offg. Judge, S. C. Court, 6th Aug. 1872; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 5th Oct. 1872; Bareilly, 29th Mar. 1873; Offg. Pol. Agent, 1st class, Bhopal, Feb. 1874; Offg. Magt., Aligarh, 16th Oct. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. Aligarh, 28th Oct. 1875; Offg. Supt., Dehra Dun, 10th Feb. 1876; Jt. Magt., 1st gr. (Dehra Dun), 23rd Nov. 1876; Etah dist., 5th Jan. 1877; Offg. Magt., Ghazipur, 12th Apr. 1877.

1861. WILLIAM ARTHUR HOWE.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1861; attached to N. W. Prov., 7th Oct. 1862; Asst. Supt., Dehra Dun, 8th Nov. 1862; Asst. Magt., Aligarh, 4th June 1864; leave on M. C. from 1st June to 30th Nov. 1865; Saharanpur, 1st Dec.

1865 ; Gházipur 9th Oct. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., 25th Oct. 1869 ; Asst. Magt., 7th Nov. 1869 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 18th May 1870 ; 1st gr., 8th June 1870 ; in charge of sub-divn. of Kirwi in Bándá dist., 21st Aug. 1871 ; Offg. Magt., Hamirpur, 10th July 1873 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 19th Aug. 1873, Kirwi, 29th idem ; special duty in the Behar famine, Dec. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Mainpuri, 6th Jan. 1875 ; Offg. Magt., Mainpuri, 20th Mar. 1875 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Jaunpur, 10th Apl. 1875 ; Offg. Magt., Sháhjahánpur, 24th July 1875 ; Aligarh, 28th Sep. 1875 ; Jt. Magt., 25th Oct. ; services temply placed at the disposal of Govt. of Madras, for famine, from 4th Feb. 1877 ; left Madras Presy., 15th Nov. 1878 ; Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 7th Dec. 1878 ; Etawah, Dec. 1878.

1861. MATTHEW ALLEN MCCONAGHEY.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 5th Dec. 1862 ; Asst. Magt., Agra, 23rd Dec. 1862 ; Mainpuri, 22nd June 1863 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 22nd Apl. 1865 ; confirmed 1st Sep. 1866 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 24th Apl. 1867 ; Offg. Magt., 21st May 1868 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 21st Aug. 1868 ; Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., Nov. 1868 ; in charge of Settl. of Muttra, Oct. 1871 ; Settl. Officer, 2nd gr., Muttra and Mainpuri, 1st Jan. 1875 ; Offg. Magt., Bándá, 21st Oct. 1876 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 23rd Oct. 1876, (Offg. Magt., Bándá).

1861. WILLIAM ROBERT BURKITT.—Arrd. 10th Oct. 1861 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 7th Oct. 1862 ; Asst. Magt., Gorakhpur, 27th Oct. 1862 ; Basti, Apl. 1865 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., June 1865 ; Asst. Magt., 16th Jan. 1866 ; Bándá, 5th Feb. 1866 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 5th Mar. 1866 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Aug. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., 5th Sep. 1866 ; Jt. Mag., 2nd gr., 5th Dec. 1866 ; Cawnpore, 30th Jan. 1868 ; Asst. Magt., Cawnpore, 28th Apl. 1868 ; Bareilly 21st July 1868 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Bareilly, 1st Sep. 1868 ; 1st gr., 1st Dec. 1868 ; furl. to Eur. from 16th Oct. 1869 to 15th Oct. 1871 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bándá, 27th Oct. 1871 ; Muzaffarnagar, 24th Feb. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. Mag., Muzaffarnagar, 24th Aug. 1874 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 6th Oct. 1874 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 29th Mar. 1875 ; Saháranpur, 12th Oct. 1875 ; Muzaffarnagar, 2nd May 1876 ; Saháranpur, 17th July 1876 ; Offg. Magt., Etawah, 27th Mar. 1877 ; furl. to Eur. from 1st Mar. 1878.

1861. EDWARD CHARLES BUCK.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 7th May 1863 ; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 6th June 1863 ; Hamirpur, 1st Sep. 1863 ; Cawnpore, 27th Apl. 1864 ; leave on M. C. from 21st Oct. to 2nd Dec. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., Cawnpore, 23th July 1867 ; Asst. Magt., 24th Nov. 1867 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 10th Dec. 1867 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 5th Dec. 1868 ; 2nd gr., Mar. 1869 ; leave on M. C. from 16th Aug. to 30th Sep. 1869 ; trans to Farukhabad, 5th Jan. 1870 ; Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., 1st Apl. 1870 ; furl. to Eur. from 6th June to 28th Oct. 1871 ; Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., Farukhabad, 6th Nov. 1871 ; Cawnpore, 1st Dec. 1871 ; Offg. Secy. to Bd. of Rev. N. W. Prov., 21st Apl. 1873 ; Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., Cawnpore, 9th June 1873 ; Offg. Secy. to Bd. of Rev. 26th June 1873 ; Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., Cawnpore, 1st Oct. 1873 ; Offg. Secy. to Bd. of Rev. 13th Dec. 1873 ; Director of Agriculture and Commerce, N.-W. Prov. 10th Feb. 1875 ; furl. to Eur. from 1st May to 5th Nov. 1875 ; Director of Agriculture and Commerce, N.-W. Prov., 16th Nov. 1875.

1861. WILLIAM WOLFRAN GARDNER CORNWALL.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1861 ; attached to N. W. Prov., 5th Dec. 1862 ; Asst. Magt., Benares, 5th Jan. 1863 ; Mirzapur, 9th Nov. 1863 ; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 24th Apl. 1866 to 9th Jan. 1867 ; Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 22nd Jan. 1867 ; Allahabad, 18th Apl. 1867 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Allahabad 11th July 1867 ; (Dehra Dún), 1st June 1868 ; Offg. Supt., Dehra Dún, 9th Dec. 1868 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 28th Apl. 1869 ; 1st gr., 5th July 1869 ; Offg. Supt., 23rd Aug. 1869 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 11th Nov. 1869 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. 1st gr., 14th June 1870 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th Feb. 1871 ; Asst. Settl. Officer, 1st gr., in charge of Jáunsar Bawar pargana zila Dehra Dun, 4th Feb. 1871 ; furl. to Eur. from 10th Mar. 1873 to 14th Nov. 1874 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Jaunpur, 23rd Nov. 1874 ; Budann, 29th Mar. 1875 ; Offg. Magt., 3rd Aug. 1875 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 4th Nov. 1875 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 15th Feb. 1877 ; Offg. Magt., Cawnpore, 10th Apl. 1877.

1861. WILLIAM HEBARD HUDSON.—Arrd. 17th Nov. 1861, attached to N. W. Prov., 8th Jan. 1863 ; Asst. Magt., Gorakhpur, 29th Jan. 1863 ; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 2nd Sep. 1864 to 1st Mar. 1866 ; Asst. Magt., Gorakhpur, 25th Mar. 1866 ; Azamgarh, 25th Mar. 1867, Bándá, 21st June 1869 ; Gorakhpur, 1st Apl. 1871 ; furl. to Eur. from 26th May 1872 to 12th Mar. 1873 ; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 19th

Mar. 1873; Agra, 28th Mar. 1873; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 27th Apr. 1873; services placed at the disposal of Govt. of Bengal on famine duty in Behar, 19th Dec. 1873; returned to N.-W. Prov., Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Basti, 23rd Jan. 1875; Gorakhpur, in charge of the sub-divn. of Kassia, 30th Mar. 1875; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th Feb. 1877; Ghazipur, 10th Aug. 1877; Offg. Magt., 19th Apr. 1878; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 19th July 1878; Offg. Magt., Etawah, 1st Aug. 1878; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., from 1st Nov. 1878; Hamirpur, 12th Nov. 1878.

1861. ALEXANDER MACAULAY MARKHAM.—Arrd. 2nd Feb. 1862; attached to N.-W. Prov., 8th Jan. 1863; Asst. Magt., Bareilly, 8th Feb. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 20th July 1866; Asst. Magt., 17th Nov. 1866; Offg. Jt. Mag., 2nd gr., 3rd May 1867; Asst. Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., Bijnor, 21st Jan. 1868; Settl. Officer, 1st May 1868; Offg. Magt., 21st Aug. 1868; Settl. Officer, 4th Oct. 1868; Offg. Post-master Genl., N. W. Prov., 25th Mar. 1874; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Allahabad, 29th Jan. 1875; Meerut, 8th Feb. 1875; Allahabad, 4th Mar. 1875; Saharanpur, 27th Mar. 1875; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 21st May 1875; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 8th Oct. 1875; 1st gr., Bijnor, 25th Mar. 1876; Settl. Officer, 3rd gr., Allahabad, 22nd Apr. 1876; Offg. Magt., 2nd Aug. 1876; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 9th Oct. 1876; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Offg. 1st gr., 15th Feb. 1877; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 10th Apr. 1877; Offg. Magt., Basti, 10th July 1877; 1st gr., Allahabad, 18th Oct. 1877; special leave on private affairs to Eur. from 1st Nov. 1877 to 23rd Apr. 1878; Offg. Magt., Allahabad, 27th Apr. 1878.

1861. JOHN QUINN.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861; attached to N.-W. Prov., 14th Apr. 1863; Asst. Magt., Benares, 29th Apr. 1863; Offg. Cant. Magt., Benares, from 1st July to 20th Aug. 1865; and from 9th Sep. to 8th Oct. 1866; as also from 11th Dec. 1866 to 19th Jan. 1867; Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 1st Feb. 1868; Benares, 25th Sep. 1868; offd. as Cant. Magt., Benares, from 25th Sep. to 26th Oct. 1868; and from 8th July to 24th Aug. 1869; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 8th May 1870; Offg. Cant. Magt., from 4th to 17th July 1870; Asst. Magt., 20th Jan. 1871; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 27th Mar. 1871; 1st gr., 31st Mar. 1871; Offg. Magt., 7th June 1871; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Oct. 1871; Offg. Dy. Comr. of Jhansi, 7th Oct. 1871; Comr.'s Office, Jhansi, from 13th to 24th Sep. 1872; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 3rd Jan. 1873; furl. to Eur. from 7th Apr. 1873 to 13th Oct. 1874; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bareilly, 20th Oct. 1874; Offg. Magt., 1st Sep. 1875; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 10th Oct. 1875; Offg. Magt., 17th Feb. 1876; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 7th Mar. 1876; Dy. Comr., 2nd gr., Oudh, 1st Apr. 1877; Hardoi, 3rd Apr. 1877; Offg. Dy. Comr., 1st gr., Hardoi, 4th Sep. 1878.

1861. JOSEPH SMITH.—Arrd. 25th Sep. 1861; attached to N.-W. Prov., 6th Sep. 1862; Asst. Magt., Mirzapur, 3rd Oct. 1862; Ghazipur, 17th Mar. 1865; Mirzapur, 7th May 1866; Ghazipur, 16th July 1866; leave to Eur. on M. C. from 10th Sep. 1866 to 3rd Dec. 1867; Asst. Magt., Shahjahanpur, 13th Dec. 1867; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 1st Jan. 1868; 1st gr., 23rd Aug. 1869; 2nd gr., 4th Jan. 1871; 1st gr., 17th Mar. 1871; Ghazipur, 28th Apr. 1871; in charge of Ballia Sub-Divn., 26th June 1872; furl. to Eur. from 31st Mar. 1873 to 21st Oct. 1874; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr. Meerut, Offg. 1st gr., 31st Oct. 1874; Offg. Magt., Meerut, 8th Sep. 1875; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 8th Oct. 1875; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 22nd Jan. 1876; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 10th Feb. 1876; Offg. Magt., 2nd Apr. 1877; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Offg. as Magt., from 10th Apr. 1877; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 28th Nov. 1877; Offg. Magt., Etawah, 22nd Feb. 1878; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Dec. 1878.

1861. CHARLES WARREN MELLOR.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861, attached to N.-W. Prov., 7th Oct. 1862; Asst. Magt., Azamgarh, 28th Oct. 1862; Ghazipur, 1st Oct. 1863; Offg. Jt. Magt., 7th July 1864; Asst. Magt., 14th Nov. 1864; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 16th Mar. 1865; Meerut, 22nd July 1865; Aligarh, 22nd Aug. 1865; Offg. Magt., 22nd Sep. 1865; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 23rd Oct. 1865; confirmed 27th May 1865; Offg. Magt., Aligarh, 16th Aug. 1866; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 13th Nov. 1866; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 10th Aug. 1869 to 5th Feb. 1870; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Jaunpur, 26th Feb. 1870; Offg. 1st gr., 8th Mar. 1870; Offg. Magt., 8th June 1870; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 5th July 1870; furl. to Eur. from 6th Nov. 1870 to 11th Dec. 1871; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Bijnor, 7th Jan. 1872; Meerut, 29th Sep. 1872; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 15th Feb. 1873; Offg. gr. 27th Feb. 1873; Offg. Magt., 16th July 1874; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr. 7th Oct. 1874; furl. to Eur. from 26th Apr. 1875 to 26th Mar. 1876; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Shahjahanpur, 9th Apr. 1876; Offg. Magt., 24th July 1876; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 13th Sep. 1876; Pilibhit, 29th Sep. 1876; Bareilly, 15th Oct. 1876; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., 17th Jan. 1877; Offg. 1st gr., 26th Jan.

1877 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 15th Apl. 1877 ; Offg. Magt., Bulandshahr, 17th July 1877 ; Bareilly, 1st Oct. 1877 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Nov. 1877 ; Offg. Magt., 30th Mar. 1878 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 3rd Dec. 1878.

1861. ROBERT THOMPSON HOBART.—Arrd. in India, 31st Oct. 1861 ; reported qualified for public service and attached to N. W. Prov., 7th Oct. 1862 ; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 11th Nov. 1862 ; Banda, 20th Dec. 1862 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Bānda, 1st Nov. 1865 ; Asst. Magt., Banda, 17th Nov. 1865 ; Basti, 2nd Feb. 1866 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Basti, 25th May 1866 ; Asst. Magt., Basti, 26th Nov. 1866 ; Offg. Magt., Basti, from 4th to 26th Apl. 1867 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Basti, 5th May 1867 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Basti, 1st Sep. 1867 ; Offg. Magt., Basti, 11th March 1868 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Basti, 16th June 1868 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 1st Aug. 1868 ; Offg. Jt. Magt. Basti, 8th Sep. 1868 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Basti, 19th Nov. 1868 ; Offg. Magt., Basti, 16th Jan. 1869 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Basti, 3rd Feb. 1869 ; Offg. Magt., Basti, 30th Apl. 1869 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Basti, 18th May 1869, Mirzapur, 12th July 1869 ; Etah, 26th Apl. 1870 ; Dy. Insp.-Genl. of Police, N. W. Prov., 24th Dec. 1873 ; leave to Eur. on private affairs from 11th May to 10th Nov. 1874 ; Dy. Insp.-Genl. of Police, N.-W. Prov., 14th Nov. 1874 ; furl. to Eur. on M. C. from 12th July 1878.

1861. GEORGE SPENCE DESBOROUGH DALE.—Arrd. in India, 31st Oct. 1861 ; reported qualified for public service and attached to N.-W. Prov., 5th Aug. 1862 ; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 15th Sep. 1862 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Allahabad, 10th June 1865 ; Asst. Magt., Allahabad, 16th Dec. 1865 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Allahabad, 18th Mar. 1866 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Allahabad, 10th Apl. 1867 ; Aligarh, 31st Oct. 1867 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Aligarh, 1st Aug. 1868 ; Offg. Magt., Aligarh, 10th Mar. 1869 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Aligarh, 16th Mar. 1869 ; Offg. Magt., Aligarh, 16th Aug. 1869 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Aligarh, 1st Nov. 1869 ; furl. to Eur. from 25th Mar. 1871 to 20th Mar. 1873 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Etawah, 12th Apl. 1873 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Etawah, 16th Apl. 1873 ; Cawnpore, 9th June 1873 ; Offg. Magt., Cawnpore, 11th May 1874 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 9th July 1874 ; Offg. Magt., Cawnpore, 27th July 1875 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 2nd Nov. 1875 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Cawnpore, 2nd Dec. 1875 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., Colr., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 17th Feb. 1876 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Cawnpore, 1st Mar. 1876 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 12th Apl. 1876 ; Jt. Magt., 2nd gr., Cawnpore, 7th Dec. 1876 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 1st Feb. 1877 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., 24th Apl. 1877 ; Offg. Magt., Fatehpur, 31st Aug. 1877 ; Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 10th Oct., Offg. Magt., Fatehpur, 19th Oct. 1877, Jt. Magt., 1st gr., Cawnpore, 30th, Offg. Magt., Mirzapur, 2nd Apl. 1878 ; 1st gr., Dec. 1878.

1861. JEAN MARI CONRAD STEINBELT.—Arrd. in India, 31st Oct. 1861 ; reported qualified for public service, and attached to N. W. Prov., 8th Jan. 1863 ; Asst. Magt., Ghāzipur, 6th Feb. 1863 ; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Dariabad (Bara Banki), 27th Feb. 1865 ; Asst. Comr., 3rd class, Lucknow, 25th Feb. 1868 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Lucknow, 1st July 1868 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr. Unao, 1st Jan. 1869 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 2nd gr., Unao, 4th Mar. 1869 ; Offg. Dy. Comr., Bara Banki, 27th Oct. 1869 ; Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Unao, 13th Nov. 1869 ; furl. to Eur. from 1st May 1870, to 15th Jan. 1872 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Partabgarh, 16th Jan. 1872 ; Offg. Dy. Com., Partabgarh, from 6th to 17th June 1872 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Sultanpur, 21st Dec. 1872 ; confirmed in 2nd gr., but Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Sultanapur, 8th Dec. 1878 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Partabgarh, 24th Dec. 1873 ; Offg., Asst. Comr., 1st gr., Unao, 25th Aug. 1874 ; Offg. Dy. Com., Unao, 22nd Oct. 1874 ; Offg. Asst. 1st gr., Unao, 11th Nov. 1874 ; 3rd gr., 27th Mar. 1875 ; 2nd gr., 19th Oct. 1875 ; 3rd gr., 15th Nov. 1875 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st gr., 25th Dec. 1875 ; furl. to Eur. from 10th Apl. to 5th Dec. 1876 ; Offg. Asst. Comr., 1st class, Sitapur, 16th Dec. 1876 ; Offg. Jt. Mag. 1st gr., Mirzapur, 18th Apl. 1878 ; Jt. Mag. 1st gr., (Mirzapur), 4th Sept. 1878 ; special leave on private affairs for three months from 20th Sept. 1878 to 18th Dec. 1878.

1861.—PAUL WHALLEY.—Arrd. 31st Oct. 1861 ; leave on M. C. from 30th June to 6th Oct. 1862 ; attached to N.-W. Prov. 6th Nov. 1862 ; Asst. Magt. Fatehpur, 15th Dec. 1862 ; Banda, 27th Sep. 1866 ; Fatehpur, 24th Dec. 1866 ; Farukhabad, 8th Apl. 1867 ; Offg. Jt. Magt., 10th Oct. 1867 ; Asst. Mag. 8th Nov. 1867 ; Offg. Jt. Mag. 2nd gr., 1st Aug. 1868 ; Offg. Under-Secy. to Govt. N.-W. Prov., 10th Sept. 1868 ; Offg. Jr. Secy. 1st May 1869 ; Under-Secy. 19th July 1869 ; Offg. Jr. Secy. 2nd May 1870 ; Offg. Jt. Magt. 1st gr., Bijnor, 17th Oct. 1870 ; Offg. Under-Secy. to Govt. of India, Dept. Rev. Agri and Comrce. 1st Dec. 1871 ; fur. to Eur. from 20th Feb. 1872 to 19th Dec. 1873 ; Offg. Jt. Mag. 1st gr., Moradabad, 30th Dec. 1873 ;

Offg Mag 18th June 1874; Offg Jt Mag, 1st gr 7th Sep 1874; Offg Mag, 30th Oct 1874; Offg Jt Mag, 1st gr 17th Dec 1874; Offg Mag 24th Aug 1875; Offg Jt Mag, 1st gr 17th Oct 1875; Offg Mag 4th Jan 1876; Offg Jt Mag, 1st gr 1st Mar 1876; Offg Mag, 8th May 1877; Jt Mag, 1st gr, 29th June 1877; Offg Mag 20th Aug 1877; Jt Mag 1st gr 18th Oct 1877; Dy Comr 2nd gr Rae Bareli, 15th Dec 1877; Offg Mag Mainpuri, 17th Apr 1878; Jt Mag 1st gr from 4th Nov 1878, Offg Mag Mainpuri.

1861.—CHARLES FREDERICK HALL.—Arrd 31st Oct 1861; attached to N W Prov 12th May 1862; Asst Mag Aligarh, 11th July 1862; Asst Supt Dehra Dun, 28th May 1864; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 29th May 1864; Jt Mag 2nd gr 20th May 1865; Agra, 5th Nov 1866; Offg 1st gr 1st Aug 1868; Offg Mag 5th Oct 1869; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 6th Nov 1869; furl to Eur from 14th Feb 1870 to 12th Nov 1871; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Benares, 25th Nov 1871; Jt Mag 2nd gr 25th Jan 1872; Offg 1st gr 4th Apr 1872; Muttra, 22nd Apr 1872; Jt Mag 2nd gr 3rd Feb 1873; Offg 1st gr 26th Mar 1873; Mainpuri, 11th Aug 1873; Jt Mag 2nd gr 29th Jan 1875; Offg 1st gr 1st Feb 1875; 2nd gr 1st Dec 1875; Offg 1st gr 22nd Apr 1876; Offg Mag 23rd Aug 1876; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 21st Oct 1876; Jt Mag 2nd gr 26th Nov 1876; Offg 1st gr 4th Feb 1877; furl to Eur from 15th Mar to 21st Dec 1877; Jt Mag 1st gr Aligarh, 28th Dec 1877; Offg Mag 6th May 1878; Meerut, 2nd Aug 1878, Jt Mag 1st gr Aligarh, 19th Nov 1878.

1861.—GEORGE ADAMS.—Arrd 30th Dec 1861, attached to N W Prov, 24th Apr 1863; Asst Mag Farukhabad, 25th June 1863; leave M C from 15th Aug to 14th Nov 1863; Asst Mag Hamirpur, 18th Apr 1867; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 14th June 1869; 1st gr 17th Apr 1870; in charge of Karwi, in the Banda dist, 16th May 1870; 2nd gr Karwi, 21st Jan 1871; 1st gr Saharanpur, 24th Mar 1871; 2nd gr 7th Jan 1872; 1st gr 8th Apr 1872; 2nd gr 20th Nov 1872; 1st gr 8th Apr 1873; 2nd gr 30th Jan 1874; 2nd gr Allahabad, 28th Feb 1874; fur to Eur from 1st Apr 1874 to 24th Oct 1875; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Etawah, 25th Oct 1875; 2nd gr 30th Nov 1875; 1st gr 22nd Apr 1876; 2nd gr 16th Nov 1876; 1st gr 15th Feb 1877; Dy Comr 2nd class, Jhansi Commission, Lalitpur, 1st Apr 1877; Jhansi, 18th Apr 1878; Offg Comr Jhansi Div, 7th Sep 1878; Dy Comr Jhansi, 12th Nov 1878.

1861.—JOHN HADDEN FISHER.—Arrd 29th Nov 1861; attached to N W Provs, 9th June 1863; Asst Magt Agra, 29th July 1863; Allahabad, 6th July 1865; Agra, 16th Aug 1866; Muttra, 31st Aug 1866; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, Muttra, 22nd Dec 1868; Allahabad, 16th Apr 1870; 1st gr, 8th May 1870; 2nd gr, 23rd Dec 1870; 1st gr, 1st Apr 1871; Offg Magt 22nd May 1871; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 27th Nov 1871; services placed at the disposal of Govt of India Home Dept, Jan 1872; left N W Provs, 19th Jan 1872.

1862.—JOHN HILKIAH CARTER.—Arrd 28th Oct 1862; attached to N W Prov, 11th Mar 1863; Asst Magt, Muttra, 28th Mar 1863; Offg Asst Comr, Jalaun, 5th Nov 1864; leave to Eur on M C from 24th Sept 1865 to 29th Dec 1866; Asst Magt, Allahabad, 18th Jan 1867; Agra 26th Jan 1867; Allahabad, 18th Feb 1867; Jaunpur, 25th Feb 1867; Basti, 23rd Aug 1869; Magt Basti, from 31st Aug to 17th Sept 1869; Asst Magt Gorakhpur, 6th Jan 1871; Aligarh, 21st Feb 1871; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr 4th May 1871; Asst Magt 2nd Nov 1871; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 15th Apr 1872; 1st gr, 5th Aug 1872; Asst Magt Fatehpur, 20th Nov 1872; Offg Magt 20th Feb 1873; furl to Eur from 10th Mar 1873 to 23rd Apr 1874; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr Jaunpur, 29th Apr 1874; Fatehpur, 24th Nov 1874; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 25th Oct 1875; Asst Mag 24th Nov 1875; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 2nd May 1876; Asst Mag 14th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 19th Feb 1877; Jt Mag 1st gr Fatehpur, 7th Oct 1877; fur to Eur from 8th Dec 1877 to 3rd Sep 1878; Jt Mag 1st gr Azamgarh, 7th Sep 1878.

1862.—MORTIMER SLOPER HOWELL.—Arrd 10th Oct 1862; attached to N W Prov 20th Jan 1863; Asst Mag Bareilly 3rd Mar 1863; Shahjahanpur, 6th May 1863; Offg Insp of Pub Instr, Meerut circle 23rd Apr 1867; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, and Judge S C Court Dehra Dun, 21st Mar 1868; 1st gr, 8th May 1870; 2nd gr, 15th Nov 1870; Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 4th Feb 1871; furl to Eur from 15th Apr 1871 to 9th Jan 1873; Offg Magt, Benares, 26th Jan 1873; Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 9th Apr 1873; Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 19th Nov 1873; 1st gr, 24th Dec 1873; Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 19th Jan 1874; Offg 1st gr, 3rd Apr 1874; Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 2nd Jan 1875; Offg 1st gr, 10th Mar 1875; Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 23rd Nov 1875; Offg 1st gr, 2nd May 1876; furl in India from 15th June to 31st Oct 1876; Offg Jt Magt, 1st gr, Bulandshahr, 1st Nov 1876; Jt Magt 2nd gr, 8th Nov 1876; Offg 1st gr, 11th Mar 1877; leave to Eur on M C from 21st May to 14th Nov 1877; Jt Magt, 1st gr, Fatehpur, 21st Nov 1877; Offg Magt, 9th Apr 1878; Jt Magt, 1st gr, 10th Nov 1878.

1862.—ALAN CADELL.—Arrd 10th Oct 1862; attached to N W Prov, 9th July 1863; Asst Magt Hamirpur, 11th Aug 1863; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 25th May 1866; Asst Magt Hamirpur, 4th Dec 1866; Asst Set Offr, 4th gr Allahabad, 11th Apl 1867; 3rd gr 5th May 1867; on spl duty to Fatehpur, 1st June 1867; Asst Set Offr, 2nd gr Allahabad, 21st Sep 1867; Muzaffarnagar, 15th Jan 1868; Set Offr 3rd gr 5th Nov 1868; 3rd gr Muzaffarnagar and Banda Jan 1874; furl to Eur from 6th Apl to 4th Dec 1874; Set Offr 3rd gr Banda, 10th Dec 1874; Offg Magt Banda 25th July 1877; Set Offr 2nd gr Banda 27th Oct 1879; 1st gr 27th Oct 1879.

1862.—ARTHUR HENRY HARINGTON.—Arrd 10th Oct 1862; attached to Oudh, 19th Aug 1863; Supy Asst Oomr 3rd class Dariabad, (Bara Bank) 1st Nov 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class, Dariabad, 9th Feb 1863; leave to Eur on medl cert from 24th Oct 1864 to 13th Jan 1866; Asst Comr 3rd class, Lucknow, 8th Feb 1866; Offg Jr Secy to Cf Comr Oudh, 20th Mar 1866; Jr Secy to Cf Comr Apl 1866; Asst Secy to Govt of India, Foreign Dept Dec 1866; Offg Under-Secy to Govt of India, Home Dept Apl 1867; Jr Secy to Cf Comr Oudh, 9th Jan 1868; Offg Supt of Excise and Stamps, Oudh, 15th July 1868; Offg Asst Comr 1st class, Lucknow, 6th Nov 1868; Offg Personal Asst to Finl Comr Oudh, 15th March 1869; Offg Asst Set Offr Bara Banki, 8th Oct 1869; Offg Set Offr Hardoi, 27th Mar 1870; 1st gr Lucknow, 31st Oct 1871; Offg Dy Comr Kheri, 10th Apl 1872; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr, 23rd May 1872; Manager Encumbered Estates Fyzabad, 30th May 1872; Gonda Circle 15th Apl 1875; Asst Comr 1st class, 20th Aug 1875; Offg Dy Comr 3rd class, Partabgarh, 3rd Dec 1875; 2nd class, 16th Apl 1876; 3rd class, 7th July 1876; 2nd class, 2nd Aug 1876, 3rd class, 4th Dec 1876; furl to Eur from 21st Mar 1877 to 8th Nov 1878; Offg Dy Comr Bara Banki, 16th Nov 1878.

1862.—ARTHUR FENNING MILLETT.—Arrd 11th Jan 1863; leave to Eur on med cert from 24th Sep 1863 to 13th Nov 1864; attached to N W Prov, 15th Nov 1864; Asst Magt Meerut, 30th Dec 1864; Offg Asst Comr, 3rd class, Oudh, 1st Mar 1865; Unao, 18th Mar 1865; Offg Asst Set Offr, Partabgarh 11th Apl 1866; Partabgarh Set 29th July 1866; Asst Set Offr 2nd gr, 5th Sep 1866; Bahraich, 4th Jan 1867; Offg Set Offr 15h Aug 1867; Asst Set Offr, 2nd gr 15th Nov 1867; Sultanpur, 25th Apl 1868; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on Set duty) 1st July 1868; Offg Set Offr Sultanpur, 16th Apl 1869; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr (on Set duty), 5th Apl 1869; Asst Comr 2nd gr (on Set duty) Mar 1872; furl to Eur from 10th Apl 1872 to 27th Nov 1873; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr Sultanpur 2nd Jan 1874; Offg Asst Set Offr Fyzabad 23rd Mar 1874; Offg Asst Set Offr, Fyzabad, 8th Apl 1875; also in charge of the Set of Sultanpur, Oct 1876; Asst Comr, 1st gr (on Set duty) 16th Mar 1877; furl to Eur from Nov 1878.

1862 WALTER ERSKINE NEALE.—Arrd 10th Oct 1862; attached to N W Provs, 16th June 1863; Asst Magt, Meerut, 7th Aug 1863; Offg Asst Comr, Jhansi, 3rd Dec. 1864; Asst Magt Meerut, 2nd Feb 1865; Asst Set Offr, 4th gr, Farukhabad, 25th Nov 1867; Etawah, 17th Oct 1868; Set Offr, 3rd gr, Mar 1869; Set Offr, 4th gr, 1st Apl 1870; leave to Eur on private affairs from 20th May to 17th Nov 1871; Offg Set Offr, Etawah, 23rd Nov 1871; Set Offr, Etawah, Jan 1874; furl to Eur from 27th Apl 1874; to 23rd Feb 1876; Set Offr, 3rd gr, Hamirpur, 23rd Mar 1876; 2nd gr, 1st Apl 1878.

1862. JOHN CUNNINGHAM LEUPOLT.—Arrd 10th Oct 1862, attached to N W Provs, 19th Aug 1863; Asst Magt, Azamgarh, 23th Sept 1863; Gorakhpur, Apl 1867; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, Gorakhpur, 16th July 1867; in charge of sub-divn of Kassia, Nov 1867; Jt Magt 2nd gr, 1st Aug 1868; Azamgarh, 25th July 1869; Offg Magt, 29th Sept 1870; Jt Magt 2nd gr, 3rd Jan 1871; 3rd Apl 1871; Offg (in full charge) Etah 29th May 1871; furl to Eur from 21st June 1872 to 15th June 1874; Offg Jt Magt, 1st gr, Pilibhit 15th July 1874; Azamgarh, 12th Nov 1874; Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 17th Dec 1874; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr, 20th Mar 1875; Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 17th Nov 1875; Offg 1st gr, 2nd May 1876; Jt Magt 2nd gr, 7th Nov 1876; Offg 1st gr, Banda 15th Mar 1877; 1st gr, Etah, 9th Apl 1877.

1862. WILLIAM BARRY.—Arrd, 14th Feb 1863; attached to N W Provs, 17th Dec 1863; Asst Magt Bulandshahr 12th Jan 1864; Aligarh, 29th Mar 1865; Ghazipur, 13th Aug 1865; Benares, 13th Aug 1866; Banda, 9th Oct 1869; furl to Eur from 8th Apl 1871 to 18th Jan 1873; Asst Magt Jaunpore, 10th Feb 1873; Offg Jt Magt, 1st gr, 21 Apl 1873; Asst Magt, Jaunpur, 19th Nov 1873; services temply placed at the disposal of Govt of Bengal from 22nd Dec 1873; for employment on famine duty, on return to N W Provs, Asst Magt, Jaunpur, 30th Jan 1875; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr, 24th Mar 1875; 2nd gr, 5th Nov 1875; Banda, 22nd Nov 1875; Asst Mag Banda 30th Nov 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 22nd Apl 1876; 1st gr, 4th May 1876; Offg Mag 20th Sept 1876; Asst Mag Banda, 20th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Feb 1877; 1st gr 18th Mar 1877; Jt Mag 2nd gr 13th Aug 1877.

1862. MICHAEL LOYD FERRAR.—Arrd 31st Jan 1863; attached to Bengal, 11th Jan 1864; Asst Mag Rajshahi 30th Jan 1864; services placed under Govt of India for empl in Oudh, 1st Sep 1865; Asst Comr 3rd gr Lucknow 2nd Oct 1865; Bahraich, 13th Mar 1867; Fyzabad, 5th Sep 1867; Bahraich, 14th Oct 1867; Gonda, 15th Dec 1867; Bahraich 14th Jan 1868; Asst Set Offr Partabgarh 14th July 1868; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty) 6th Nov 1868; 1st gr (on set duty) 12th Mar 1869; Offg Set Offr Partabgarh 25th May 1869; Rae Bareli, 2nd July 1869; Offg Perl Asst to Finl Comr Oudh, 6th Oct. 1869; Asst Set Offr Partabgarh, 29th Oct 1869; Offg Set Offr 3rd Dec 1869; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty) from 11th Jan 1870; 1st gr (on set duty), 7th Mar 1870; Offg Set Offr Sitapur 14th July 1870; Asst Set Offr Sitapur 6th Aug 1870; Offg Set Offr Lucknow 15th Aug 1870; Asst Set Offr Sitapur, 21st Oct 1870; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty) 30th Nov 1870; 1st gr (on set duty), 20th Dec 1870; 2nd gr (on set duty), 9th Jan 1871; 1st gr (on set duty) 16th Mar 1871; Offg Set Offr Sitapur 23rd Apr 1871; Fyzabad, 2nd Mar 1872; furl to Eur from 5th May 1875, to 21st Dec 1876, Offg Asst Comr 1st gr Fyzabad, 12th Jan 1877; Offg Dy Comr Hardoi 18th Feb 1877; Asst Comr 2nd gr Fyzabad 9th Apr 1877; Offg Dy Comr Lucknow, 1st May 1877; Asst Comr 2nd gr Fyzabad, 9th July 1877; Offg Dy Comr Rae Bareli 6th Sept 1877; Asst Comr 1st gr from 16th Sep 1877, Hardoi, 2nd Jan 1878; Offg Dy Comr Hardoi, 2nd May 1878; Asst Comr 1st gr Hardoi 2nd July 1878.

1863. WILLIAM IRVINE.—Arrd 12th Dec 1863; attached to N-W P 28th May 1864; Asst Mag Saharanpur, 3rd June 1864; Muzaffarnagar, 1st Apr 1865; Benares 6th July 1869; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 28th July 1869; Asst Mag 11th Nov 1869; Gorakhpur 29th Jan 1870; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 8th May 1870; Asst Mag 1st Feb 1871; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th Mar 1871; furl to Eur from 18th Mar 1872 to 6th Mar 1874; Offg Jt Mag Saharanpur 26th Mar 1874; 1st gr 16th Apr 1874; Cant Mag Roorkee from 2nd May to 2nd Aug 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Saharanpur 25th Nov 1874; 1st gr 9th Apr 1875; Farukhabad, 4th June 1875; Offg Mag 11th June 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr, 8th Nov 1875; 1st gr 9th May 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Nov 1876; 1st gr 20th Mar 1877; Offg Mag 1st June 1878; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 22nd July 1878; Offg Mag 17th Sep 1878; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Farukhabad, 17th Oct 1878.

1863. JOHN HILL TWIGG.—Arrd 12th Dec 1863; att'd to N W Prov, 26th May 1864; Asst Mag Mutra, 6th June 1864; leave to attend the exam from 19th Mar to 17th Apr 65; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Agra, 23rd Aug 1869; leave to attend exam 28th March to 10th Apr 1870; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Hamirpur 7th June 1870; Asst Mag 30th Jan 1871; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 14th Mar 1871; Allahabad, 28th Apr 1872; 1st gr 25th Aug 1872; 2nd gr 19th Oct 1872; 1st gr 2nd May 1873; 2nd gr 29th Oct 1873; 2nd gr Fatehpur, 7th Jan 1874; special duty under the Comr of Cotton and Commerce from 18th Feb 1874; from 9th Sep 1874, to officiate as Jt Mag 1st gr Bareilly, 13th Oct 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Bareilly, 24th Nov 1874; 2nd gr Shahjahanpur 17th Dec 1874; Jt Mag 2nd gr 27th Mar 1875; Offg 1st gr 1st May 1875, Meerut, 15th June 1875; Jt Mag 2nd gr 3rd Nov 1875; Offg 1st gr 10th May 1876; Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Nov 1876; Offg 1st gr 21st March 1877; furl to Eur from 20th May 1877.

1863. ALEXANDAR BLEAKLEY PATTERSON.—Arrd 20th Dec 1863; attached to N W Prov, 22nd July 1864; Asst Mag Meernut, 17th Aug 1864; Alligarh, 29th Aug 1865; Bulandshahr, 17th Aug 1867; Offg Jt Mag 10th Oct 1867; Asst Mag 8th Nov 1867; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Aug 1868; Jt Mag 2nd gr Aligarh, 6th Jan 1869; Asst Sett Offr 2nd gr 1st June 1869; 1st gr 3rd Oct 1870; Offg Sett Offr Fatehpur, 4th Nov 1870; Sett Offr 3rd gr 1st Apr 1872; Sett of the Sub-Divn of Karwi, Banda dist Dec 1876, 2nd gr from 1st July 1878.

1863. JAMES KENNEDY.—Arrd 14th Nov 1863; attached to N W Prov 22nd July 1864; Asst Mag Agra, 8th Aug 1864; Etawah, 28th Nov 1864; Agra, 30th June 1865; Etawah 28th May 1866; Agra 22nd Jan 1867; Etawah 23rd Feb 1867; Farukhabad, 19th Oct 1868; Sett Offr 4th gr 6th Mar 1869, furl to Eur on mc from 24th May 1869, to 25th Nov 1871; Asst Mag Saharanpur, 5th Dec 1871; Offg. Jt Mag 1st gr 6th Sep 1872; 2nd gr 15th Oct 1872; 1st gr 26th May 1873; 2nd gr 25th Oct 1873; 2nd gr Shahjahanpur, 7th Apr 1874; 1st gr Shahjahanpur, 1st May 1874; 2nd gr 23rd Nov 1874; 1st gr 17th May 1875; 2nd gr 2nd Nov 1875; 2nd gr 12th Apr 1876; 1st gr 15th May 1876; 2nd gr 1st Nov 1876; Asst Mag 7th Dec 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr; 5th Jan 1877; 1st gr 26th Mar 1877; Jt Mag 2nd gr 10th Apr 1877; Offg Mag 23rd Mar 1878; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Shahjahanpur, 5th Nov 1878.

1863. JOHN WOODBURN.—Arrd 12th Dec 1863; attached to N W P, 22nd July 1874; Asst Mag Cawnpore, 4th Aug 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class, Sitapur, 16th Feb 1865; Fyzabad, 2nd Dec 1865; Offg Set Offr Dariabad, Bara Banki, 12th Apr 1866; Asst

Set Offr Dariabad, 27th Nov 1866 ; Bahraich, 30th Nov 1866 ; Fyzabad, 28th Feb 1867 ; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty) Fyzabad, 23rd Decr 1868 ; Asst Set Offr 21st Feb 1869 ; special leave to Eur on private affairs from 17th Apl to 16th Oct 1869 ; Offg Asst Set Offr Fyzabad, 24th Dec 1869 ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr (on set duty) 16th Mar 1870 ; Offg Set Offr, Sitapur, 16th May 1870 ; Fyzabad, 19th July 1870 ; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty), 8th Nov 1870 ; Offg Set Offr Fyzabad, 29th Mar 1871 ; Offg Perl Asst to Chief Comr Oudh, 4th Mar 1872 ; Offg Secy to Chief Comr Oudh, 14th Aug 1872 ; Offg Perl Asst to Chief Comr Oudh, 14th Nov 1872 ; furl to Eur from 3rd Nov 1873 to 29th Oct 1875 ; Offg Dy Comr 3rd gr Rae Bareli, 19th Nov 1875 ; 2nd gr 19th Apl 1876 ; 3rd gr 10th May 1876 ; 2nd gr 17th Aug 1876 ; 3rd gr 16th Nov 1876 ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr 9th Jan 1877 ; special duty to Naini Tal, 23rd June 1877 ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr Rae Bareli, 18th Oct 1877, confirmed 15th Dec 1877 ; Asst Comr 1st gr (on settl duty), 1st Mar 1878 ; Offg Dy Com Fyzabad, 11th Apl 1878.

1863. HORACE FREDERICK D'OYLY MOULE.—Arrd 14th Nov 1863 ; attached to N W Prov, 8th July 1864 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 13th July 1864 ; Bareilly, 15th Aug 1864 ; Budaun, 6th Aug 1865 ; Bareilly, 8th Jan 1867 ; leave on m c from 17th May to 16th Aug 1869 ; Asst Mag Bijnor, 17th Aug 1869 ; Allahabad, 22nd Jany 1870 ; furl to Eur on m c from 17th Apl 1870 to 11th Nov 1871 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 17th Nov 1870 ; Mirzapur, 28th Nov 1871 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 8th Apl 1872 ; Offg Dy Supt family domains, Maharaja of Benares, (Mirzapur), 8th May 1872 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 16th Aug 1872 ; Offg Dy Supt family domains, Maharaja of Benares 10th Sep 1872 ; 2nd gr 24th June 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr also Dy Supt &c., 27th Aug 1873 ; 2nd gr 15th Oct 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Mirzapur, 15th Dec 1873 ; Asst Mag 19th Jan 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 3rd Mar 1874 ; 2nd gr and Dy Sup family domains 15th Apl 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 1st May 1874 ; 1st gr Mirzapur, 21st June 1874 ; also Offg Dy Supt family domains, Maharaja of Benares, Mirzapur, 28th July 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Mirzapur, 6th Nov 1874 ; Offg Dy Supt family domains, Maharaja of Benares, 24th Nov 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 23rd Dec 1874 ; Asst Mag 2nd Jan 1875 ; Offg Dy Supt family domains, Maharaja of Benares, 15th Mar 1875 ; Offg Mag Mirzapur, 28th July 1875 ; Offg Dy Supt 16th Oct 1875 ; Asst Mag 6th Dec 1875 ; Offg Dy Supt 10th Apl 1876 ; furl to Eur on m c from 27th Feb 1877 to Nov 1878 ; Jt Mag 2nd gr Saharanpur, 2nd Dec 1878.

1863. HENRY SCOTT BOYS.—Arrd 30th Oct 1863 ; attached to N W Pro, 7th Dec 1874 ; transferred to Oudh, Dec 1864 ; Offg Asst Comr Dariabad, (Bara Banki), 18th Dec 1864 ; Fyzabad, 14th Mar 1865 ; Asst Comr 3rd class, Bahraich, 15th Nov 1865 ; Asst Sett Offr Sitapur, 19th Apl 1866 ; Bahraich, 21st Apl 1868 ; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on Sett duty) 1st July 1868 ; special leave to Eur from 10th Mar to 22nd Oct 1869 ; Offg Asst Sett Offr Bahraich ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr 13th Nov 1869 ; 2nd gr 18th Dec 1869 ; 1st gr 21st Mar 1870 ; Offg Sett Offr Bahraich, 21st May 1870 ; Manager of the Encumbered Estates in Districts of Sitapur and Kheri, 10th June 1872 ; Asst Comr 2nd gr from 20th June 1874, (continuing as Manager of Encumbered Estates ; furl to Eur from 24th Apl 1875 to 11th Apl 1876 ; Offg Dy Comr Kheri, 19th Apl 1876 ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr, Kheri, 7th July 1876 ; Offg Dy Comr, Bahraich, 17th Aug 1876 ; 2nd gr, 29th Sep 1876 ; Offg Asst Comr, 1st gr, 16th Oct 1876 ; Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 12th Jan 1877 ; Offg 1st gr, 18th Feb 1877 ; Asst Comr, 2nd gr, Bahriach, 3rd July 1877 ; Offg 1st gr, 6th Sep 1877 ; Fyzabad, 26th Sep 1877 ; Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 15th Dec 1877 ; Offg Dy Comr, 7th Mar 1878 ; Offg Asst Comr, 1st gr, 11th Apl 1878 ; Asst Comr, 1st gr, 8th Aug 1878.

1863. JOHN THOMSON CRAWFORD.—Arrd 8th Jan 1864 ; attached to Oudh, 15th Feb 1865 ; Offg Asst Comr, 3rd class Fyzabad, 1st Mar 1865 ; Sultanpur, 11th Feb 1867 ; Asst Comr, 3rd class, Oudh, 27th Mar 1867 ; Offg 2nd gr, Sultanpur, 21st July 1868 ; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, Gonda, 18th Aug 1868 ; Offg 2nd gr, 15th Feb 1869 ; Offg as Dy Comr, Gonda, from 4th to 19th Mar 1869 ; Offg Asst Comr, 1st gr, 16th Apl 1869 ; 2nd gr, 15th Nov 1869 ; Bara Banki, 14th Mar 1870 ; 1st gr, 21st May 1870 ; 2nd gr, 7th Nov 1870 ; 1st gr, 1st Apl 1871 ; Offg Dy Comr, Fyzabad, 31st May 1871 ; Sultanpur, 12th Sep 1871 ; Offg Asst Comr, 1st gr, 14th Oct 1871 ; Offg Dy Comr, Fyzabad, 23rd Apl 1872 ; Furl to Eur from 1st Nov 1872 to 29th Oct 1874 ; confirmed (while on leave) Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 20th June 1874 ; Offg 1st gr, Hardoi, 3rd Nov 1874 ; Offg Dy Comr, Sultanpur, 6th Feb 1875 ; Offg Judge, Civil Court, Lucknow, 20th Oct 1875 ; Offg Asst Comr, 1st gr, Sitapur, 23rd June 1876 ; Offg Dy Comr, 3rd gr, Unao, 9th Aug 1876 ; Offg Asst Comr, 1st gr, 2nd Dec 1876 ; Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 9th Jan 1877 ; Offg 1st gr, 1st May 1877 ; Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 2nd July 1877 ; Offg 1st gr, 25th Mar 1878.

1863. FRANCIS NELSON WRIGHT.—Arrd 15th Jan 1864 ; attached to N W P, 7th

Dec 1864 ; Asst Mag Mainpuri, 27th Jan 1865 ; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr 18th May 1870 ; 2nd gr Cawnpore, 21st Oct 1870 ; Offg Set Offr 1st gr 1st Aug 1871 ; Asst Set Offr 1st gr 1st May 1873 ; Set Offr Cawnpore from 21st Apl to 8th June 1873, and from 25th June to 30th Sep 1873 ; Offg Set Offr 3rd gr Cawnpore 12th Dec 1873 ; Set Offr 3rd gr 1st Apl 1876 ; Jt-Magt 2nd gr, Offg 1st gr, from 1st Apl 1878 ; Offg Dir of Agrl and Com, N W Pros, 22nd Apl 1878 ; Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, July 12th 1878 ; Cawnpore, Offg Magt, 21st Aug 1878 ; Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, 21st Oct 1878.

1863. JOHN CHARLES WILLIAMS.—Arrd 12th Dec 1863 ; posted to Oudh, 12th Jan 1865 ; supy Asst Comr, Rae Bareli, 13th Feb 1865 ; Sultanpur, 20th Nov 1865 ; Asst Comr, 3rd class, Sultanpur, Apl 1866 ; Lucknow, 8th Apl 1867 ; Offg Asst Set Offr, 2nd gr, Sitapur, 6th July 1868 ; Offg Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 8th July 1868 ; Offg Asst Set Offr, 2nd gr, Sitapur, 18th Aug 1868 ; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, 6th Nov 1868 ; Offg 2nd gr, (on Set duty) 5th Feb 1869 ; on spl duty at Lucknow 1st Mar 1869 ; Asst Comr 3rd gr (on Set duty) Sitapur, 22nd Nov 1869 ; Offg 2nd gr (on Set duty) 15th Jan 1870 ; Kheri, 4th Oct 1870 ; Offg Dy Comr Kheri, 27th July 1871 ; Sitapur, 2nd Aug 1871 ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr Sitapur 12th Oct 1871 ; Rae Bareli, 1st Nov 1871 ; 2nd gr Partabgarh, 22nd Feb 1873 ; Offg Dy Comr, 24th May 1873 ; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr 24th June 1873 ; Offg Dy Comr Bara Banki, 6th Aug 1873 ; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr (on spl duty) 3rd Nov 1873 ; Offg 1st gr Lucknow, 4th Mar 1874 ; Sultanpur, 12th Oct 1874 ; Asst Mag Saharanpur, 14th May 1874 ; Jt Mag 2nd gr Offg 1st gr from 1st Jan 1878 ; Offg Mag Saharanpur, 14th Aug 1878 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 9th Nov 1878.

1863.
