WILLIAM THOMAS CHURCH.—Arrd 30th Oct 1863 ; attached to N W Pro, 7th July 1864 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 1st Aug 1864 ; Banda, 23rd Dec 1864 ; Cawnpore, 16th Aug 1867 ; leave to Eur on private affairs from 14th Mar 1868 to 13th Mar 1869 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 22nd Mar 1869 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Allahabad, 17th June 1869 ; Shahjahanpur, Dec 1869 ; Offg Mag 22nd July 1872 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 8th Aug 1872 ; 1st gr 11th September 1873 ; Offg Mag from 22nd Sep 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr, 22nd Oct 1873 ; furl to Eur from 13th Apl to 27th Oct 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Benares, 13th Nov 1874 ; Jt Mag 2nd gr 20th Mar 1875 ; 1st gr 25th May 1875 ; 2nd gr 2nd Nov 1875 ; Offg Mag 1st Aug 1876 ; Jt Mag 2nd gr 20th Nov 1876 ; Offg Mag Mirza pur, 28th Jan 1877 ; Jt Mag 2nd gr 23rd Feb 1877 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 1st Apl 1877 ; Offg Mag 26th Apl 1877 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 12th Jan 1878 ; Offg Mag 12th Apl 1878 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 6th Nov 1878.

1864. JAMES MAURICE PEARSON.—Arrd 28th Nov 1864 ; att'd to N W Prov, 12th July 1865 ; Asst Mag Benares, 15th Aug 1865 ; Shahjahanpur 21st Mar 1866 ; Cawnpore, 10th Aug 1868 ; Offg Mag 14th Aug 1871 ; Asst Mag 14th Nov 1871 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 14th Sept 1872 ; Asst Mag 5th Oct 1872 ; furl to Eur from 2nd Dec 1872 to 26th Feb 1874 ; Asst Mag Etawah, 9th Mar 1874 ; Offg Mag 11th Apl 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 11th May 1874 ; Offg Mag 7th June 1874 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 7th July 1874 ; 2nd gr 1st Nov 1874 ; Asst Mag 23rd Nov 1874 ; Offg Mag 10th Apl 1875 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 10th July 1875 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 8th Nov 1875 ; Offg Mag 22nd May 1876 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 2nd Aug 1876 ; 1st gr 23rd Aug 1876 ; 2nd gr 30th Oct 1876 ; Asst Mag 7th Nov 1876 ; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr 1st Apl 1877 ; Bareilly, 12th July 1877 ; leave on m c in India from 13th July to 12th Oct 1877 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Meerut, 13th Oct 1877 ; Offg Mag 27th Mar 1878 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 2nd Aug 1878.

1865. HERBERT BLAKEY FINLAY.—Arrd 3rd Dec 1865 ; attached to N W Prov, 19th May 1866 ; Asst Mag Agra, 12th June 1866 ; Etah, 30th Oct 1866 ; Agra, 7th Nov 1866 ; Etah, 7th Jan 1868 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr, Etah, 3rd Aug 1869 ; Asst Mag 25th Oct 1869 ; Azamgarh, 5th Sept 1870 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 10th May 1872 ; Asst Mag 8th June 1872 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 25th Aug 1872 ; Asst Mag 20th Oct 1878 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 2nd May 1873 ; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr 2nd Oct 1873 ; Banda, 31st Jan 1874 ; 1st gr Banda, 1st Aug 1874 ; Kirwi Sub Div (Banda) from 31st Aug to 15th Nov 1874 ; furl to Eur from 1st Apl to 29th Sept 1875 ; Asst Set Offr 1st gr Banda, 5th Oct 1875 ; Set Offr 3rd gr Banda, 1st July 1878.

1856. FORTESCUE WILLOUGHBY PORTER.—Arrd 21st Nov 1865 ; attached to N W Prov, 17th Mar 1866 ; Asst Mag Bareilly 18th Apl 1866 ; Budaun, 25th July 1867 ; Bareilly, 2nd Sept 1867 ; Set Offr 4th gr Bareilly, 6th March 1869 ; Asst Set Offr 2nd gr 16th Aug 1871 ; 2nd gr Allahabad, 2nd Nov 1872 ; 1st gr 21st Apl 1873 ; Offg Set Offr 3rd gr 8th Mar 1874 ; Set Offr 3rd gr, 1st Apl 1877 ; furl to Eur for 18 months from 22nd Apl 1878.

1865. GEORGE EDWARD KNOX.—Arrd 21st Nov 1865 ; attached to N W P, 21st June 1867 ; Asst Magt Meerut, 12th July 1867 ; Bulandshahr, 31st Dec 1869 ; Allahabad, 26th Nov 1870 ; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 17th Sep 1872 ; Asst Magt, 1st Oct 1872 ;

Offg. Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 25th June 1873; Asst Magt 19th July 1873; Offg. Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 10th Aug 1873; Asst Magt, 25th Oct 1873; Kirwi Sub-divn, (Banda) 4th Mar 1874; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 1st May 1874; 1st gr, 1st June 1874; Offg Magt, Banda, 12th Aug 1874; Asst Magt, Kirwi, 14th Nov 1874; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 28th Apr 1875; Asst Magt, Kirwi, 3rd Nov 1875; Offd as Judge, S C Court, Allahabad, 7th June to 8th Nov 1876; Asst Magt, Kirwi, 27th Nov 1876; Offg Judge, S C Courts, Allahabad, 6th Mar 1877; Judge, S C Court, 14th Aug 1877.

1865. GEORGE ROBERT CARLISLE WILLIAMS.—Arrd 21st Nov 1865; attached to N W Provs, 17th Mar 1866; Asst Magt, Meerut, 28th Apr 1866; Saharanpur, 20th Sept 1866; Aligarh, 21st Sept 1867; Saharanpur, 15th Feb 1868; Offg Cant Magt, Roorkee, 4th Aug 1868; Asst Magt, Saharanpur, 3rd Oct 1868; Asst Supdt, Dehra Dun, 7th May 1871; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 8th May 1872; Muzaffarnagar, 5th June 1872; Asst Magt, 14th Nov 1872; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 21st Apr 1873; Asst Magt, 7th Nov 1873; Meerut, 28th Mar 1874; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 3rd Apr 1874; 1st gr, 1st June 1874; 2nd gr, 31st Oct, 1874; Asst Magt, Meerut, 8th Dec 1874; Banda, 8th Jan 1875; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr Banda, 24th Mar 1875; Dy Supdt, family domains, Benares, 28th Apr 1875; Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, Ag Dy Supt, 23rd July 1875; Asst Magt Ballai 17th Nov 1875; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 2nd May 1876; 1st gr, 25th May 1876; 2nd gr, 8th July 1876; 1st gr, 28th Aug 1876; Asst Magt 8th Nov 1876; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 11th Mar 1877; 1st gr, 12th Apr 1877; Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, from 1st Apr 1878, Offg 1st gr.

1865. WILLIAM THOMAS MARTIN, (Bar-at-Law.)—Arrd 3rd Dec 1865; attached to N W P, 25th July 1867; Asst Magt, Fatehpur, 2nd Aug 1867; Allahabad, 17th Oct 1867; Hamirpur, Dec 1867; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 15th Apr 1872; Asst Magt, 15th July 1872; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 19th Aug 1872; Asst Magt, 7th Nov 1872; Asst Set Offr, 2nd gr, 2nd Dec 1872; furl to Eur from 5th Oct 1874 to 25th Sept 1876; Offg Jt-Magt, 1st gr, Jaunpur, 4th Oct 1876; Asst Magt, 8th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 15th Mar 1877; 1st gr, 2nd Apr 1877; Offg Magt, 15th Dec 1877; Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 1st Apr, Offg 1st gr; Offg Magt, 15th Aug 1878; Jt Magt, 1st gr, 6th Nov 1878.

1865. WILLIAM BLENNERHASSETT.—Arrd 1st Nov 1865; placed at disposal of For Dept 18th Apr 1866; Offg Asst Comr 3rd class, Fyzabad, 26th May 1866; Asst Comr 3rd class, 12th Mar 1867; leave on M C from 4th Apr 1867; Asst Comr 3rd gr Fyzabad, 4th Oct 1867; Offg 2nd gr. Sitapur, 8th Apr 1869; 1st gr 1st June 1869; 2nd gr 13th Nov 1869; Hardoi, 10th Dec 1869; Asst Comr 3rd gr 30th Jan 1870; Offg 2nd gr 14th Mar 1870; Offg Civil Judge, Lucknow 4th May 1870; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr Lucknow, 18th July 1870; Unao 22nd Aug 1870; Offg Dy Comr Hardoi 11th Sep 1870; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr 15th Oct 1870; Asst Comr 3rd gr 24th Feb 1871; Offg 2nd gr 8th Mar 1871; 1st gr 23rd Apr 1871; Bara Banki, 6th June 1871; Lucknow, 26th July 1871; Offg Dy Comr Fyzabad, 24th Sep 1871; Asst Comr 3rd gr Lucknow 16th Oct 1871; Offg 2nd gr Kheri, 15th Nov 1871; leave to Eur on med cer from 1st Apr 1872 to 26th Mar 1873; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr Rae Bareli 8th Apr 1873; 1st gr 10th Aug 1873; Offg Dy Comr Hardoi 18th Aug 1873; Offg Asst Comr 1st gr 18th Nov. 1873; 2nd gr 2nd Jan 1874; 1st gr 3rd Apr 1874; Offg Civil Judge Lucknow, 4th June 1874; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr Lucknow, 18th Aug 1874; 1st gr Hardoi 21st Aug 1874; 2nd gr 1st Feb 1875; 1st gr 27th Mar 1875; Offg Dy Comr, 16th Apr 1875; Asst Comr 2nd gr 10th Aug 1875, contg to act as Dy Comr Hardoi; 2nd gr Rae Bareli, 9th May 1878; Offg 1st gr 4th Sep 1878; Offg 2nd gr 4th Nov 1878.

1865. HENRY PILKINGTON MULOCK.—Arrd 1st Nov 1865; attached to N W P, 10th Feb 1866; Asst Mag Benares 5th Mar 1866; Azamgarh, 23rd Mar 1866; Ghazipur 17th Dec 1866; Mirzapur, 17th Mar 1870; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th Apr 1871; Asst Mag 25th Nov 1871; Hamirpur, 15th Nov 1873; placed at the disposal of the Govt of Bengal on Bahar F R W Dec 1873; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr from 12th Aug 1874; services replaced under this Govt from 5th Oct 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 28th Oct 1874; Mainpuri, 5th Nov 1874; Asst Mag 17th Dec 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 20th Mar 1875; Aligarh 25th May 1875; 1st gr 27th July 1875; 2nd gr 25th Oct 1875; Asst Mag Aligarh, 23rd Nov 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 27th Apr 1876; 1st gr 2nd June 1876; 2nd gr 2nd July 1876; 1st gr 1st Sep 1876; 2nd gr 20th Oct 1876; Bijnor, 5th Nov 1876; Asst Mag 16th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 4th Feb 1877; 1st gr 4th Apr 1877; 1st gr Hamirpur, 28th Apr 1877; Jt Mag 2nd gr to offe in the 1st gr from 1st Apr 1878.

1865. ALEXANDER ROBINSON.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; attached to N W Prov 26th Jan 1867; employed temp in the Agra Exhibition from 25th Jan to 15th Feb 1867; Asst Magt Benares, 19th Feb 1867; Meerut, 30th Jan 1868; Aligarh, 28th Feb 1868;

Asst Supt Dehra Dun 17th June 1868; transferred to Muzaffarnagar, 6th July 1869; exmtn leave from 23rd Sep to 31st Oct 1869; Asst Magt Mirzapur, 2nd May 1870; Gorakhpur, in charge of Kassia, 23rd Nov 1870; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 26th May 1873; Asst Magt 1st Nov 1873; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr Gorakhpur, in charge of Kassia 18th Apl 1874; 1st gr 4th June 1874; 2nd gr 9th July 1874; 1st gr 12th Aug 1874; 2nd gr 21st Oct 1874; Asst Magt (Kassia) 24th Nov 1874; furl to Eur from 24th Mar 1875 to 4th Dec 1876; Asst Magt Budaun, 5th Dec 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr, 19th Mar 1877; 1st gr, 16th Feb 1878; Offg Magt 26th Sept 1878; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr 11th Oct 1878.

CLASS V.—BELOW 12 YEARS' STANDING.

1867. JAMES JOHN DIGGES LATOUCHE.—Arrd 4th Dec 1867; attached to N W Prov, 25th Oct 1867; Asst Mag Meerut, 13th Dec 1867; Aligarh, 20th May 1868; Asst Sett Offr, 3rd gr Aligarh, 8th Feb 1871; Sett Offr Ajmere and Mhairwar, 5th Dec 1871; Offg Asst Comr Beawar, 16th Apl 1872; Offg Dy Comr Ajmere, Apl 1875; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Moradabad, 14th Aug 1875; Dist Supt of Police 1st gr Bulandshahr, 6th Sep 1875; Offg Mag Bulandshahr, 2nd Sep 1876; Dist Sup Police 7th Oct 1876; Offg Sett Offr 3rd gr Jhansi 2nd Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Muttra 8th Oct 1877, furl to Eur for twenty-one months from 20th Feb 1878.

1876. ROBERT SMITH AIKMAN.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1867; attached to N W Prov 25th Oct 1867; Asst Magt Farukhabad, 27th Dec 1867; Agra, 29th Jan 1868; Etawah, 2nd Feb 1869; Etah 8th Aug 1871; Etawah 18th Oct 1871; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 19th May 1873; Asst Magt 5th Nov 1873; placed at the disposal of Govt of Bengal on famine relief duties from 23rd Feb 1874; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr (on spl duty in Bengal) 17th Aug 1874; 2nd gr (on spl duty in Bengal) 21st Oct 1874; services replaced at the disposal of this Govt from 27th Oct 1874; Asst Magt Etah, 27th Nov 1874; Offg Jt-Magt 2nd gr, 7th Apl 1875; 1st gr in charge of Etah Dist 15th Aug 1875; Asst Mag 5th Nov 1875; furl to Eur from 6th March 1876 to 12th Dec 1877; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Agra, 22nd Dec 1877; 2nd gr 1st Jan 1878; 1st gr 22nd Feb 1878; Offg Mag 18th Aug 1878; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 5th Nov 1878.

1876. HENRY FARRINGTON EVANS.—Arrd 4th Dec 1867; attached to N W Prov, 25th Oct 1867; Asst Mag Mainpuri, 18th Dec 1867; Agra, 30th Jan 1868; Mainpuri, 2nd June 1868; Etawah, 4th Sep 1868; Mainpuri, 28th Sep 1868; Farukhabad 11th Oct 1868; Asst Sett Offr 3rd gr 19th May 1870; Offg Sett Offr 1st June 1871; Asst Sett Offr 2nd gr but Offg Sett Offr 1st May 1872; Offg Sett Offr and in charge of Sett of Etah, 23rd Feb 1873; Asst Sett Offr Cawnpore, 19th Jan 1874; Offg Sett Offr 1st gr in charge of Cawnpore, Sett 14th Mar 1874; 1st gr July 1874; furl to Eur from 8th Apl 1876 to 15th Nov 1877; Asst Sett Offr 1st gr Agra 27th Nov 1877; Offg Sett Offr 3rd gr 23rd Feb 1878; Sett Offr 3rd gr 20th Sep 1878.

1867. WILLIAM CHARLES BENNETT.—Arrd 4th Dec 1867, attached to Oudh 25th Oct 1867; Asst Comr 3rd class, Rae Bareli, 24th Dec 1867; Offg Asst Sett Offr 8th Apl 1869; Partabgarh, 3rd July 1869; 3rd Sep 1869; Offg Asst Set Offr Gonda, 6th Dec 1869; on spl duty at Fyzabad from 28th Feb to 29th Aug 1870; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on spl duty), 19th May 1870; Offg Asst Set Offr Gonda, 30th Aug 1870; Asst Comr 3rd gr 11th Oct 1870; Gonda, 22nd Mar 1871; Offg 2nd gr 4th Apl 1871; 1st gr 4th June 1871; Asst Set Offr 24th July 1871; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty), 13th Oct 1871; Manager of Encumbered Estates Gonda 5th Mar 1872; Offg Set Offr, also Manager of Encumbered Estates 5th Dec 1874; Asst Comr 3rd gr but Offg Set Offr Gonda, 10th Feb 1875; furl to Eur from 15th Apl 1876 to 15th Nov 1877; Asst Comr 3rd gr Rae Bareli, 29th Nov 1877; 2nd gr 25th Mar 1878; spl leave on private affairs to Eur from 13th May to 29th July 1878; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr Lucknow, 10th Aug 1878; Offg as City Mag Lucknow, from 3rd to 18th Sep 1878.

1867. EDMUND WHITE.—Arrd 4th Dec 1867; attached to N W P, 25th Oct 1867; Asst Magt, Bareilly, 9th Dec 1867; in charge of Pilibhit, Sub-divn, 26th May 1867; Asst Magt, Budaun, 26th Aug 1872; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 16th Sep 1872; Asst Magt, Bijnor, 21st Oct 1872; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 2nd June 1873; Asst Magt, 19th July 1873; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 1st Aug 1873; Asst Magt, 29th Oct 1873; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 12th Apl 1874; 1st gr, 18th June 1874; 2nd gr, 1st July 1874; 1st gr 17th Aug 1874; 2nd gr 7th Oct 1874; Offg Mag 18th Nov 1874; Asst Magt 4th Dec 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 9th Apl 1875; 1st gr 22nd Aug 1875 Offg Mag 13th Oct 1875; Asst Mag 3rd Nov 1875; Offg Mag 16th May 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th July 1876; 1st gr 11th Sep 1876; 2nd gr 10th Oct 1876; furl to Eur from 6th Nov 1876 to 11th

Oct 1877; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr Allahabad, 30th Oct 1877; 2nd gr 28th Dec 1877; 1st gr 23rd Mar 1878; 1st gr 27th Apr 1878.

1867. JAMES SIMON MACKINTOSH.—Arrd 4th Dec 1867; attached to N W Pro, 25th Oct 1867; Asst Mag Benares, 16th Dec 1867; Ghazipur, 6th June 1868; Benares, 14th Sep 1868; Ghazipur, 27th May 1870; Asst Secy to Govt N W Pro, 1st Apr 1871; Offg Under-Secy to Govt 30th Mar 1872; Asst Secy to Govt, 4th Aug 1872; Offg Under Secy 12th Nov 1872; Asst Secy 12th Dec 1872; Offg Under Secy 13th Apr 1873; Private Secy to His Honor the Lt-Govr, 10th Feb 1874; First Asst Secy to Govt, Offg as Under-Secy 27th Apr 1874; Offg Jr Secy 28th July 1874; Offg Secy 22nd Aug 1875; Offg Jr Secy 17th Nov 1875; confirmed, 4th July 1876; Offg Secy to Bd of Rev, N W Pro, 1st May 1877; Secy to Bd of Rev, 1st Aug 1877; furl to Eur from 5th Nov 1877.

1867. JAMES AUGUSTINE MARCEL.—Arrd 12th Dec 1867; attached to N W P, 25th Oct 1867; Asst Magt, Allahabad, 29th Dec 1867; Banda, 20th July 1868; Azamgarh, 29th June 1869; Etah, 12th Sep 1870; leave to Eur on medl cert from 8th Apr 1871 to 7th Apr 1872; Asst Magt, Etah, 25th Apr 1872; Offg Jt Magt, 1st gr, 18th Sep 1872; Aligarh 25th Oct 1872; 2nd gr, 3rd Sep 1873; Asst Magt, 15th Oct 1873; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 14th May 1874; 1st gr 24th Aug 1874; 2nd gr 17th Sept 1874; Asst Mag 31st Oct 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 31st July 1875; 1st gr 1st Sept 1875; 2nd gr 22nd Oct 1875; Asst Mag 2nd Nov 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Aligarh, 15th May 1876; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 23rd June 1876; Offg Magt, 29th Aug 1876; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 10th Oct 1876; Asst Magt, 4th Nov 1876; furl to Eur from 1st Mar 1877 to 27th Feb 1878; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, Cawnpore, 13th Mar 1878; 1st gr, Cawnpore 27th Mar 1878; Hamirpur, 1st Aug 1878; Cawnpore, 28th Aug 1878.

1868. WILLIAM LAMBE.—Arrd 24th Oct 1868; attached to N W P, 5th Dec 1868; Asst Magt, Cawnpore, 8th Dec 1868; Fatehpur, 2nd July 1873; Bareilly, 12th Oct 1873; in charge of Sub-divn, Pilibhit, 15th Dec 1873; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, Pilibhit, 1st June, 1874; Asst Magt 20th July 1874; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 2nd June 1875; 1st gr, 1st Sep 1875; 2nd gr, 17th Oct 1875; Asst Magt 1st Nov 1875; Offg Jt-Magt, 2nd gr, 22nd May 1876; Asst Magt 15th July 1876; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 28th Aug 1876; 1st gr 18th Sep 1876; Shahjahanpur 21st Sep 1876; 2nd gr 9th Oct 1876 Asst Mag Shahjahanpur 30th Oct 1876; furl to Eur from 5th Feb 1877 to 18th Oct 1878; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr Moradabad, 6th Nov 1878; 2nd gr 19th Nov 1878.

1868. ROBERT SMEATON.—Arrd 5th Dec. 1868; attached to N W, P 5th Dec 1868; Asst Magt Allahabad 29th Jan 1869; Gorakhpur 16th June 1870; Basti 17th Dec 1870; Offg Magt Basti, 19th Apr 1871; Asst Magt 19th May 1871; Asst Set Offr, 3rd gr Aligarh 22nd Feb 1872; Set Offr Aligarh, from 9th Apr to 14th Oct 1872; also Asst Magt from 15th Sep to 1st Nov 1872; leave on med cer to Eur from 6th June to 14th Nov 1873; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr Aligarh, 18th Nov 1873; Offg Under Secy to Govt, 1st May 1874; Offg Jr Secy 22nd Aug 1875; Offg Under-Secy 17th Nov 1875; Offg Jr Secy 9th Mar 1876; Offg Under Secy 14th May 1876; 1st Asst Secy Ag Under Secy 4th July 1876; Offg Jr Secy 1st May 1877; Under-Secy Ag Jr Secy to Govt 17th May 1877; Jr Secy 1st Aug 1877.

1868. DAVID THOMAS ROBERTS.—Arrd 14th Nov 1868; attached to the N W Pro, 4th Dec 1868; Asst Mag Ghazipur, Dec 1868; Examination leave from 1st to 30th Oct 1870; Asst Mag Ballia Sub-divn, Ghazipur, 2nd June 1871; Budaun, 15th Oct 1872; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 15th Aug 1873; Asst Mag 24th Oct 1873; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 6th May 1874; 1st gr 25th Aug 1874; 2nd gr 7th Sep 1874; Asst Magt 3rd Nov 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 12th July 1875; 1st gr, 1st Sep, 1875; 2nd gr, 10th Oct 1875; Asst Magt, 2nd Nov 1875; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd, gr, Budaun, 15th May 1876; 1st gr, 20th Sept 1876; 2nd gr, 9th Oct 1876; Asst Magt, 4th Nov 1876; furl to Eur from 3rd Apr 1877 to Nov 1878; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, Agra, 20th 1878.

1868. EDWARD ROSE.—Arrd 7th Nov 1868; attached to N W P Dec 1868; Asst Magt Moradabad 26th Dec 1868; Budaun, 10th July 1869; Moradabad, 8th July 1870; Asst Mag 7th June 1872; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 6th Sept 1872; Asst Mag 15th Oct 1872; leave to Eur on med cer from 3rd Feb to 2nd Dec 1873; Asst Mag Banda 15th Dec 1873; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 6th Apr 1874; Asst Mag 25th Nov 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 29th Mar 1875; 1st gr 6th Sep 1875; 2nd gr 10th Oct 1875; Asst Magt 8th Nov 1875; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 4th May 1876; Karwi, Sub-divn 6th June 2nd gr 9th Oct 1876; Asst Mag Banda, 27th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Karwi Sub-divn 18th Mar 1877; 1st gr 5th Apr 1877; 2nd gr 28th Nov 1877; 1st gr 30th Mar 1878; 2nd gr 10th Nov 1878.

1868. THOMAS BENSON.—Arrd 14th Nov 1868 ; attached to N W P, 4th Dec 1868 ; Asst Magt Agra, 21st Dec 1868 ; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr 27th Nov 1872 ; 2nd gr Mainpuri, 1st June 1874.

1868. GEORGE JOHN LAIDMAN.—Arrd 7th Dec 1868 ; attached to N W P, 4th Dec 1868 ; Asst Magt Fatehpur, 5th Jan 1869 ; Asst Supt Dehra Dun, 19th May 1870 ; Asst Mag Saharanpur, 23rd Jan 1871 ; Jaunpur, 3rd Nov 1871 ; Bareilly, 29th Nov 1874 ; Moradabad, 1st Apr 1875 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 25th May 1875 ; 1st gr 7th Sep 1875 ; 2nd gr 8th Oct 1875 ; Asst Mag 2nd Nov 1875 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 16th May 1876 ; Asst Mag 16th July 1876 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 23rd Aug 1876 ; Asst Mag 30th Oct 1876 ; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 5th Apr 1877 ; 2nd gr 20th Nov 1877 ; 1st gr 12th Apr 1878 ; Offg Magt Moradabad, 26th Sep 1878 ; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr 11th Oct 1878 ; 2nd gr 9th Nov 1878

1868. RICHARD DUNDAS ALEXANDER.—Arrd 14th Dec 1868 ; attached to N W P, 24th Dec 1868 ; Asst Magt Meerut, 4th Feb 1869 ; Farukhabad, 5th July 1869, Agra, 18th Oct 1869 ; Mainpuri, 25th Apr 1870 ; Farukhabad, 6th Apr 1872 ; Mainpuri, 3rd May 1872 ; Farukhabad, 3rd June 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 8th Sept 1873 ; Asst Magt 5th Oct 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st June 1874 ; Asst Magt 21st July 1874 ; Asst Supt and Judge S C Court, Dehra Dun, 27th Mar 1875 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th May 1875 ; 1st gr 24th Sept 1875 ; 2nd gr 8th Oct 1875 ; Asst Magt 2nd Nov 1875 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 16th May 1876 ; Asst Mag 21st July 1876 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr (Dehra Dun), 11th Aug 1876 ; Asst Mag (Dehra Dun), 1st Nov 1876 ; 21 months' furl to Eur from 21st Mar 1877.

1868. RICHARD STEPHEN WHITEWAY.—Arrd 10th Dec 1868 ; attached to N W P, 4th Dec 1868 ; Asst Magt Agra 14th Jan 1869 ; Muttra, 10th July 1869 ; Mainpuri, 13th Nov 1869 ; Azamgarh, 11th Mar 1871 ; Asst Secy to Gov N W P, 12th Nov 1872 ; Asst Mag Allahabad, 12th Dec 1872 ; Moradabad, 28th Jan 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 27th Aug 1873 ; Asst Mag 22nd Oct 1873 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 30th July 1874 ; Asst Magt 1st Nov 1874 ; Asst Set Offr 2nd gr Muttra, 11th Mar 1875 ; placed in charge of the set of Muttra and of Jalesar in the Agra dist 16th Oct 1876 ; 1st gr 1st Apr 1877 ; Offg Set Offr 3rd gr Muttra, 1st Mar 1878 ; Offg Magt Muttra 8th Aug 1878 ; Offg Set Offr 3rd gr 8th Oct 1878.

1868. WILLIAM HOLMES.—Arrd 21st Nov 1868 ; attached to N W P 4th Dec 1868 ; Asst Magt Meerut, 20th Jan 1869 ; Aligarh, July 1869 ; Leave M C from 20th Apr 1871 ; to 23rd Dec 1872 ; Asst Mag Agra 10th Jan 1873 ; Dehra Dun 7th May 1873 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 2nd June 1874 ; Asst Magt 21st Oct 1874 ; Offg Cant Magt Chakrata, 4th Jan 1875 ; Asst Supt Dehra Dun, 4th Mar 1875 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 11th June 1875 ; Asst Mag 28th Oct 1875 ; Offg Cant Magt Chakrata, 16th Mar 1876 ; Asst Supt Dehra Dun, 11th Apr 1876 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 25th May 1876 ; Asst Magt 8th July 1876 ; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 29th Aug 1876 ; Asst Mag 21st Oct 1876 ; Muttra, 29th Nov 1876 ; Offg Jt Magt st gr 8th Apr 1877 ; 2nd gr 1st Nov 1877 ; 1st gr 19th Apr 1878 ; Dehra Dun, 30th Apr 1878 ; 2nd gr 6th Nov 1878.

1868. ALEXANDER MACMILLAN.—Arrd 10th Dec 1868 ; attd to N W P, 4th Dec 1868 ; Asst Magt Mirzapur, 8th Feb 1869 ; Azamgarh, 7th May 1869 ; Fatehpur, 31st May 1870 ; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr 24th Feb 1872 ; 1st gr Fatehpur, 1st June 1874 ; Offg 1st Asst Secy to Govt N W P, 17th Aug 1874 ; Offg Under Secy 22nd Aug 1875 ; Offg 1st Asst Secy 7th Nov 1875 ; Offg Under Secy 9th Mar 1876 ; Offg 1st Asst Secy 21st Aug 1876 ; Dy Supt Family, Domains Maharajah of Benares, 30th Mar 1877 ; Furl to Eur from 8th Apr to 21st Oct 1878 ; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr and Dy Supt Family Domains Maharaja of Benares 30th Oct 1878 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr and Dy Supt &c., 6th Nov 1878.

1869. FRANCIS BAKER.—Arrd 13th Nov. 1869 ; attd to N. W. P. 19th Nov 1869 ; Asst Magt Agra, 12th Jan 1870 ; exmn leave from 17th Sept to 16th Oct 1872 ; Asst Magt Allahabad, 9th Apr 1873 ; 1st Asst Secy to Govt, N W P, 1st Nov 1873 ; Priv Secy to His Honor the Lt-Govr, N W P 27 to Apr, 1874 ; Furl to Eur from 22nd Mar 1875 to 9th Dec 1877 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd Gorakhpur, 22nd Dec 1877 ; 1st gr 22nd Apr 1878 ; Jr Secy to Board of Rev 14th May 1878 ; Offg Secy to Board of Rev 15th Sep 1878 Jr Secy 3rd Oct, 1878 ; Offg Under Secy to Govt N W P and Oudh, 14th Nov 1878.

1869. JAMES LAWSON DENNISTON.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869 ; attd to N W P 19th Nov 1869 ; Asst Magt Benares, 12th Nov 1869 ; Basti, 10th Jan 1870 ; Mainpuri, 9th Oct 1871 ; Farukhabad, May 1874 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 7th June, 1874 ; Asst Magt 7th July 1874 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 14th Aug 1874, Asst Magt 15th Oct, 1874 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 1st July 1875 ; Asst Magt 25th Oct 1875 ; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 1st June 1876 ; Asst Magt

4th July 1876; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 29th Aug 1876; Asst Magt 21st Oct 1876; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 1st Apl, 1877; 1st gr, 12th Apl 1877; Cawnpore, 1st Sept 1877; 1st gr, Farukhabad, 10th Oct 1877; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 30th Oct 1877; 1st gr, Farukhabad, 6th June 1878; 2nd gr 6th Nov, 1878.

1870. STEPHEN HARVEY JAMES.—Arrd 30th Oct 1870; attd to N W P 30th Sept 1870; Asst Magt Meerut, 21st Nov 1870; Etah, 17th Oct 1872; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 22nd Sep 1873; Asst Magt 18th Oct 1873; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 18th June 1874; Asst Magt 1st July 1874; Allahabad, 2nd Nov 1874; Jr Secy Board of Rev N W P, 1st May 1875; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, from 1st Sep to 14th Oct 1875, and from 2nd June to 1st July 1876, and again from 1st Sep to 19th Oct 1876; Offg Secy to Board of Rev 23rd Feb 1877; Offg Under-Secy to Govt, 1st May 1877; confirmed 1st Aug 1877; Offg Jr Secy to Govt, 19th May 1878; Under-Secy 18th Aug 1878; Offg Regr, High Court, N W P 14th Nov 1878.

1870. JOSEPH DEAS.—Arrd 1st Nov 1870; attd to Oudh, 30th Sep 1870; Asst Comr, Sitapur, 7th Nov 1870; Offg 2nd gr, 10th Apl 1872; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, 7th Nov 1872; Fyzabad, 14th May 1873; Offg 2nd gr, 16th Oct 1873; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, 6th Nov 1878; 3rd gr, Gonda, 4th Mar 1875; leave to Eur on medl cer from 14th July 1875 to 3rd Oct 1876; Offg Asst Comr, 2nd gr, Fyzabad, 4th Oct 1876; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, (on set duty), from 6th Nov 1876; (on dist work), 25th Oct 1877; Offg 2nd gr, Jhansi, 13th May 1878; Offg 1st gr, Jhansi, 14th June 1878; Offg Dy Comr 7th Sep 1878; Asst Comr, 2nd gr from 8th Oct 1878; Offg as Dy Comr Offg Asst Cm, 1st gr, Jhansi, 12th Nov 1878.

1870. FREDERICK HENRY FISHER.—Arrd 4th Dec 1870; attached to N W Prov 30th Sep 1870; Asst Mag Jaunpur, 8th Dec 1870; Banda, 10th Apl 1871; exam leave from 24th Sep to 24th Oct 1872; in charge of the Kirwi, Sub-divn (Banda) 15th Dec 1873; Asst Mag Agra, 17th Mar 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th Aug 1874; Asst Mag-13th Oct 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Agra, 1st Sep 1875; Asst Mag 22nd Oct 1875; leave to Eur on med cert from 15th Mar to 17th Oct 1876; Asst Mag Mainpuri, 27th Oct 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Apl 1877; 1st gr 26th Apl 1877; Offg Magt 6th July 1877; Offg Jt Magt 1st gr, 14th Aug 1877; 2nd gr 13th Oct 1877; furl to Eur from 1st Nov 1877 to Dec 1878; Asst Mag Allahabad Dec 1877.

1870. THOMAS ROBERT REDFERN.—Arrd 2nd Oct 1870; attached to N W Pro, 30th Sep 1870; Asst Comr 3rd gr Fyzabad, 10th Nov 1870; Gonda, 7th Apl 1871; Offg 2nd gr 2nd Apl 1872; Offg Jr Secy to Chief Comr Oudh, 18th Aug 1872; also Asst Comr Lucknow, 24th Sep 1872; Offg 2nd gr Unao, 19th Nov 1872; Lucknow, 26th Nov 1873; Asst Comr 3rd gr 13th Dec 1873; Kheri, 13th Jan 1874; Offg 2nd gr 26th Sep 1874; Asst Comr 3rd gr 7th Oct 1874; Offg Asst Sett Offr 18th Jan 1875; Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr (on set duty) Kheri, Asst Set Offr Offg Asst Comr 2nd gr 18th Oct 1875; Asst Comr 3rd gr (on set duty) 16th Nov 1875; Offg 2nd gr 10th Apl 1876; Asst Comr 3rd gr 7th July 1876; Offg Set Offr Kheri, 16th Aug 1876; Asst Set Offr Asst Comr 3rd gr 16th Nov 1876; Asst Comr 3rd gr (on set duty) 24th Sep 1877; Offg Set Offr 11th Aug 1878; also Asst Comr from 24th Aug 1878.

1870. JOHN BROWN THOMSON.—Arrd 16th Nov 1870; attached to N W Prov, 30th Sep 1870; Asst Mag Benares, 6th Dec 1870; Basti, 15th Apl 1872; Etawah, 6th Nov 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Etawah, 1st Sep 1875; Asst Mag (on leave) 10th Oct 1875; Allahabad, 12th Apl 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 7th June 1876; Asst Mag 13th Oct 1876; Fatehpur, 11th Mar 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 2nd Apl 1877; 1st gr 1st May 1877; 1st gr Allahabad, 9th June 1877; 2nd gr 13th Oct 1877; 1st gr 1st Aug 1878; 2nd gr 5th Nov 1878.

1870. FREDERICK SHORE, BULLOCK.—Arrd 7th Nov 1870; attached to the N W Prov 30th Sep 1870; Asst Mag Bareilly, 28th Nov 1870; Shahjahanpur, 27th April 1871; Bareilly, 26th May 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 14th Aug 1874; Asst Mag 17th Sep 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 6th Sep 1875; Asst Mag 10th Oct 1875; Offg Canmt Mag Bareilly from 1st May to 30th July 1875; in charge of Pilfihit Sub-divn 15th Oct 1876; Asst Supt and Judge S C Court, Dehra Dun, 5th Mar 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 3rd Apl 1877; 1st gr 14th May 1877; 2nd gr 11th Oct 1877; Asst Mag 12th Jan 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 16th Feb 1878; 1st gr 6th May 1878; 2nd gr 3rd Nov 1878.

1871. VINCENT ARTHUR SMITH.—Arrd 2nd Nov 1871; attached to N W Pro, 14th Oct 1871; Asst Mag Ghazipur 9th Nov 1871; Azamgarh 12th Aug 1873; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 25th Aug 1874; Asst Mag 7th Sept 1874; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr Hamirpur, 15th Nov 1874; 2nd gr 16th June 1877; 1st gr 15th Jan 1878.

1871. RICHARD GILLIES HARDY.—Arrd 1st Nov 1871; attached to N W Pro, 14th Oct 1871; Asst Mag Allahabad, 1st Nov 1871 Banda, 6th Apr 1873; Allahabad, 7th May 1874; Hamirpur, 9th July 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 8th Sep 1875; Asst Magt Bulandshahr, 10th Oct 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 11th Sep 1876; Asst Mag 18th Oct 1876; Sub-divn of Pilibhit, 9th Mar 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 4th Apr 1877; 1st gr 15th May 1877; 2nd gr, 8th Oct 1877; Asst Magt, 1st Jan 1878; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 19th Feb 1878; Asst Mag 13th Mar 1878; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 23rd Mar 1878; 2nd gr, 15th July 1878; 1st gr, 15th Aug 1878; Offg Magt, Bareilly, 22nd Sept 1878; Offg Jt Magt, 1st gr, Pilibhit, 2nd Oct 1878, 2nd gr, 1st Nov 1878.

1871. CHARLES JAMES CONNELL.—Arrd 7th Nov 1871; attached to Oudh 14th Oct 1871; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, Lucknow, 7th Nov 1871; Offg Jr Secy to Chief Comr, Oudh, 10th Feb 1873; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, Lucknow, 27th Feb 1873; Offg 2nd gr, 29th Oct 1873; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, 3rd Nov 1873; Offg Asst Set Offr, Gonda, 7th May 1874; Offg Set Offr, Gonda, 9th Aug 1875; Fyzabad, 12th Nov 1875; Offg Asst Comr, 2nd gr, (on set duty) 16th Apr 1876; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, 14th June 1876; Offg 2nd gr 1st Sep 1876; 3rd gr 27th Oct 1876; spl leave to Eur from 16th Apr to 10th Oct 1877; Asst Set Offr Fyzabad, 24th Oct 1877; First Asst Secy to Govt N-W P and Oudh, 5th Feb 1878; Offg Under-Secy 19th May 1878; First Asst Secy 18th Aug 1878; extraordinary leave (without pay) from 15th Dec 1878.

1871. ERNEST BRUCE ALEXANDER.—Arrd 1st Nov 1871; attached to N-W P 14th Oct 1871; Asst Mag Mainpuri, 9th Nov 1871; Gorakhpur 4th June 1872 Jaunpur 7th June 1873; Allahabad, 22nd Oct 1873; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr Fatehpur, 14th Nov 1874; Jr Secy to the Board of Revenue, N W P 23rd Apr 1877; Asst Set Offr Fatehpur 10th July 1877; Jr Secy to the Board of Revenue, N W P 15th Nov 1877; Asst Set Offr 1st gr Moradabad, 1st Feb 1878; placed in charge of the Moradabad Set from 25th Apr to 25th Oct 1878.

1871. HENRY CROSSLY IRWIN.—Arrd 1st Nov 1871; attached to Oudh; 14th Oct 1871; Asst Comr 3rd gr Fyzabad, 9th Nov 1871; Bahraich, 23rd Oct 1874; 1876; Asst Comr 3rd gr Bahraich 18th Oct 1876; Unao, 7th Nov 1876; 3rd gr Fyzabad, 5th Dec 1876; Bahraich 11th Apr 1877; Offg 2nd gr Jhansi 25th Jan 1878; 3rd gr 2nd Apr 1878; Offg 2nd gr, Bahraich, 27th Sept 1878; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, 28th Oct 1878.

1871. WILLIAM CROOKE.—Arrd 2nd Nov 1871; attached to N W Provs, 14th Oct 1871; Asst Magt, Bulandshahr, 11th Nov 1871; Gorakhpur, 3rd June 1874; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 14th Sept 1875; Asst Magt, 8th Oct 1875; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 18th Sept 1876; Asst Magt, 10th Oct 1876; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 5th Apr 1877; 1st gr, 17th May 1877; 2nd gr, 9th June 1877; 1st gr, 13th July 1877; 2nd gr, 12th Sept 1877; Asst Magt, 26th Dec 1877; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 27th Mar 1878; 1st gr, 7th May 1878; 2nd gr, 11th July 1878; 1st gr, 16th Aug 1878; 2nd gr, 26th Oct 1878.

1871. JULIUS WOOD MUIR.—(Barristers-at-law) Arrd 1st Nov 1871; attached to N-W Provs, 4th Oct 1871; Asst Magt, Bareilly, 13th Nov 1871; Basti 8th Feb 1873; Bulandshahr, 26th Apr 1875; leave to Eur on med cer from 2nd July 1875 to 2nd Nov 1876; Asst Mag Azamgarh, 24th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 5th Apr 1877; 1st gr 29th July 1877; 2nd gr 8th Aug 1877; 2nd gr Mirzapur, 30th Sep 1877; Asst Mag Mainpuri, 25th Dec 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 30th Mar 1878; 1st gr 16th May 1878; 2nd gr 6th July 1878; 1st gr 18th Aug 1878; Offg Mag Mainpuri, 20th Sept 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 21st Oct 1878.

1871. FRANCIS BERRY MULOCK.—Arrd 2nd Nov 1871; attached to N W P 14th Oct 1871; Asst Mag Mirzapur, 3rd Nov 1871; Allahabad 29th May 1874; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 26th Sep 1875; Asst Mag 6th Oct 1875; on spl duty as Asst Priv Secy to the Lieut Governor in connection with the visit of H R H the Prince of Wales to N W P from 22nd Dec 1875 to 10th Mar 1876; Asst Mag Aligarh, 15th Mar 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 20th Sep 1876; Asst Mag 9th Oct 1876; on spl duty in the arrangements connected with the Imperial Assemblage from 18th Nov 1876 to 10th Jan 1877; Asst Mag Aligarh, 11th Jan 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 5th Apr 1877; Offg Mag 18th May 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 18th July 1877; Asst Mag (while on leave) 28th Nov 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Aligarh, 1st Apr 1878; 1st gr 21st Aug 1878; 2nd gr 21st Oct 1878.

1878. JOHN HOOPER.—Arrd 7th Dec 1871; attached to Oudh, 14th Oct 1871; Asst Comr 3rd gr Lucknow, 7th Dec 1871; Sitapur, 15th Jan 1872; Unao, 3rd Sept 1872; Sitapur, 5th Dec 1872; Gonda, 1st Feb 1876; Offg 2nd gr 1st Oct 1876; Asst Comr 3rd gr 18th Oct 1876.

1871. CHARLES WILLIAM WHISH.—Arrd 1st Nov 1871; attached to N W P, 14th Oct 1871; Asst Mag Budaun, 15th Nov 1871; Basti, 11th Apr 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 23rd Sept 1876; Asst Mag 9th Oct 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 8th Apr 1877; Asst Mag 28th Nov 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Ghazipur, 24th Oct 1878.

1871. HERBERT GEORGE PEARSE.—Arrd 7th Nov 1871; attached to N W P, 14th, Oct 1872; Asst Mag Benares, 15th Nov 1871; Jaunpur, 24th Apr 1874; Cawnpore 30th Oct 1874; Farukhabad, 12th Apr 1875; Benares, 25th May 1876; furl to Eur on m c from 15th Apr 1877 to 18th Oct 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Muttra, 21st Oct 1878.

1872. EDWARD STACK.—Arrd 2nd Nov 1872; attd to N W Prov, 7th Oct 1872; Asst Mag Bareilly, 10th Nov 1872; 2nd Asst Secy to Govt N W P, 24th Sept 1873; Offg 1st Asst Secy 21st Aug 1875; 2nd Asst Secy 17th Nov 1875; Offg 1st Asst Secy 9th Mar 1876; 2nd Asst Secy 21st Aug 1876; Offg 1st Asst Secy 22nd Mag 1877; 1st Asst Secy 1st Aug 1876; Asst Mag Bareilly 9th Feb 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Apr 1878; 1st gr 29th Aug 1878; 2nd gr 18th Oct 1878.

1872. DAVID FOULIS ADDIS.—Arrd 14th Nov 1872; attd to N W P, 17th Oct 1872; Asst Mag Benares, 20th Nov 1872; Azamgarh, 24th Nov 1874; Benares 15th June 1875; Allahabad, 13th Aug 1875; Benares, 25th Aug 1875; in charge of Sub divn Balia, Ghazipur, 7th Sept 1875; Ghazipur, (head-quarters), 27th Oct 1875; Shahjahanpur, 16th Feb 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 26th Apr 1877; Asst Mag 1st Nov 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Apr 1878; 1st gr 17th Sep 1878; 2nd gr 17th Oct 1878; Asst Mag 20th Nov 1878.

1872. WILLIAM HOEY.—Arrd 18th Oct 1872; attached to Oudh-17th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 3rd gr Sultanpur, 22nd Oct 1873; Fyzabad, 8th Oct 1874; Gonda, 28th Aug 1875; Offg 2nd gr 8th Sep 1875; Asst Comr, 3rd gr 6th Nov 1875; Unao, 15th Nov 1876; Lucknow, Dec 1878.

1872. ALEXANDER WALMESLY CRUICKSHANK.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872; attached to N W P, 17th Oct 1872; Asst Mag Allahabad; 11th Nov 1872; Cawnpore, 20th May 1873; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st May 1877; 2nd gr Agra, 23rd May 1877; Asst Mag 30th Oct 1877; Jun Sec to B of R, N W P, 22nd Jan 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr from 1st Apr 1878; furl to Eur on m c from 29th May to 27th Nov 1878; posted to Budaun as Asst Mag Dec 1878.

1872. THOMAS STOKER.—Arrd 14th Nov 1872; attd to N W P, 17th Oct 1872; Asst Mag Gorakhpur, 20th Nov 1872; in charge of the Gorakhpur Jail, from 2nd Aug to 1st Nov 1873; Asst Mag Mirzapur, 20th Apr 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 24th Sept 1876; Asst Mag 5th Oct 1876; Offg Mag 9th Jan 1877; Offg Dy Supt of the Family Domains, Maharaja of Benares, 28th Jan 1877; Asst Mag Mirzapur, 28th Feb 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 14th May 1877; Asst Mag 13th Oct 1877; Dy Supt of the Benares from 29th Sept to 23rd Oct 1877; Asst Mag 24th Oct 1877; Dy Supt Benares, 29th Mar 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr from 1st Apr 1878; 1st gr from 17th Sept, 2nd gr 17th Oct 1878; Asst Mag 10th Nov 1878.

1872. THOMAS WILLIAM HOLDERNESS.—Arrd 17th Feb 1873; attd to N W P, 17th Oct 1872; Asst Mag Bijnor, 22nd Feb 1873; Fatehpur, 27th Apr 1874; Muzaffarnagar, 26th May 1875; Offg 2nd Asst Secy to Govt, N W Prov, 9th Mar 1876; Asst Mag Allahabad, 1st Nov 1876; 2nd Asst Secy to Govt 22nd Mar 1877; Offg 1st Asst Secy 19th May 1878; 2nd Asst Secy from 18th Aug 1878; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr 18th Aug 1878, Asst Magt 5th Nov 1878; Jr Secy to Board of Revenue, 14th Nov 1878.

1872. HERBERT MOOR BIRD.—Arrd 4th Nov 1872; attached to N W P 17th Oct 1872; Asst Magt Agra 8th Nov 1872; Muttra, 12th Aug 1873; Shahjahanpur, 1st June 1874; Etah 8th Mar 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 15th May 1877; Asst Mag 11th Oct 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Apr 1878; Asst Mag 6th Nov 1878.

1872. JAMES MACPHERSON.—Arrd 1st Nov 1872; attached to N W P 17th Oct 1872; Asst Mag Meerut, 7th Nov 1872; Hamirpur, 11th Nov 1873; on spl duty at Naini Tal under the orders of the Board of Revenue N W P, 8th July to 31st Aug 1875; Asst Magt Hamirpur, 7th Sep Bareilly, 19th Apr 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th May 1877; Asst Magt, 14th Aug 1877; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 31st Aug 1877; Asst Magt 8th Oct 1877; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, in charge of Pilibhit, 8th Apr 1878; 2nd gr, Bareilly, 6th July 1878; Asst Magt from 6th Nov 1878.

1873. WILLIAM RUSSEL BARRY.—Arrd, attached to N W P 23rd Oct 1873; Asst Magt Bareilly, 3rd Nov 1873; Moradabad, 28th Apr 1874; Bulandshahr, 14th Sep 1874; Offg Asst Comr, 3rd class, Jhansi, 21st Mar 1875; Offg 2nd class, 16th Apr 1875; Offg 3rd gr, 16th Nov 1875; Offg Cant Magt, from 8th Jan to 18th Apr 1876; Offg

Asst Comr, 2nd gr, 20th Apr 1876; Offg 3rd gr, 3rd July 1876; Offg Asst Comr, Jalaun, 2nd gr, 10th Oct 1876; 3rd gr, 4th Nov 1876; Jhansi, 25th Nov 1876; Offg Cant Magt, Jhansi, from 29th Dec 1876 to 26th Jan 1877; Offg Asst Comr, 3rd gr, Lalitpur, 13th Feb 1877; Offg 2nd gr, 10th Mar 1877; Offg Jr Secy to Board of Revenue, 20th July 1877; Offg Asst Comr, 2nd gr, Jhansi, 4th Dec 1877; acted as 2nd Asst Secy to Govt, from 19th May to 21st Aug 1878; Offg 1st gr, Jhansi, 7th Sep 1878; Offg 2nd gr, 21st Oct 1878; Offg 1st Asst Secy to Govt 21st Dec 1878.

1873. THOMAS ROWLAND WYER.—Arrd 20th Oct 1873 attached to N W P 23rd Oct 1873; Asst Mag Meerut, 5th Nov 1873; Muzaffarnagar, 24th Mar 1874; Asst Set Offr 3rd gr Moradabad, 1st June 1875; Asst Mag Budaun, 9th June 1877; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 29th July 1877; Asst Mag 8th Aug 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Sep 1877; Asst Mag 8th Oct 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 9th Apr 1878; 1st gr 17th Sep 1878; 2nd gr 17th Oct 1878; Asst Mag 6th Nov 1878; Azamgarh, 7th Dec 1878.

1873. ROSS SCOTT.—Arrd 26th Oct 1873; attached to N W P, 23rd Oct 1873; Asst Magt, Gorakhpur, 8th Nov 1873; Bulandshahr, 9th June 1874; leave on med cert from 16th July to 14th Oct 1874; Asst Magt, Muttra, 7th Nov 1874; Agra, 8th Jan 1876; Muttra, 11th Feb 1876; Muzaffarnagar, 2nd June 1876; furl to Eur on med cert from 18th Apr 1877.

1873. FRANK GILES.—Arrd 26th Oct 1873; attached to N W P, 23rd Oct 1873; Asst Magt Ghâzipur, 4th Nov 1873; Allahabad, 27th Dec 1875; leave to Eur on med cert from 17th Apr 1876 to 8th Apr 1877; Asst Magt, Meerut, 16th Apr 1877; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 12th Apr 1878; furl to Eur from 1st Aug to Nov 1878.

1874. HUGH SHAKESPEARE BARNES.—Arrd 30th Oct 1874; attached to N W P, 25th Sep 1874; Asst Mag Allahabad, 30th Oct 1874; Moradabad, 15th Nov 1875; Shah-jahanpur, 16th Sep 1876; Moradabad, 24th October 1876; services placed at the disposal of Govt of India, Finl Dept, Dec 1876; left N W P, 14th Dec 1876.

1874. FRANCIS LORAINNE PETRE (Barrister-at-Law).—Arrd 15th Nov 1874; attd to N W Pro, 25th Sep 1874; Asst Mag Fatehpur, 23rd Nov 1874; Bareilly, 24th Feb 1875; Badaun, 21st Mar 1875; Bijnor, 23rd Sep 1875; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 17th Sep 1877; Asst Mag 30th Sep 1877; Offg Mag from 23rd Nov to 20th Dec 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 19th Apr 1878; 1st gr 17th Sep 1878; 2nd gr 16th Dec 1878; Asst Mag 6th Nov 1878.

1874. HUGH FRASER.—Arrd 15th Nov 1874; attached to N W Pro, 25th Sep 1874; Asst Mag Agra, 26th Nov 1874; Etawah, 19th Apr 1876; in charge of the Sub-divn of Kassia in Gorakhpur, 28th July 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Kassia, 22nd Apr 1878; 1st gr 20th Sep 1878; 2nd gr 11th Oct 1878; Asst Mag 5th Nov 1878.

1874. ARTHUR EDWIN COMERFORD CASEY.—Arrd 23rd Nov 1874; attached to N W P 25th Sep 1874; Asst Mag Ghâzipur 28th Nov 1874; Mirzapur, 17th May 1876; Ghâzipur 17th July 1876; Azamgarh, 3rd Jan 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 22nd Apr 1878, furl to Eur on med cer from 2nd Aug 1878.

1874. JOHN HENRY HARRISON.—Arrd 7th Nov 1874; attached to N W P 25th Sep 1874; Asst Mag Etah, 12th Nov 1874; leave on med cer from 2nd July to 15th Oct 1875; Asst Mag Agra, Jan 1876; Etah 11th Feb 1876; leave on med cer from 11th Sept to 16th Oct 1876; Asst Supt Dehra Dun 30th Nov 1876; transferred to Cawnpore, 3rd May 1878; Offg Jt Mag 1st gr 22nd Sep 1878; 2nd gr 11th Oct 1878; Asst Mag 3rd Nov 1878.

1874. ROBERT FERGUSON GIBBON.—Arrd 27th Nov 1874; attached to Oudh, 25th Sep 1874; Asst Comr, 3rd gr Bahraich, 8th Dec 1874; Bareli, 9th Apr 1875; Lucknow 10th Sep 1875; Rae Bareli, 30th Sep 1875; Partabgarh, 1st Apr 1876; Bara Banki, 13th Sep 1877.

1875. JOSEPH BAMPFYLDE FULLER.—Arrd 13th Nov 1875; attached to N W P 8th Oct 1875; Asst Mag Cawnpore, 15th Nov 1875; Aligarh, 14th Nov 1876; Asst to the Director of Agriculture and Commerce, N W P 1st Feb 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr from 6th May 1878; Asst Mag 1st Nov 1878.

1875. ALFRED EVELYN STALEY.—Arrd 20th Oct 1875; attached to N W Pro, 8th Oct 1875; Asst Mag Benares, 25th Oct 1875; Etawah, 24th Mar 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 6th May 1878; 1st gr 26th Sept 1878; 2nd gr 7th Oct 1878; Asst Mag 1st Nov 1878.

1875. HENRY FRANCIS DUMARESQ PENNINGTON.—Arrd 21st Oct 1875; attached to Oudh, 8th Oct 1875; Asst Comr 3rd gr Fyzabad, 27th Oct 1875; Bahraich, 23rd Oct 1877.

1875. JOHN JAMES McLEAN.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1875; attached to N W P 8th Oct 1875; Asst Mag Agra, 25th Nov 1875; Bulandshahr, 19th May 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 7th May 1878; 1st gr 26th Sep 1878; 2nd gr 2nd Oct 1878; Asst Mag 30th Oct 1878.

1875. LEONARD TAYLOR.—Arrd 13th Nov 1875; attached to N W Pro, 8th Oct 1875; Asst Mag Mainpuri, 17th Nov 1875; Etawah, 5th March 1878; Mainpuri Apl 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Muttra 14th May 1878; Asst Mag 11th July 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 1st Aug 1878; Asst Mag 26th Oct 1878; Kurnaon 3rd Dec 1878.

1875. WALTER FOX WILLIAMSON WELLS.—Arrd 16th Nov 1875; attached to Oudh, 8th Oct 1875; Asst Comr 3rd class Sitapur 22nd Nov 1875; 3rd class Hardoi 24th Nov 1876; 3rd gr Lucknow, 9th Dec 1877; leave to Eur on med cer from 8th Feb 1878.

1876. CURSETJEE RUSTOMJEE.—Arrd 29th Nov 1876; attached to N W P 20th Oct 1876; Asst Mag Allahabad, 29th Nov 1876; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr Ghazipur 16th May 1878; Asst Mag 6th July 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 9th Aug 1878; Asst Mag 26th Oct 1878.

1876. LESLIE ALEXANDER SELIM PORTER.—Arrd 13th Nov 1876; attached to N W P 20th Oct 1876; Asst Mag Meerut, 17th Nov 1876; Muzaaffarnagar, 29th Oct 1877; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 15th June 1878; Asst Mag 4th July 1878; Offg Jt Mag 2nd gr 14th Aug 1878; Asst Magt, 24th Oct 1878; Asst Secy to Govt N W Provs and Oudh, 22nd Nov 1878.

1876. HERBERT BURLETON JONES BATEMAN.—Arrd 16th Oct 1876; attached to Oudh, 20th Oct 1876; Asst Comr. 3rd gr, Kheri, 21st Oct 1876.

1876. LOFTUS GEORGE EVANS.—Arrd 13th Nov 1876; attached to N W Pro 20th Oct 1876; Asst Magt, Cawnpore, 14th Nov 1876; Basti, 25th Mar 1878; Offg Jt Magt 2nd gr, 15th Aug 1878 Asst Magt, 21st Oct 1878.

1876. CHARLES DENTON STEEL.—Arrd 13th Nov 1876; attached to N W Pro 20th Oct 1876; Asst Magt, Etah, 17th Nov 1876; Muttra, 1st May 1877; Saharanpur, 23rd July 1877.

1876. HENRY BEATSON PUNNETT.—Arrd 21st Oct 1876; attached to N W Pro 20th Oct 1876; Asst Magt, Bareilly, 26th Oct 1876; Bijnor, 14th Nov 1877; Offg Jt Magt, 2nd gr, 16th Aug 1878; Basti, 17th Sept 1878; Asst, Magt 21st Oct 1878.

1876. EDGAR GALBRAITH.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1876; attached to N W Pro 20th Oct 1876; Asst Magt Benares, 29th Nov 1876; Mizapur, 9th Jan 1878.

1877. RODERICK HENRY McLEOD.—Arrd 13th Dec 1877; attached to N W Pro 26th Oct 1877; Asst Mag Benares, 20th Dec 1877.

1877. JOHN PRESCOTT HEWETT.—Arrd 17th Dec 1877; attached to N W Prov 26th Oct 1877; Asst Mag Agra, 20th Dec 1877.

1877. PERCY COTTERILL WHEELER (Bar-at-law).—Arrd, 25th Dec 1877; attached N W Pro, 26th Oct 1877; Asst Mag Ghazipur, 1st Jan 1878.

1877. HENRY ZOUCHE DARRAH.—Arrd 24th Oct 1877; attached to N W Pro 26th Oct 1877; Asst Mag Bareilly, 3rd Nov 1877; Moradabad 3rd Aug 1878.

1877. RICHARD EBB HAMBLIN.—Arrd 4th Jan 1878; attached to N W Pro, 26th Oct 1877; Asst Mag Etawah, 9th Jan 1878; Muttra, Aug 1878; Etah, 11th Nov 1878.

1877. JOHN EDWARD GILL.—Arrd 23rd Jan 1878; attached to N W Pro, 26th Oct 1877 Asst Mag Basti, 29th Jan 1878.

1877. HERBERT WILLIAM WARD REYNOLDS.—Arrd 22nd Dec 1877; attached to N W Pro 26th Oct 1877; Asst Mag Jaunpur, 2nd Jan 1878.

1878. WILLIAM HENRY LOCKINGTON IMPEY.—Arrd 7th Nov 1878; attached to N W Pro, and Oudh, 26th Sep 1878; Asst Mag Meerut, 15th Nov 1878.

1878. ALEXANDER MURISON WAKE SHAKESPEAR.—Arrd 17th Nov 1878; attached to N W Pro, and Oudh, 26th Sep 1878; Asst Mag Bareilly, 23rd Nov 1878.

1878. GEORGE ROBERT IRWIN.—Arrd 16th Nov 1878; attached to N W Pro and Oudh, 26th Sept 1878; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, Bahraich, 28th Nov 1878.

1878. PERCY GRAY.—Arrd 30th Dec 1878; attached to N W Pro and Oudh 26th Sept 1878; Asst Magt, Allahabad, 30th Dec 1878.

1878. CHARLES LINDSTEDT MODELLIER EALES.—Arrd 4th Dec 1878; attached to N W Pro and Oudh, 26th Sept 1878; Asst Comr, 3rd gr, Lucknow, 7th Dec 1878.

IV.PANJAB.

A. ANDERSON.—Arrd 4th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 3rd class, Rs. 450 2nd June 1878; Dy Comr of Sirsa from 3rd to 24th Oct 1873; Hissar on Rs 500 from 23rd Oct 1874 offg Dy Comr 3rd class from 6th to 15th Nov 1875; sick leave from 27th Mar to 15th Nov 1876.

H. A. ANDERSON.—Arrd 2nd Nov 1873; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 2nd Dec 1874 and Rs 500 from 8th June 1875.

J. A. ANDERSON.—Arrd 2nd Dec 1874; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 13th Dec 1875 and Rs 500 from 13th Dec 1876.

D. G. BARKLEY.—Arrd 29th Dec 1857; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 425-4-6 from 1st Apr 1860 and to Rs 500 from 29th Dec 1860; on sick leave from 10th Nov 1861 to 29th Jan 1863; Asst Comr 2nd class 2nd May 1864; Perl Asst to Comr Umballa from 21st Nov 1864; Asst Comr 1st class from 1st May 1866; offd as Regr Cf Court from 1st Aug to 31st Oct 1866; as Dy Comr from 17th May to 22nd July 1867, from 15th Aug to 23rd Oct 1867, and from 25th Mar to 23rd Sep 1868; on furl from 20th Oct 1868 to 15th Oct 1870; on spl duty at Cf Court from 2nd Nov 1870 to 17th Apr 1871; offd as D Comr from 18th Apr 1871 to 24th June 1871; on spl duty from 25th June to 21st July 1871; offd as Dy Comr 2nd class from 22nd July 1871; on spl duty from 9th Apr 1872; offd as Dy Comr 2nd class from 4th July 1872; offd as Dy Comr 2nd class and Asst Sr Judge from 26th Mar; offd as Dy Comr from 8th Apr 1873 to 15th Jan 1874; 2nd class from 3rd Feb 1874; Dy Comr 3rd from 6th Oct 1874 offg Dy Comr 2nd class to 16th Nov 1875; offd as Addl Comr 17th Nov 1875 to 1st Apr 1876; as Dy Comr 2nd class from 2nd Apr 1876; as Addl Comr from 16th May 1876 to 31st Mar 1877; Dy Comr 2nd class on Rs 1,666-10-8 from 5th Nov 1876; on furl from 9th Apr 1877 to 2nd Apr 1878; Dy Comr 1st class from 16th Apr 1877 on Rs 1,833-5-4; offd as Comr, Supt and Judge from 25th Apr and as Addl Comr from 9th May 1878.

F. P. BEACHCROFT.—Arrd 12th Nov 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 25th Apr 1866, Rs 500 from 26th Oct 1866; on sick leave from 12th Mar 1870 to 12th Nov 1871; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 per men from 21st Apr 1874; on sick leave from 15th Mar 1875 to 14th Feb 1877; Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr on Rs 1,000 from 1st Apr 1877; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class, from 1st to 27th Feb 1878, and from 11th Apr 1878.

A. H. BENTON.—Arrd 20th Feb 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 21st Apr 1865; on sick leave to Simla from 6th May to 9th Dec 1867; on furl from 10th Dec 1867 to 22nd Dec 1868; Rs 500 from 23rd June 1866; offd as Dy Comr from 18th June to 6th Aug 1869, from 11th June to 16th Aug 1870, and from 1st Mar to 26th Mar 1872; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 from 26th May 1873; on furl from 18th May 1874 to 15th Nov 1875; offd as Judl Asst Comr from 30th Nov 1875 to 30th July 1876, and from 3rd Oct to 4th Nov 1876, and as Dy Comr 3rd class from 31st July to 1st Oct 1876; Judl Asst Comr 3rd gr on Rs 900 from 15th Nov 1876, and 1st gr, on Rs 1,100 from 1st Apr 1877; offd as Dy Comr from 5th Apr 1877 to 20th Dec 1877 and from 4th Jan 1878.

A. BRANDRETH.—Arrd 2nd Jan 1852; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 500 from 1st Dec 1852, 2nd class on Rs 600 from 1st June 1854; on spl leave from 10th June to 24th July 1854; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs 700 from 19th Nov 1854; offd as Dy Comr Ferozepore from 25th Apr to 31st May 1855; Set Offr Jhelum and Rawalpindi from 1st June 1855; on Rs 1,000 from 24th Feb 1858; on sick leave to Eur from 12th Mar 1859 to 26th Nov 1860; offd as Dy Comr Gujranwala from 6th Mar 1861 to 19th Jan 1862; Dy Comr 2nd class on Rs 1,200 from 20th Jan 1862, and 1st class on Rs 1,500 from 6th May 1862; Set Offr Jhelum from 14th June to 31st Oct 1862, and from 12th Feb to 30th May 1864; offd as Secy to Govt Punjab from 16th Sep to 3rd Oct 1864; on sick leave from 6th June to 31st Aug 1865; offd as Comr of Lahore from 1st Sep to 31st Oct 1865, and of Rawalpindi from 3rd Jan to 21st Mar 1866; on furl to Eur from 14th Apr 1866 to 16th Oct 1868; Rs 1,833-5-4 from 23rd Dec 1868; offd as Comr Mooltan from 11th Mar 1869 to 19th May 1870; Comr and Supt Punjab, on Rs 2,500 from 20th May 1870; on spl leave from 19th June to 30th July 1873; on furl from 17th Nov 1873 to 13th Oct 1874.

F. D. O. BULLOCK.—Arrd 11th Jan 1865; Asst Comr Rs 450 from 26th Apr 1866, Rs 500 from 19th Oct 1866; offd as Judge of S C Court from 1st Apr to 12th May 1869, and as Dy Comr 3rd class from 10th June 1871 to 8th Feb 1872; offd as Judge S C Court from 28th Oct to 1st Dec 1872; Judge S C Court 1st gr on Rs 900 from 2nd Jan 1873; on furl from 1st Mar 1874 to 22nd Feb 1876; Asst Comr 3rd class Lahore from 13th Mar 1876 on Rs. 500 and offd as Judl Asst Comr to 31st Aug 1877; Asst Comr 2nd class from 1st Apr 1876 on Rs. 700 1st class on Rs 800 from 7th Aug 1877; Judl Asst Comr 1st gr from 21st Sep 1877; 3rd gr on Rs 900 from 21st Dec 1877.

A. R. BULMAN.—Arrd 31st Oct 1861; studying at Gurgaon from 1st Mar 1863; Asst Commr 3rd Class Rs. 500 from 21st Apr 1865; on sick leave in India from 1st June to 28th Oct 1865; offd as Dy Commr Umballa from 26th July to 25th Aug 1867; leave on private affairs from 30th May to 24th Oct 1868; on furl to Eur from 3rd Apr 1870 to 28th Oct 1871; Asst Commr 2nd class on Rs 700 from 3rd June 1871; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 3rd June to 7th Nov 1872, from 16th Sep to 16 Oct 1873; offg Secy to Finl Comr from 23rd July to 1st Aug 1874; offd as Dy Comr from 1st Sep to 1st Nov 1874; on furl from 1st Mar 1875 to 30th May 1876; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs 800 from 5th June 1876, Judl Asst Comr 3rd gr on Rs 900 from 1st July 1876, 2nd gr on Rs 1,000 per 5th Nov 1876, 1st gr on Rs 1,100 from 14th Mar 1877; offd as Dy Comr from 5th June 1876.

R. T. BURNEY.—Arrd in India, 12th Feb 1858; Asst Comr 3rd class 10th Decr 1859 on sick leave in India from 6th July to 10th Sep 1861; Rs 500 from 1st Apr 1862; offd as Dy Comr from 16th Mar to 10th Apr 1863, from 10th Oct to 19th Oct 1863; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 600 from 28th Aug 1864; Rs 700 from 1st Nov 1865; offd as Dy Comr from 18th July to 17th Oct 1866, from 15th Sep to 14th Nov 1867, from 29th Aug to 19th Oct 1868, from 1st Novr to 1st Dec 1868; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs. 800 from 1st Mar 1869; Offd Dy Comr from 6th Apr 1869 to 3rd Dec 1869; on furl from 16th Jan 1870 to 12th Jan 1872;

J. C. BROWN.—Arrd 24th Nov 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 6th Dec 1872, Rs 500 from 1st Apr 1873; on spl leave from 7th Apr to 1st Oct 1873; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 25th Apr to 4th May 1878.

C. P. BIRD.—Arrd 6th Jan 1870; Asst Magt Agra from 29th Jan 1870; Asst Comr 3rd class, Punjab, Rs 450 from 24th Oct 1871; Rs 500 from 24th Apr 1872; on sick leave to Eur from 4th Aug 1872; to 25 Mar 1873; on extraordinary leave from 26th Mar 1873; to 22nd July 1874; offd as Jud Asst Com Ferozepore 28th Aug 1877.

F. C. CHANNING.—Arrd 25th Nov 1870; Asst Comr 3rd class, Lahore, Rs. 450 from 23rd May 1871, Rs 500 from 13th Dec 1871; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 18th July to 17th Aug 1872, and as Asst Settlement Offr from 4th Mar 1873 to 3rd Sept 1873, from 24th Sept 1874 to 15th Apr 1877; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 100 from 16th Apr 1877; offd as Settlement Offr from 16th Apr 1877, and as Settlement Secy to Finl Comr Lahore from 29th Dec 1877

R. CLARKE.—Arrd in India, 8th Dec 1870; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 23rd Mar 1871, Rs. 500 from 3rd Dec 1871; offd as 3rd class from 5th Aug to 6th Nov 1872; 2nd class on Rs. 700 from 29th Sept 1877; offd as Judl Asst Comr 3rd Sialkot from 21st Apr 1878.

A. F. D. CUNNINGHAM.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 3rd class from 12th Nov 1872 offd as Judl Asst Comr from 4th May to 1st Aug 1876; Rs. 450 from 2nd June 1873, Rs 500 from 5th Dec 1873; on furl from 8th June 1877 to 12th Feb 1878; rejoined at Peshowar 2nd Mar 1878.

A. CHRISTIE.—Arrd 7th Nov 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 14th May 1872 Rs 500 from 2nd June 1873; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 12th to 22nd May 1877.

W. O. CLARK.—Arrd 11th Nov 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 16th May 1872; Rs 500 from 2nd June 1873; on famine duty in Bengal from 28th Feb to 4th Nov 1874.

J. G. CORDERY.—Arrd 22nd Oct 1856; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 500 from 1st Apr 1860; offd as Judge S C Court Peshawar from 1st July 1862 to 30th Sep 1862; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 100 from 29th July 1862; offd as Judge S C Court from 31st Mar to 16th Sep 1863; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs 700 from 14th Dec 1863; offd as Dy Comr from 1st July to 7th Aug 1864; offg Dy Comr Cenf Prov from 13th Oct 1864 to 29th Jan 1867; on sick leave from 15th Jan to 11th June 1866, and from 1st Oct to 11th Dec 1866; offg 2nd Asst Resident from 30th Jan to 30th June 1867; first Asst Resident from 1st July 1867; furl on M. C. from 26th Sept 1868 to 24th Mar 1871; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 12th Sept 1871 to 21st Jan 1872, and as Dir of Pub Instr Punjab

from 22nd Jan 1872 to 9th May 1873; Dy Comr 3rd class on Rs. 1,333-5-4 from 8th May 1872; on spl leave on M C from 15th May to 9th Nov 1873; Dy Com 2nd class on rs. 1,666-10-8 from 6th Oct 1874; offd as Addl Comr from 9th Nov 1875 to 14th Jan 1876, and as Comr and Supt from 11th to 30th Sep 1876; Dy Com 1st class on rs 1,833-5-4 from 11th Mar 1877; offd as Comr and Supt Hissar from 29th July to 26th Aug 1877, as Addl Comr Amritsar from 5th Dec 8gg to 5th Feb 1878, and as Comr and Supt Lahore from 8th Feb to 14th Apr 1878; offd as Secy to Govt Punjab from 26th Apr 1878; offg Addl Comr from 18th Aug 1878.

W. COLDSTREAM.—Arrd 31st Oct 1861; Asst Comr 3rd class rs. 425-4-6 from 1st May 1863, rs. 500 from 31st Oct 1864; offg Judge of S C Court from 19th Apr 1865 to 4th Mar 1866; rs. 700 from 24th July 1867; offg Perl Asst to Finl Comr from 7th Nov to 24th Dec 1868; offg regr Chief Court from 23rd Feb 1870 to 12th Mar 1871; on furl from 12th Apr 1871 to 11th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 2nd class from 10th Dec 1872; off as Dy Comr 3rd class from 3rd Mar to 21st Oct 1873; Asst Comr 1st class from 21st Apr 1874; Rs. 800 from 2nd July 1874; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 29th May to 21st July 1874, from 1st to 30th Sep 1174, from 2nd Oct to 9th Nov 1874, from 19th Feb to 11th Apr 1875; Offd as Judl Asst Comr 1st gr, from 11th Oct to 1st Nov 1875, from 15th Jan to 5th Feb 1876; Offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 2nd Nov 1875 to 24th Jan 1876, from 6th Feb to 30th July 1876; Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr on Rs. 1,000 from 1st July 1876; Ast gr on Rs. 1,100 from 5th Nov 1876; offd as Dy Comr 3rd gr from 1st July 1876 to 13th Mar 1877; Dy Comr 3rd class on Rs. 1,333-5-4 from 14th Mar 1877; Dy Comr 2nd class on Rs. 1,666-10-8 from 7th Aug 1877.

E. L. CAPPEL.—Arrd 28th Oct 1878; Asst Comr 3rd class Lahore.

R. M. DANE.—Arrd 20th Nov 1874; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 13th Dec 1875 Rs. 500 from 4th July 1876; offd as Settlement Offr Jhelum from 31st Mar 1877 to 10th Sept 1877, from 27th Nov to 23rd Dec 1877; Offg Asst Set offr from 11th Sept to 12th Nov 1877, from 24th Dec 1877 to 24th Feb 1878; Offg Set Offr from 25th Feb 1878.

L. W. DANE.—Arrd 14th Nov 1876; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 19th Dec 1877.

J. R. DRUMMOND.—Arrd 27th Nov 1874; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 13th Dec 1875, Rs. 500 from 13th Dec 1876; Offg Cant Magt from 20th July to 19th Aug 1877.

J. McC. DOUIE.—Arrd 7th Dec 1876; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 19th Dec 1878.

M. L. DAMES.—Arrd 19th Nov 1880; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 16th May 1872; Rs. 500 from 2nd June 1873; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 27th Nov to 21st Dec 1873, from 15th Nov to 11th Dec 1874, and from 11th Sep to 19th Sept 1876.

W. W. DREW.—Arrd 14th Nov 1878; Asst Comr 3rd class.

SIR. R. E. EGERTON.—Arrd 11th Jan 1850; Asst Settlement Offr on Rs. 500 from 16th Aug 1851; Rs. 600 from 6th May 1852; on sick leave from 17th Aug to 16th Sept 1852; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs. 700 from 17th Aug 1854; Settlement Offr, on Rs. 850 from 25th Apr 1856; offg Dy Comr from 10th Aug to 27th Oct 1856, from 21st Feb 1857 to 23rd Feb 1858; confirmed 3rd class on Rs. 1,000 from 14th Feb 1858; 2nd class on Rs. 1,200 from 15th May 1858; 1st class on Rs. 1,500 from 27th Mar 1859; leave on private affairs to England from 14th May to 27th Nov 1862; offd as Comr Lahore from 20th Mar to 1st Nov 1863; Comr and Supdt Nagpore on Rs. 2,500 from 27th Jan 1864; Offg Judl Comr from 1st Apr to 11th June 1866; Finl Comr Punjab on Rs. 3,333-5-4 from 23rd Mar 1868; furl to England from 17th Apr 1869 to 11th Feb 1870; acted as an addl Mem of Govr Genl's Council from 6th July to 8th Nov 1871 from 6th June 1872 to 29th Jan 1874, from 28th Apr to 5th June 1874, and from 28th Jan 1877 to 31st Mar 1877; Lt Govr of the Punjab and its Dependencies on Rs. 8,333-5-4 from 2nd Apr 1877.

G. R. ELSMIE.—Arrd 12th Feb 1858; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 500 from 1st Apr 1860; sick leave from 26th Mar to 13th Dec 1861; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 600 from 13th Nov 1862; of Comr from 1st to 22nd Sep 1863; Offg Judge S C Court Lahore from 9th Nov 1863 to 5th May 1864; Asst Comr 1st class on rs. 700 from 3rd Feb 1864; Offg Judge of S C Court from 11th to 19th May 1864, from 26th May to 17th Aug 1864; Offg Dy Comr from 28th Jan to 10th Feb 1865, from 24th Mar to 13th Nov 1865, from 6th Jan to 30th Apr 1866; rs. 800 from 1st May 1866; Offg Dy Comr from 1st May 1866 to 13th June 1866, from 5th Jan 1867; on splduty at Lahore from 18th July 1867; Offg Dy Comr from 4th Nov 1867 to 4th Oct 1868; Offg Under Secy to Govt of India from 5th Nov 1868 to 29th Jan 1869; on furl from 30th Jan 1869 to 23rd Feb 1871; Dy Comr 3rd class on rs. 1,333-5-4 from 1st May 1870 while on leave; offd as

Addl Comr from 31st Mar 1871 to 17th Sept 1875; Dy Comr 2nd class on Rs. 1,666-10-8 from 16th Apr 1875; offd as Addl Comr from 18th Dec 1875 to 21st Apr 1876, from 27th Apr 1876 to 6th Mar 1877, and as Comr and Supdt from 22nd to 26th Apr 1876; Judge on Rs. 2,250 from 7th Mar 1877; Offg Judge Chief Court from 15th Feb 1878.

J. FRIZELLE.—Arrd dia, 20th Dec 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 1st Apr 1865, Rs. 450 from 1st Apr 1865, Rs. 500 from 23rd July 1866; Offg Judge S C Court from 5th Aug to 3rd Oct 1868; Offg Dy Comr from 16th Sep to 15th Oct 1869, from 21st Feb to 30th Apr 1870 Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 700 from 1st May 1870; Offg Dy Comr from 1st May to 2nd Dec 1870, from 13th Mar to 9th June 1871; Offg Caut Magt from 12th July to 10th Sept 1871; Offg Dy Comr from 6th Aug to 1st Sept 1872, from 1st Dec 1872 to 18th Mar 1873, from 29th May 1873 to 13th Nov 1874; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs. 800 from 16th Apr 1875; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 20th Aug to 30th Sept 1875; and as Judl Asst Comr 1st gr from 1st Oct 1875 Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr on Rs. 1,000 from 1st July 1876; 1st gr on Rs. 1,100 from 11th Mar 1877; offd as Dy Comr 3rd class from 20th to 31st Mar 1877; 3rd class anrs. 1,333-5-4 from 1st Apr 1877.

E. B. FRANCIS.—Arrd 9th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 3rd class 450 from 2nd June 1873, rs. 500 per men from 5th Dec 1873; temply transferred to Bengal on famine duty from 27th Feb 1873 to 4th Nov 1874; Offg Dy Comr from 26th Aug to 9th Nov 1875, from 9th Aug to 14th Oct 1877.

J. F. FINLAY.—Arrd 17th Nov 1875; Asst Comr 3rd class rs. 450 from 13th Dec 1876, rs 500 from 6th Aug 1877.

H. C. FANSHAW.—Arrd 6th Nov 1873, Asst Comr 3rd class; trans to Bengal on famine duty from 27th Feb to 25th Oct 1874; rs. 450 from 6th Feb 1875 Rs 500 from 4th Aug 1875, offd as Set Offr from 8th Aug 1875 to 4th Feb 1876; from 27th Apr to 10th Nov 1876, from 10th Mar to 7th May 1877; from 11th May 1877.

F. W. R. FRYER.—Arrd 28th Nov 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 25th Apr 1866, Rs 500 from 17th July 1866; Asst Comr and Set Offr from 29th Mar 1869; offg Set offr from 16th Sep to 11th Oct 1869 spl leave from 3rd Apr to 24th Sep 1870; Asst Comr and Set Offr from 10th Oct 1870 Set Offr 3rd gr, from 6th Nov 1871 offg Set Offr from 18th Dec 1872 to 4th Mar 1874; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 offg Set Offr from 7th Apr 1873 Asst Comr 2nd class and Set Offr from 5th Mar 1874 to 24th Feb 1875; Secy to Finl Comr from 23rd Oct 1875 to 15th Jan 1876; offg Dy Comr from 1st Mar 1876, from 2nd Sep 1876, from 25th Feb 1877; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs 800 from 14th Mar 1877 Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr on Rs 1,000 from 1st Apr 1877.

L. H. GRIFFIN.—Arrd 17th Nov 1860; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 500 from 1st May 1863; offg perl Asst to Judl Comr from 1st Dec 1864; offg Judge of S C Court from 6th Mar to 24th Apr 1865; offg Perl Asst to Judl Comr from 7th May to 11th Oct 1865; Rs 600 from 1st Nov 1865; on sick leave to Eur from 15th Apr 1866 to 9th Jan 1867; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 from 27th Feb 1867; offg Dy Comr from 23rd Mar to 30th Apr 1867, from 1st Aug to 30th Sep 1867; on duty at Secrt's Office Punjab, from 1st Oct 1867 to 30th June 1868; offg Dy Comr from 1st Aug to 13th Nov 1868; on duty in Punjab Secrt's Office from 14th Nov 1868 offg Dy Comr from 20th July to 6th Sep 1869, from 20th Nov 1869 to 18th Apr 1870; Under-Secy to Govt Punjab on Rs 1,000 from 19th Apr 1870; offg Secy to Govt Punjab from 18th Mar 1871 on spl duty from 20th Feb to 15th Mar 1873; on furl from 7th Apr 1873 to 7th Apr 1875, offg Supt Kapurthala from 19th Apr 1875 offg Secy to Govt Punjab from 9th Feb 1876; Dy Comr 1st class on Rs 1,833-5-4 from 2nd Apr 1877.

J. W. GARDINER.—Arrd 24th Nov 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 25th Apr 1866, Rs 500 from 29th Aug 1866; leave on priv affrs from 23rd June to 22nd Dec 1868, offg Dy Comr from 1st Aug to 1st Sep 1870, from 11th Feb to 17th Mar 1872, from 7th to 28th Apr 1872; on furl from 30th Mar 1874 to 20th Oct 1875; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 from 16th Apr 1875 while on furl offg Judl Asst Comr from 5th Nov 1875 offg Dy Comr from 15th Sep 1876; offg Judl Asst Comr from 20th Oct 1876; offg Dy Comr from 30th Nov 1876 offg Judl Asst Comr from 11th Jan 1877; Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr on Rs 1,000 from 1st Apr 1877; offg Dy Comr from 27th July 1877 to 4th Jan 1878, and from 2nd Feb 1878.

J. A. GRANT.—Arrd 3rd Jan 1878; Asst Comr 3rd class.

C. R. HAWKINS.—Arrd 10th Nov 1862; Asst Magt Mongyr 3rd Oct 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class from 7th Feb 1875; Rs 450 from 21st Apr 1865; Rs 500 from 23rd July 1866; on spl leave from 2nd Jan to 1st Mar 1870; Judge of S C Court on Rs 600 from 27th Mar 1870; on sick leave from 21st June 1870 Judge of S C Court from 17th July to 23rd

Aug 1870; on furl from 1st Oct 1870 to 3rd Nov 1871; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 from 1st Jan 1872; offg Dy Comr 3rd class from 10th Apl to 5th Nov 1872, from 1st to 13th Apl 1873, from 2nd Sep to 8th Nov 1873; offg Secy to Finl Comr from 21st Apl 1875 offg Dy Comr 3rd class from 8th June 1876; Judl Asst Comr 3rd gr on Rs 900 from 2nd July 1876; offg Dy Comr from 2nd July to 21st Oct 1876.

G. HUGHES.—Arrd 23rd Oct 1875; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 13th Dec 1876; Rs 500 from 3rd Sep 1877.

R. L. HARRIS.—Arrd 1st Dec 1877; Asst Comr 3rd class Amritsar.

E. P. HENDERSON.—Arrd 10th Oct 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 16th May 1872, Rs 500 from 6th Dec 1872; on sick leave from 23rd Mar to 6th Oct 1874; offg Judl Asst Comr from 21st May to 18th Dec 1877; offg Govt Adv Lahore from 24th Feb 1878.

D. C. J. IBBETSON.—Arrd 8th Dec 1870; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 23rd May 1871, Rs 500 from 13th Dec 1871; from 2nd Dec 1872 to 31st Mar 1873; Set Offr from 24th Feb 1877; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 Set Offr from 7th Aug 1877 to 11th Mar 1878.

P. D. H. JOHNSTONE.—Arrd 16th Nov 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class, offg Cant Magt from 14th Oct to 1st Nov 1872; Rs 450 from 4th May 1872, Rs 500 from 26th Mar 1873 offg Dy Comr 3rd class from 7th to 29th July 1873; offg Cant Magt from 22nd Sep to 22nd Oct 1873; offg Judge S C Court from 5th Aug to 4th Sep 1874; on sick leave from 1st Nov 1875 to 12th Feb 1878.

A. KENSINGTON.—Arrd 12th Feb 1878; Asst Comr 3rd class.

L. W. KING.—Arrd 27th Nov 1878; Asst Comr 3rd class.

J. B. LYALL.—Arrd 8th Apl 1855; Asst Comr 3rd class 15th Jan 1859, sick leave in India from 23rd June to 7th Sept 1860; Rs. 500 from 1st Apl 1861; leave on private affairs from 4th June to 9th Dec 1863; out of employment from 10th Dec 1863 to 17th Jan 1864; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 600 from 18th Jan 1864; Asst to the Set Comr Rs. 800 from 5th Apl 1864; Set Offr on Rs. 1,000 from 1st Nov 1865; Rs. 1,250 from 1st May 1866; on furl to Europe from 22nd Nov 1869 to 16th Dec 1871; Set Offr 1st gr Rs. 1,333-5-4 from 6th Nov 1871; Dy Comr 3rd class and Set Offr and Offg Set Comr from 5th Jan 1872 Set Comr Rs. 2,500 from 5th Mar 1874; sick leave from 28th Apl to 30th Dec 1874.

M. MACAULIFFE.—Arrd 9th Feb 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class 26th Feby 1865 Rs. 450 from 21st Apl 1865, Rs. 500 from 8th July 1866; sick leave from 15th June to 5th Aug 1865; Offg Dy Comr from 6th to 11th Mar 1869, from 26th Apl to 25th May 1869, from 27th Mar to 17th Apl 1871, and from 16th May to 6th Nov 1871; furl from 1st Apl 1872 to 25th Mar 1874; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs. 700 from 15th Apl 1874; Offg Dy Comr 3rd class from 2nd to 30th Sept 1874; Offg Judl Asst Comr from 8th Oct 1875 to Offg Dy Comr from 27th Feb 1876 to 16th May 1878; Judl Asst Comr 3rd gr Rs. 900 from 12th Nov 1876, 2nd gr Rs. 1,000 from 1st Apl 1877 1st gr Rs. 11,100 from 29th Sept 1877; spl leave from 31st May to 18th Nov 1878.

D. C. MACNABB.—Arrd 22nd Mar 1854; Asst Comr 3rd class 1st Sept 1855 Rs. 500 from 1st Oct 1855; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 600 from 15th May 1858, 1st class on Rs. 700 from 11th Nov 1858; Offg Dy Comr from 7th Mar 1860 to 16th Aug 1861; on furl to Eng on M C from 10th Nov 1861 to 25th Oct 1863; Supdt Chamba State from 30th Jan 1864; Offg Dy Comr from 23rd Aug 1864 Dy Comr 3rd class on Rs. 1,000 from 27th Jan 1866; Rs. 1,333-5-4 from 1st May 1866; 2nd class on Rs. 1,666-10-8 from 3rd Oct 1866; Offg Comr from 13th Nov 1866 to 12th Jan 1867; Offg Addl Comr from 6th Dec 1869 Offg Comr from 10th Mar 1871 Comr and Supdt on Rs. 2,500 from 8th May 1872; on furl from 20th Apl 1874 to 18th Apl 1876.

J. W. MACNABB.—Arrd 2nd Jan 1852; Asst Comr 3rd class 11th Mar 1853, Rs. 500 from 19th May 1854; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 600 from 28th Feb 1856; 1st class on Rs. 700 from 1st May 1857; Offg Dy Comr from 17th Sept 1857 sick leave (in India) from 16th June to 30th Sept 1858; sick leave to Eur from 25th Nov 1858 to 9th Feb 1861; Offg Dy Comr from 9th Apl to 30th Aug 1861; Dy Comr 3rd class on Rs. 1,000 from 31st Aug 1861; 2nd class from 5th Feb 1864; on furl to Eur from 24th Mar 1866 to 21st Mar 1869; Offg Addl Comr from 12th Apl 1869 to 31st May 1870; Dy Comr 1st class on Rs. 1833-5-4 from 12th Oct 1869; Offg Comr from 1st June 1870 to 1st Nov 1871; on spl leave from 3rd Jan to 9th Mar 1872; Offg Comr and Supdt from 30th

Jan to 28th Apr 1874, and from 27th Feb to 15th Nov 1875; Comr and Supdt on Rs. 2,500 per men from 16th Nov 1875.

W. R. H. MERK.—Arrd 1st Dec 1875; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 13th Dec 1876; Offg Cant Magt from 3rd to 19th Jan 1877; Rs. 500 per men from 18th July 1877.

H. MAUDE.—Arrd 27th Dec 1877; Asst Comr 3rd class.

J. R. MACONACHIE.—Arrd 9th Jan 1872; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 14th May 1872 Rs. 500 from 6th Dec 1872; from 4th Sept to 11th Oct 1876; Set Offr 3rd gr from 11th Jan to 6th June 1878.

A. MEREDITH.—Arrd 25th Nov 1878 Asst Comr 3rd class.

E. O'BRIEN.—Arrd 11th Jan 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class 26th Jan 1865, Rs. 450 from 26th Apr 1866, Rs. 500 from 30th Oct 1866; Offg Judge of S C Court from 1st June to 31st July 1868; Offg Dy Comr from 2nd Sept 1870 to 11th Jan 1871; Offg Secy to Finl Comr from 16th Mar to 7th Dec 1871; Set Offr from 8th Dec 1871 to 31st Mar 1872; Offg Set Offr from 1st Apr to 31st May 1872; Set Offr 3rd gr from 1st June 1872; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs. 700 from 7th Apr 1873; 1st class on Rs. 800 from 11th Mar 1877.

G. M. OGILVIE.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 21st Apr 1865, Rs. 500 from 25th Apr 1866; Offg Dy Comr from 1st Sept to 13th Nov 1868, from 5th Aug to 5th Oct 1870, 20th Feb to 15th Mar 1871, from 10th Aug to 11th Sep 1871; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs. 700 from 1st May 1872; on furl to England from 2nd Apr 1874; to 29th Mar 1876; Asst Comr 1st class on Rs. 800 from 1st Apr 1876; Offg Judl Asst Comr from 8th Apr to 2nd May 1876; Offg Dy Comr from 3rd May 1876; Offg Dy Comr 3rd class from 1st July to 2nd Aug 1876, from 5th Sep to 4th Oct 1876; Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr Rs. 1,000 from 13th Mar 1877; 1st gr on Rs. 1,100 from 1st Apr 1877; Offg Dy Comr from 1st Apr 1877 to 3rd Jan 1878, and from 21st Jan 1878.

H. E. PERKINS.—Arrd 24th Sep 1856; Asst Comr 3rd class 21st Apr 1857, placed at the disposal Gov of India for employment in Oudh from 6th Apr 1858; Asst Comr 1st class Rs. 700 from 23rd July 1859; Offg Perl Asst to Fin Comr from 1st Sep 1859 Perl Asst from 14th Jan 1860; leave on private affairs from 27th Apr to 26th Oct 1860; Offg Judge of S C Court from 25th Mar to 3rd Dec 1862; Asst Comr 1st class from 23rd Mar 1863; offg Dy Comr from 25th Mar to 8th Nov 1863, from 24th Feb to 4th Aug 1864; spl duty from 15th Dec 1864 to 10th Jan 1865; Offg Judge S C Court from 28th Feb to 17th Apr 1865; furl from 25th Apr 1865 to 30th Mar 1866; Dy Comr 3rd class on Rs. 1000 from 1st Apr 1866; Rs. 1,333-5-4 from 1st May 1866 Dy Comr 2nd Cl on Rs. 1,666-10-8 from 20th May 1870; on furl from 1st Apr 1871 to 27th Oct 1872; Offg Addl Comr from 18th Sep to 12th Nov 1875; offg Comr and Supt from 16th Nov 1875 to 29th Feb 1876; offg Add Comr from 1st Mar 1876 to 6th Mar 1877; Dy Comr 1st class Rs. 1,833-5-4 from 1st Apr 1876; Comr and Supt Rs. 2,500 from 1st Apr 1877.

W. E. PURSER.—Arrd 21st Nov 1865; Asst Comr 3rd class 1st Jan 1866, Rs 450 from 24th Apr 1867, Rs 500 from 9th Apr 1868; offg Set Offr from 1st Apr 1870 Set Offr from 18th Apr 1872; from 15th Oct 1872; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 from 7th Apr 1873; on furl to Eng from 18th Jan 1875 to 14th Jan 1876.

C. M. RIVAZ.—Arrd 28th Nov 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class 9th Nov 1865 Rs 450 from 25th Apr 1866, Rs 500 from 8th June 1866, offg Judge of S C Court from 31st Mar to 21st June 1868; offg Dy Comr from 14th July to 13th Aug 1869; furl from 2nd May to 22nd Oct 1870; offg Under-Secy to Govt Punjab, from 21st Mar 1871; Asst Comr 2nd class, on Rs 700 from 8th Oct 1873; offg Secy to Govt Punjab, from 28th May to 18th Sept 1874; Under-Secy to Govt Punjab, from 17th Apr 1875; offg Secy to Govt Punjab from 26th Jan 1876; offg Supt Kapurthala State from 9th Feb 1876; confirmed from 2nd Apr 1877, Rs 1,666-10-8.

G. W. RIVAZ.—Arrd 29th Oct 1870; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 23rd May 1871, Rs 500 from 1st Apr 1872; leave to Engon private affairs from 28th Apr to 30th Oct 1873; Offg Regr Chief Court from 17th May to 29th July 1875; Offg Cant Magt from 7th Aug to 17th Sep 1875; offg Regr Chief Court from 6th to 31st Mar 1877; Reg Chief Court Rs. 1,250 from 1st Apr 1877.

F. A. ROBERTSON.—Arrd 14th Dec 1876; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 19th Dec 1877

C. A. ROE.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class 6th May 1864 Rs. 500 from 20th Apr 1865; offg Judge S C Court from 12th June 1867 to 20th Jan 1868 Offg Set offr from 1st Feb to 19th Apr 1868; Asst Set Offr Rs 700 from 20th Feb 1868; Offg Dy Comr from 15th Sep to 13th Oct 1868, and from 11th May to 21st June 1869; Asst

Comr 2nd class from 5th Nov 1869; sick leave to Eur from 22nd May to 19th Sep 1870; Asst Comr 2nd class Offg Set Offr from 21st Sep 1870 to 7th May 1871; from 5th Jan 1872 to 4th Mar 1874; Asst Comr 1st class, on Rs. 800 Offg set Offr from 5th Mar 1874.

T. ROBERTS.—Arrd 14th Nov 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class 8th Dec 1864; Rs. 450 from 21st Apl 1865; Rs. 500 from 23rd Oct 1866; offg Judge S C Court from 27th July to 14th Sept 1868; on sick leave to Eur from 19th Mar 1870 to 20th Oct 1871; offg Dy Comr from 5th Jan to 20th Mar 1872, Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 from 30th Apl 1872; offg Dy Comr from 8th June to 7th July 1873, Judl Asst Comr from 6th Oct 1875; on furl to Englpd on private affairs from 10th Apl 1876 to 3rd Jan 1877; Rs 1,000 from 13th Mar 1876; Asst Comr 2nd class and offid as Judl Asst Comr from 16th Jan to 6th Mar 1877; Judl Asst Comr 2nd gr Rs 1,000 from 7th Mar 1877; 1st gr on Rs 1,100 from 1st Apl 1877; offg Dy Comr from 1st Apl to 25th Oct 1877 and from 16th Nov 1877.

H. C. T. ROBINSON.—Arrd 18th Nov 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 14th May 1872; sick leave from 13th May to 29th June 1873; Rs 500 from 30th June 1873; sick leave from 24th Oct 1874 to 20th Feb 1875; from 5th to 7th Feb 1876, foom 6th to 12th Dec 1876, and from 31st Oct to 16th Nov 1877.

G. SMYTH.—Arrd 2nd Dec 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class 16th Jan 1866, Rs 500 from 25th Apl 1866; offg Dy Comr from 15th Sep to 15th Oct 1869, Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 from 25th May 1872; offg Dy Comr from 21st Aug to 20th Sep 1872; furl from 18th Nov 1872 to 17th Oct 1874; offg Regr Chief Court from 30 July 1875 to 28th Feb 1877; Asst Comr 1st class Rs 800 from 1st May 1876, Judl Asst Comr 3rd gr Rs 900 from 1st July 1876, 2nd gd Rs. 1,000 from 14th Mar 1877; 1st gr Rs. 1,100 from 1st Apl 1877; offg Dy Comr from 1st Mar 1877.

T. W. SMYTH.—Arrd 2nd Feb 1862; Asst Comr 3rd class 1st Oct 1862 Rs. 500 from 1st Apl 1863; offg Judge S C Court from 4th Mar to 30th June 1866; Judge of S C Court 4th class Rs. 600 from 1st July 1866; offg Dy Comr from 3rd Sep to 1st Oct 1866; Judge S C Court 3rd class Rs. 700 from 12th Nov 1866; offg Regr Chief Court from 12th June 1867 to 11th Oct 1869; Judge S C Court 2nd class Rs. 800 from 14th Feb 1869; Regr Chief Court, Rs. 1,250 from 12th Oct 1869; furl from 6th Mar 1870 to 1st Mar 1872; offg Dy Comr from 9th Apr 1872 to 4th Nov 1873; spl duty in the Chief Court from 11th Nov 1873 offg Dy Comr. from 17th Apl 1874 to 5th May 1875; offg Dy. Comr from 14th May 1875 to 31st Mar 1877; Dy Comr. 3rd class Rs. 1,333-54 from 1st Apr 1877.

J. W. SMYTH.—Arrd 29th Dec 1857; Asst Comr 3rd class June 1859; Rs. 500 from 19th Nov 1859; offg Perl Asst to Finl Comr from 2nd May to 15th July 1860; to Judl Comr from 17th June 1861 to 12th Mar 1862; Perl Asst to Judl Comr Rs. 700 from 13th Mar 1862; sick leave from 24th Nov 1863 to 10th Feb 1865; Regr Chief Court Rs. 1,250 from 19th Feb. 1866; offg Dy Comr from 31st July to 2nd Nov 1866, from 14th June to 24th July 1867, from 31st July 1867 to 19th July 1869; spl duty from 20th July to 11th Oct 1869; Dy Comr 3rd class Rs. 1,333-54 from 12th Oct 1869; furl from 19th Mar 1870 to 11th Jan 1872; offg Com and Sup from 11th Apl to 5th Nov 1872; on sick leave from 21st Apl to 14th Nov 1873; offg Addl Comr from 24th Mar 1874 to 13th Jan 1875; Dy Comr 2nd class on Rs 1,666-10-8 from 1st Jan 1875; offg Addl Comr from 5th Feb 1875 to 26th May 1877; Com 1st class Rs 1,833-5-4 from 1st Apl 1877; offg Judge Chief Court from 28th May to 14th Aug 1877; offg Addl Comr from 15th Aug to 8th Nov 1877; Judge of Chief Court from 9th Nov 1877.

G. L. SMITH.—Arrd 9th Nov 1871; Asst Comr. 3rd class Rs 450 from 16th May 1872 Rs 500 from 6th Dec 1872; trans to Bengal on famine duty from 29th Feb to 19th Sep 1874; offg Dy Comr from 25th June to 30th July 1877.

A. W. STOGDON.—Arrd 11th Nov 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class May 1865; Rs 450 from 25th Apl 1866, Rs 500 from 24th Apl 1877 1867; offg Dy Com from 15th Oct to 13th Dec 1869, from 5th Sept to 20th Oct 1870; offg Cant Magt from 5th Apl to 22nd Nov 1874; furl from 13th Feb 1875 to 10th Feb 1877; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 from 7th Mar 1877; offg Judl Comr from 10th Mar to 14th Aug 1877; Asst Comr 1st class Rs 800 from 16th Apl 1877; offg Dy Com from 15th Aug to 14th Oct 1877; Judl Asst Comr 3rd gr on Rs 900 per men from 29th Sept 1877.

J. G. SILCOCK.—Arrd 16th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 2nd June 1873, Rs 500 from 5th Dec 1873; offg Dy Comr from 20th Aug to 2nd Oct 1877.

H. W. STEEL.—Arrd 10th Nov 1862; Asst Comr 3rd class 22nd Feb 1864, from 21st Apl 1865; sick leave from 29th Apl 1867 to 30th Apl 1868; Rs. 500 from 19th July 1868;

offg Dy Comr from 13th Mar to 5th Apr 1870, from 5th to 25th Feb 1871, from 1st Mar to 4th May 1871, from 9th May to 3rd July 1871; furl from 1st Apr 1872 to 7th Dec 1873; at the disposal of P W D in connection with Punjab N State Railway from 1st July to 17th Aug 1874, from 28th Sep 1874 to 19th Apr 1875; offg Dy Comr from 8th Aug to 27th Sep 1874; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs. 700 from 20th Apr 1875; offg Judl Asst Comr from 13th Mar to 13th Dec 1876; ifg Dy Comr from 14th Dec. 1876 to 17th Jan 1877; offg Judl Asst Comr from 27th to Feb 24th Apr 1877.

E. B. STEEDMAN.—Arrd 31st Oct 1871; Assistant Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 27th May 1872, Rs. 500 from 5th Feb 1873; offg Dy Comr from 11th Apr to 6th May 1874; offg Asst Set Offr from 31st Mar to 28th July 1875; offg Set Offr from 29th July to 3rd Nov 1875; offg Asst Set Offr from 4th Nov to 6th Dec 1875 Offg Set Offr from 7th Dec 1875 to 15th Jan 1876; furl from 1st May to 2nd Nov 1876; offg Asst Set Offr from 16th Jan to 9th Apr 1876, from 11th Nov 1876; Asst Set Offr from 6th Apr 1877.

D. B. SINCLAIR.—Arrd 9th Nov 1872; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs. 450 from 2nd June 1873, Rs. 500 from 3rd Dec 1874; Offg Dy Comr from 2nd June to 3rd July 1876; on sick leave to Eng from 2nd May to 13th Dec 1877.

S. S. THORBURN.—Arrd 26th Nov 1864; Asst Comr 3rd class 1st May 1865; Rs 450 from 25th Apr 1866, Rs 500 from 24th Apr 1867; offg Dy Com from 24th Nov 1867 to 29th Jan 1868, from 1st June to 6th Aug 1868, from 25th Jan to 23rd Feb 1869, from 8th to 31st Mar 1869; leave on private affairs from 7th May to 29th Oct 1869; Offg Dy Com from 22nd Dec 1869 to 27th May 1870; Set Offr 3rd gr from 27th Mar 1872; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 per men from 5th Mar 1874; 1st class Rs 800 from 1st Apr 1877; Set Offr 2nd gr from 15th Oct 1877.

T. W. H. TOLBORT.—Arrd 12th Dec 1863; Asst Comr 3rd class 6th May 1864; Rs 500 from 21st Apr 1865; on sick leave from 30th Nov 1865 to 28th Nov 1866; Offg Judge S C Court from 1st July to 12th Dec 1867, from 16th Dec 1867 to 8th Jan 1868 from 2nd Mar to 27th July 1868; Offg Dy Comr from 28th July to 27th Sept 1868; Offg Judge S C Court from 28th Sept 1868 to 29th Jan 1869; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 from 1st May 1870; Offg Dy Com from 27th Sept to 22nd Oct 1870, from 11th Mar to 12th Apr 1871, from 18th Apr to 16th May 1871, from 3rd June 1871 to 23rd Jan 1872 from 26th Aug 1873 to 16th Jan 1875; Asst Com 1st class Rs 800 from 17th Jan 1875; Offg Dy Comr from 17th Jan 1875 to 29th Feb 1876; on furl to Eng from 29th Mar 1876 to 19th Mar 1878; Judl Asst Comr 3rd Gr from 14th Mar 1877 Dy Comr 3rd class Rs 1,333-5-4 from 21st Dec 1877 (while on furl).

H. St. G. TUCKER.—Arrd 3rd Dec 1865; Asst Comr 3rd class 1st June 1866 Rs 450 from 24th Apr 1867 Rs 500 from 24th July 1868; on spl leave from 24th Apr to 22nd Oct 1870; offg Set Offr from 1s Apr 1872 Set Offr from 5th Mar 1874; Asst Comr 2nd class Rs 700 per men from 19th June 1876.

F. St. G. de L. TUCKER.—Arrd 16th Nov 1876; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 19th Dec 1876.

C. L. TUPPER.—Arrd 1st Nov 1871; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 14th May 1872; offg Asst Set Offr from 14th Jan 1873 to 19th May 1874; Rs 500 from 27th Jan 1874; offg Under-Secy to Punjab Govt from 24th May to 18th Sep 1874 offg Asst Set Offr from 19th Sep 1874 to 11th Jan 1875; offg Set Offr from 12th Jan 1875; offg Under-Secy to Punjab Govt from 17th Aug 1875; on spl duty with the Maharajah of Patiala from 17th Nov 1875 offg Uuder-Secy to Punjab Govt from 27th Jan 1876 Under-Secy to Punjab Govt Rs 1,000 from 2nd Apr 1877.

R. G. THOMSON.—Arrd 14th Nov 1874; Asst Comr 3rd class Rs 450 from 13th Dec 1875 Rs 500 from 15th July 1876.

J. D. TREMLETT.—Arrd 17th Nov 1860; Asst Comr 3rd class 17th Feb 1862 Rs. 500 from 17th Apr 1863, Rs 600 from 17th Jan 1865; Asst Comr 2nd class on Rs 700 from 1st May 1866; fur from 28th Mar 1870 to 9th Mar 1872; Offg Dy Comr from 23rd Mar to 22nd Dec 1872; Asst Comr 1st class Rs 800 from 25th May 1872; Offg Dy Comr from 1st Mar 1873; Dy Comr 3rd class Rs 1333-5-4 from 2nd July 1876; 2nd class Rs 1666-10-8 from 1st Apr 1877; Offg Add Comr and Add Ses Judge from 6th Feb to 15th Apr 1873; Offg Add Comr from 16th Apr 1878.
