On furlough to Europe, from 30th March 1874 to 26th March 1876. Acting Judge, Court of Small Causes, Madura, 25th July 1876. Acting Special Assistant, during the Famine, Kurnool, 5th June 1877. Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Tanjore, but to continue to act Special Assistant, Kurnool, 23rd October 1877. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Kurnool, from 9th March to 3rd April 1878, 17th May 1878. Acting Judge, Court of Small Causes, Madura, from 22nd January to 31st March 1879, 31st December 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Bellary, from 6th April 1879. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Bellary, from 1st to 16th June 1879—24th June 1879.—12 years, 11 months, 6 days.

JOHN LEE-WARNER.

1864. Student at the College, 7th November 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Tinnevelly, 13th April 1866. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Madras District, 20th April 1866. Assistant Cantonment Magistrate, St. Thomas' Mount, 21st September 1866. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of South Arcot, 1st March 1867. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of South Arcot, 5th April 1867. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 13th August 1867. Assistant but Acting Head Assistant, North Arcot, 29th November 1867. On special duty in North Arcot, January 1868 and 22nd July 1868. Assistant to the Collector of Madras District, 27th November 1868. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Trichinopoly, from 28th March to 7th November 1869. Acting Cantonment Magistrate, Trichinopoly, from 31st March to 14th April 1869. Assistant to the Collector of North Arcot, 11th May 1869. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector of North Arcot, from 17th May 1869. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, North Arcot, from 29th May to 14th June 1869. Assistant Collector, South Canara, from 7th December 1869. Acting Senior Assistant Collector, Vizagapatam, from 7th February 1870. Acting Collector and Agent, but to continue to act as Senior Assistant, Vizagapatam, 8th November 1870. In charge of Principal Assistant's Office, Vizagapatam, from 13th February to 18th March 1871. Special Assistant, Madura, from 18th December 1871. On furlough to Europe from 20th April 1875 to 13th December 1876. Head Assistant, Malabar, Acting Principal Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, 12th February 1878. Acting Collector and Magistrate and Agent to the Governor, Vizagapatam, from 16th April 1879 to 25th September 1879, 25th April 1879. Temporary Joint Sessions Judge within the jurisdiction of the Government Agent, Vizagapatam—9th October 1879. Granted Furlough to Europe for 18 months—31st October 1879—13 years, 6 months, 1 day.

LEONARD ROBERT BURROWS, B.A.

1864. Student at the College, 7th November 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Madura, 7th November 1865. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Tanjore, from 28th February 1868. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Tanjore, from 27th July to 26th August 1869. Assistant Collector, but to continue to act as Head Assistant Collector, Tanjore, 8th November 1870. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate of Tanjore, from 18th October to 10th November 1871. Acting Head Assistant, Tanjore, from 17th November 1871 to 9th October 1872. On furlough to Europe, from 13th October 1872 to 18th October 1874. Assistant Collector, Tanjore, 19th October 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Madura, 27th October 1874. Acting Special Assistant, Madura, from 2nd April 1875. Acting President of Municipal Commission, Madras, 25th May 1875. President of the Municipal Commission, Madras—4th October 1878—13 years, 1 month, 19 days.

EDWARD TURNER.

1864. Student at the College, 20th November 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Kurnool, 13th April 1866. On sick leave to Bangalore, from 26th July to 20th September 1866. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Bellary, from 27th June to 29th August 1870, Assistant Collector, Godavery, 25th October 1870. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Kurnool, from 27th February 1871. In charge of Collector's Office, Kurnool, from 17th October to 17th November 1871 and from 4th to 26th March 1873. On furlough to Europe, from 9th April 1873 to 26th December 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Tinnevelly, 5th January 1875. Acting Special Assistant, Madura, 18th June 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Madura, without prejudice to his duties as Acting Special Assistant, Madura, 16th June 1876. Temporary Special Assistant, Madura, for State Relief operations, 9th January 1877. Special Assistant, Madura, 12th February 1878. In charge of the District of Madura, from 24th May to 17th June 1879—31st July 1879—13 years, 2 months, 28 days.

ROBERT RICE, B.A., LL.D.

1864. Student at the College, 28th December 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate Madras District, 12th January 1866. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, South Arcot, 6th April 1866. On furlough to Europe, on Medical Certificate, from 21st August 1863 to 6th November 1869. Assistant Collector, Bellary, 9th November 1869. In charge of Head Assistant Collector's Office, Bellary, from 22nd April to 11th May 1870. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Coimbatore, from 16th May 1870. Assistant, but to continue to act as Head Assistant Collector, Coimbatore, 8th November 1870 to 17th February 1871. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Coimbatore, from 8th March 1871. In charge of Sub Collector's Office, Coimbatore, from 15th May to 9th June 1871 and from 3rd April to 14th May 1873. Head Assistant, Coimbatore, from 4th September to 27th December 1873. Acting Assistant Commissioner, Nilgiris, from 30th December 1873 to 31st January 1874, and from 3rd to 18th February 1874. Acting Sub Collector, North Arcot, from 13th March to 23rd June 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Coimbatore, from 24th June to 2nd July 1874. Acting Sub Collector, Malabar, from 3rd July to 22nd October 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Coimbatore, from 23rd October 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Tinnevelly, from 25th August 1875. On furlough to Europe from 7th July 1876 to 9th September 1877. Acting Special Assistant, Bellary, for Famine purposes, 11th September 1877. Out of employ. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Bellary. Special Assistant for Famine duties, 6th January 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Bellary, from 3rd to 24th May 1878. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Bellary, from 22nd to 27th November 1878, 19th March 1879. On special duty in connection with the Irrigation and Canal Company, Kurnool and Cuddapah, 30th December 1878. Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Coimbatore, continuing on special duty, Irrigation and Canal Company, 21st January 1879. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Kistna, from 1st August 1879.—12 years, 8 months, 15 days.

EDWARD NOEL OVERBURY.

1864. Student at the College, 25th November 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Malabar, 7th November 1865. Acting Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Coimbatore, 27th July 1866. On sick leave, from 20th January to 13th May 1867. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Coimbatore, 30th April 1867. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Cuddapah, 17th September 1867. In charge of Sub Collector's Office, Cuddapah, from 6th to 21st Aug. 1868. Assistant Collector of Salem, 3rd November 1868. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Salem, from 13th February to 24th March 1869 and from 22nd June to 20th July 1869. Acting Head Assistant Collector of Salem, from 26th October to 31st December 1869 and from 7th March to 6th June 1870 and from 9th June 1870. In charge of Collector's Office, Salem, from 26th to 28th August 1870. In charge of Sub Collector's Office, Salem, from 29th August to 9th October 1870. Took charge of Head Assistant's Office, Salem, on 10th October 1870. In charge of Sub Collector's Office, from 8th to 25th November 1870. Resumed charge Head Assistant's Office on 20th December 1870. Acting Head Assistant, Salem, from 28th January 1871. On furlough to Europe, from 17th August 1871 to 5th November 1872. Acting Senior Assistant in Ganjam, 12th November 1872. On furlough to Europe, from 15th December 1873 to 23rd September 1877. Assistant and Acting Special Assistant, Chingleput, for Famine purposes, 25th September 1877. Senior Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Ganjam, Acting Sub Collector, Bellary, 7th May 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Malabar, 19th November 1878. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Malabar, from 5th May to 10th June 1879, 11th July 1879. Acting District and Session Judge, North Malabar, from 27th August to 18th September 1879.—9 years, 10 months, 16 days.

EDWARD GIBSON.

1864. Student at the College, 25th November 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Cuddapah, 23rd January 1866. Acting Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 27th July 1866. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 1st March 1867. On special duty in North Arcot, January 1868. Acting Head Assistant Collector of Bellary, from 24th July 1869. In charge of Sub Collector's Office, Bellary, from 15th April to 26th May 1870. Assistant, but to continue to act as Head Assistant Collector of Bellary,

8th November 1870. In charge of Sub Collector's Office, Bellary, from 9th to 30th July 1872. Acting Head Assistant, South Canara, from 12th November 1872. In charge Collector's Office, South Canara, from 18th September to 14th October 1874. Acting Collector and Magistrate, South Canara, from 12th October 1875 to 9th January 1876. Acting Sub Secretary Board of Revenue from 18th February to 4th November 1876. On special duty, Kurnool, 5th November 1876. Head Assistant, North Arcot, 19th March 1878. On furlough to Europe, from 8th April 1878 to 12th December 1879.—13 years, 5 months, 2 days.

ARTHUR JOHNSTON BREEKS ATKINSON.

1864. Student at the College, 13th October 1864. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Madras District, 6th March 1866. Services temporarily placed at the disposal of the Committee on Subsidiary Jails, 8th May 1867. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Madras, from 15th to 26th July 1869. Assistant Collector of Chingleput, 28th June 1870. To act as Cantonment Magistrate of Poonamallee, 15th July 1870. Acting Head Assistant Collector, North Arcot, from 14th March to 13th April 1871. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Salem, from 18th April to 3rd July 1871. Assistant Collector, South Arcot, from 10th July 1871. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Salem, from 14th August 1871. Acting Head Assistant, Cuddapah, from 22nd August 1872. On special leave from 4th to 27th June 1873. Acting Head Assistant, Cuddapah, from 28th June 1873. Acting Sub Collector, Cuddapah, from 20th May to 5th July 1875. On furlough to Europe from 20th December 1875 to 17th June 1877. Acting Head Assistant, Nellore, 19th June 1877. Acting Sub Collector, Cuddapah, 5th March 1878. Head Assistant, but to continue to act as Sub Collector, Cuddapah, 19th March 1878. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Cuddapah, from 19th August to 23rd October 1878—15th November 1878.—13 years, 7 months, 27 days.

ARUNDEL TAGG ARUNDEL, B.A.

1865. Student at the College, 18th November 1865. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 24th July 1866. Acting Head Assistant Collector, North Arcot, from 29th February to 21st March 1868. On special duty, South Arcot, June 1868. Assistant Collector, South Arcot, from 9th July 1868. Assistant Collector, Tanjore, from 12th October 1868. Acting Head Assistant Collector of Cuddapah, from 14th April to 5th July 1870. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Tinnevelly, from 8th February 1871 to 18th October 1877. Additional Sub-Collector, Tinnevelly, from 16th September 1872. Private Secretary to the Honorable the Governor from 1st July to 22nd November. Reverted to former appointment, 22nd November 1875. On furlough to Europe from 23rd April 1876 to 18th October 1877. Head Assistant, Kistna, Acting Deputy Director Revenue Settlement, 2nd April 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Coimbatore, from 23rd September 1879. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Coimbatore from 22nd September to 11th October 1879.—12 years, 7 months, 18 days.

WILLIAM JOSEPH HENRY LEFANU, (Barrister-at-Law.)

1865. Student at the College, 28th October 1865. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Trichinopoly, 16th October 1866. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Madura, 23rd May 1867. Acting Head Assistant Collector of Tinnevelly, from 3rd August to 29th September 1869. On furlough to Europe from 30th September 1869 to 19th March 1872. Assistant Collector of Chingleput, from 12th April 1872. Acting Head Assistant Collector of Salem, from 28th May 1872. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Salem, from 25th March to 3rd April 1873. Acting Sub-Collector, Chingleput, from 29th April to 15th July 1874. Acting Sub-Collector, South Arcot, from 23rd August to 1st October 1874. Head Assistant, Tinnevelly, 19th March 1878. Acting Sub-Collector, Salem—2nd August 1878. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Salem, from 24th December 1878 to 8th January 1879.—11 years, 8 months, 14 days.

CHARLES DONALD MACLEAN, B.A.

1865. Student at the College, 19th December 1865. Acting Inspector of Schools, Second Division, 9th October 1866. Assistant Collector, Madras District, 24th December 1867. On special duty, Madras District, January 1868. Acting Cantonment Magistrate, Saint Thomas' Mount, from 23rd September to 16th November 1868. Assistant Collector, Coimbatore, 19th January 1869. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Coimbatore, from 15th March to 29th April 1870. Acting Under-Secretary to Government, Public, &c., Departments, from 4th May to 12th June 1870. Acting Under-Secretary to Government, Revenue Department, from 12th January 1871. To be Assistant Collector, Chingleput, but to continue to act as Under-Secretary to Government, Revenue Department, 7th February 1871. Gave over charge of Under-Secretaryship on 14th February 1871. Acting Under-Secretary to Government, Revenue Department, from 15th March to 11th April 1871. On furlough to Europe, from 15th May 1871 to 7th June 1875. Assistant Collector, Chingleput, 15th June 1875. Acting Under-Secretary to Government, Public Department, 16th June 1875. Acting Canarese Translator to Government, 15th June 1875. On special duty, Madras, 14th November 1876. Temporary Additional Sub Secretary, Board of Revenue, 20th February 1877. Acting Assistant Commissioner, Nilgiri Hills, 29th January 1878. Head Assistant, South Arcot, but to continue to act as Sub Collector, Godavari, 27th August 1878. On special duty of preparing the Annual Administration Report of the Madras Presidency for

1877-78, 24th September 1878. Acting Under-Secretary to Government, Revenue Department, 12th December 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Salem, 1st April 1879. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Salem, from 7th June to 2nd July 1879, 18th July 1879. Acting Sub Collector and Joint Magistrate, South Arcot, from 7th to 31st July 1879. Acting Sub-Secretary, Board of Revenue, from 5th August to 15th September 1879. On furlough to Europe, from 16th September 1879.—9 years, 8 months, 3 days.

EVANS CHARLES JOHNSON.

1867 Arrived 29th November 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Vizagapatam, 24th December 1867. In charge of Principal Assistant Collectors's Office, Vizagapatam, from 4th January to 6th February 1869. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, 31st May 1870. In charge of Principal Assistant's Office, Vizagapatam, from 1st to 13th February 1871. Acting Senior Assistant, Vizagapatam, from 13th February to 16th May 1871. In charge of Senior Assistant Collector's Office, Vizagapatam, from 1st December 1871 to 8th January 1872. To be Assistant Collector of Kistna, 5th December 1871. Acting Head Assistant, Kistna, from 29th April to 25th June 1872. Acting Head Assistant of Tinnevelly, from 28th September 1872. Assistant, but Acting Special Assistant, Vizagapatam, from 24th April 1873. On furlough to Europe, from 19th July 1875 to 10th July 1877. Acting Head Assistant, Malabar, 17th July 1877. Acting Assistant Commissioner Nilgiris, from 3rd February to 10th March 1878. Acting Commissioner, Nilgiris, from 11th to 18th March 1878. Acting Sub-Collector, Godavari, 25th June 1878. Head Assistant, Salem, but to continue to act as Sub-Collector, Godavari—4th October 1878. On special duty—30th July 1879.—10 years, 20 days.

FREDERICK EDWARD GIBSON.

1867. Arrived 29th November 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, North Arcot, 24th December 1867. Assistant Collector of South Arcot, 15th September 1868. On furlough from 23rd October 1869 to 23rd April 1870. Assistant Collector, North Arcot, 26th April 1870. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, North Arcot, from 19th January to 8th February 1871. On furlough to Europe, from 22nd April 1871 to 5th November 1872. Assistant Collector of Coimbatore, 5th November 1872. Assistant, but Acting Head Assistant, Kistna, from 2nd April 1873. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Kistna, from 26th July 1873. On special leave to Europe, from 29th January to 27th July 1875. Assistant Collector, but Acting Head Assistant Collector, South Arcot, 30th July 1875. On furlough to Europe, from 10th April 1876 to 17th December 1877. Assistant Collector, North Arcot, 8th January 1878. Acting Sub Collector, Tinnevelly, 5th March 1878. Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Madura, continuing to act as Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Tinnevelly, 11th July 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector and District Magistrate, Tinnevelly—23rd December 1879.—7 years, 9 months, 19 days.

CHARLES LENNOX BRUCE CUMMING, F.R.G.S.

1867 Arrived 29th November 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Godavery District, 24th December 1867. Assistant Collector, Kistna District, 9th March 1869. In charge of Head Assistant Collector's Office, from 7th September to 6th October 1871. Assistant Collector of Kurnool, 14th November 1871. Acting Head Assistant Collector of Kurnool, from 6th April to 8th June 1872, and from 28th March to 2nd April 1873. Assistant Collector, Malabar, 13th June 1873. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant, North Arcot, 3rd February 1874. Acting Sub-Collector, North Arcot, from 10th to 15th August 1874. On furlough to Europe, from 8th February 1876 to 4th November 1878. Assistant Collector, Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Nellore, 19th November 1878. On furlough to Europe, from 29th August 1879.—9 years, 2 days.

THOMAS WEIR, B.A.

1867. Arrived 8th December 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Coimbatore, 24th December 1867. Assistant Collector, Madras, 19th January 1869. Services placed at the disposal of the Public Works Commission, 13th March 1869. To be Assistant Collector, Bellary, 12th October 1869. Deputy Registrar, High Court, Appellate side, from 14th January 1870. Acting Registrar, High Court, Appellate side, from 23rd June 1871 to 24th June 1872. Assistant Collector, but to act as Head Assistant of Nellore, 21st June 1872. Acting Registrar, High Court, Appellate side, 10th March 1874. Acting Tamil Translator to Government, 20th September 1878. Tamil Translator to Government—28th January 1879.—12 years 24 days.

CHARLES KOUGH, B.A.

1867. Arrived 8th December 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Salem, 24th December 1867. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Salem, from 31st August to 9th October 1870. Assistant Collector and Magistrate of Chingleput, from 16th January 1871. Assistant Collector and Magistrate of South Arcot, 17th August 1871. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, South Arcot, from 6th November to 13th December 1871. Acting Head Assistant, South Arcot, from 8th July to 14th October 1872 and from 28th June 1873. Acting Sub-Collector, Bellary, from 16th July to 4th October 1874. On furlough to Europe from 20th June 1875.

to 19th November 1877. Out of Employ. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Godavari, 20th November 1877. Acting Sub Collector, Kistna, 5th February 1878. Assistant Collector, Acting Sub-Collector, Madura, 4th October 1878. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Madura, from 18th to 23rd June 1879—18th July 1879. Acting Head Assistant, Madura—25th November 1879.—9 years, 7 months, 15 days.

THOMAS JAMES MALTBY.

1867. Arrived 29th November 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Madras District, 24th December 1867. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, from 13th May 1868. In charge of Head Assistant Collector's Office, Trichinopoly, from 30th January to 16th February 1871. Assistant Collector, Ganjam, 7th December 1870. In charge of Senior Assistant's Office, Ganjam, from 16th March. Acting Senior Assistant, Ganjam, 18th April 1871. On special leave for 6 months to Europe, from 29th August 1871 to 1st March 1872. Acting Senior Assistant, Ganjam, from 17th July 1872. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Ganjam, from 10th September to 30th November 1872. Acting Senior Assistant, Ganjam, 25th November 1873. Assistant Collector, Godaveri. Acting Head Assistant, Godaveri, 29th March 1876. On special duty, Ganjam, 10th June 1876. Acting Head Assistant, Godaveri, from 24th October 1876. On furlough to Europe, from 19th January 1877, to 30th December 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Kistna, 7th January 1879. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Kistna, from 26th April to 24th June 1879—27th June 1879. Acting Principal Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent to the Governor, Ganjam, from 17th July 1879. Assistant Collector and Acting Senior Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, 14th November 1879.—9 years, 7 months, 18 days.

FIFTH CLASS UNDER 12 YEARS' STANDING.

HUBERT THOMAS KNOX, (Barrister-at-Law.)

1868. Arrived 4th December 1868. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Salem, 15th December 1868. In charge of Salem Collectorate, from 18th to 21st March 1873. Acting Head Assistant, North Arcot, from 3rd September 1873. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant, Malabar, 10th March 1874. Acting Assistant Commissioner, Nilgiri Hills, 1st February 1876. On furlough to Europe, from 26th February 1878.—9 years, 2 months, 22 days

HENRY RICHARD FARMER.

1868. Arrived 4th December 1868. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Coimbatore, 15th December 1868. Assistant Collector, Bellary, from 3rd May 1870. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Bellary, from 19th May to 18th June 1870. Assistant Collector and Magistrate of Chingleput, from 10th January 1871. Acting Head Assistant of North Arcot, from 10th May to 12th July 1872. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Chingleput, from 5th to 29th August 1872. Assistant but Acting Head Assistant, Kurnool, 10th April 1873. On furlough to Europe, from 16th June 1877 to 27th June 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, and Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, North Arcot, from 7th July 1879. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Chingleput, from 4th August 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Chingleput—31st October 1879.—9 years, 16 days.

LEWIS McIVER.

1868. Arrived 21st November 1868. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Madras District, 1st December 1868. Assistant Collector, South Canara, from 14th April 1870. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, South Canara, from 14th January to 2nd March 1871 and from 27th October to 31st December 1871 and from 9th March to 9th April 1872 and from 16th April to 16th May 1872. Acting Head Assistant of South Canara, from 24th August 1872. Services placed at disposal of the Government of India for employment in British Burmah—Assistant Commissioner, 3rd Grade, but officiating 2nd Grade, from 25th January to 11th August 1873. Officiating Assistant Commissioner 1st Grade from 12th August to 13th September 1873. Officiating Town Magistrate 2nd Grade from 14th September to 7th December 1873. Officiating Assistant Commissioner 1st Grade from 8th December 1873 to 7th February 1874. Officiating Assistant Secretary to Chief Commissioner from 15th February to 3rd September 1874. Assistant Commissioner 2nd Grade, continuing to act as Assistant Secretary to Chief Commissioner from 4th September to 19th December 1874. Officiating Assistant Secretary to Chief Commissioner and Superintendent of Emigration from 20th December 1874 to 19th February 1875. Officiating Assistant Secretary to Chief Commissioner, from 20th Feb. to 24th March 1875. Officiating Town Magistrate 2nd Grade and President of the Rangoon Municipality from 25th March 1875 to 19th June 1876. Services replaced at disposal of the Madras Government. On Special duty in connection with the preparation of

Part I of the "Imperial Gazetteer," Madras—22nd September 1876. Officiating Assistant to the Commissioner of Nilgiri Hills, without prejudice to his special duty, from 9th September to 8th November 1877. On furlough to Europe, from 8th April 1878 to 2nd November 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate Chingleput but to act temporarily as Deputy Commissioner of Salt Revenue, Northern Division—5th November 1879.—9 years, 6 months, 15 days.

JAMES ACWORTH DAVIES (Barrister-at-Law.)

1868. Arrived 3rd January 1869. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Tinnevelly, 1st January 1868. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Tinnevelly, from 20th to 22nd April 1870. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Tinnevelly, from 17th November to 18th December 1870 and from 20th January to 7th February 1871. Assistant Collector, Madura, from 1st July 1871. Assistant Collector of Tanjore, from 13th February 1872. Assistant Collector of Bellary, from 15th June 1872. Acting Head Assistant, Bellary, from 16th June 1873. Assistant, Acting Head Assistant, Tinnevelly, 23rd June 1876. On furlough to Europe, from 25th August 1878 to 3rd December 1879. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant Collector District Magistrate and Governor Agent, Godaveri, 9th December 1879.—9 years, 8 months, 20 days.

MATTHEW RICHARD WELD, B.A.

1868. Arrived 21st November 1868. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of South Canara, 1st December 1869. Assistant Collector, Bellary, from 23rd August 1870. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Bellary, from 3rd to 10th March 1871. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Bellary, from 26th September to 16th October 1871. Assistant Collector of Tanjore, from 9th May 1872. Acting Head Assistant, Tanjore, from 21st November to 9th December 1872 and from 8th June 1873. On furlough to Europe, from 13th October 1876 to 13th August 1877. Assistant, Acting Special Assistant, Chingleput, for Famine purposes, 14th Aug. 1877. Acting Sub-Collector, Chingleput, 24th June 1878. Furlough to Europe, from 20th November 1879.—10 years, 3 months, 1 day.

ROBERT SEWELL.

1868. Arrived 19th December 1868. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 2nd December 1868. On leave to Europe, from 21st March to 18th November 1869. In charge of Collector's Office, North Arcot, from 29th February to 10th March 1872. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, North Arcot, from 28th April to 9th May 1872. Assistant Collector, Godavery, 4th March 1873. Acting Head Assistant, Godavery, 3rd March 1874. Acting Sub Collector and Joint Magistrate, Godavery, from 1st to 13th April 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Kistna, 15th December 1874. Acting Sub-Collector, Kistna, from 3rd August 1875 to 11th March 1876. Acting Special Assistant, Trichinopoly, for Famine purposes, 9th October 1877. Acting Head Assistant, Kistna, 15th January 1878. Acting Sub-Collector, Kistna, from 18th October 1878 to 12th January 1879—4th October 1878. Acting Head Assistant, Kistna, from 18th January to 11th April 1879—On furlough to Europe, from 22nd April 1879—25th April 1879.—9 years, 8 months, 5 days.

HENRY MARTIN WINTERBOTHAM.

1869. Arrived 19th November 1869. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Coimbatore, 7th December 1869. Assistant Collector, Malabar, from 9th June 1870. In charge of Sub-Collector's Office, Malabar, from 20th to 25th November 1871. Acting Head Assistant, Malabar, from 12th August 1872 to 13th February 1873, and from 13th May 1873. Acting Special Assistant, Malabar, 23rd February 1875. Acting Malayalam Translator to Government, 13th March 1877. On furlough to Europe, from 30th June 1878.—8 years, 7 months, 11 days.

GORDON THOMSON MACKENZIE.

1869. Arrived 19th November 1869. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Nellore, 30th November 1869. Assistant Collector, Cuddapah, 10th January 1871. Acting Head Assistant, Cuddapah, from 26th November to 20th December 1871. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Cuddapah, from 2nd to 16th February 1872. Assistant Collector, Nellore, from 15th April 1872. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Nellore, from 18th May to 26th June 1872. Acting Head Assistant, Nellore, 10th March 1874. Acting Sub-Collector, Nellore, from 9th April to 30th June 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Coimbatore, 14th August 1875. Assistant Collector, but to continue to act as Head Assistant, Coimbatore, 30th July 1875. On furlough to Europe, from 22nd April 1878.—8 years, 5 months, 3 days.

WILLIAM ALEXANDER WILLOCK, B.A.

1869. Arrived 12th March 1870. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Vizagapatam, 12th April 1870. Assistant Collector, Chingleput, 25th October 1870. Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, 10th January 1871. Acting Senior Assistant, Vizagapatam from 4th May to 18th July 1872 and from 27th July 1873. Acting Senior Assistant, Vizagapatam, 25th August 1874. Acting Senior Assistant, Vizagapatam, 16th March 1875. On Special duty, Salt Commission, from 10th January to 25th September 1876. Acting Prin-

clpal Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, from 7th to 21st March 1878, 16th April 1878. Deputy Commissioner, Salt Revenue, Northern Division, 21st February 1879. In charge of Principal Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent's Division, Vizagapatam, and employed in suppressing the disturbances in the Gudum Hills — 19th May 1879. — 9 years, 9 months, 20 days.

LEWIS MOORE.

1869. Arrived 7th November 1869. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, 7th December 1869. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, from 30th September to 7th October 1871, and from 5th to 18th April 1872 and from 12th July to 1st August 1872. Acting Head Assistant, Trichinopoly, from 4th May 1873 to 23rd November 1874. Acting Collector, Trichinopoly, from 18th to 21st July 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Madura, from 8th April 1875. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, 1st December 1875. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, from 26th to 30th October 1876, 17th November 1876. In charge of Cantonment Magistrate's Office, Trichinopoly, from 16th May to 4th June 1877, 24th May 1877. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, from 1st to 25th June 1878 — 9th August 1878. On furlough to Europe, from 8th April 1879 — 8th April 1879. — 9 years, 5 months, 1 day.

FREDERICK AUGUSTUS NICHOLSON.

1869. Arrived 4th December 1869. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, South Arcot, 14th December 1869. Assistant Collector, Tanjore, from 15th January 1870. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Tanjore, from 7th October to 17th November 1871. Assistant Collector, Madura, from 10th February 1872. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Madura, from 16th August to 18th September 1872. Assistant Collector, Kurnool, 27th October 1874. On furlough to Europe from 5th January to 24th December 1875. Assistant Collector, South Arcot, 4th January 1876. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant, Madura, 18th January 1876. Acting Sub Collector and Joint Magistrate, Madura, from 22nd July to 14th October 1876. Acting Head Assistant, Salem, 2nd August 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Coimbatore, from 10th March to 22nd September 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Coimbatore, from 23rd September 1879. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate Salem, 2nd December 1879. — 9 years, 1 month, 8 days.

WALTER GREGORY UNDERWOOD.

1870. Arrived 17th September 1870. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Coimbatore, 4th October 1870. Assistant Collector, Malabar, from 9th September 1872. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Malabar, from 3rd to 12th May 1873. Assistant Collector, Coimbatore, 13th June 1873. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Coimbatore, from 26th July to 4th September 1873, and from 27th December 1873 to 26th February 1874 and from 7th November 1874. Assistant Collector, Malabar, 9th February 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Malabar, 23rd March 1875. Acting Special Assistant, Malabar, from 23rd February to 5th March 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Nellore, 6th July 1875. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Nellore, 4th October 1875. Acting Sub Collector, Nellore, 15th October 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Nellore, 15th December 1875. On furlough to Europe, from 2nd June 1877 to 23rd January 1878. Acting Head Assistant, Malabar, 5th February 1878. Acting Special Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Malabar, 13th September 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Malabar, from 11th May to 10th June 1879, and from 27th August to 19th September 1879. — 8 years, 7 months, 22 days.

ARTHUR FREDERICK COX.

1871. Arrived 3rd November 1871. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 7th November 1871. Assistant Collector of Godavery, from 27th August 1872. In charge of Head Assistant's Office, Godavery, from 28th November to 11th December 1872. Assistant Collector, North Arcot, from 24th March 1873. Acting Head Assistant, South Arcot, 31st March 1874. Acting Head Assistant, North Arcot, 23rd March 1875. On special duty in the Districts of Madura and Trichinopoly in connection with the approaching visit of His Royal Highness the Prince of Wales, 22nd November 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Trichinopoly, from 27th November to 13th December 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Madura, from 15th December 1875. Acting Head Assistant, North Arcot, from 24th January 1876. Assistant, Acting Head Assistant, Bellary, from 6th January 1877, 27th December 1876. Assistant Collector and Acting Head Assistant Collector, North Arcot, 20th February 1877. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, North Arcot, from 24th September to 30th December 1878, from 4th May to 6th July 1879, from 1st to 4th August and from 6th August to 5th November 1879. — 8 years, 1 month, 28 days.

JAMES THOMSON, M. A.

1871. Arrived 24th November 1871. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of South Arcot, 28th November 1871. Acting Head Assistant, Salem, 1st May to 8th October 1874. Acting Head Assistant, South Arcot, 1st February to 9th March 1875. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Salem, from 31st March to 3rd June 1875. Acting Head Assistant Collector, South Arcot, from 4th June to 7th September 1875. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Cuddapah, from

21st December 1875. Acting Sub Collector, Cuddapah, from 29th February to 2nd March 1876. Acting Head Assistant Collector, South Arcot, from 1st April 1876. Acting Sub Collector, South Arcot, from 9th September to 2nd October 1876, from 7th to 29th May 1877,

GABRIEL STOKES, B.A.

1871. Arrived 28th October 1871. Placed under the orders of the Collector of Belgaum, from 28th October 1871 to 14th April 1872. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Belgaum, from 15th April to 30th November 1872. Services placed at the disposal of the Government of Madras, 1st December 1872. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of South Canara, 5th November 1872. Temporary Additional Under-Secretary to Government in the Revenue (Famine) Department, from 8th May 1877 to 16th April 1879, 25th April 1877. Transferred to the Madras Civil Establishment, 11th September 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Coimbatore, from 21st July 1879. On special duty preparing the Madras Administration Report for 1878-79 from 18th September 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the Coimbatore District, without prejudice to his present appointments, 2nd December 1879.—8 years, 1 month, 4 days.

EBENEZER JAMES SEWELL.

1872. Arrived 1st November 1872. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Cuddapah, 12th November 1872. Assistant Collector, Chingleput, from 3rd July 1873. Assistant Collector, Madura, 24th March 1874. Assistant, Acting Head Assistant, Malabar, 1st February 1876. Acting Special Assistant, Cuddapah, for Famine purposes, 7th August 1877. Special Assistant, North Arcot, Famine duty, 20th December 1877. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Malabar, from 21st September 1878.—7 years, 2 months.

GEORGE STUART FORBES, M.A.

1872. Arrived 16th October 1872. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of North Arcot, 29th October 1872. Assistant Collector, Tanjore, 28th October 1873. Acting Head Assistant, Tanjore, from 15th September to 24th November 1875. Assistant and Acting Senior Assistant and Agent, Ganjam, from 28th April 1876. Acting Principal Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Ganjam, from 17th May to 25th June 1877, and from 27th November to 20th December 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Nellore, 29th August 1879. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Nellore, from 1st to 7th November 1879—15th September 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the Nellore District without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December, 1879.—7 years, 2 months, 16 days.

RALPH SELLERY BENSON, B.A., L.L.B.

1873. Arrived 29th October 1873. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Salem, 18th November 1873. Acting Head Assistant, Salem, 29th June 1875. Assistant, Acting Head Assistant, Cuddapah, from 8th May 1876. Acting Assistant Commissioner, Nilgiris, 25th June 1878. Acting Commissioner, Nilgiris, from 24th February to 23rd March 1879—8th June 1879.—6 years, 2 months, 3 days.

HENRY THOMAS ROSS, M.A., LL.B.

1873. Arrived 26th October 1873. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Bellary, 4th November 1873. Acting Head Assistant, Bellary, 1st June 1875. Acting Sub Collector, Bellary, from 1st April to 2nd May 1876. Acting Head Assistant, Bellary, 20th February 1877. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Bellary, from 9th to 16th June 1879, and from 10th July to 16th October 1879.—6 years, 2 months, 6 days.

EGERTON EDWARD SPENCER.

1873. Arrived 31st October 1873. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Chingleput, 4th November 1873. Acting Sub Collector, Chingleput, from 12th July to 12th August 1875. Assistant, Acting Head Assistant, Tanjore, from 30th September 1876. On Special duty, Cuddapah, 24th October 1876. In charge of the district of Tanjore, from 1st to 6th April 1878, 26th July 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Tanjore, from 7th April to 24th May 1878, and from 16th August to 5th December 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector, South Canara, from 23rd March 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, South Canara, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879.—6 years, 2 months, 1 day.

SYDENHAM HENRY WYNNE, B.A.

1873. Arrived 21st October 1873. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Trichinopoly, 4th November 1873. Acting Head Assistant, Trichinopoly, from 18th to 26th November 1875 and from 7th June to 3rd September 1876. On Special duty, Trichinopoly. Acting Head Assistant, South Canara, 1st May 1877. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, from 31st March 1879. Acting Collector and Magistrate, Trichinopoly, from 19th April to 6th May, and from 17th to 27th May, 1879.—6 years, 2 months, 11 days.

WILLIAM JACOB TATE.

1874. Arrived 25th November 1874. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of the District, Godavery, 1st December 1874. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate Kistna, March 1877. Acting Head Assistant, Godavari, 2nd August 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Kurnool, from 12th March 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Kurnool, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879.—5 years, 1 month, 6 days.

GEORGE WILLIAM FAWCETT.

1874. Arrived 6th November 1874. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Kistna, 10th November 1874. Acting Head Assistant, Kurnool, 12th May 1877. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Tanjore, from 14th March 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Tanjore, without prejudice to his present appointments, 2nd December 1879.—5 years, 1 month, 25 days.

PIERCE WILLIAM MOORE.

1874. Arrived 18th October 1874. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Agent to the Governor of Fort St. George in Ganjam, 27th October 1874. Assistant Collector, Kistna, 12th February 1878. Acting Head Assistant, Nellore, 5th March 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Nellore, from 9th October to 5th December 1878, and from 16th August to 25th September 1879. Acting Senior Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Ganjam—29th August 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Ganjam, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879.—5 years, 2 months, 14 days.

JAMES HENRY APPERLEY TREMENHERE.

1875. Arrived 23rd November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of the District, North Arcot, 1st December 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Coimbatore, 26th March 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Bellary, from 4th August to 11th September 1879. Acting Special Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, from 1st October 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Vizagapatam, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879.—4 years, 1 month, 8 days.

JOHN DAVID REES.

1875. Arrived 10th November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Agent to the Governor of Fort Saint George in Vizag, 16th November 1875. Assistant Collector and Magistrate Chingleput, 14th June 1878. Acting Head Assistant, Tinnevelly—9th August 1878. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Tinnevelly, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879.—4 years, 1 month, 21 days.

FRANCIS HENRY HEBBERT.

1875. Arrived 23rd November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of the District, South Canara, 1st December 1875. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, South Canara, 5th March 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Madura, from 14th October 1878. Assistant Collector and District Magistrate, Madura—2nd December 1879.—4 years, 1 month, 8 days.

WALTER MILLER THORBURN, B.A.

1875. Arrived 26th November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of the District, Kurnool, 1st December 1875. On furlough from 15th April to 13th August 1876. Acting Head Assistant, Kistna, 4th October 1878. Acting Head Assistant, Collector and Magistrate, Kistna, from 24th January to 4th March 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Godavari District from 5th March 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District Godavari, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879—3 years, 9 months, 6 days.

ARTHUR HENRY TEMPLE MARTINDALE.

1875. Arrived 10th November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Coimbatore, 16th November 1875. Services placed at the disposal of the Government of India for employment in the Foreign Department, 23rd October 1877. Junior Attaché, Foreign Department 7th November 1877. On furlough to Europe, from 14th June 1878 to 11th March 1879. Senior Attaché, Foreign Department, 8th March 1879. Officiating Political Agent, 3rd Class, and Assistant Secretary to the Government of India in the Foreign Department, from 9th September to 12th October 1879. Replaced at disposal of Madras Government, from 13th October 1879. Special leave to Europe, from 13th October to 29th December 1879. Assistant Collector and District Magistrate, Tanjore from 13th October 1879—9th December 1879.—3 years, 2 months, 9 days

HORACE HANDLEY O'FARRELL.

1875. Arrived 23rd November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of the District, Cuddapah, 1st December 1875. On special leave from 3rd February to 7th March 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Tinnevelly, 1st February 1876. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Tanjore, 4th September 1877. Assistant, Acting Head Assistant, Cuddapah, 8th January and 2nd April 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Salem, from 4th July 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Salem, without prejudice to his present appointments—2nd December 1879.—4 years, 12 days.

GUY FRANCIS THOMAS POWER.

1875. Arrived 23rd November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of the District, Nellore, 1st December 1875. Acting Head Assistant, Kurnool, 12th November 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Malabar, 18th February 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, North Arcot, 25th April 1879. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant Collector, North Arcot, 11th July 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector, South Arcot, 18th July 1879. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, South Arcot, from 2nd to 30th August 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Tinnevelly, 25th November 1879.—4 years, 1 month, 8 days.

JAMES PAULL FIDDIAN.

1875. Arrived 13th November 1875. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Malabar, 16th November 1875. Assistant Collector, Tanjore, 14th May 1878. In charge of Office of Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Tanjore, on 1st October 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Tanjore, from 15th to 22nd Feb 1879, Acting Head Assistant Collector, Salem, from 4th March to 9th April 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Kistna, from 21st April 1879. Acting Sub-Collector, Kistna, from 28th June to 31st July 1879. Posted as an Assistant in the District, Kistna, without prejudice to his present appointments.—2nd December 1879.—4 years, 1 month, 18 days.

ARTHUR THOMPSON, M.A.

1876. Arrived 20th November 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Chingleput, 21st November 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Assistant, Vizagapatam, 14th June 1878. Acting Senior Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam, from 5th March to 8th October 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Ganjam—12th September 1879.—3 years, 1 month, 11 days.

PULICAT RATNAVELU CHETTI, B.A.

1876. Arrived 24th December 1876. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Salem, 2nd January 1877. Assistant Collector, Chingleput, 9th August 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, North Arcot, from 9th August 1879. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Malabar, 2nd December 1879.—3 years, 1 month, 8 days.

WILLIAM HENRY WELSH.

1876. Arrived 20th November 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Salem, 20th November 1876. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Salem, from 16th April to 3rd July 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, North Arcot, and Acting Head Assistant, North Arcot—23rd September 1879.—3 years, 1 month, 11 days.

THOMAS MENDELSSOHN HORSFALL.

1876. Arrived 5th December 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Madura, 5th December 1876. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Madura, from 15th to 26th July 1878. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Madura, from 2nd to 30th October 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Madura, from 4th March to 3rd June 1879—3 years, 27 days.

ALFRED WILLIAM BUCKLE HIGGINS.

1876. Arrived 6th December 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of South Arcot, 12th December 1876. Transferred temporarily to Cuddapah, for Famine purposes, 24th July 1877. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Cuddapah, 19th November 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Cuddapah, from 25th March 1879.—3 years, 26 days.

EDWARD SIDNEY LAFFAN.

1876. Arrived 22nd November 1876. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate of Tanjore, 28th November 1876. Transferred temporarily to Cuddapah, for Famine purposes, 24th July 1877. Assistant Collector, North Arcot, (temporarily) 12th February 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, North Arcot, from 3rd October 1878 to 8th January 1879, and from 4th May to 7th June 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Kurnool, from 18th June 1879. Assistant and Acting Head Assistant Collector, Nellore—15th September 1879.—3 years, 1 month, 9 days.

VERNOR ALEXANDER BRODIE.

1877. Arrived 6th January 1878. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Malabar, 8th January 1878. Acting Special Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Malabar, from 11th May to 10th June 1879, and from 25th August to 30th September 1879.—1 year, 11 months, 26 days.

JOHN WILLOUGHBY FRANCIS DUMERGUE.

1877. Arrived 23rd December 1877. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, South Arcot, 5th January 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector and Magistrate, South Arcot, 18th March 1879. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, South Arcot, from 27th May to 9th June 1879. Acting Head Assistant, South Arcot, from 1st August to 9th September 1879.—2 years, 9 days.

SAMUEL RUSSELL, B.A.

1877. Arrived 7th November 1877. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Coimbatore, 13th November 1877. Acting Head Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Coimbatore, from 13th December 1878 to 8th January 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Tanjore—4th March 1879.—2 years, 1 month, 24 days.

WILLIAM CUTHBERT HOLMES, B.A.

1877. Arrived 7th November 1877. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Godavari—13th November 1877.—2 years, 1 month, 24 days.

ROBERT WATSON FRAZER, B.A.

1877. Arrived 7th November 1877. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Ganjam, 13th November 1877. Acting Senior Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Ganjam, from 26th November to 22nd December 1878, and from 1st April to 3rd July 1879. Assistant and Acting Senior Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam—12th September 1879.—2 years, 1 month, 24 days.

FRANCIS D'ARCY OSBORNE WOLFE-MURRAY.

1877. Arrived 19th December 1877. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate and Assistant, Vizagapatam, 8th January 1878. Furlough to Europe for 1 year, and 2 months—12th November 1878—10 months, 24 days.

MURRAY HAMMICK.

1877. Arrived 18th December 1877. Assistant to the Collector and Magistrate, Bellary, 18th December 1877. Acting Sub-Collector and Joint Magistrate, Bellary, from 20th March to 5th April 1879. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Bellary, from 9th to 16th June and from 15th July to 3rd August, and from 17th September to 20th October, 1879.—2 years, 14 days.

HUGH GORE JOSEPH.

1877. Arrived 7th November 1877. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Trichinopoly, 13th November 1877. Acting Cantonment Magistrate, Trichinopoly, 8th to 16th May 1878—16th August 1878.—2 years, 25 days.

GEORGE MAUDSLEY WILLIAMS.

1878. Arrived 19th November 1878. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Nellore, 26th November 1878. On furlough to Europe, from 11th April 1879.—4 months, 23 days.

HERBERT BRADLEY. (Barrister-at-Law.)

1878. Arrived 3rd December 1878. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, South Canara—10th December 1878.—1 year, 29 days.

HENRY ALEXANDER SIM.

1878. Arrived 19th November 1878. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Coimbatore, 26th November 1878. Acting Head Assistant Collector, Coimbatore, from 16th to 22nd September 1879.—1 year, 1 month, 12 days.

CHARLES HERBERT MOUNSEY. (Barrister-at-Law.)

1878. Arrived 3rd December 1878. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Vizagapatam 10th December 1878. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Kurnool—2nd December 1879. Assistant to Collector, District Magistrate and Agent to the Governor, Vizagapatam—23rd December 1879.—1 year, 29 days.

HENRY SHIRECLIFFE OTTER.

1878. Arrived 17th December 1878. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Tinnevelly—31st December 1878. On Furlough to Europe from 20th October 1879.—10 months, 3 days.

JOHN NATHANIEL ATKINSON.

1878. Arrived 3rd December 1878. Assistant to the Collector and District Magistrate, Kistna—10th December 1878.—1 year, 29 days.

CHARLES JAMES WEIR.

1879. Arrived 17th November 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Chingleput—25th November 1879.—1 month 15 days.

FREDERICK HARPER HAMNETT.

1879. Arrived 17th November 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Coimbatore—25th November 1879.—1 month, 15 days.

CHARLES MYLNE MULLALY.

1879. Arrived 3rd November 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Salem—25th November 1879.—1 month, 29 days.

JOHN TWIGG.

1879. Arrived 3rd December 1879. Assistant to Collector and District Magistrate, South Arcot—23rd December 1879.—29 days.

JAMES ANDREW.

1879. Arrived 17th November 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate, Nellore—25th November 1879.—1 month, 15 days.

ANDREW EDMUND CASTLE-STUART STUART.

1879. Arrived 17th November 1879. Assistant Collector and Magistrate and Agent, Vizagapatam—25th November 1879.—1 month, 15 days.

ALEXANDER CHAMBERS TATE.

1879. Arrived 3rd December 1879. Assistant to Collector and District Magistrate, Cuddapah—23rd December 1879.—29 days.

IXBOMBAY.

Class I of 28 years' standing.

1845. LESTOCK REID.—Arrd 29th Dec 1845; 3rd Asst Magt, Poona, 2nd Dec 1846; 2nd Asst 5th May 1847; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 1st Oct 1850; 1st Asst Surat, 10th Oct 1851; Ag Sub-Collector Kolaba, 26th Sep 1854; Sub Coll Kolaba, 7th Dec 1854; Ag Magt, Thana, 1st Aug 1855; sick leave to Bombay from 9th Dec 1858 to 31st Jan 1859; fur on m c 13th Mar 1859 to 11th Mar 1860; Magt Kurrahee, 16th Mar 1860; Ag Magt, Poona, 21st Mar 1860; Ahmednagar, 15th May 1860; Ratnagiri, 19th Nov 1860; Magt, Ahmedabad, 17th Dec 1861; Ratnagiri, 24th Mar 1862; Ag Mag Dharwar, 25th Mar 1863; Magt Dharwar, 3rd May 1865; Ag Rev Comr N. D., 17th Aug 1866; Ag Comr of Customs, Salt and Opium Bombay, 18th Apr 1868; Magt Dharwar, 17th Nov 1869; Ag Comr of Customs 24th Nov 1869; furl 19th Feb to 20th Nov 1870; Ag Comr of Customs, 21st Nov 1870; Sr Magt Dharwar, 16th Nov 1871; Comr of Customs and Opium 13th Dec 1871; furl 18th May 1874 to 10th Mar 1875; Comr of Customs 12th Mar 1875; spl duty at Kurrahee 22nd Nov to 19th Dec 1875; Comr of Customs 20th Dec 1875; Ag Comr S. D., 16th Apr 1878; N. D. 5th June 1879.

1846. JAMES GIBBS, c.s.i., Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 7th Dec 1846; attd to the Colr of Poona 19th May 1847; sick leave 15th Oct 1847 to 2nd Jan 1850; attd to the Judge of Surat, 13th Mar 1850; sick leave in India from 23rd Aug to 30th Nov 1850; Asst Judge Ahmedabad, and Ag Surat, 2nd May 1851; Ag Sr Asst Judge Broach, 20th Nov 1852; Asst Judge Surat, Ag as Sr Asst Judge at Broach, 9th Feb 1853; Ag Judl Asst to the Comr in Sind 7th Jan 1854; confirmed 25th Aug 1854; Spl Comr for trial of rebels 14th Feb 1860; Spl Comr for Income Tax, Bombay, 26th Sep 1860; Mem of the Income Tax Comr for Bombay 13th Feb 1861; Presdt of the Income Tax Comr Mar 1861; Collr of Income Tax 12th June 1861; fur from 27th Feb 1862 to 15th Jan 1865; Comr of Income Tax for Bombay, 20th Feb 1865; Judge of Kandesh Ag Poona and Ag for Sirdars 3rd Mar 1865; confirmed 31st July 1865; Judge H Court, Bombay, 14th Feb 1866; Vice-Chancellor of Univy of Bombay, 14th Mar 1870; re-apptd 1872, 1874, 1876; Prov'l Mem of Council, 16th Oct 1872; Mem of Council pro-tem, 13th May 1873; Mem of Council, 7th Apr 1874; furl for one year 7th Apr 1879; Mem G G's Council 1st Apr 1880.

1848. THE HON'BLE LIONEL ROBERT ASHBURNER, c.s.i.—Arr 26th Feb 1848; 3rd Asst Broach, 23rd May 1849; Ag 2nd Asst 1st Nov 1849; 2nd Asst 10th Oct 1851; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 17th Sep 1851; 2nd Asst Broach, 5th Apr 1852; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 20th Sep 1852; Broach, 29th Apr 1853; Ag Magt Kaira, 17th June 1853, 27th Dec 1854, and 12th Apr 1857; furl 13th May 1859 to 13th Nov 1860; 1st Asst Ratnagiri, 24th Nov 1860; Ag Magt Ahmedabad, 6th June 1861; Khandesh, 31st Oct 1861; Mag Khandesh, 12th Mar 1862; sick leave 9th Aug 1867 to 7th Mar 1869; Ag Rev and Police Comr S D 13th Mar 1859; Magt Khandesh, 12th June 1869; Ag Rev and Police Comr N. D., from 2nd Sep 1871 to 8th Jan 1872; Ag Magt Poona, from 13th Apr to 21st May 1872; Rev and Police Comr N. D., 22nd May 1872; temp'y Mem of Council, 28th June 1877; Mem of Council, 1st Aug 1877; Offg Govr of Bombay 15th Mar 1880.

1848. ROBERT FERGUSON MACTIER.—Arrd 28th Dec 1848; Asst and Ag 3rd Asst, Belgaum, 9th Apr 1850; 3rd Asst Sholapur, 20th June 1850; Ag 2nd Asst 14th Oct 1851; 2nd Asst, 30th June 1852; Ag Asst Judge, Surat, 10th May 1853; Asst Judge, Surat, 25th Aug 1854; Poona, and Asst Agent for Sirdars 4th Oct 1854; Sr Asst Judge Broach 19th Mar 1856; Ag Judge, Surat, 2nd Apr to 31st May 1859; sick leave 27th Sep 1859 to 12th Dec 1860; Judl Asst Magt, Satara, 4th Jan 1861; Ag Judge Thana, 27th Mar 1862; Ahmednagar, 7th May 1862; spl duty in the Judl Dept, Bombay, 26th Nov 1862; Judge Satara, 21st Mar 1863.

1850. CHARLES FORBES HUDSON SHAW, Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 21st Aug 1850; attd to the Rev Comr, N. D., 6th Mar 1851; 3rd Asst Magt, Belgaum, 10th Oct and 20th Dec 1851; Ag 2nd Asst, 7th Feb 1853; 2nd Asst, 4th June 1853; Supy 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 20th Sept 1856; 1st Asst, 18th Mar 1859; furl 12th Sep 1860 to 9th Sep 1863; Offg 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 16th Sep 1863; Ag Magt Ratnagiri, 12th Jan 1864; Ag Judge Dharwar, 17th Feb and 9th Apr 1864; Judge Sholapur, Ag at Dharwar,

28th Aug 1864; Judge Kaladgi, 1st Dec 1864; Dharwar, 8th Mar 1866; Belgaum, 6th Feb 1869; sick leave 6th May 1871 to 31st Jan 1873; Judge Belgaum, 4th Feb 1873.

1850. THE HON'BLE CHARLES GUARDON KEMBALL, Bar-at-law.—Arrd 25th Nov 1850; att'd to the Rev Comr, N. D., 6th Mar 1851; Asst Collr, Ahmednagar, 18th Oct 1851; Supy Asst 26th Jan 1852; Ag 3rd Asst 25th May 1852; Ag Asst Judge Konkan, 30th May 1853; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 17th May 1854; Jr Judl Asst Comr, Sind, 19th Jan 1855; Dy Magt Shikarpur, 25th Apr 1855; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 30th May 1856; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, 30th Oct 1857; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 28th July 1858; 1st Asst Belgaum, Ag Poona, 1st June 1859; Ag Magt Poona, from 7th May to 11th June 1859; 1st Asst Poona, 16th Mar 1860; Ag Magt Kurrachee, 27th July 1860; Magt Kurrachee, 12th Nov 1861, furl 27th Nov 1862 to 29th Nov 1865 on sub allow from 30th Nov 1865; Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, Ag Judge Surat from 15th Jan 1866; Judge Kaladgi, Ag Judge Surat; 14th Mar 1866; Judge Kanara 18th Apr 1866; Judge Surat, 20th Mar 1867; Ag Judge High Court Bombay, 22nd June 1870; Judge High Court 23rd Aug 1871; furl to Eur from 5th May 1873 to 28th July 1874; Judge High Court 30th July 1874.

1851. THE HON'BLE ROBERT HILL PINHEY, Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 23rd Feb 1851; Asst Magt, Ahmednagar, 22nd May 1851; Ag 3rd Asst, Poona, 10th Oct 1851; sick leave 26th Jan to 15th Mar 1852; 3rd Asst Poona, 7th Feb 1853; Ag 2nd Asst 4th June 1853; Thana, 12th July 1854; Asst Judge, Dharwar, 31st Mar 1855; Ag Sr Asst Judge, Konkan, Ratnagiri, 26th Apr 1856; Ag Judl Asst Satara, 30th June 1858; Jt Judge Dharwar, 4th Dec 1858; on furl 13th May 1859 to 25th Oct 1860; Ag Asst Judge Surat, 14th Nov 1860; Asst Judge, Ahmednagar, 15th Mar 1861; Ag Regr, Sadar Divani and Faujdari Bombay, 16th Nov 1861; Sr Asst Judge, Kaira; Ag Regr, High Court, Bombay 28th Apr 1862; Regr High Court 25th Feb 1863; Ag Judge Surat, 1st June 1863; Judge of Thana, 21st Sep 1863; on sick leave 15th Mar 1868 to 31st Oct 1869; Ag Judl Comr in Sind, 19th Nov 1869; Ag Judge Poona 13th June 1871; confirmed 16th Apr 1873; Ag Judge H C, Bombay, 6th May 1873; Judge H C, 12th Feb 1875.

1851. THE HON'BLE EDWARD W. RAVENSCROFT, c.s.l.—Arrd 25th May 1851; Supy Asst Magt, Surat, 30th Aug 1852; Ahmedabad, 7th Feb 1853; on priv affrs without pay, from 15th Apr 1853 to 4th Mar 1854; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmedabad, 18th Mar 1854; Surat, 27th Dec 1854; 2nd Asst 12th Sep 1855; on spl duty in Surat and Broach 22nd Oct 1855; Asst Magt in Gujarat, 27th Nov 1855; on sick leave 24th Dec 1858 to 30th Nov 1859; Ag Magt, Surat, 27th Sep 1860; on leave to Eur without pay, from 13th Feb 1861 to 9th Feb 1862; Ag Sub-Collr of Broach, 3rd Mar 1862; Ag Magt Surat, 6th May 1862; Sub-Col of Kolaba, Ag Magt of Surat, 25th Aug 1862; Asst Magt of Thana, 21st Jan 1863; Insp-in-Cf under Cotton Frauds Act, Bombay, in Feb 1864; Presdt of Municipal Comn, 8th June 1864; Ag Secy to Govt Rev, Finl and Gl Depts, 28th Sep 1864; Offg Cf Secy 8th Nov 1864; on furl 1st Mar 1865 to 25th Oct 1867; Ag Cf Secy to Govt Bombay 14th Nov 1867; Collr of Bombay Ag Cf Secy 14th Mar 1868; on sick leave 20th Mar 1868 to 10th Dec 1869; Ag Cf Secy to Govt 13th Dec 1869; on leave on priv affrs 19th Mar to 18th Sep 1870, Ag Cf Secy to Govt 10th Oct 1870; Addl Mem of Legisl Council of Bombay, 15th Mar 1871; Ag Magt Ratnagiri, 10th Apr 1871; on leave without pay, from 27th Apr to 3rd Nov 1871; Collr of Salt Rev 12th Oct 1871; Ag Cf Secy to Govt 6th Nov 1871; Sr Magt Ratnagiri, Ag as Cf Secy to Govt 12th Dec 1871; Sr Magt Kolaba, 14th Dec 1872; Ag as Cf Secy to Govt Addl Mem of the Legisl Council of Bombay, 15th Mar 1873; ag Collr of Bombay 10th Apr 1873; on Spl duty Mem of Baroda Comn 31st Oct 1873; Ag Collr of Bombay 16th Feb 1874; Ag Mun Comr Bombay, 7th Apr 1874; Magt Kolaba, 14th Jan 1875; Ag Cf Secy to Govt 19th Dec 1875; Ag Collr of Bombay 19th Sep 1876; Comr S. Din, 8th Nov 1876; Magt Thana and Ag Collr of Bombay, 13th Nov 1876; Ag Munl Comr, 20th Nov 1876; Cf Secy to Govt 23rd Jan 1877; Tempy Mem of Council, 7th Apr 1879; confirmed 15th Apr 1879.

1851. ELPHINSTONE POURTALES ROBERTSON.—Arrd 27th Mar 1851; Supy Asst Surat, 1st Mar 1852; 3rd Asst 10th Nov 1852; Ag 2nd Asst 4th June 1853; on sick leave 13th Jan to 4th March 1854, and 21st Apr 1854 to 22nd Nov 1857; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 8th Feb 1858; Ag Dy Comr of Customs, N. D., 12th Mar 1858; 2nd Asst Surat, Ag Dy Comr of Customs, 1st June 1859; 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 23rd Mar 1860; Dy Comr of Customs, N. D., 5th Apr 1861; Ag Sub-Collr Kolaba, 8th Apr 1862; Ag Magt Thana, 12th Apr 1862; Sub Collr Broach, 16th Oct 1862; Ag Magt Thana, Sub-Collr Kolaba, 8th June 1864; Ag Magt Kaira, 18th Oct 1864; on furl 14th Feb 1865 to 9th Oct 1867; 1st Asst Magt Ahmedabad, 15th Nov 1867; on spl duty in Bombay on Abkari lands, 13th Mar 1868; Ag Magt Dharwar, 9th Apr 1868; Magt Ahmedabad

Ag Magt Dharwar, 22nd May 1869 Sr Magt 4th Jan 1873; ag Comr, ND 6th Apl 1875; Magt Dharwar, 3rd July 1875; Comr S. D., 23th Nov 1876; Comr Central Divn, 1st Jan 1878.

Class II of 20 years' standing.

1852. WILLIAM SANDWITH.—Arrd 23rd Mar 1852; Asst Mag Surat, 25th Jany 1853; 3rd Asst Ahmedabad 15th Aug 1853; Asst Mag Surat 4th Jan 1854; 3rd Asst 17th Jan 1855; 2nd Asst 2nd Apl 1856; Ag Asst Judge 19th June 1856; Asst Judge 11th Jan 1858; Ag Sr Asst Judge Broach 16th Apl 1859; furl on M C 11th Nov 1859 to 27th Jan 1861; Ag Sr Asst Judge Broach 4th June 1861; confd 18th Jany 1862; Ag Judge Ahmedabad, 5th Nov 1862 to 4th Feb 1863; Sr Asst Judge Kaira, Ag Sholapur 12th Jany 1864; Ag Asst Judge Poona 24th Dec 1864; Ag Judge Sholapur, 25th Feb to 16th Mar 1865; Ag Sr Asst Judge Broach 16th May 1865; Jt Judge Poona, 31st May 1865; Judge of the Court of S C Poona 1st Jan 1866; Jt Judge Dharwar, 30th Apl 1866; Ag Judge Kaladgi, 21st Jan 1867; Sr Asst Judge Broach, 4th Mar 1867; Ag Judge Kaladgi, 13th June 1867; Ahmedabad, 3rd July 1868; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, Ag Judge Ahmedabad 8th Jan 1869; Judge Ratnagiri, Ag Judge Ahmedabad, 7th Apl 1869; furl m c 26th May 1869 to 18th May 1871; Ag Judge Belgaum, 29th May 1871; Judge 1st gr, Surat, Ag at Belgaum, 3rd Oct 1871; Judge Dharwar, 4th Feb 1873; furl on m c 7th Apl 1873 to 3rd Apl 1874; Judge Dharwar, 24th Apl 1874; sick leave 31st Jan 1876 to 26th Jan 1877; Judge Dharwar, 16th Feb 1877.

1853. THE HON'BLE THEODORE CRACRAFT HOPE, c. s. r. Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 5th June 1853; placed under the Inam Comr, Poona, 15th Aug 1853; Asst Magt Thana, 14th Dec 1853; 3rd Asst 7th Dec 1854; Edul Insp, N. D., Gujarat, 20th May 1855; spl leave on pri affrs 12th May to 5th Oct 1857; Edul Insp, Gujarat Divn, 13th Oct 1857; Pri Secy to Govr Bombay, 16th May 1860; Ag Magt Ahmedabad, 2nd Apl 1862; Dy Comr of Customs, N. D., Ag Magt Ahmedabad, 16th Oct 1862; on pri affrs in India, 3rd Feb 1863; Dy Comr of Customs, N. D., ag as Magt Ahmedabad, 9th Mar 1863; on furl 14th Oct 1863 to 10th Oct 1866; Ag Mag Surat, 8th Nov 1866; Magt Kaira, Ag Surat, 14th Jan 1867; Magt Surat, 25th Mar 1867; Ag Munl Comr, Bombay, 30th Nov 1871; on furl 27th May to 22nd Nov 1872; Mag Surat 27th Nov 1872; Ag Comr of Customs 7th Nov to 24th Dec 1874; on duty at Calcutta Traffic Comt from 25th Dec 1874; Mag Surat 12th Mar 1875; Addl Mem of Council of G G 7th July 1875; also Ag Secy to Govt of India in Dept of Agrl and Comce 11th Sept 1876; Rev Comr N D Addl Secy to Govt of India 28th June 1877; Addl Mem of Legisl Council of G G 16th Aug 1877; Comr of N D 1st Jany 1878, Addl Mem of G G's Legisl Council; furl from 2nd Apl to 18th Oct 1878; spl pol duty in Eng from 19th Oct 1878; furl 28th Nov to 16th Dec 1878; Addl Mem of the Legisl Council of G G 30th Dec 1878.

1853. HENRY NAPIER BRUCE ERSKINE.—Arrd 23rd Sep 1853; Asst Mag Dharwar 24th Mar 1855; 3rd Asst Dharwar 16th May 1855; Ag 2nd Asst 2nd Apl 1856; 2nd Asst Belgaum Ag Dharwar 20th Sep 1856; spl Offr for Income Tax, Belgaum 5th Oct 1860; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum 1st Oct 1860; 1st Asst Ahmednagar 12th May 1861; Ag Asst Comr Edul Insp in Sind, 27th Apl 1862; Asst Comr in Sind, 10th Nov 1862; Ag Mag Kurrachee 11th Apl 1863; fur 14th Apl 1864 to 7th Apl 1867; Ag Mag Ahmednagar 10th May 1867; Sub-Colr Sholapur Ag Mag Ahmednagar 7th Oct 1867; Ag Mag Poona, 29th Nov 1868; Mag Nasik, 10th July 1869; Ag Mag Khandesh 14th Sept 1871; Sr Mag Nasik 4th Jan 1873; furl 1st Mar 1875 to 10th Oct 1876; Mag Nasik 25th Oct 1876; Ag Rev and Police Comr N D 29th June 1877; Ag Comr in Sind, 7th June 1879.

1853. JAMES GEORGE WHITE.—Arrd 23rd Feb 1853; Asst Mag Broach, 21st Feb 1855; 3rd Asst 20th Sept 1856; sick leave 6th Nov 1857 Ag 2nd Asst Kaira, 6th Feb 1858; 2nd Asst 26th Oct 1858; sick leave from 19th Mar to 18th May 1859; 2nd Asst Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 7th June 1859; sick leave Neilgherry Hills from 14th Mar 1860 to 8th May 1861; sick leave to Eur from 9th May 1861 to 11th Apl 1863; Ag Sub-Colr Kolaba, 12th May 1863; Broach 7th Dec 1863 1st Asst Ahmednagar, Ag Sub-Colr 30th Mar 1864; Ag Sub-Colr Broach, 30th May 1864; 1st Asst Khandesh, Ag Sub-Colr Broach 29th Jan 1865; Sub-Colr 3rd May 1865; furl 14th Mar 1866 to 16th Jan 1869; Ag Mag Surat, 6th Feb 1869 Sub-Colr Broach, 4th Apl 1869; Jr Mag, 10th July 1869; Ag Jr Mag 30th Dec 1869; Jr Mag 2nd July 1872; Sr Mag from 27th Mar 1873; spl leave 19th May to 18th Oct 1873; Mag Broach, 28th Nov 1873.

1854. CHARLES GONNE.—Arrd 10th Mar 1854; Asst Mag Ahmednagar, 17th June 1854; Thana, 21st Feb 1855; placed under the Comr at Satara, 27th Mar 1855; 3rd Asst Thana, 3rd Sept 1855; 2nd Asst Poona, 20th Sept 1856; Ag asst Judge and Ag Asst Agt for Sirdars in the Deccan, 21st May 1859; Asst Judge Ahmednagar, 18th Oct 1860; Poona, 4th Feb 1861; Judge of the S C Court, Ahmedabad, 15th May 1861; furl 27th Dec 1861 to 28th Jan 1863; Jt Judge Thana, 21st March 1863; Ag Judge 27th June 1863; Ag Secy to Govt Political and Judl Depts 5th Mar 1864; Ag Judge Poona, and Ag Agent 26th Apl 1864; Ag Reg, H Ct App Side, 6th June 1864; Ag Secy to Gov, Judl and Pol Depts 20th Oct 1864; confd 4th May 1865; Ag Chief Secy to Govt 29th March 1868; furl 19th Feb 1870 to 1st Mar 1872; Secy to Govt, Pol &c., Depts 2nd Mar 1872; 7 months' ful from 17th May 1875; Secy to Govt Pol &c., Depts 19th Dec 1875; Ag Cheif Secy to Govt 19th Mar 1878; Secy to Govt Pol, &c., Dept 19th June 1878; furl for one year from 3rd Mar 1879; Chief Secy to Govt 7th Apl 1879.

1854. THEODORE BOSANQUET.—Arrd 17th Jan 1855; Asst Mag Sholapur, 4th Aug 1855; 3rd Asst 20th Sep 1856; Ag 2nd Asst 6th Apl 1859; Ahmednagar 1st Oct 1860; 2nd Asst Poona, Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 31st Oct 1860; Extra 2nd Asst Khandesh, 8th Mar 1862; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 7th Apl 1862; Ag 1st Asst Ratnagiri, 7th Jan 1863; confd 6th May 1863; furl 14th May 1865; to 24th Jan 1868; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar 11th Mar 1868; subs allowance from 11th June 1868; Ag Mag Satara 12th Oct 1868 subs allowance from 24th Dec 1868; Ag 1st Asst Satara 2nd Mar 1869; Ag Sub-Colr Kolaba 15th Apl 1869; Ag Mag Kolaba 10th July 1869; Sholapur 14th Sept 1869; Jr Mag 4th Jan 1873; Ag Sr Mag 16th May 1874; furl for 19 months from 26th Apl 1875 Sr Mag Sholapur, 19th Sept 1875; Ag Mag Belgaum, 1st Dec 1876; Ag Mag and Political Agent Kolaba, 21st Jan 1879.

1855. G. FREDERICK SHEPPARD.—Arrd 23rd Nov 1854 Asst Mag Ahmednagar, 10th July 1855; 3rd Asst 12th Mar 1856; 2nd Asst 16th June 1858; on private affairs from 14th May to 13th Nov 1859; 2nd Asst Khandesh, 19th Nov 1859; Ag 1st Asst 25th Apl 1860; 1st Asst 28th Jan 1862; furl 29th Jan 1865 to 26th Jan 1867; Ag Sub-Collr Broach, 11th Feb 1867; 1st Asst Surat, Ag Sub-Collr Broach, 13th Feb 1867; 1st Asst Dharwar, 14th May 1867; Ag Mag Ahmedabad, 30th June 1867; Khandesh, 27th Sept 1867; 1st Asst Kaira, Ag Mag Khandesh, 6th Nov 1867; Ag Mag Kanara, 7th June 1869; Ag Mag Kolaba, 5th Sept 1869; 1st Asst Mag Broach, 22nd Dec 1869; Ag collr of Bombay and Supt of Stamps 30th Jan 1870; on spl duty in Bombay, 16th Mar 1870; Ag Mag Thana, 27th Apl 1870; Kaira, 1st Mar 1871; Collr of Salt Rev at Bombay, Ag Mag Kaira, 13th Dec 1871; Mag at Kaira, 17th Feb 1873; furl 10th Mar 1873 to 3rd June 1874; Kaira, 19th June 1874; Sr Mag and Pol Agt Kaira, 23rd Nov 1875 Mag Kaira, 9th Oct 1878; furl for 9 months from 20th Mar 1879.

1854. WILLIAM MANT PHILIP COGHLAN.—Arrd 25th Feb 1855; placed under the Collr of Satara, 10th Mar 1855; Asst Mag Poona, 16th Oct 1855; Supy 3rd Asst 20th Sept 1856; 3rd Asst Ratnagiri, 27th Mar 1857; Ag 2nd Asst 15th May 1857; on private affairs from 1st Aug to 25th Sept 1857; Ag Judl Dy Mag in charge of Adalat, Kurrachee, 10th Oct 1857; 3rd Asst Belgaum Ag Judl Dy Mag Kurrachee, 13th Oct 1857; ag 2nd Asst and Asst Political Agent for the Peint State, Ahmednagar 3rd May 1859; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 19th Nov 1859; sick leave 27th Nov 1860 to 18th Sep 1862; Extra 2nd Asst Khandesh 6th Nov 1861; spl duty to Bombay from 19th Sep to 29th Oct 1862; Ag 1st Asst Ratnagiri, 29th Sep 1862; Ag Sr Asst Judge Surat, Broach 3rd Nov 1862; Judge S C Court Ahmedabad 21st Mar 1863; Sr Asst Judge Broach, 3rd Feb 1864; Ag Judge Khandesh, 14th July 1864; Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, Ag at Khandesh, 23rd Oct 1865; Ag Jt Judge Ratnagiri, from 16th Feb to 21st May 1866; Judge Kurrachee 15th June 1866; Ag Judl Comr Judge of the Sadar Court and the Chief Parsi Matrimonial Court in Sind 4th Aug 1866; Judge Ahmedabad, Ag Judl Comr, &c., in Sind, 20th Mar 1867; Judge Ahmedabad 16th Feb 1868; Ag Judl Comr, Judge of the Sadar Court in Sind 11th July 1868; furl 12th Aug 1868 to 31st Jan 1870; Judge Ahmedabad 17th Feb 1870; 1st gr Judge 30th Apl 1870; Ag Judge Thana 16th May 1870; Judge 16th Apl 1872; furl on m c 29th Apl to 31st Oct 1872; rejoined his appt at Thana 7th Nov 1872; on spl duty in the Secretariat 30th Apl 1876; Judge Thana 21st June 1876; spl leave 11th Dec 1876 to 4th Apl 1877; Judge Thana 5th Apl 1877.

1855. ARTHUR TRAVERS CRAWFORD.—Arrd 9th Feb 1855; placed under the Collr of Satara 17th Feb 1855; Asst Mag 10th July 1855; on m c to Poona from 10th Aug to 12th Oct 1855; 3rd Asst Satara, 12th Mar 1856; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 14th Feb

1857 3rd Asst Ahmednagar 21st June 1858; Ag 2nd Asst Ratnagiri 24th Dec 1858; Ag 1st Asst 9th June to 9th Dec 1859; spl Income Tax Offr Ratnagiri 24th Oct 1860; Ag 1st Asst 24th Oct to 3rd Dec 1860, and from 1st June 1861 to 28th Feb 1862; Ag Sr Asst Judge Konkan, 21st May 1862; Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 28th Sep 1863; Ag Judge Konkan, 5th Mar to 20th June 1864; Registrar Genl of Assr 1st Jan 1865; Ag Col of Bombay, Spl Income Tax Comr, and Supt of Stamps 29th Apr 1865; Munpl Comr, Bombay, 23rd June 1865; Mbr of the Architectural Imp Com Bombay 28th Sep 1865; leave on md cer 28th Oct 1871 to 6th Dec 1873; 19th June to 17th Dec 1874; Jr Mag Kanara, and Ag Sr Mag and Polt Ag Kolaba, 29th Jan 1875; Jr Mag and Polt Ag Kolaba, Ag Sr Col 14th Sep 1875; Sr Col Kolaba, 2nd Feb 1876; Ag Col Ratnagiri, 27th July 1876; Mag Thana, Ratnagiri, 13th July 1877; on spl duty as Presd of the G I P R Comm Railway robberies, 20th Mar to 3rd Aug 1878; Ag Sr Mag Ratnagiri, 4th Aug 1878; Ag Comr S D 29th May 1879.

1855. JOHN ELPHINSTONE.—Arrd 5th Feb 1855; placed under the Col of Poona 14th Mar 1855; Supy Asst Mag Ratnagiri, 27th Oct 1855; 3rd Asst 12th Mar 1856; 3rd class Depy Col Hala, in Sind, 4th June 1857; 2nd class Dpy Col Tando Muhammad Khan, in Hyderabad, Sind, 26th Nov 1859; Ag 2nd Asst Thana, 3rd May 1860; Belgaum, 11th Sep 1860; Khandesh, 27th Oct 1860; 2nd Asst Dharwar 27th Aug 1861; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 12th Mar 1862 1st Asst Dharwar, 30th Apr 1862; Ag Col 22nd Sept to 22nd Oct 1862; 29th Mar to 3rd June 1863; Ag Sub-Col Angria's Kolaba, 10th Nov 1864; Sub-Col 22nd Mar 1865; on urgent pr affairs 14th May to 8th Nov 1865; Ag Collr North Kanara, 27th Nov 1866; Ag 1st Asst Dharwar, 10th Mar 1871; ag Collr Ratnagiri, 22nd May 1871; Ag Sr Magt 4th Jan 1873 to 21st June 1874, 15t Sep 1874; furl 14th Feb 1876 to 12th Feb 1878; ag Collr Dharwar, 4th Mar 1878.

1855. THE HON'BLE MAXWELL MELVILL.—Arrd 7th Nov 1855; sick leave at Mahabaleshwar 13th May to 13th June 1856; Asst Magt Satara, 9th Apr 1856; Supy 3rd Asst 18th Dec 1856; sick leave to the Presy 15th Jan to 14th Feb 1857; Supy 3rd Asst Thana, 21st Feb 1857; Asst Regr Sadar Divani and Faujdari Adalat, Bombay, 9th Mar 1857; 3rd Asst Thana, Ag as Asst Regr, Bombay, 5th Aug 1857; Ag Asst Judge Konkan, 4th Sep 1858; 2nd Asst Surat, Ag Asst Judge Konkan, 16th Mar 1860; Asst Judge Konkan, 4th July 1860; on pri affrs 12th May to 12th Nov 1861; Judl Asst Comr in Sind, 11th Feb 1862; Regr Gl of Assurs, 19th Feb 1866; on m c from 14th May 1866 to 13th Jan 1868; Comr to inquire into the failure of the Bank of Bombay, 1st June 1868 to 5th May 1869; Ag Judge High Court, Bombay, 13th June 1869; Judge 21st June 1871; furlm c from 20th Apr 1874 to 19th July 1875; leave without pay 20th July to 18th Nov 1875; Judge High Court 19th Nov 1875.

1855. ALEXANDER ALFRED BORRADAILE.—Arrd 10th Dec 1855; Asst Collr Surat, 3rd Apr 1856; Ag 3rd Asst Jan 1857; Ag 2nd Asst 5th Aug 1857; 2nd Asst 9th July 1860; Ag 1st Asst 1st Apr and 2nd Nov 1861; offd Sub-Collr Broach, 15th Oct to 6th Dec 1861; sick leave 13th Feb 1863 to 11th Feb 1865; 2nd Asst Kaira, 18th Feb 1863; 1st Asst 13th Mar 1864; Ahmedabad, 22nd Sep 1864; Kaladgi, 1st Dec 1864; Ag Dy Comr of customs, Bombay 13th Mar 1865; confd 12th Apr 1865; Ag Mag Kaira, 29th May 1865; Sub-Collr Broach, ag Coll Kaira, 14th Mar 1866; Ag Mag Ahmedabad 2nd Oct 1867; Jr Mag Ahmedabad, 4th Jan 1873; Ag Sr Mag 1st Mar 1873 to 18th June 1874 and from 7th Nov 1874, Sr Mag Ahmedabad, 28th Nov 1876.

1856. THE HON'BLE FRANCIS DAWES MELVILL.—Arrd 22nd Feb 1856; Supy Asst Mag Dharwar, 9th Apr 1856; Supy 3rd Asst 8th Apr 1857; 3rd Asst 5th Aug 1857; Ag 2nd Asst 19th Jan 1859; 2nd Asst 22nd Apr 1861; Ag 2nd Asst Thana, 14th Aug 1861; 2nd Asst 14th Dec 1861; Asst Judge Poona, 26th Mar 1862; Ag Judge Kanara, 3rd Apr to 20th May 1863; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 24th Mar 1863; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 12th Aug 1863; confd 7th Nov 1863; offg Judge Poona, 2nd Mar to 25th Apr 1874; Kanara, 9th May to 19th Nov 1864; Judl Asst Comr in Sind 19th Feb 1866; Sr Asst Judge Konkan, 22nd May 1866; Ag Judl Asst Comr in Sind; Ag Judge Kurrachee, 4th Aug 1866; confd 20th Mar 1867; Ag Judge Ahmedabad, 20th Apr 1867; furl 14th Dec 1867 to 9th Jan 1870; Ag Judge Thana, 24th Jan 1870; Poona, 19th March 1870; Ag 2nd Gr Judge Ahmedabad, 9th May 1870; Jt Judge Kaira, 10th Jan 1871; Ag Judge Ahmedabad; 2nd gr Judge Ratnagiri, 3rd Oct 1871, Ag Judge Ahmedabad; confd 16th Apr 1872; Judl Comr and Judge Sadar Court in Sind, 16th Apr 1873; for 21 months from 20th Apr 1874 Judl Comr and Judge Sadar Court in Sind, 7th Feb 1876; ag Comr in Sind, 12th Sep 1877; Ag Judge High Court, Bombay, 9th June 1879.

1856. ARCHIBALD LOCKHART SPENS.—Arrd 22nd Feb 1856; placed under the Collr, Ahmednagar, 27th Feb 1856; on medl cert to Mahabaleshvar for 2 months 19th Apr 1856; placed under the Collr of Poona, 2nd June 1856; of Thana, 18th Oct 1856; of Belgaum, 13th Jan 1857; Ag Asst Magt Dharwar, 4th Sep 1857; Supy 3rd Asst 4th Mar 1858; Ag 3rd Asst 11th Sep 1860; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum, 22nd Apr 1861; Ag Asst Judge at Dharwar, 7th Apr 1862; Ag Asst Judge Dharwar, 12th June 1862; Asst Judge 21st Sep 1863; Ag Judge 23rd Dec 1863; Ag Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 16th Mar 1864; Judge S C Court, Ahmedabad, 24th Feb 1864; Ag Sr Asst Judge Broach 14th July 1864; on medl cert 14th Oct 1865 to 9th June 1867; Sr Asst Judge Ahmedabad, Kaira, 22nd June 1867; Ag Judge Thana, 20th July 1867; Ahmedabad 7th Mar 1868; Kanara 29th Oct 1868; Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 8th Feb 1869; Asst Judge Ahmedabad, Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 25th Jan 1869; Ag Judge Kanara, 1st May 1869; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 10th May 1869; Ag Judge Kanara, 8th May 1870; Judge Ratnagiri, Ag Judge Kanara, 16th Apr 1872; Kanara, 2nd Aug 1872; Ag 1st gr Judge 5th May 1873; pro tem Kanara, 12th Apr 1874; 2nd gr Judge 1st Aug 1874; Ag 1st gr 12th Oct 1874, con 17th Feb 1875; furl 29th Mar 1875 to 21st Mar 1877; Judge Kanara 26th Mar 1877; Mutiny Medal for services in the Mutiny.

1856. ARTHUR RAMSAY MACDONALD.—Arrd 22nd May 1856; placed under the Collr of Ahmednagar, 2nd June 1856; Ag Comr. Sind, 13th Jan 1857; Supy Dy Collr Kotri, Kurrachee Colte 13th June 1857; 3rd Cl Dy Collr Shikarpur, 31st Aug 1857; Ag 2nd Cl 26th Dec 1857 to 15th Jan 1859; and 8th Apr to 18th Nov 1859; 3rd Class Dy Collr Hyderabad, 6th Apr 1859; Set Offr, Hyderabad, 29th Nov 1859; Ag 1st Asst Collr Thana, 2nd May 1862; confd 2nd Aug 1862; Ag Sub-Collr Kolaba, 1st Mar 1864, and 13th May to 14th Nov 1865; First Asst Thana, from 15th Nov 1865; Ag Sub-Collr Broach 16th Mar, 1866; furl 14th Feb 1867 to 12th Feb 1870; Ag 1st Asst Thana, 16th Feb 1870; Poona, 28th Apr 1870; on pri affrs from 12th Sep to 10th Dec 1871; Ag Jr Collr Kanara, 18th Dec 1871; Ag Sr Collr 11th Apr 1873; 1st Asst Belgaum, Ag Sr Collr Kanara, 4th Nov 1873; Ag Jr Collr 28th Nov 1873; Ag Collr 9th Feb 1875; Ag Sr Collr 1st Apr 1875; Dy Comr of Customs Bombay, Ag Kanara, 19th Sep 1875; Jr Collr Kanara; Ag Sr Collr, 23rd Nov 1875; Sr Collr 28th June 1877; Sr Collr Kanara, 15th Sep 1877.

1856. WILLIAM HENRY PROPERT.—Arrd 6th Nov 1856; attd to the Collr of Surat, 17th Nov 1856; of Thana, 25th Apr 1867; of Ahmednagar, 8th July 1857; Asst Collr Surat, 13th Jan 1858; attd to Gujarat Rev Survey, 10th Mar 1858; Supy 3rd Asst Ahmedabad, 26th Sep 1859; 3rd Asst 11th Sept 1860; Ag 2nd Asst 29th June to 1st Oct 1860; Khandesh, 4th Dec 1860; 2nd Asst Khandesh. 28th Jan 1862; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 2nd June 1863; Ag Colr Ahmedabad, 15th Sept to 27th Nov 1863; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 10th Feb 1864; Agt to the Govr Panch Mahals, 5th Apr 1864; 1st Asst Kaira, 22nd Sep 1864; Extra 1st Asst and Ag to the Govr Panch Mahals, 17th May 1865; on private affairs 14th May to 9th Nov 1866; furl on private affairs 21st Nov 1869 to 17th Nov 1871; Ag Colr Kaira, 12th Apr 1873; Extra 1st Asst and Agt to the Govr Panch Mahals, 19th June 1874; furl for one year from 30th Nov 1874, Jr Colr and Pol Agt Khandesh, 2nd Feb 1876; Ag Sr Colr 4th Mar 1876; Sr Colr 15th Sept 1877.

1856.
