JOHN GEORGE MOORE.—Arrd 6th Nov 1856; placed under the Colr of Belgaum, 17th Nov 1856; of Satara, 24th Nov 1857; Asst Colr Ahmednagar, 13th Jan 1858; Thana, 20th Feb 1858; Supy 3rd Asst 16th Aug 1858; Ag 3rd Asst 26th Oct 1858; Ag 2nd Asst 22nd July to 26th Sept 1859; Ag 2nd Asst Broach, 25th Feb 1860; sick leave to Bombay 1st Dec 1860 to 8th Feb 1861; Ag 3rd Asst Sholapur 14th Feb 1861; Ag 2nd Asst Sohalapur, 22nd May 1861; sick leave 30th Sept to 29th Oct 1861; 2nd Asst Sholapur 12th Nov 1861; Ag 1st Asst 14th May 1862; Ag Asst Comr in Sind, 9th Dec 1862; Educ Insp Sind, 3rd June 1863; Asst Comr 30th Mar 1864; Branch Regr Genl, 22nd Dec 1866; Ag Comr 10th May to 12th June 1867; on private affairs 29th Jan to 24th July 1865; furl 13th Nov 1870 to 8th Nov 1872; Ag Collr and Pol Agt, Khandesh, 2nd Apr 1873; Ag Jr Collr Satara, 2nd Nov 1874; 3rd May to 4th Aug 1875; 19th Sep to 17th Nov 1875; Ag Jr Collr and Pol Agent, Thana, 18th Nov 1875; Ag Sr Collr 3rd Jan 1876; Ag Sr Collr Satara, 9th Feb 1876; Sr Collr Satara, 25th Sep 1877; spl duty as President of the Jail Comn from 29th July to 17th Sep 1878; Collr of Poona, 11th Dec 1878.

1856. JAMES BRAITHWAITE PEILE, M.A.—Arrd 8th Oct 1856; placed under the Collr of Thana, 15th Oct 1856; of Surat 13th Jan 1857; Asst Magt Ahmedabad, 15th Apr 1857; attd to Survey Supt, Gujarat 17th Feb 1858; on spl duty, Alienation Dept, 30th Nov 1858; under the Rev Commr, N. D., 9th Jan 1860; Alienation Sett Offr, Gujarat.

10th Apr 1861; Asst to the Rev Comr, N. D., 11th Dec 1861; Ag Under Secy to Govt, Rev Dept, 9th Jan 1862; confirmed 30th Apr 1862; Ag Reg Gl of Assurances, 14th May 1866; Reg Gl of Assurances, 30th July 1866; fur 30th Sep 1867 to 23rd Apr 1869; Dir of Public Ins, Bombay, 24th Apr 1869; Ag Mun Comr, Bombay, 27th May to 20th Oct 1872; Ag Pol Agent, Kathiawar, 30th Jan 1873 to 29th Jan 1874; fur 2nd Mar to 27th Oct 1874; Pol Agent, Kathiawar, 8th Nov 1874; on spl duty in Bombay 24th Oct to 23rd Nov 1875; on duty at Delhi in the Imperial Assemblage, from 4th Dec 1876 to 19th Jan 1877; Ag Comr in Sind, 1st June 1878; Member of the Famine Comm 8th Aug 1878 to 10th Mar 1879; Ag Secy to Govt, Pol, Secret, Judl and Edul Depts, 11th Mar 1879; con and Ag Cf Secy to Govt 7th Apr 1879.

1856. WILLIAM RAMSAY.—Arrd 8th Oct 1856; placed under Colr of Thana, 15th Oct 1856; of Surat, 13th Jan 1857; Asst Col Surat, 15th Apr 1857; Ag 3rd Asst Khandesh, 5th Aug 1857; Ag 2nd Asst 26th Apr 1860; transf to the Govt of India, 20th Aug 1860; Asst Comr in Nagpur 1st Oct 1860; Alienation Offr Nagpur, 25th Feb 1861; Set Offr Betul, 5th July 1862; Chindwara, 1st May 1864; on priv affairs 29th Apr to 28th Oct 1865; Sett Offr Chindwara, in charge of Seoni 22nd Aug to 3rd Dec 1866; Offg Dy Comr Chindwara, 9th Apr to 6th July 1867; on furl 30th Dec 1867 to 29th Dec 1869; 1st Asst Surat, 11th Feb 1870; Ag Colr Kaira, 10th June to 14th Aug 1870; Surat 13th Oct to 12th Dec 1870, and 30th Nov 1871 to 5th Jan 1872; Ag Colr and Supt of Stamps Bombay, 6th May to 28th Oct 1872; Ag Colr Nasik, 3rd Mar to 11th May 1873; Broach, 20th May 1873; pro-tem. Jr Colr Broach, 19th Oct to 24th Nov 1873; Ag Colr and Pol Ag at Sholapur, 7th Mar 1874; at Surat, 7th June 1874; Ag Jr Colr Khandesh, 5th Nov 1874; Ag Sr Colr 29th June to 2nd July 1875, and 25th Jan to 3rd Mar 1876; furl 3rd Apr 1876 to 31st Oct 1877; Jr Colr Dharwar from 28th Nov 1876; Thana, 23rd Jan 1877; Kolaba, 13th July 1877; Ag Sr Colr Nasik, 15th Nov 1877; confd Kolabo, 16th Dec 1878; Ag at Nasik.

1856. THE HON'BLE RAYMOND WEST, M. A. Barr. R. G. S.—Arrd 18th Sept 1856; placed under the Colr of Ahmednagar, 25th Sept 1856; of Belgaum, 13th Jan 1857; Asst Colr 5th Aug 1857; Ag 3rd Asst and Mag Belgaum, 12th Jan 1858; 3rd Asst 4th June 1859; Ag 1st Asst Judge Dharwar, 17th Jan 1860; Asst Judge 22nd May 1861; Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaira, 26th Mar 1862; Offg Under Secy to Govt, Judl and Pol Dept, 2nd June 1862; Regr, H Court, 1st June 1863; private affairs from 24th May to 23rd Nov 1864; Regr H Court 29th Nov 1864; Ag Judge Kanara, 17th May 1866; Ag Judl Comr and Judge Sadar Court in Sind, 13th Nov 1868; furl 23rd May 1869 to 13th May 1871; Ag Judge, H Court, 14th May 1871; Regr, H Court, 13th Nov 1871; Judl Comr and Judge of the Sadar Court in Sind, 10th June 1872; Ag Judge H Court 31st Mar 1873; Judge H Court, 8th Sept 1873; furl 22nd May 1876 to 21st May 1877; Judge H Court, 23rd May 1877; spl duty as Memb of the Law Comm, Calcutta.

1857. HERBERT EDWARD JACOMB.—Arrd 9th Mar 1857; Asst Collr Poona, 23rd Jan 1858; 3rd Asst Ahmednagar, 16th Aug 1858; Supy Dy Collr, Sukkur in Sind, 15th June 1859; 3rd Class Dy Collr, Shikarpur, 4th Jan 1860; Hyderabad, 3rd Apr 1860; placed at disposal of Govt of India 20th Aug 1860; Asst Comr, 3rd Class, Shaipur, Punjab, 19th Sept 1860, 2nd Class, Punjab, 5th Dec 1860; Offg Dy Comr, Gurgaon, Punjab, 10th July to 3rd Aug 1862; Asst Comr, 1st Class, Punjab, 4th Aug 1862; Offg Dy Comr, Punjab, 4th Aug 1862 to 29th Nov 1863; Asst Comr, 1st Class, Punjab, on 30th Nov 1863; on sub all from 1st Dec 1863; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 10th Mar 1864; Offg Under Secy to Govt in Rev, Finl and Genl Dept, Bombay, 13th Apr 1864; con Under Secy to Govt in Rev, Finl and Genl Dept 17th July 1865; leave on priv aff 4th May to 11th Oct 1866; Under Secy to Govt, Rev, Finl and Genl Depts, 12th Oct 1866; Ag Sub-Collr Sholapur, 17th Oct 1867; Under Secy to Govt, 18th Mar 1867; furl to Eur from 7th Mar 1868 to 27th Feb 1870; Ag Dy Comr of Customs Prey Divn, from 1st Mar to 17th Oct 1870; Under Secy to Govt in Bombay, 18th Oct 1870; Ag Dy Comr of Customs P D, 1st Mar 1872 to 4th May 1873; furl 5th May 1873 to 13th Oct 1874; Ag Collr 6th Nov 1874 to 22nd Mar 1875; Ag Dy Comr of Customs 1st Apr 1875; Ag Munpl Comr, Bombay, 18th May 1875; Dy Comr of Customs 23rd Nov 1875; Dy Comr of Customs 19th Dec 1875; Ag Comr of Customs 21st Feb to 19th Mar 1876; Ag Sr Collr Ahmednagar, 13th Sep 1876; Ag Jr Collr 25th Oct 1876; Jr Collr Belgaum; Ag Sr Collr Ahmednagar, 21st Nov 1876; Ag Jr Collr 1st Feb 1877; Ag Sr Collr 3rd Mar 1877; Ag Jr Collr 11th June 1877; Collr Belgaum, and Ag Sr Collr Ahmednagar, 28th June 1877; Jr Collr ag as Sr Collr 25th Sep 1877; Jr Collr 25th Nov 1877; Ag Sr Collr Ahmednagar, 31st Dec 1877; Jr Collr 27th Feb 1878; furl to Eur from 1st Apr 1878 to 12th Feb 1879; Collr of Bombay and Supt of Stamps 1st Jan 1879; Collr of Bombay and Supt of Stamps 15th Feb 1879.

1857. WILLIAM ROGER PRATT.—Arrd 9th Mar 1857; placed under the Collr of Poona, 7th Aug 1857; Asst Collr Surat, 12th Apr 1858; Ag 3rd Asst Broach, 28th Feb 1859; Surat, 28th Apr 1859; Supy 3rd Asst Broach, 31st Oct 1859; Ag 3rd Asst Surat, 18th Jan 1860; 3rd Asst 9th July 1860; Ag 2nd Asst 13th Nov 1861; 2nd Asst 16th Feb 1863; Ag 1st Asst 3rd Mar to 5th May 1863; Ahmedabad 4th Mar 1864; 1st Asst 1st Dec 1864; furl 15th Nov 1867 to 12th Nov 1869; Ag First Asst Kanara, 11th Jan to 6th May 1870; Ag Talukdari Set Offr 7th May 1870 to 14th May 1872; First Asst, Satara, Ag Collr, Ahmedabad, 29th May 1872; Ag Asst Broach, 3rd Aug 1872; First Asst, Ahmedabad, 18th Dec 1872; Ag Collr and Supdt of Stamps Bombay, 30th Jan to 9th Apr 1873; furl M C 5th May 1873 to 9th Feb 1875; First Asst Ahmedabad, 22nd Feb 1875; Ag Jr Collr Ahmedabad, 3rd May 1875; Surat, 14th Aug 1875; Ag Sr Collr 19th Apr to 20th June 1876; Jr Collr Surat, 28th June 1877; Ag Sr Collr Surat, 15th Sept 1877; Jr Collr 15th Nov 1877; Ag Sr Collr Surat, 4th July 1878; Sr Collr 5th May 1879; Ag Comr of Customs, Opium and Abkari, and Reporter Genl of Extl Come, 26th May 1879.

1857. JOHN HAY GRANT.—Arrd 6th Feb 1857; Supy Asst Collr Ahmednagar, 12th Apr 1851; Supy Third Asst Ahmednagar, 26th Oct 1871; Railway Magt, Thal Ghat, 11th July 1859; Ag Third Asst 1st Oct 1860; acted as First Asst 6th May to 26th Aug 1861; Ag Second Asst 24th Dec 1861; Third Asst, Ag as Second Asst, Ahmednagar, 7th Apr 1862; Asst Rev and Police Comr, S D, 12th Mar 1863; Ag First Asst, Ahmednagar, 19th Jan 1864; Second Asst, Ag First Asst, Ahmednagar, 30th Mar 1864; First Asst, 31st Jan 1865; Ag Collr 10th Mar 1860; Ag Dy Comr of Customs, P D, Bombay, 14th June 1866; Ag Comr of Customs from 10th Sep to 26th Nov 1866; Ag Dy Comr of Customs, 27th Nov 1866; on furl 14th May 1867 to 13th May 1870; on subs all 14th May 1870; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 10th June 1870; Belgaum, 1st Aug 1870; Nasik, 17th Jan 1871; Ag Collr Nasik, 12th Sep to 9th Nov 1871; Ag 1st Asst Collr Nasik, 10th Nov 1871; Ag Collr Khandesh, 13th Sep 1872; Ag 1st Asst Nasik, 28th Dec 1872; Ag Collr Kolaba, 6th Feb 1873; First Asst Nasik, Ag Collr Kolaba, 26th Feb 1873; Ag Collr Satara, 9th May 1873; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 19th Jan 1874; Ag Collr Satara, 20th Feb 1874; Ag Collr Poona, 18th May 1874; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 21st June 1874; Ag Dy Comr of Customs 5th Nov 1854; Ag Comr of Customs 24th Nov to 13th Dec 1874, and 25th Dec 1874 to 7th Mar 1875; Dy Comr of Customs 8th Mar 1875; Ag Jr Collr Sholapur, 8th Apr 1875; 1st Asst Collr Nasik, and Ag Munl Comr, Bombay, 1st Feb 1877; Jr Collr Kaladgi, Ag Munl Comr, Bombay, 22nd Sep 1877; confd as Munl Comr, Bombay, 12th Nov 1871.

1857. ALAN ARTHUR CLARKE JERVOISE.—Arr 23rd Mar 1858; Asst Collr Ahmednagar, 24th July 1858; Ag Asst Collr Poona, 31st Aug 1850; Supy 3rd Asst Poona, 7th Mar 1860; on leave priv aff from 24th May to 14th Nov 1860; 3rd Asst Khandesh, 27th Aug 1861; Ag 2nd Asst Dharwar, 12th Mar 1862; 3rd Asst Poona, Ag 2nd Asst Dharwar, 7th Apr 1862; 1st Asst Kanara, 16th Mar 1864; Ag Collr Kanara, 4th May 1865; on sick leave 29th Nov 1865 to 28th May 1867; Ag Sub Collr Sholapur, 11th Jan 1868; Ag Collr Sholapur, 10th July to 3rd Sep 1869; Ag Extra 1st Asst of Panch Mahals, 16th Dec 1869 and 3rd May 1873, Ag Dy Comr of Customs 1st May to 23rd Aug 1874; 1st Asst Kanara, 7th Sep 1874; Ag Jr Collr 2nd Oct 1874; spl leave in India from 22nd Oct to 8th Nov 1874; Collr Kanara, 9th Nov 1874; 1st Asst 9th Feb 1875; Ag Jr Collr Thana, 9th Mar 1876; Jr Collr Belgaum, Ag Thana, 25th Sep 1877; Ag Sr Collr Thana, 5th Oct 1877; Jr Collr 12th Nov 1877; Ag Sr Collr 1st July 1878; Jr Collr 11th Oct 1878; Ag Sr Collr 11th Dec 1878; Jr Collr 28th Jan 1879; Sr Collr 2nd Mar 1879; furl for 14 mos from 21st Apr 1879.

1856. WILLIAM HEURTLEY NEWNHAM, M.A., Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 17th Dec 1856; Asst to the Collr Belgaum, 27th Mar 1858; attached Office Dir of Pub Instr 26th June 1858; Supy 3rd Asst Dharwar, 16th Mar 1860; Ag Asst Judge Thana, 15th June 1861; Ahmednagar, 26th Nov 1861; Asst Judge 7th May 1862; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 9th July 1863; Thana, 20th July 1863; Asst Judge Thana, 21st Sept 1863; Ag Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri 9th Jan to 20th Apr 1865; Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 1st July to 23rd Oct 1865; Asst Judge Dharwar, Ag Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 23rd Oct 1865; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 14th Feb 1866; Sr Asst Judge 14th Mar 1866; Ag Regr, H Court, App Side, Bombay, 10th May 1866; furl 14th Mar 1867 to 12th Mar 1870; on subs allow from 13th Mar 1873; Ag Jt Judge Ahmedabad, 20th May 1870; Ag Judge Surat, 23rd June 1870; Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, Ag Judge at Surat, 6th Aug 1870; Jt Judge Thana, Ag Judge at Surat, 16th Apr 1872; Ag 2nd Gr Judge Ahmedabad, 27th Mar 1873; 2nd Gr Judge 31st Mar 1873; Ag 1st Gr from 12th Mar to 11th June 1874, from 23rd Nov 1874 to 11th Feb 1875, and from 27th Feb 1875; Ag Judge Poona,

9th June 1875 ; 1st Gr Judge 15th June 1875; Ahmedabad, 11th Sep 1875 ; Ag Judge Poona, 23rd Feb 1876 ; Judge Ahmednagar, Ag at Poona, 12th Feb 1877 ; furl 1st Nov 1877 to 8th Apl 1879 ; Judge Poona, 13th Apl 1879.

1856. JAMES BELLOT RICHEY.—Arrd 7th Dec 1856 ; placed under Col of Surat, 13th Dec 1856 ; of Poona, 15th Apl 1857 ; Supy Asst Khandesh, 13th Jan 1858 ; Supy 3rd Asst Khandesh, 18th Mar 1859 ; Ag 3rd Asst Khandesh, 25th Apl 1860 ; Ed Insp N D, 1st Aug 1860 ; Ag Asst to the Rev Comr N D, 15th Feb 1862 ; Asst Rev Comr, N D 24th Feb 1863 ; Offr Under-Secy to Govt Rev, Finl and Genl Depts 12th Sept 1863 ; furl 4th Apl 1864 to 13th Apl 1865 ; leave without pay 14th Apl to 11th July 1865 ; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 18th July 1865 ; 2nd Asst Poona, Ag 1st Asst 19th July 1865 ; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 13th Feb 1866 ; Extra 1st Asst 7th Mar 1866 ; Ag Talukdari Set Offr Ahmedabad, 24th May 1866 ; 1st Asst Poona, Talukdari, Set Offr Gujarat, 27th Nov 1866 ; confd 14th May 1867 ; Asst to the Col of Ahmedabad, 14th Sep 1867 ; Ag Col Ahmedabad 9th Nov 1868 ; furl 15th May 1870 to 11th Mar 1872 ; Talukdari Set Offr 3rd May 1874 ; Asst to G G's Agent and Spl Comr, Baroda, 16th Dec 1874 ; Ag Jr Collr Surat, 29th June 1875 ; on spl duty Ahmednagar and Poona Dists, 15th July 1875 ; Talukdari Sett'l Offr, 1st Feb 1876 ; Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals, 1st Mar 1876 ; Ag Jr Collr Dharrow, 19th Dec 1876 ; Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals, 18th Jan 1878 ; furl 29th Apl 1878 ; Jr Collr Ahmednagar, 1st Jan 1879 ; Collr Satara, 5th May 1879.

1857. GEORGE WADDINGTON.—Arrd 21st Dec 1857 ; placed under the Collr of Kurachee, 4th Jan 1858, of Thana, 26th Oct 1858 ; Asst Collr Satara, 10th Jan 1859 ; Supy 3rd Asst Collr Satara, 22nd Aug 1859 ; 3rd Asst Satara, 11th Sep 1860 ; 2nd Asst 16th June 1861 ; Ag Extra 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 7th June 1865 ; 2nd Asst 9th July 1865 ; Ag 1st Asst 12th Mar 1866 ; 1st Asst Dharrow, Ag Ahmednagar, 10th Apl 1867 ; Ag Collr Ahmednagar, 21st Mar to 9th May 1867, confirmed 4th May 1867 ; furl private affairs from 27th Mar 1870 to 27th Mar 1872 ; 1st Asst Dharrow, 13th Apl 1872 ; Ag Collr 11th Apl to 10th July 1873 ; 30th Mar to 19th July 1875, from 19th Apl to 18th July 1873, 20th Nov to 18th Dec 1876, spl leave 7th May to 31st Oct 1877 ; 1st Asst Dharrow, 15th Nov 1877 ; Collr 18th Jan to 3rd Mar 1878 ; Ag Jr Collr Kolaba, 23rd May 1878 ; Ag Sr Collr 15th July 1878 ; Ag Jr Col 1st Oct 1878 ; Kaladgi, Ag at Kolaba, 16th Dec 1878 ; Ag Col Belgaum, 4th Jan 1879 ; Ag Sr Col 17th Mar 1879.

1857. ARTHUR HUME SPRY.—Arrd 22nd Oct 1857 ; placed under the Col of Thana, 11th Nov 1857 ; Asst Col Kairi, 24th July 1858 ; on private affairs to Allahabad 1st Aug 1858 to 18th Jan 1859 ; 3rd Asst Col Kaira, 22nd Aug 1859 ; Ag 3rd Asst 11th Sep 1860 ; Spl Offr of Income Tax, 26th Oct 1860 ; Ag 3rd Asst Ahmednagar, 24th Dec 1861 ; confd 7th Apl 1862 ; Ag 2nd Asst Poona, 14th May 1862 ; Ahmedabad, 2nd Sep 1862 ; 1st Asst 2nd Sep 1862 to 9th Mar 1863 ; 3rd Asst Kaira, 18th Feb 1863 ; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 14th Mar to 1st June 1863 ; 2nd Asst 24th Mar 1864 ; Ag Col Kaira, 29th Aug 1864 ; Ag 1st Asst Khandesh, 1st Mar 1865 ; 1st Asst 23rd June 1865 ; Asst Pol Agent 7th Feb 1866 ; Collr 12th Oct to 12th Dec 1866 ; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 7th Mar 1867 ; 1st Asst 14th May 1867 ; Ahmednagar, 1st Apl to 4th June 1871 ; Ag Talukdari Set Offr, Gujarat, 17th Nov 1873 ; 1st Asst Ahmednagar, Talukdari Set 15th Sep to 8th 1874 ; 1st Asst Ahmednagar, from 9th Nov 1874 ; Ag Col Kaladgi, 20th Sep 1876 ; 1st Asst, Ahmednagar, 20th Nov 1876 ; Ag Jr Collr, Kaladgi, 3rd May 1877 ; Ag Collr, Sholapur, 31st Dec 1878 ; Ag Sr Collr, 24th Mar 1879.

1857. CHARLES BRADLEY PRITCHARD.—Arrd 24th Jan 1858 ; placed under the Collr of Bombay, 25th Jan 1858 ; of Thana, 10th Mar 1858 ; of Belgaum, 12th Apl 1858 ; Supy 3rd Asst 1st May 1859 ; Ag 3rd Asst, 13th Feb 1860 ; 3rd Asst, 29th May 1861 ; Ag 2nd Asst 7th Apl 1862 ; 2nd Asst, 25th Nov 1863 ; Ag 1st Asst, Dharrow, 12th Oct 1864 ; sick leave 14th Feb 1865 ; 2nd Asst Belgaum, 8th Mar 1866 ; Ag 1st Asst, Thana, 8th Apl 1866 ; Extra 2nd and Ag 1st Asst Khandesh, 21st Feb 1867 ; 1st Asst 14th May 1867 ; Ag Collr, 3rd Aug to 26th Sept 1867 ; Collr, 30th May to 14th June 1869 ; on spl duty at Poona P W D 14th Oct 1870 ; Ag Collr Salt Rev, Bombay Presy 15th Oct 1871 ; confirmed 17th Feb 1873 ; on spl duty in Madras as Prest of the Salt Comm 10th Jan to 11th Sept 1876 ; Collr Salt Rev, Bombay Presy, 16th Sept 1876 ; on spl duty Abbkari system 21st May 1877 to 28th Mar 1878 ; Ag Comr of Customs, and Reporter Genl of Ext'l Com 29th Mar 1878 ; furl for one year from 26th May 1879.

1858. HERBERT MILLS BIRDWOOD, M.A., LL.M.—Arrd 26th Jan 1859 ; Asst Collr, Thana, 14th July 1859 ; 3rd Asst, 18th Apl 1860 ; Ag 3rd Asst Broach, 24th Nov 1860 ; Supy 3rd Asst, Surat, 27th May 1861 ; Ag 3rd Asst, Ahmedabad, 27th Aug

1861; 3rd Asst 28th Jan 1862; Ag 2nd Asst 12th Mar 1862; Ag Asst Judge, Thana, 14th May 1862; 2nd Asst Ahmedabad, 14th Apr 1862; 3rd Asst Poona, Ag Asst Judge Thana, 18th Feb 1863; Under-Secy to Govt, Judl Dept and Secy to the Legisl Council, Bombay, 29th June 1863; Ag 1st Asst Pol Agent, Kathiawar, 1st June 1866; Ag Regr, H Court, Bombay, 11th Mar 1867; Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, Ag Regr, H C B, 3rd May 1867; fur 9th Jan 1869 to 9th Apr 1870; Ag Regr, High Court, App Side, 12th Apr 1870; Regr, High Court, 14th May to 12th Nov 1871; Ag Judge Ratnagiri, 11th Dec 1871; Sr Asst Judge Poona, Sholapur, Ag Judge Ratnagiri, 16th Apr 1872; Ag Jt Judge Thana, 11th Apr 1873; Ag Judge Surat, 14th May 1873; 2nd gr Judge 12th Apr 1874; Jt Judge Thana dist, Ag Judge Surat, 12th Oct 1874; Judge Surat, 22nd Mar 1875; 2nd gr 12th Feb 1875; Ag 1st gr Judge 24th May to 30th Nov 1875 and from 5th Jan 1876; furl 16th Apr 1877 to 12th Feb 1879; 1st gr Judge at Surat, 16th Feb 1879.

Class III of 12 years' standing.

1860. WILLIAM WEDDERBURN.—Arrd 25th Nov 1860; Asst Collr Ahmednagar, 16th Apr 1861; Dharwar 9th July 1861; Ag 3rd Asst 22nd Feb 1862; deputed to North Kanara, 8th Apr 1862; Asst Collr North Kanara, 10th Jan 1863; Ag 1st Asst 1st May 1863; 2nd Asst 16th Mar 1864; Ag Judge S C Court, Ahmedabad, 15th Oct 1864; Kurrachee, 2nd Oct 1865; Asst Judge Ahmednagar, Ag Judge Kurrachee, 5th Oct 1865; Ag Judl Asst to the Comr in Sind, Kurrachee, 11th Jan 1866; 1st Judge S C Court, Kurrachee, 13th Jan 1866; Ag Under Secy to Govt Judl and Pol Depts, and Secy to the Legisl Council 8th June 1866; Ag Regr Genl of Assurs, Bombay, 2nd Oct 1866; Ag Secy to Govt, Judl, Pol, Edl, Secret and Persian Depts, 29th Dec 1866; Under Secy to Govt, Judl and Pol Depts, 3rd May 1867; leave on private affairs 14th May to 11th Nov 1867; Ag Regr, H Court, 9th Jan 1869; Ag Secy to Govt, Judl, Pol, Edl, Sec and Pers Depts, 26th Feb 1870; furl 11th Mar 1872 to 6th Mar 1874; Ag Secy to Govt, 10th Mar 1864; Ag Judl Comr in Sind and Judge Sadar Court 30th May 1874; Jt Judge Thana Dist, Ag Judl Comr in Sind 12th Feb 1875; 2nd gr Judge, Ratnagiri, Ag Judl Comr in Sind, 15th June 1875; Judge, Ratnagiri, Ag 1st gr, 7th Feb 1876; on spl duty in Bombay from 2nd Nov to 10th Dec 1876; Ag 1st gr Judge, Thana, 11th Dec 1876; furl 3rd Apr 1877 to 27th Sept 1878; extend leave without pay from 23rd Sept to 26th Dec 1878; 1st gr Judge, Ahmednagar, 2nd Jan 1879.

1860. CLARENCE BOVILL IZON.—Arrd 25th Nov 1860; Asst Poona, 2nd Dec 1860; Sholapur, 20th July 1861; Supy Asst Thana, 21st July 1862; Ag 3rd Asst, 18th Feb 1863; 3rd Asst, 24th Mar 1863; Ag 2nd Asst, 2nd Mar 1864; 2nd Asst, Kanara, 16th Mar 1864; Ag Asst Judge, Poona, 8th July 1864; Thana, 24th Dec 1864; Third Asst Khandesh, Ag Asst Judge, Thana, 23rd June 1865; Asst Judge, Thana, 23rd Oct 1865; Ag Sr Asst Judge, Kaira, 11th Apr 1866; Jt Judge, Ratnagiri, 4th June 1866; furl 29th Dec 1867 to 19th Dec 1868; Ag Sr Asst Judge, Ahmedabad, Kaira, 27th Dec 1868; Sholapur, 27th Jan 1869; Ag Judge Ahmedabad, 21st June 1869; Ag Regr, H C, Bombay, 7th Feb 1870; Ag Jt Judge Kaira, 23rd June 1870; Ag Judge Ratnagiri, 23rd Mar 1871; furl 2nd Jan 1872 to 2nd July 1873; Ag Jt Judge Thana, for Nasik, 18th July 1873; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, Ag Jt Judge Thana, 22nd July 1873; Jt Judge Thana, 12th Apr 1874; 2nd gr Judge Ahmedabad, and Ag 1st gr Judge Ratnagiri, 8th Feb 1877; furl 1st Dec 1877 to 26th Dec 1878; 2nd gr Judge Ahmedabad, Ag 1st gr, 11th Jan 1879; Judge Ratnagiri, 26th Apr 1879.

1860. GEORGE MORRISON MACPHERSON, M.A., Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 10th Oct 1860; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 17th Jan 1862; Ag 3rd Asst 6th Sep 1862; 3rd Asst 18th Feb 1863; Ag 2nd Asst 24th Mar 1863; Asst Judge Surat, 17th Feb 1864; Ahmedabad, 16th May 1865; Ag Judge Hyderabad, 8th Mar 1866; Ag Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 1st June 1866; sick leave 6th Dec 1866 to 16th Jan 1867; Ratnagiri, 2nd Feb 1867; Ag Judge Kurrachee, 15th Apr 1867; Judge S C Court, Kurrachee, 3rd May 1867; Judge Shikarpur, 23rd Mar 1868; furl m c 4th May 1869 to 5th Mar 1871; Ag Jt Judge Kaira, 9th Mar 1871; Thana, 1st Nov 1871; Ag 2nd gr Judge Dhulia, 8th Apr 1872; furl 30th Sep 1872 to 27th Nov 1873; Ag 2nd gr Judge Surat, 1st Dec 1873; Satara, 12th Mar 1874; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, Ag 2nd gr Judge Satara 13th Apr to 11th June 1874; Sr Asst Judge Poona 12th June 1874; Sholapur 12th Oct 1874; Ag 2nd gr Judge Khandesh 3rd Nov 1874; Kanara 8th Mar 1875; Ag 1st gr 15th June to 6th Sep 1875, 5th Jan to 6th Feb 1876, 16th Feb to 20th June 1876, and from 16th Sep 1876 to 15th Feb 1877; Ag 2nd gr Judge Kanara 16th Feb to 25th Mar 1877; Ag 1st gr Judge Surat, 4th Apr 1877; 2nd gr Judge Khandesh, Ag 1st gr Surat 31st Dec 1877; furl for 18 months 30th Sep 1878.

1860. JOSHUA KING, M.A.—Arrd 26th Oct 1860; Asst Collr Ahmedabad, 7th Nov 1861; Supy Asst 17th Jan 1862; Ag 3rd Asst 10th July 1862; Ag 2nd Asst 10th Jan to 9th Mar and from 14th Mar to 21st June 1863; Ag 2nd Asst Kaira 22nd June 1863; Ag Asst Judge Ahmedabad 17th Feb 1864; S C Court Ahmedabad 20th Apl to 22nd May 1864; 2nd Asst Surat 17th May 1865; Ag 1st Asst Thana 5th June 1865; 2nd Asst Poona; Ag 1st Asst Thana 23rd June 1865; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri; Ag 1st Asst Thana 19th July 1865; Ag 2nd Asst Thana 14th Dec 1865; Kaladgi Ag 2nd Asst Thana 2nd Jan 1866; 2nd Asst Thana 7th Mar 1866; Ag Under Secy to Govt Rev, Finl and Genl Depts Bombay 4th May 1866; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 24th Apl 1867; Ag 1st Asst Dharwar 27th May 1867; 1st Asst 15th Nov 1867; furl 30th Dec 1867 to 29th Dec 1868, and leave without pay 30th Dec 1868 to 7th May 1869; on subs allow from 8th May 1869; 1st Asst Broach, 10th July 1869; Ag Collr and Supt of Stamps Stationery Bomby, 16th July 1869; 1st Asst; Kaira, Ag Collr Bombay, 22nd Dec 1869; Collr and Supt of Stamps Bombay 26th Sep 1869 to 29th Jan 1870; 1st Asst Kaira, 30th Jan 1870; furl 21st Apl 1873 to 14th Dec 1874; Talukdari Set Offr 24th Dec 1874 to 27th June 1875; Ag Talukdari Set Offr 28th June 1875, 31st Jan 1876; 1st Asst Kaira, 9th Feb 1876; Talukdari Set Offr 23rd Feb 1876; on spl duty, Baroda, 21st Nov 1877; Jr Collr Ahmednagar, 5th May 1879, Collr Ahmednagar, 25th June 1879.

1861. ARTHUR CHARLES TREVOR.—Arrd 28th Oct 1861; Collr Surat, 23rd Apl 1862 Supy Asst Ahmedabad, 26th Jan 1863; 3rd Asst 19th Aug 1863; Ag 2nd Asst Kaira, 14th Mar 1864; 2nd Asst 22nd Sep 1864; under Survey Set Offr, Gujarat, Surat, 31st Oct 1864; 2nd Asst Kaira, 1st Sep 1865; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 21st Sep 1865; 2nd Asst Surat, 13th May 1867; Ag 1st Asst Thana, 28th Aug 1867; 2nd Asst Khandesh, Ag 1st Asst Thana, 2nd Dec 1867; Ag 1st Asst Collr Satara, 24th Apl 1869; on furl 14th Jan 1871 to 28th Dec 1872; acted as 1st Asst Nasik, 8th Feb to 11th May 1873; Ag 1st Asst Nasik, 7th June 1873; 1st Asst Kaladgi, Ag 1st Asst Nasik, 27th Feb 1874; Ag Extra 1st Asst Kaira, for Panch Mahals, Collr of Stamp 23rd Feb 1875; 1st Asst Broach, Ag Panch Mahals, 14th Dec 1875; 1st Asst Broach 1st Mar 1876; Ag Dy Comr of Customs and Opium, 14th Sep 1876; Ag Municipal Comr Bombay 23rd Jan 1877; Dy Comr of Customs and Opium 28th June 1877; Ag Colr of Bombay and Suptd of Stamps 1st Jan 1879; Dy Comr of Customs and Opium 15th Feb 1879.

1862. THEODORE HENRY STEWART.—Arrd 28th Oct 1862; Asst Colr Surat 6th May 1863; 3rd Asst 19th Aug 1863; Ag 3rd Asst Kaira, 1st Aug 1864; 3rd Asst Ahmedabad, Kaira 19th Apl 1865; Ag 2nd Asst 1st Nov 1864 to 23rd June 1865; on spl duty in the Panch Mahals, 15th Sep 1865; Ag Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals 9th May 1866; on spl duty Surat, 16th Aug 1867; Ag 1st Asst Kaira spl duty in the Panch Mahals, 3rd Sep 1867; 1st Asst Kaira, 5th June 1868; furl on 25th Oct 1868 to 22nd Oct 1870; Ag 1st Asst Belgaum, 3rd Jan 1871; Ag Colr Belgaum 14th Oct 1872; Ag 1st Asst Belgaum 26th Jan 1872; 1st Asst Belgaum, 30th Jan 1875; Ag Jr Collr Kaladgi, 6th Apl 1876; furl 8th Oct 1876 to 29th Jan 1878; First Asst Broach, 16th Feb 1878; Ag Jr Collr Ahmednagar, 16th Apl 1878; Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals, Collr of Stamp 1st Jan 1879; Ag Jr Collr Satara, 19th May 1879; Ag Sr Collr.

1862. WILLIAM BURY MULOCK.—Arrd 28th Nov 1862; Asst Regr App Side, H Court Bombay, 21st Aug 1863; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 24th Aug 1864; Ag 1st Asst 14th Sep 1865; 2nd Asst Khandesh, 9th Apl 1866; sick leave 9th Aug 1866 to 26th Oct 1867; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 9th Nov 1867; Thana, 24th Apl 1870; furl 18th Mar 1872 to 11th Apl 1873; Ag Asst Com and Branch Ins Gl of Assurances in Sind from 29th Apl 1873; Ag Insp of Education in Sind from 2nd May to 19th Nov 1873; Comr in Sind 30th Nov 1874 to 23rd Jan 1875, 27th Oct to 22nd Nov 1875, 1st Asst Collr Ratnagiri, Ag Asst Comr in Sind, 19th Sep 1875; Asst Comr and Br Insp Gl of Regn in Sind, 13th Oct 1876; Ag 1st Asst and Railway Magt, Thana, 28th Nov 1876; furl 31st Aug 1877 to 17th Mar 1879; Ag Jr Collr Thana, 24th Mar 1879; Ag Sr Collr.

1862. JAMES RICHARD NAYLOR.—Arrd 28th Oct 1862; Asst Collr Ahmedabad, 26th May 1863; 3rd Asst 10th July 1863; Ag 3rd Asst 7th Mar 1864; sick leave in India 14th Oct to 13th Dec 1864; 2nd Asst Kaladgi, 2nd Dec 1864; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum, 23rd June 1865; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, 26th Jan 1866; Ag Sr Asst Judge Broach, 21st June 1866; Ratnagiri 5th May 1867; 2nd Asst Kanara, Ag Sr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 21st June 1867; Asst Judge Dharwar, 7th July 1867; Ahmednagar, 22nd June 1868; 1st gr Ratnagiri, 25th Jan 1869; Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 6th May 1869; furl 6th May 1871 to 30th Apl 1873; 1st gr Asst Judge Khandesh, 13th May 1873; pro-tem, Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 1st June 1873; spl duty 21st Apl 1874; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, Ag spl duty, 28th Oct 1874; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, spl duty, 15th June

1875; acd as Legal Rembr 4th May 1874 to 7th July 1876; Rembr of Legal Affairs, 8th July 1876.

1862. SEXTUS HOWARD PHILLPOTTS.—Arrd 28th Oct 1862; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 25th July 1863; 3rd Asst Khandesh, 11th July 1864; 2nd Asst 20th Feb 1865; Asst Judge Ahmednagar, 6th Mar 1866; Ag Asst Judge Thana, 6th Aug 1866; Asst Judge, Ahmednagar, 22nd Feb 1867; Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaira, 7th May 1867; Broach, 2nd July 1867; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Surat, 1st Feb 1869; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 21st June 1869; Ag Dist Judge Shikapur, 9th Dec 1869; Hyderabad, Sind, 24th Apr 1872; Dist Judge Shikapur; Ag Dist Judge Hyderabad, 3rd June 1873; Ag Judge Shikapur, 9th Sep to 18th Nov 1874; Judge, Hyderabad, 19th Nov 1874; spl leave 24th May to 17th Nov 1875; Judge Hyderabad 24th July 1875; Ag Judge Shikarpur 13th Dec 1875; furl 24th Apr 1876 to 23rd Oct 1877; Ag 1st gr Judge 9th Nov 1877; 2nd gr Judge Ratnagiri, Ag Judge Poona 28th Sept 1878; Judge Ahmedabad, 23rd Apr 1879.

1863. GEORGE HERBERT DASHWOOD WILSON.—Arrd 26th Nov 1863; Extra Dy Colr Ahmednagar 27th Sept 1864; 3rd Asst 1st Mar 1865; Ratnagiri (Ag at Satara,) 22nd Mar 1865; 2nd Asst Satara 19th July 1865; Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi 1st Apr 1865; 2nd Asst Kaladgi, Ag 1st Asst 3rd Oct 1868; 2nd Asst Kolaba 28th July 1869; Ag 1st Asst Broach 10th Sep 1869 and 17th May 1870; Ag Jr Colr Broach 17th Nov 1871 to 24th Jan 1872; furl 15th Apr 1872 to 14th Apr 1874; Ag 1st Asst Kaira 20th Apr 1874; 1st Asst Kaladgi, Ag Kaira 20th Dec 1875; 1st Asst Kaira 21st Feb 1876; Ag Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals, 2nd Mar 1877; Ag Political Agent, Rewa Kantha, Panch Mahals 20th Oct 1877 to 29th Jan 1878; furl 25th Feb 1878 to 11th Mar 1879; Ag Jr Colr Kaira 20th Mar 1879.

1863. WILLIAM ALBERT EAST, M.A.—Arrd 26th Nov 1863; placed under the Colr of Satara 23rd Dec 1863; 1st Asst Regr High Court Ap Side 6th Sep 1864; Dy Regr and Sealer High Court 6th Mar 1865; 3rd Asst Poona, 21st Feb 1866; Ag 2nd Asst 21st Feb 1867; 2nd Asst 14th May 1867; Ag 1st Asst Kanara 19th Mar 1868; 2nd Asst Satara Ag 1st Asst Kanara 30th Sept 1868; furl m c 22nd May 1870 to 17th May 1872; Ag 1st Asst Nasik, 15th Oct 1872; Khandesh, 2nd Nov 1872; Surat, 26th May 1873; Ahmedabad, doing duty at Sholapur, 2nd July 1874; Ag 1st Asst Sholapur, 8th Sept 1874; Surat, 2nd Nov 1874; spl leave from 1st June to 29th Nov 1875; Ag 1st Asst Colr Surat, 10th Dec 1875; 1st Asst Kaladgi, Ag Surat, 19th Feb 1876; 1st Asst Satara, 27th Mar 1876; Supt of Panchgani, 1st Nov 1876 to 12th Feb 1877; 1st Asst Satara, 29th Oct 1877; furl 1st Feb to 30th Dec 1878; 1st Asst Colr Ahmednagar, 15th Jan 1879; Ag Jr Colr Khandesh, 20th Mar 1879; Surat, 24th May 1879.

1863. MATHEW HENRY SCOTT.—Arrd 16th Dec 1863; placed under the Colr of Surat, 23rd Dec 1863; Supy Asst 8th July 1865; 3rd Asst 20th Aug 1866; Ag 3rd Asst Kaira, 21st Sept 1866; 3rd Asst 13th Mar 1867; Ag 2nd Asst 12th Mar 1868; Ag Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 6th June 1868; Ag 2nd Asst Kaira, 12th Feb 1869; Ag Extra Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 26th Apr 1869; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 8th Mar 1870; Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 20th Feb 1871; Ag Judge 15th Jan 1872; Ag Judge Shikarpur, 27th May 1872; 2nd gr Asst Judge 12th June 1872; 1st gr Ahmedabad, Ag Judge Shikarpur, 3rd June 1873; furl 24th Apr 1875 to 11th Mar 1877; Ag Judge Satara, 2nd gr 23rd Mar 1877; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 23rd June 1877; Ag 1st gr 22nd Nov 1877; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi 11th Feb 1878; Ag 2nd gr Judge Dharwar 6th Feb 1879; Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi 9th Apr 1879.

1863. WILLOUGHBY WOODWARD, M.A.—Arrd 26th Nov 1863; placed under the Colr of Surat 23rd Dec 1863; Extra Dy Colr Ahmedabad, 15th Oct 1864; 3rd Asst 23rd June 1865; Ag 2nd Asst Surat 27th Mar 1866; 2nd Asst Kaira, Ag Surat 24th Apr 1867; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad 11th Mar 1868; 2nd Asst Nasik 28th July 1869; Ag 1st Asst Kaira 14th Aug 1869; furl m c 5th Feb 1870 to 28th Oct 1861; Ag 2nd Asst Mag of Police Bombay 1st June 1872; Ag 1st Asst Ratnagiri 6th May 1873; Colr Ratnagiri 20th July to 19th Oct 1873; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, Ag 1st Asst 26th Jan 1874; Supt of Police 1st Jan to 5th Feb 1874; 22nd Aug to 17th Sept 1875; Ag Jr Colr Ratnagiri 25th Jan 1876; Ag 1st Asst Nasik 1st June 1876; 1st Asst Colr Ratnagiri, Ag Nasik 13th Oct 1876; Ag Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals also Ag Political Agent Rewa Kantha 17th June 1878.

1863. ARTHUR CHORLEY WATT.—Arrd 26th Nov 1863; placed under the Colr of Ahmednagar 23rd Dec 1863; Kanara 6th Apr 1864; Extra Dy Colr Kanara 24th Oct 1864; Supy 3rd Asst 22nd Mar 1865; Ag 2nd Asst 12th July 1865; Asst Judge Surat and Ag Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 31st Jan 1866; Ag Asst Judge Thana 23rd

Feb 1866; Poona 10th July 1866; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 10th July to 11th Sep 1867; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 18th Sep 1867; Satara, 4th Dec 1867; Poona, 5th Oct 1868; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 24th Oct 1868; Asst Judge Satara, 16th Dec 1868; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 10th Feb 1869; Ag 1st gr 10th Apl 1869; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 16th Dec 1869 to 4th Oct 1870; Ag Judge Poona, 7th Oct 1870; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 7th Dec 1870; Ag Judge Khandesh, 24th Feb 1871; Asst Judge Poona, Ag Judge at Khandesh, 6th Dec 1871; Regr App Side H Court, Bombay, 12th June 1872; furl 19th Oct 1873 to 5th Oct 1875; Regr App Side H Court, 13th Oct 1875; Ag 1st gr Judge Ratnagiri, 18th Feb 1878; Ag 2nd gr 18th Mar 1878; Ag 1st gr 28th July 1878; Ag 2nd Gr 11th Jan 1879; Regr App Side, High, Court, 26th Apl 1879.

1864. SATYANDRANATH TAGORE.—Arrd 12th Dec 1864; Supy Asst Magt, Ahmedabad, 27th Apl 1865; Supy 3rd Asst 19th Oct 1865; Ag Asst Judge 1st Sep 1866; sick leave in India from 28th Oct 1866 to 7th Apl 1867; Ag Asst Judge 4th July 1867; sick leave from 16th Oct 1867 to 15th June 1868; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 24th Dec 1867; Ag Asst Judge 26th June 1868; Asst Judge Dharwar, Ag Asst Judge Ahmednagar, 19th Oct 1868; Ag Asst Judge Satara, 8th Feb 1869; 2nd gr Asst Judge Dhulia, 7th Apl 1869 1st gr Asst Judge 8th Mar 1870; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 28th Mar 1871; Ag Jt Judge Thana, 28th June 1872; Ag Judge of the S C C, Ahmednagar, 22nd Mar 1873; 1st gr Asst Judge 5th May 1873 to 27th Oct 1874; Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 30th June 1873; 1st gr Asst Judge, Ag Sr Asst Judge 15th June 1875; Judge Shikarpur, Ag at Hyderabad, 30th Aug 1875; Ag 2nd gr Judge Ahmedabad, 19th Apl 1876; Ag 1st gr Judge, 30th Sept 1876; Ag 2nd gr 8th Feb 1877; furl for two years 20th Sept 1878.

1864. CHARLES GEORGE BLATHWAYT.—Arrd 2nd Jan 1865; placed under the Collr of Ahmednagar, 5th Jan 1865; Asst Collr Dharwar, 5th Feb 1866; Supy 3rd Asst Kaladgi, 13th Feb 1867; Ag 2nd Asst 8th Feb 1868; Ag 2nd Asst Poona, 29th Sep 1869; Ag 1st Asst Kanara, 3rd June 1870; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, Ag 1st Asst Kanara, 27th Dec 1874; Ag 1st Asst Nasik, 1st Nov 1872; on furl 2nd Jan 1873 to 22th Dec 1874; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 24th Jan 1875; Ag Collr Ahmednagar, 12th Oct to 16th Nov 1875 and 17th Mar to 23rd Apl 1876; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 15th Sep 1876; 1st Asst Khandesh, 10th Nov 1876. Ag Ahmednagar; Khandesh, 28th Nov 1876; Ag Jr Magt, Satara, 15th July 1878; Kanara, 14th Oct 1878; Satara, 14th Jan 1879; 1st Asst Sholapur, 12th May 1879; spl leave on pri affs for 6 months 30th May 1869.

1864. JOHN NUGENT.—Arrd 29th Nov 1864; Asst Magt, Satara, 7th Oct 1865; Ag Asst Edul Insp, C D 1st Feb to 19th Nov 1866; Supy Asst Magt Thana, 18th Dec 1866; Ag 3rd Asst 7th Mar 1867; 3rd Asst 14th May 1867; 2nd Asst Kanara, Ag Surat, 10th July 1867; Ag 2nd Asst Thana, 18th Sept 1867; Asst Poona, 30th Sept 1868; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 13th Oct 1868; 2nd Asst Thana, 1st Sept 1869; Ag Under-Secy to Govt, and Ag Secy to Legisl Council, Bombay, 30th Apl 1871; confirmed 12th Feb 1875; furl 8th May 1875 to 7th May 1877; Under-Secy to Govt, and Secy to Legisl Council 10th May 1877; Ag Secy to Govt, Rev, Finl and Gl Depts, 19th Mar 1878; reverted 19th June 1878; Ag Collr of Salt Rev, 14th July 1878; reverted 10th Oct 1878; Ag Secy to Govt, Pol, Secret, Judl, Edul and Per Depts, 15th Feb 1879.

1864. EDWARD CORDEAUX.—Arrd 29th Nov 1864; placed under the Collr of Satara, 10th Dec 1864; Asst Collr Satara, 7th Oct 1865; Supy Asst Satara, 13th Jan 1866; 3rd Asst 20th Aug 1866; Ratnagiri, 11th Nov 1866; Ag 2nd Asst 6th Apl 1867; 2nd Asst 21st June 1867; Ag 1st Asst 14th Dec 1867; Ag Asst Judge Thana, 14th Mar 1870; furl on m c 1st Apl 1871 to 30th Sep 1872; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 7th Oct 1872; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Poona, 2nd June 1873; Ag Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 3rd Nov 1873; Ag Regr of H C Bombay, 11th Feb 1874; Poona, 19th Apl 1874; Ag Judge Kurachee, 2nd Nov 1874; Ag 2nd gr Judge Surat, 17th Apl 1875; spl leave for 6 months from 17th May 1875; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 3rd Dec 1875; Ag Judge Dharwar, 5th Jan 1876; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 10th Apl 1876; 1st gr Asst Judge 8th July 1876; Ag Judge Khandesh, 1st gr 1st Feb 1877; Ag 2nd gr 8th Feb 1877; Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, Ag 2nd gr Judge Khandesh, 31st Dec 1877; Ag 1st gr Judge, 29th Sept 1878; Ag 2nd gr Judge, Khandesh, 3rd May 1879.

1864. MONTAGU BERNARD BAKER.—Arrd 29th Nov 1864; placed under the Colr of Satara, 10th Dec 1864; Asst Coir Khandesh, 31st May 1865; Supry 3rd Asst 12th Jan 1866, Ag 2nd Asst 4th Sept 1866; Ag Extra 2nd Asst 13th Feb 1867; Extra 2nd Asst 14th May 1867; Ag 1st Asst 3rd Aug 1867; Ag Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 3rd Jan 1868; Asst Judge Dhulia 27th May 1866; Ag Dharwar, 14th Dec 1868; Thana, 20th May 1869; Poona, 17th Feb 1870 Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 7th Oct to 6th Dec 1870;

Kaladgi, 20th May 1871; Ag Judge Dharwar, 4th June to 10th July 1872 furl m c 6th Dec 1872 to 14th Dec 1874; 3rd gr Asst Judge Surat, 3rd June 1873; Thana, 12th Oct 1874; Ag 2nd gr Judge, Ratnagiri, 21st Dec. 1874 to 9th Feb 1875; Dhulia, 22nd Feb 1875; 2nd Gr Asst Judge, Khandesh, 15th June 1875; Ag 1st Gr, 1st Dec 1875; Ag Asst Judge, Poona, 5th Dec 1875; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 3rd Jan 1876; Ag 1st Gr, wsst Judge, Poona, 9th Apl 1876; wg 2nd Gr, Judge, Khandesh, 6th Sept to 16th Nov 1876; Ag Judge Hyderabad, 6th Dec 1876; 1st Gr Asst Judge, Thana, 6th Feb 1877; Ag Judge Hyderabad and Kurrachee, 12th Sept 1877; Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, Ag Judge, Kurrachee, 28th Sept 1878; Ag Judl Comr in Sind and Judge Sadar Court 15th Apl 1879.

1864. GEORGE FRANCIS MYTTON GRANT.—Arrd 12th Dec 1864; placed under the Collr of Satara Dec 1864; Asst Magt, Surat, 7th Oct 1865; Supy Asst 13th Jan 1866; Ag 3rd Asst, Ahmedabad, 1st Sept 1866; 3rd Asst, 13th Mar 1867; Ag 2nd Asst, 3rd Sept 1867; Ag 1st Asst 2nd Apl 1868; 2nd Asst, 17th Nov 1868; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 21st May 1869; Ag Asst Comr, Br Regr Genl, and Edl Insp in Sind, 18th May 1871; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 29th Jan to 25th May 1873; Kaira, 28th May 1873; Ag Extra 1st Asst, Kaira, for Panch Mahals, Collr of Stamp 2nd Apl 1874; furl 24th July 1876; to 17th July 1876; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 29th July to 14th Oct 1876; furl for one year on M C from 23rd Oct 1876; extn to 18th Dec 1878; 1st Asst Surat, 24th Dec 1878; Sachin State, 5th May 1879.

1865. ARTHUR DOUGLAS CAREY.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; placed under the Colr of Ahmedabad, 16th Nov 1865; Asst Mag 10th Jan 1866; Supy 3rd Asst 15th Feb 1867; 3rd Asst Surat, 23rd Dec 1867; Ag 2nd Asst th Feb 1868; Asst Mag Broach, 22nd Sept 1869 1st Asst Surat, 3rd Sept to 9th Oct 1869, 12th Jaa to 17th Aug and from 13th Oct to 12th Dec 1870; Extra 2nd Asst Surat, 15th Mar 1870; 2nd Asst Panch Mahals, 1st Feb 1872; on spl duty, Salt Dept 22nd May 1872; 1st cl Asst Colr of Salt Rev 21st Feb 1874; Ag Dy Colr Salt Rev 14th Aug 1874; 1st cl Asst Colr of Salt Rev 13th Nov 1874; Ag Dy Colr Salt Rev from 7th Jan to 9th Feb 1876; 1st cl Asst Colr of Salt Rev 16th Sept 1876; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 1st Mar 1877; reverted to the Salt Dept 17th May 1877; Colr of Salt Rev 21st May 1877 to 28th Mar 1878.

1865. JAMES RUSSELL MIDDLETON, M.A.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; Asst Mag Poona, 10th Jan 1866; Supy Asst 14th Apl 1866; 3rd Asst 14th May 1867; Ag 2nd Asst Dharwar, 14th Mar 1868; Ag Sub-Colr Sholapur, 6th Nov 1867 to 8th Jan 1868, Supy Asst Dharwar 14th Nov 1870; Ag 2nd Asst 20th Dec 1870; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, Ag Dharwar, 15th July 1872; 2nd Asst Kanara, Ag Dharwar, 21st Oct 1872; Ag 1st Asst Dharwar, 11th Apl to 10th July 1873; Ag 1st Asst Kanara, 24th Aug 1873 to 6th Sept 1874; from 9th Nov 1874 to 8th Feb 1875; Ag 1st Asst Nasik, 8th Mar 1875; furl 22nd Feb 1876 to 31st Oct 1877; 1st Asst, Belgaum, 13th Nov 1877; Ag Jr Magt of Ahmedabad, 17th July 1878; 1st Asst Collr Sholapur, 11th Oct 1878; Ag Jr Magt, Kaladgi, 27th Dec 1878.

1865. HENRY EVAN MURCHISON JAMES.—Arrd 14th Dec 1865; placed under the Collr of Poona, 26th Dec 1865; Asst Magt, Khandesh, 14th Apl 1866; Supy 3rd Asst Khandesh 6th Mar 1867; Ag 3rd Asst 8th Mar 1867; 3rd Asst, 14th May 1867; Ag 2nd Asst, 10th July 1867; Ag 1st Dy Magt, Kurrachee, 19th May 1870; Ag Asst Comr, B Insp Genl of Regr, and Edl Insp in Sind, 16th Apl 1872; Ag 1st Class Dy Magt, Kurrachee, 15th Nov 1872; Ag Under Secy to Govt, Rev, Finl and Genl Depts, 26th May 1870; Extra 2nd Asst, Khandesh, Ag as Under Secy 6th Aug 1873; Under Secy 18th May 1875; Ag Post Master Genl, Bombay, 4th Nov 1875; Under Secy to Govt Ag as Post Master Genl, Bombay, 23rd Nov 1875; 2nd Gr Post Master Genl, Punjab, Ag Bombay, 21st Nov 1877; furl to Eur for 18 months from 31st May 1878.

1865. THOMAS DUNCAN MACKENZIE.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; placed under the Collr of Ahmedabad, 16th Nov 1865; Asst Magt, 10th Jan 1866; Supy Asst, Surat, 5th Sept 1866; Supy 3rd Asst 13th Feb 1867; Ag 3rd Asst Broach, 15th June 1867; Surat, 1st Oct 1867; Broach, 16th Nov 1867; Surat, 8th Feb 1868; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum, 6th June 1868; 1st Asst 1st Feb to 15th Apl 1869; Ag 2nd Asst Nasik, 6th Nov 1869; Supy Asst Nasik 16th Dec 1870; 1st Asst Nasik, 12th Sep to 8th Nov 1871; Ag 2nd Asst 1st June 1872; 1st Asst 11th Sep to 14th Oct 1872; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, Ag Nasik, 29th Jan 1873; Ratnagiri, 11th Mar 1873; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 29th May 1873; Secy, Baroda Enquiry Com, 3rd Nov 1873; 2nd Asst Nasik, Secy, Baroda Com, 26th Jan 1874; furl for 20 months from 9th Mar 1874 Ag Under-Secy to Govt in the Rev Finl and Genl Depts, 6th Nov 1873; 1st Asst Poona, Under-Secy 12th Nov 1876; 2nd Asst but appt pro-tem, 1st Asst 9th July 1877; 1st Asst Col 15th Sep 1877; Under-Secy to Govt 20th Nov 1877.

1865. EDWARD TOWNSHEND CANDY.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; placed under the Col of Bombay, 16th Nov 1865; Asst Mag Ahmednagar, 14th Apl 1866; 3rd Asst 4th Sep 1866; on sick leave 9th Dec 1866 to 9th Jan 1867; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 10th July 1867 Ag 2nd Asst 26th June 1868; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 30th Oct 1868; Ag 2nd Asst, 3rd Jan 1869; Ag Asst Judge 7th Apl 1869; extra 2nd Asst, special duty, Poona, 24th March to 6th Apl 1869; and 13th May to 21st July 1869; Ag Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 28th July 1869; Poona, 6th Oct 1870; Ahmedabad, 16th Dec 1870 to 22nd Feb 1871; Khandesh, 20th Mar 1871; extra Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 20th Dec 1871; Thana, 11th Dec 1872; pro-tem 3rd gr Asst Judge 5th May 1873; Ag Asst Judge Satara, 31st May 1873; 2nd gr 18th July 1873; pro-tem 3rd gr Asst Judge and Ag Judl Asst to Pol Agent, Kathiawar, 22nd Oct 1873; 3rd gr, Asst Judge, Ratnagiri, Ag at Kathiawar, 15th June 1875; 2nd gr, 8th July 1876; Judl Asst to the Pol Agent, Kathiawar, 22nd Feb 1878; furl for two years from 8th Apl 1878.

1865. ALFRED KEYSER.—Arrd 29th Oct 1865; placed under the Collr of Poona, 4th Nov 1865; Asst Magt, Satara, 18th Apl 1866; Poona, 17th July 1866; Thana, 10th Oct 1866; Supy Asst 7th Mar 1867; 3rd Asst 10th July 1867; Supy Asst, Poona, 23rd July 1868; Ahmednagar, 24th Nov 1868; Ag 2nd Asst 14th Jan 1869; Ag 1st Asst, 1st Apl to 4th June 1871; Asst Magt, 20th Feb 1872; 2nd Asst, Sholapur, 20th June 1872; furl for two years and two months 15th Aug 1873; 2nd Asst Magt, Sholapur, 22nd Oct 1875; Ag 1st Asst, Surat, 11th Mar 1876; Poona, 17th Nov 1876; 1st Asst Broach, Ag at Poona, 21st Nov 1876; 2nd Asst Poona, Ag 1st Asst 9th July 1877; 1st Asst Poona, 22nd Sept 1877; Ag Collr 1st Apl 1878; 1st Asst 1st June 1878.

1865. JOHN McLEOD CAMPBELL.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; placed under the Collr of Poona, 16th Nov 1865; Dy Reagr, H Court, Bombay, 10th Feb 1866; Supy Asst Poona (but detained in Bombay on spl duty in the Sect), 18th Feb 1867; Supy Asst, Khandesh, 4th May 1867; Ag 3rd Asst, 10th July 1867; Ag Extra 2nd Asst, 8th Feb 1868 to 13th May 1870; Ag 1st Asst, 14th Oct to 12th Dec 1870; Ag Extra 2nd Asst and Asst Pol Agent, 13th Dec 1870; Dy Conservator of Forests 2nd gr Thana, 15th July 1871; in Sind, 8th Sept 1873; spl leave 24th May to 17th Nov 1875; Conservator of Forests in Sind, 8th Dec 1875; furl 25th Aug 1876 to 18th Feb 1879; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 6th Mar 1879.

1865. RICHARD EDWARD CANDY.—Arrd 9th Nov 1865; placed under the Collr of Bombay, 16th Nov 1865; Supy Asst Dharwar, 5th May 1866; Supy 3rd Asst Kanara, 9th Mar 1867; Ag 2nd Asst 27th June 1867, and 7th Mar 1870; Ag Educl Insp, S D 6th July 1871; Ag Director of Pub Instrn, Berar, 7th June 1872; Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi 25th Dec 1873; 2nd Asst Khandesh, Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi, 27th Feb 1874; Mag Kaladgi, 13th Feb 1875; Ag 1st Asst 8th Mar 1875; furl 29th Mar 1875 to 21st Dec 1876; Ag Extra 1st Asst Ahmednagar and Poona, 3rd Jan 1877; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 18th May 1877; 1st Asst 23rd Oct 1877; Ag Jr Magt 24th Nov to 23rd Dec 1877 and from 29th Mar to 15th Apl 1878.

1865. JAMES KNOX SPENCE.—Arrd 29th Oct 1865; placed under the Collr of Satara 14th Apl 1866; Asst Magt, 17th July 1866; Ag 2nd Asst 14th July 1867; Poona, 24th Sep 1872; Asst Magt, 29th Jan 1873; furl 3rd Nov 1873 to 3rd Nov 1875; 2nd Asst Surat, 19th Sep 1875; Ag 1st Asst Belgaum, 30th Nov 1875 to 21st Feb 1876; Kanara, 7th Mar 1876; Belgaum, 5th Jan 1877; Dharwar, 6th Mar to 2nd Apl 1877; Belgaum, 24th Apl 1877; 1st Asst 20th Nov 1877; 1st Asst, and Railway Magt Thana, 25th Nov 1877; placed at the disposal of the Govt of India, Ag Post Master Genl, Bombay, 13th May 1878.

Class IV of 8 years' standing.

1867. WILLIAM HENRY CROWE, Bar.—Arrd 26th Oct 1867; placed under the Collr of Poona, 4th Nov 1867; Supy 3rd Asst, 21st Jan 1868; Ag 3rd Asst 5th Feb 1868; Professor Deccan College, 7th Mar 1868; Supy Asst 17th Aug 1868; Editor of the "Bombay Gazetteer," 1st Oct 1868; Ag 2nd Ass't Sholapur, 12th Oct 1871; Ag Asst Judge, Thana, 21st Oct 1872 and 2nd Aug 1873; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge, Satara, 17th July 1874; 3rd gr 30th July 1874; 2nd gr 6th Aug 1874; 1st gr Poona, 26th Oct 1874; 3rd gr, Dharwar, 8th Aug 1875; Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi 21st Aug 1875; 2nd gr Asst Judge, 13th Sept 1876; Ag at Kaladgi; Ag Judge, Kanara, 30th Sept 1876; Dharwar, 15th Jan 1877; Ag Sr Asst Judge, Sholapur 21st Feb 1877; 1st gr Asst Judge Poona, 31st Dec 1877; Judge, Ratnagiri, 2nd gr, 29th Sept 1878; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur 29th Dec 1878; Ag 2nd gr Judge Khandesh, 3rd Feb 1879; furl for 19th months from 5th May 1879.

1867. GEORGE BOILEAU REID, B.A.—Arrd 26th Nov 1867; placed under the Collr of Ahmednagar, 29th Nov 1867; Ag 3rd Asst, 26th Jan 1868 and 22nd July 1868; Supy Asst Thana, 2nd Dec 1868; Extra 2nd Asst Poona, on spl duty to take up land for the Khadakvasla Lake, 13th Oct 1869; Ag 2nd Asst Poona, 25th May 1870; Supy Asst 4th July 1871; Ag 2nd Asst 29th Aug 1871; Supy Asst City Magt and Non-Agrl Tax Officer, 4th Dec 1871; Ag 2nd Asst Khandesh, 14th Apl 1872, Railway Magt Bhusaval, 5th June 1872; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 6th Nov 1872; Supy and Ag 2nd Asst 29th Jan 1873; Ag 1st Class Dy Collr Kurrachee, 5th June 1873, Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 31st Jan 1874; 2nd Asst Panch Mahals doing duty as 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 17th Aug 1874; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 2nd Nov 1874 to 21st Feb 1875; Kaladgi 12th Mar 1875; Ahmedabad 25th Sep 1875; furl 10th Apl 1876 to 31st Oct 1877; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 21st Nov 1877; Ag Jr Collr 4th July 1878; Ag 1st Asst 17th July 1878; 1st Asst 19th July 1878; on spl duty at Baroda, 14th June 1879.

1867. HENRY JAMES PARSONS, Bar—Arrd 21st Nov 1867; placed under the Collr of Thana, Nov 1867; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1868; Sholapur, 15th Apl 1868; 2nd Asst Poona, 10th Mar to 3rd June 1869; Sholapur, 10th July to 23rd Aug 1869; Supy Asst Sholapur, 9th Feb 1870; Ag 2nd Asst 23rd Mar 1870; Ag Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 8th Mar 1871; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Ratnagiri 12th Oct 1872; leave on urgent pri affrs 6th Oct 1873 to 3rd Apl 1874; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Surat, 4th Apl 1874; Ag 2nd gr 12th June 1874; Ag 1st gr 12th Oct 1874; Thana 26th Oct 1874; Ag Sr Asst Judge Poona, and Jt Judge Sholapur, 7th June to 2nd Dec 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Judge 13th Dec 1875; Ag 1st gr Satara, 3rd Jan 1876; furl 22nd May 1876 to 20th Nov 1877; 3rd gr Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 8th July 1876; 2nd gr 6th Feb 1877; Ag Judge 2nd gr Ratnagiri, 26th Nov 1877; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge 18th Feb 1878; Ag Judge, Hyderabad, 26th Feb 1878; Shikarpur, 1st Apl 1878; Hyderabad, 27th Aug 1878; 1st gr Asst Judge, Ag Judge Hyderabad, 28th Sept 1878.

1867. JOHN FAITHFUL FLEET.—Arrd 6th Dec 1867; placed under the Colr of Poona, 6th Dec 1867; Supry Asst Belgaum, 23rd Aug 1868; Ag 1st Asst Belgaum, 3rd Jan to 15th Feb from 22nd Feb to 19th May and from 7th June to 31st July 1870; Ag Edul Insr S D 7th June 1872; Edul Insr S D 29th Aug 1873 to 11th Mar 1874; Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi, 13th Sept 1874; Supry Asst Belgaum, 19th Oct 1874; Ag Asst Pol Agt Kolhapur and S Maratha country, 25th Jan 1875; 2nd Asst Dharwar, 30th Jan 1875; Ag 1st Asst Dharwar, 14th Apl to 19th July 1875; Kaladgi, 6th Aug 1875; furl on m c 21st Apl 1877 to 20th Apl 1879; 1st Asst 30th Dec 1878; on spl duty in Eng from 21st Apl to 3rd June 1879; 1st Asst Belgaum.

1867. GEORGE WILLIAM VIDAL, Bar—Arrd 26th Oct 1867; placed under the Colr of Satara, 4th Nov 1867; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1868; Ag 3rd Asst 5th Aug 1868; Poona, 10th Mar 1869; 2nd Asst 10th July to 23rd Aug 1869; Ag 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, 13th Sep 1869; Extra 2nd Asst Satara, on spl duty with the Jath State, 18th Mar 1873; Ag 1st Asst Satara, 25th Oct 1873; reverted 4th June 1874; Ag 1st Asst Satara, 15th Feb 1875; Extra 2nd Asst Khandesh, Ag at Satara, 18th May 1875; 2nd Asst Poona, Ag at Satara, 14th Dec 1875; furl 5th Apl 1876 to 31st Oct 1877; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, 12th Nov 1877; Ag 1st Asst 24th Nov 1877; 1st Asst 30th Dec 1878; Ag Jr Collr Ratnagiri, 24th May 1879.

1867. WILLIAM PORTEOUS, M.A.—Arrd 26th Nov 1867; placed under the Collr of Ahmedabad, 29th Nov 1867; Ag 3rd Asst Kaira, 8th Apl 1868; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 13th June 1870; 1st Asst 30th Nov 1871 to 5th Jan 1872; 2nd Asst and Asst Agent to the Governor, Panch Mahals, 11th June 1872; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 14th Nov 1873; Ag Extra 1st Asst Panch Mahals, 8th Dec 1873; spl Asst Comr Tumkur, 20th Jan 1874; Ag Town and Cant Magt, Bangalore, 11th Apl 1875; 1st Asst Comr Bangalore, 1st June 1875; Ag Dy Comr Mysore 1st Apl to 18th June 1876; Ag Dy Insprgl of Police 17th July to 22nd Oct 1876; Asst Comr Bangalore, 23rd Oct 1876; Ag Dy Comr Tumkur Dist, 18th May 1877; Asst Comr Bangalore, 11th June 1877; Ag Asst Judge 8th Oct 1877; Asst Comr Bangalore, 24th Mar 1878; Asst Collr Bombay Presy, 5th Apl 1878; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 17th Apl 1878; Ag Jr Collr Kaira, and Pol Agent, Cambay, 1st July 1878; 2nd Asst 19th July 1878; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 1st Oct 1878; 1st Asst Kaira, 1st Jan 1879; furl for 20 months from 7th Apl 1879.

1867. ARTHUR DANIEL POLLEN, B.A., LL.D., Barr—Arrd 26th Oct 1867; placed under the Colr of Satara, 4th Nov 1867; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1868; Ag 3rd Asst Khandesh, 28th Aug 1868; Ag 2nd Asst 14th May 1870; Railway Magt Bhusaval, 1st Oct to 30th Nov 1871; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Surat, 10th Jan 1872; furl on m c 7th June 1872 to 6th Feb 1873; Supy Asst Khandesh, 17th Feb 1873; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Surat, 16th Apl 1873; Ag 3rd gr 18th July 1873; 2nd gr Ratnagiri, 26th Mar

1874; 3rd gr 12th June 1874; 2nd gr 12th Oct 1874; Ag 1st gr 31st Mar 1875; Ag Judge Ratnagiri, 15th June 1875; Ag 1st gr Judge 19th Oct 1865; 2nd gr Asst Judge, 3rd Dec 1875; 1st gr 22nd May 1876; Ag Judge Ratnagiri, 16th Sept 1876; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge, 17th Dec 1876; Ag Judge 2nd gr Ratnagiri, 1st Jan 1877; furl 1st Feb 1877 to 15th Feb 1878; 2nd gr Asst Judge, Dharwar, 31st Dec 1877; Ag Judge Ahmedabad, 23rd Feb 1878; Ag Rembr of Legal Affairs, 20th Mar 1878; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 22nd June 1878; spl duty Jt Sessions Judge at Surat, 17th Aug 1878; Ag 2nd gr Judge 22nd Sept 1878; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 22nd Feb 1879.

1867. JOHN LEECH JOHNSTON.—Arrd 26th Nov 1867; placed under the Colr Ahmedabad, 29th Nov 1867; Supy and Ag, 3rd Asst Broach 12th Feb 1869; Supry Asst of Broach, 10th July 1869; 1st Asst 15th July to 9th Sept 1869; and from 3rd Feb to 2nd May 1870; Ag 2nd Asst Kolaba, 22nd Apr 1871; Supy Asst Kolaba, 2nd Asst 29th Jan 1873; Supy Asst Sholapur, 23rd July 1873; Ag 2nd Asst 1st Aug 1873; Ag 1st Asst Ahmednagar, 4th Nov 1873; 2nd Asst Sholapur, 11th May 1874; Dist Supt of Police, Sholapur, 5th May to 3rd June 1874; 2nd Asst Thana, 12th Feb 1875; Pol Supt Akalkot, 19th Mar to 12th June 1875; Jr Coll Sholapur, 26th Apr to 30th May 1875; Ag 1st Asst Surat, 15th June 1875; 2nd Asst Thana, 10th Dec 1875; Ag 1st Asst, 3rd Jan 1876; Ag 1st Asst Ratnagiri, 12th Mar 1876; Ag Jr Collr 25th May 1876; Ag 1st Asst 27th July 1876; furl on 21st May 1877 to 19th Nov 1878; Ag 1st Asst Sholapur, 7th Dec 1878; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 28th May 1879.

1867. JOHN FAIRLIE MUIR.—Arrd 10th Oct 1867; attd to Collr Poona, 26th Oct 1867; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1868; Ag 3rd Asst 26th Feb 1868; leave without pay 26th Sep to 25th Oct 1868; 3rd Asst Khandesh, 11th Nov 1868; Asst Comr, Nagpur, 1st Sep 1869; 3rd Class Asst Comr, Wardah, in the Ceni Prov, 18th Oct 1869; Ag Asst Secy to the Chief Comr, Cen Provs, 11th June 1870; Persl Asst to the Chief Comr and Ag Asst Comr 2nd Class, 22nd Oct 1872; Ag 4th Class Dy Comr Balaghat, 4th July 1873; Asst Comr 3rd Class Hingunghat, 16th Dec 1873; Ag 2nd Class Asst Comr Wardah, 19th Dec 1873 to 15th Mar 1874; Supy Asst and Ag 1st Asst Broach, 2nd Apr 1874; furl 8th Apr 1875 to 4th June 1877; Extra 2nd Asst Khandesh 23rd Nov 1875; Ag 2nd Asst 22nd June 1877; Ag 1st Asst 3rd to 12th Nov 1877 and from 2nd to 23rd Dec 1877; Ag 2nd Asst from 13th Nov to 1st Dec 1877 and from 24th Dec 1877; Ag 1st Asst Satara 29th Mar 1878; Ag Jr Magt and Pol Agent 9th Dec 1878; Ag 1st Asst 14th Jan 1879.

1867. EDWARD JAMES EBDEN, B.A.—Arrd 6th Dec 1867; placed under the Colr of Poona Dec 1867; Supy Asst Dharwar 5th Aug 1868; North Kanara 27th May 1871; Ag 2nd Asst 18th June 1871; Ag 2nd gr Dy Conservator of Forests, 21st Sep 1872; services placed at the disposal of Major Peyton, Conservator of Forests, S. D., Kanara District from 8th Dec 1874 to 9th Jan 1875; on demarcation duty Kanara 10th Jan 1875; 2nd Asst Kolaba on demn duty 20th Dec 1875; employed on the selection and demarn Kanara Forests 1st Apr 1876; trans to Dharwar on famine duty, 5th Apr 1877; services placed at the disposal of the Govt of India for employment on famine duty at Mysore, 23rd Oct 1877 to 1st July 1878; Ag 1st Asst Thana 2nd July 1878; Railway Mag Thana 17th July 1878.

1867. WILLIAM SCOTT FORMAN.—Arrd 9th Nov 1867; placed under the Colr of Ratnagiri 12th Nov 1867; Ag 3rd Asst 8th Apr 1868; Ag 2nd Asst 25th Aug 1869; Ag 2nd class Dy Colr Shikarpur 18th June 1870; 3rd class Meharr, Sind, 19th July 1870; 1st class 17th Apr to 4th July 1871; 2nd class Hyderabad, 5th July 1871 to 11th Nov 1872; Supy Asst Thana 3rd Dec 1872; Ag Conservator of Forests in Sind, 9th Jan 1873; Ag 2nd class Dy Mag Shikarpur 25th Apr 1873; 1st class 27th May 1874; Colr 26th May to 9th Sep 1875; 2nd Asst Magt, Satara; Ag as Dy Collr in Sind, 19th Feb 1876; furl 24th Apr 1876 to 23rd Oct 1877; Ag 1st Class Dy Collr, Shikarpur, 20th Nov 1877; Ag Judge 27th Feb 1878; 1st Class Dy Collr, 1st Apr 1878; Ag Judge 25th Aug 1879.

1868. JAMES WILLIAM WALKER, LL.B., Bar.—Arrd 5th Dec 1868; placed under the Colr of Bombay, 16th Dec 1868; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 13th Jan 1869; Ahmedabad, 19th Jan 1869; Ag 2nd Class Dy Collr in Sind, Kurrahee, 1st June 1870; 1st Class 17th May to 15th Aug 1871; Asst Collr Surat, 8th Dec 1871; Ahmedabad, 29th Dec 1871; Ag 3rd Gr Asst Judge 17th Jan 1872; Extra Asst Judge 15th Mar 1872; Ag Asst Judge 20th May 1872; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge 31st Oct 1873; Ag Judge 6th Apr 1874; ag 2nd Gr Asst Judge 12th July 1874; on spl duty in the Baroda Comm, 13th Feb 1875; ag 2nd gr Asst Judge, Ahmedabad, 19th Mar 1875; 1st Gr 15th June 1875; Dist Judge 22nd Aug to 1st Sep 1875; ag 1st gr Asst Judge, 15th Sep 1875; 2nd gr 1st Dec 1876; ag Judge 23rd Feb 1876; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge 19th Apr 1876; 1st Gr 1st

Sep 1876; ag Judge 5th Jan 1877; 3rd gr Asst Judge, Ag Judge 6th Feb 1877; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge 2nd Mar 1877; furl 21st Apl 1877 to 14th Apl 1879; 2nd gr Asst Judge 22nd Feb 1878; Ag 1st gr Satara 23rd Apl 1879; Poona, 7th June 1879.

1868. WILLIE WALKER LOCH, B. A.—Arrd 14th Nov 1868; placed under the Colr Thana 21st Nov 1868; Supy Asst 13th Jan 1869; Satara 26th Feb 1869; 2nd Asst 30th May 1870; Ag Extra 2nd Asst Khandesh 30th Aug 1871; Asst Colr Khandesh, Ag Extra 2nd Asst 29th Jan 1873; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 4th July 1873; Ag 1st Asst 15th Sept 1874 to 23rd Jan 1875; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 26th June 1875 to 2nd Jan 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 19th Jan 1876; 1st Asst 17th to 31st Mar 1876; Ag 1st Asst Thana 4th Apl to 4th July 1876, and from 7th July to 13th Aug 1870; 1st Asst 6th to 18th Sept 1876; 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, Ag 1st Asst Broach, 13th Oct 1876; Ag 1st Asst ch, 9th July 1877; Ag 1st Asst 15th Sept 1877; Ag Jr Colr 5th Oct 1877; 1st Asst 25th Nov 1877; furl for 21 months from 16th Feb 1878.

1868. EDWARD HOSKING.—Arrd 1st Feb 1869; placed under the Colr Surat 6th Feb 1869; Supy Asst Broach 20th Oct 1869; Ahmedabad 28th May 1870; Ag 3rd gr Asst Judge 1st Sept 1870; Ag Extra Asst Judge 23rd Jan 1871 to 14th Mar 1872; Extra Asst Judge 11th June 1872; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Khandesh 19th Mar 1873; Supy Asst Khandesh 10th May 1873; Railway Mag Bhusaval 28th June to 19th Oct 1873; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Satara 23rd Oct 1873 to 29th July 1874, and 6th Aug to 16th Oct 1874, and 24th Oct 1874; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge 31st Mar 1875; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Thana, 2nd July 1875; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge 8th Aug to 18th Oct 1875; Ag 2nd gr 19th Oct 1875; Ag 3rd gr 13th Dec 1875; Ag 2nd gr 3rd Jan 1876; Ag 1st gr 14th Feb 1876; Ag 2nd gr 9th Apl 1876; Ag Sr Asst Judge of Belgaum and Jt Session Judge at Kaladgi, 20th Sep 1876 to 3rd July 1877; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Surat, 29th July 1877; furl for two years from 21st Sep 1877; 3rd gr Asst Judge Surat (while on leave,) 31st Dec 1877; 2nd gr Asst Judge (while on leave,) 28th Sep 1878.

1868. HENRY EDWARD WINTER.—Arrd 21st Nov 1868; placed under the Collr Satara, 25th Nov 1868; Supy Asst 13th Jan 1869; Thana, 27th Oct 1869; 2nd Asst 17th Apl to 7th June 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Satara, 7th Oct 1872; Supy Asst, Ag 2nd Asst 29th Jan 1873; Ag 1st Asst 15th Apl 1874; 2nd Asst 22nd May 1874; Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi, 5th Apl to 25th June 1876; Ag Asst Pol Agnt in the SoutF Maratha county 10th July 1876; 2nd Asst Ahmedabad, 15th Oct 1876; 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 10th Nov 1876; Ag 1st Asst Kanara, 20th Dec 1876; 2nd Asst Ag 1st Asst Kanara, 22nd Sep 1877; furl for 22 months from 5th Nov 1877.

1868. ARTHUR WILLIAM CRAWLEY-BOEVEY, B.A., Bar.—Arrd 21st Nov 1868; placed under the Collr Poona, 28th Nov 1868; Supy Asst 13th Jan 1869; Khandesh, 14th May 1870; Extra 2nd Asst 18th Oct 1870 to 30th Aug 1871; Spl Asst to Political Agent, Rewa Kantha, 16th Nov 1871; Ag Political Agent, Rewa Kantha, 1st Mar 1873; Ag Asst Resident, Baroda, 2nd May 1873; Cantonment and Railway Magt, and Judge of the S C Court 1st May to 21st Nov 1873; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, and Ag Asst Agent to the Govr Genl in spl charge of Sachin State 21st Dec 1874; on spl duty at Baroda, 21st Feb 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 9th Mar 1875; Ag 1st Asst Broach, 31st Aug to 14th Nov 1875; Supy Asst Ahmedabad, 25th Nov to 1st Dec 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 7th Dec 1875; spl leave 15th Apl to 14th Oct 1876; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 23rd Oct 1876; 2nd Asst, Ag 1st Asst 10th Nov 1876; on famine duty at Kaladgi, 19th Aug 1877; Ag 1st Asst Ahmedabad, 3rd Nov 1877; 2nd Asst Ag 1st Asst 20th Nov 1877; Talukdari Sett'l Offr, Gujarat, 21st Nov 1877; and 25th June 1879.

1868. GEORGE DRUITT.—Arrd 7th Nov 1878; placed under the Collr Bombay, 21st Nov 1868; Supy Asst Poona, 13th Jan 1869; Nasik, 13th Oct 1869; Ag Railway Mag, Thal Ghat, and Cantonment Mag, Devlali, 10th Sep 1870; Ag Asst Judge Surat, 20th Aug 1872; Asst Mag Khandesh, 13th July 1873; Ag 3rd gr Asst Judge Khandesh, 5th Nov 1873; furl on m e 25th July 1874 to 17th Nov 1875; Supy Asst Nasik, Railway Magt, Thal Ghat, and Cantonment Magt Devlali, 14th Dec 1875; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Ratnagiri, 14th Feb 1876; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 14th Apl 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, from 1st May to 5th June 1876; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Satara, 20th June 1876; Dhwarwar, 17th July 1876; Ag 1st gr 16th Sep 1876; Ag 2nd gr 19th Dec 1876; Ag 1st gr 1st Jan 1877; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 5th Feb 1877; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Poona, 21st Feb 1877; Ag 2nd gr 10th Sep 1877; Ag 1st gr 30th Sep 1877; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Surat, 25th Jan 1878; 2nd gr Surat, 18th Feb 1878; 3rd gr Ratnagiri, 22nd Feb 1878, Ag 2nd gr Judge, Surat; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge, 18th Mar 1878; Ag 2nd gr Judge Ahmedabad, 25th Sep 1878; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Surat, 11th Jan 1879.

1868. WILLIAM ALLEN.—Arrd 10th Oct 1868; placed under the Collr Poona, 24th Oct 1868; Supy Asst 18th Aug 1869; Kaladgi, 13th Oct 1869; Ag 1st Asst 30th July to 17th Dec 1873; Ag Extra 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 2nd Jan 1874; Asst Collr 10th May 1874; Ag 2nd Asst Thana, 7th June 1874; Ag 1st Asst and Railway Magt, 5th Oct 1874; Ag 2nd Asst 17th March 1875; Ag 1st Asst 14th July to 15th Aug 1875; and from 19th Sep to 17th Nov 1875; Supy Asst 16th Dec 1875; Ag 2nd Asst 4th Jan 1876; 1st Asst 8th to 16th Feb 1876; Acted as Collr of Shirkapur, 12th Sep to 2nd Nov 1876; Ag 1st Class Dy Collr in Sind, 3rd Nov 1876; Ag 1st Asst Kaira, 25th Sep 1877; furl for 18 mons 15th Apl 1878.

1868. STEPHEN HAMMICK.—Arrd 21st Nov 1868; placed under the Colr Poona, 28th Nov 1868; Supy Asst Poona, 18th May 1869; Asst Eduel Inspr C D 4th Sept to 22nd Nov 1869; Ag Asst Nasik, 22nd Dec 1869; Ag 1st Asst 23rd Nov 1870 to 16th Jan 1871; 2nd Asst 12th Sept to 4th Nov 1871; Ag Asst Judge Poona, 28th June 1872; Asst Colr Thana, Ag Asst Judge Poona, 25th Sept 1872; Asst Pol Agt Kolhapur and S Maratha country, and Tutor to the Maharaja of Kolhapur, 19th Feb 1873; on famine duty, Kaladgi, 3rd Sept 1877; Asst Colr and Ag Sr Asst Judge Kaladgi, 18th Dec 1877; furl for 20 mons 1st Mar 1878.

1868. WILLIAM FREDERIC SINCLAIR.—Arrd 21st Nov 1868; placed under the Colr Poona, 28th Nov 1868; Supy Asst 28th Aug 1869; Sholapur, 6th Sept 1871; Ag 2nd Asst 6th Sept to 11th Oct 1871; Asst Colr Khandesh forests, Dhulia, 25th Oct 1871; Ag 2nd Asst Khandesh, Dhulia, 5th Jan to 12th Feb 1872; Ag 2nd Asst Khandesh, and Railway Mag Bhusaval, 5th Nov 1872; Supy Asst Khandesh, 24th Dec 1872; Ag 2nd Asst, spl duty for demarcation of forests 1st Apl 1873; spl leave on private affairs 4th July to 26th Dec 1873; Supy Asst Kolaba, spl duty for demarcation of forests in Alibag, 26th Jan 1874; Ag 1st Asst Poona, 26th Feb 1874; Supy Asst Poona, Ag 1st Asst 24th Apl 1874; Supy Asst 21st June 1874; Ag 2nd Asst Thana, 6th Oct 1874; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 17th Mar 1875; Ag 2nd Asst 12th Apl to 7th June 1875, and 17th June 1875; Ag 1st Asst 12th Oct 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 17th Nov 1876; Forest Demarcating Offr Thana, 23rd Jan 1876; 2nd Asst, doing duty as Forest Demarcating Offr Thana, 12th Nov 1876; Kaladgi on famine duty, 17th Apl 1877; Asst Collr 9th July 1877; furl on m c for 2 years 7th Sep 1877.

1868. EDWARD CHARLES KAYLL OLLIVANT.—Arrd 21st Nov 1868; placed under the Collr Surat, 28th Nov 1868; Supy Asst 15th July 1869; 2nd Asst 5th June to 10th July and 30th Nov 1871 to 5th Jan 1872; Supy Asst Nasik, Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 2nd July 1872; 1st Asst Surat, 27th Feb to 25th May 1873; Asst Agent in spl charge of Sachin State, 10th Mar 1873; Supy Asst Surat, Ag 2nd Asst 23rd July 1873; Ag 1st Asst 8th Apl to 20th May 1874; furl on m c 25th May 1874 to 17th Aug 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Surat, 29th Aug 1875; 1st Asst 22nd Sep to 17th Oct 1875; Dist Supt of Police, 21st Sep to 9th Oct 1875; Supy Asst 7th Dec 1875; Ag 2nd Asst 11th Apl 1876; 2nd Asst 12th Nov 1876; Ag 1st Asst 16th Nov 1876 to 2nd Jan 1877; 2nd Asst 3rd Jan 1877; 2nd Asst 9th July 1877; Ag 1st Asst 18th Jan 1878; 2nd Asst 4th Mar 1878; Ag 1st Asst 13th Mar 1878; Ag Jr Collr and Agent for the Governor at Surat, 1st Apl 1878; Ag 1st Asst 4th July 1878; on spl duty at Baroda, in conn with the estate of Mr. Zulfikar Ali, 15th Jan 1879.

1869. ANDREW WINGATE C.R.E.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869; placed under the Collr of Poona, 9th Nov 1869; furl on m c 3rd Apl 1870 to 20th Mar 1872; placed under the Collr Bombay, 3rd Apl 1872; Supy Asst Poona, 5th Aug 1872; Satara 18th Nov 1873; Ag 2nd Asst 15th Apl to 21st May 1874; Ag Extra 2nd Asst 20th Feb 1875; Compiler on the Adminn Report for 1874-75, 28th Sept 1875 to 27th Jan 1876; Ag Extra 2nd Asst, Satara, with pol charge of Jath State, 11th Feb to 2nd Sept 1876; Compiler of the Admn Rept for 1875-76, 6th Sept to 18th Dec 1876; pro-tem 2nd Asst Sholapnr, 21st Nov 1876, Satara, 27th Dec 1876; Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi, 3rd May 1877; services placed at the disposal of the Govt of India, Addl Secy in the Famine Dept under the Chief Comr of Mysore, 29th Aug 1877 to 9th Mar 1879; on spl leave for five months from 10th Mar 1879.

1869. FENDALL LOWIS CHARLES.—Arrd 13th Nov 1869; placed under the Collr of Khandesh, 17th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 4th Mar 1870; 2nd Asst 6th Apl to 8th July 1871, and 13th Feb to 12th Mar 1872; Supy Asst, 9th July 1871 (Ag Railway Magt, Bhusaval, 12th Apl 1873); Ag 2nd Asst, Nasik, 30th May 1873; on spl duty, demarcation of forests in Nasik, 28th July 1875; 1st Asst Nasik, 16th Feb to 6th Mar 1875, and 10th Feb to 31st May 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 1st June 1876; Ag 1st Asst, Dharwar, 10th May 1877; pro-tem 2nd Asst, Ag as 1st Asst 21st Nov 1877; 2nd Asst, Ag as 1st Asst Dharwar, 30th Dec 1878.

1869. FREDERIC STYLES PHILPIN LELY.—Arrd 8th Dec 1869; placed under the Collr of Ahmedabad, 11th Dec 1869; Supy Asst 1st Mar 1870; Ag 3rd Class Dy Collr Hyderabad, Sind, 17th May 1871; Supy Asst, Ahmedabad, 20th Dec 1871; Ag 2nd Asst 4th Aug 1873; City Survey and Enquiry Officer, 4th Aug to 24th Oct 1873; 1st Asst, 9th Dec 1873; Ag 2nd Asst 31st Jan 1874; Ag 1st Asst 17th May to 1st July 1874; Ag 2nd Asst 13th July 1874; Ag 1st Asst 3rd May 1875; Ag 2nd Asst 25th Sep 1875; Ag 1st Asst 3rd Apl 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 29th July 1876; Ag 1st Asst 22nd Apl 1877; on duty at Surat, 24th Apl 1878; Ag 1st Asst on duty at Broach, 2nd July 1878; 2nd Asst, Ag 1st Asst Broach, 30th Dec 1878; Ag Talukdari, Set Offr, Gujarat, Ag 1st Asst Broach, 16th Apl 1879; Ag Jr Magt Broach, 26th May 1879.

1869. WILLIAM LEE-WARNER, M.A.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869; placed under the Collr Poona, 12th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 1st Mar 1870; Nasik 9th Sep 1870; attd to the Pol and Judl Depts of the Secrt, Bombay, 29th Mar 1871; Offg Dir of Pub Instrn in Berar 8th Feb to 26th Apl 1872; Priv Secy to the Govr of Bombay, 7th May 1872; on spl duty, Pol and Judl Depts of the Secrt, 2nd Nov 1874; Ag Under-Secy to Govnt, Pol, Judl, and Edul Depts, and Ag Secy to the Legisl Council, Bombay, from 22nd Nov 1874 to 10th Jan 1875; Ag Under-Secy to Govt 8th May 1875; Pri Secy to the Gov 11th Jan 1876; spl leave for 6 months from 22nd May to 21st Nov 1876; Pri Secy, 23rd Nov 1876; Supy Asst Poona, 1st Dec 1876; Comr in Sind, 14th Dec 1876 to 25th Jan 1877; Asst Comr and Branch Insp Gr of Regn in Sind, 28th June 1877; also Ag Edul Insp in Sind, 7th Aug 1877; furl on m c for 15 months from 6th Sep 1878.

1869. EDMUND McGILDOWNY HOPE FULTON.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869; placed under the Collr, Surat 9th Nov 1869; Supy Asst, 15th Dec 1869; Ahmedabad, 21st Nov 1870; 2nd Asst 10th July to 14th Oct 1871; Supy Asst, and Edl Insp in Sind, 1st June 1873; on spl leave on private affairs from 12th May to 8th Nov 1873; Supy Asst and Edl Insp in Sind, 20th Nov 1873; Ag Asst Comr and Branch Inspr Genl of Regn in Sind, 8th Mar to 3rd May 1875; Ag Judge Shikapur, 6th Apl 1876; Edl Insp in Sind up to 7th May 1876; Ag Repr App Side H Court, 11th Mar 1878; furl for one year from 5th May 1879.

1869. JAMES McNABB CAMPBELL.—Arrd 13th Nov 1869; placed under the Colr of Khandesh, 17th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 4th Mar 1870; Kolaba, 19th Oct 1870; 2nd Asst 6th Nov to 23rd Dec 1871; Ag 3rd gr Asst Conservator of Forests, Kolaba and Dapoli, 9th Jan to 8th Mar 1872; attd to the Pol and Judl Dept of the Secrt 19th Mar 1872; Ag Under Secy to Gov Pol, Judl and Edul Dept 27th Mar to 3rd May 1873; Compiler of the Gazetteer 9th June 1873; Ag Asst Kaladgi 3rd Apl 1877; Compiler of the Gazetteer and the Genl Admn Rept of the Bombay Presy 17th Sept 1877; Compiler of the Gazetteer, 17th Dec 1877.

1869. HENRY READE COOKE.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869; placed under the Magt, Ahmedabad, 12th Nov 1869; Supy Asst, 1st Mar 1870; Kaira, 8th Apl 1870; 1st Asst 4th to 24th Mar and from 3rd Apl to 27th May 1873; Ag 2nd Asst, Ahmedabad, 5th June 1873; Supy Asst Nasik, 19th Aug 1873; Ag 2nd Asst Nasik, 10th July to 9th Oct 1874; reverted 10th Oct 1874; Ag Magt, 9th to 21st Feb 1875; 2nd Asst, 9th Mar to 31st May 1876; spl leave from 30th Oct 1876 to 24th Apl 1877; Ag 2nd Asst Nasik, 1st May 1877; Ag 1st Asst 16th May to 11th Aug 1877, and 29th Aug to 15th Nov 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 12th to 28th Aug 1877, and from 16th Nov 1878; Ag 1st Asst 11th Apl 1878; Ag 2nd Asst 7th Dec 1878; Ag 1st Asst 16th Dec 1878; 2nd Asst Collr 15th Jan 1879; Ag 1st Asst Collr 19th Feb 1879.

1869. JAMES HENTHORN TODD.—Arrd 13th Nov 1869; placed under the Coll Thana, 17th Nov 1869; Sup Asst 26th Oct 1870; Ag Dist Sup of Police, Satara, 19th Oct to 15th Dec 1871; Sup Asst Nasik, 15th July 1872; 2nd Asst 11th Sep to 14th Oct 1872; Ag 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, 14th June 1873 to 9th Oct 1874, and 9th Nov 1874; acted as 1st Asst 10th Oct to 8th Nov 1874 and from 29th May 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 27th July 1876; Kaladgi, 5th Aug 1877; Ag 1st Asst 25th Apl 1878; Ag 2nd Asst 21st Nov 1878; Kanara, 2nd Dec 1878; Ag 1st Asst 19th March 1879.

1869. CHARLES GORDON WELLAND MACPHERSON, C.I.E.—Arrd 30th Dec 1869; placed under the Colr Belgaum 3rd Jan 1870; Supy Asst 15th Dec 1870; 4th gr Supdt of Police 28th Jan to 15th Apl 1872; Ag 2nd Asst Mag Poona, 15th Nov 1873; Ag 1st Asst 2nd Nov 1874; Ag 2nd Asst 14th Dec 1874; City Mag 21st Apl to 19th May 1875; Supy Under Secy to Govt P W D for relief purposes, 11th Nov 1876; on famine relief duty as Secy to the Personal Asst to the Governor in Madras; from 11th Sept 1877 to 15th Jan 1879; Ag 2nd Asst 16th Jan 1879; Ag 1st Asst 1st Apl 1879; Ag Under Secy to Govt Pol and Judl Depts and Secy to the Legisl Council of Bombay 10th Apl 1879.

1869. GEORGE CLIFFORD WHITWORTH.—Arrd 5th Dec 1869; placed under the Colr of Surat 7th Dec 1869; Supy Asst 1st Mar 1870; Kaira 10th May 1871; Broach 31st May 1871; Ag 1st Asst 3rd Apl to 20th Aug 1872 and 3rd Nov 1873 to 1st Apl 1874; Ag Mag Kolaba from 31st Dec 1874 to 13th Jan 1875; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Poona 12th Aug 1875, Ag 3rd gr Asst Judge Poona 19th Oct to 31st Oct and 6th Nov to 4th Dec 1875; Ag Extra 2nd Asst Satara 17th Dec 1875 to 3rd Jan 1876; Ag Under Secy to Govt Pol, Judl and Edul Depts and Secy to the Council Bombay, 11th Jan 1876; Ag 1st Asst Kaira 19th May 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 9th July 1877; Under Secy to Govt P W Dept for relief purposes 11th Sept 1877 to 9th Mar 1878; furl to Eur for 20 months and 20 days from 11th Mar 1878.

1869. CHARLES PALMER BLUETT WILTSHIRE.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869; placed under the Colr of Ahmednagar 12th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 4th Mar 1870; on m c 25th Feb 1871 to 19th Feb 1872; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 25th Feb 1872; Kanara, 13th Jan 1873; Ag Port Officer at Karwar and Supt Timber Depot, Kanara, 26th July to 16th Oct and from 8th Nov to 12th Dec 1873; Supy Asst Kaladgi, 27th Nov 1873; Belgaum, 15th Jan 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Dharwar, 15th Jan 1876; 1st Asst 19th Apl 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 19th July 1876; Asst Mag 12th Nov 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 13th Mar 1878.

1869. THOMAS HART DAVIES.—Arrd 13th Nov 1869; placed under the Coll of Sholapur, 18th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 4th Mar 1870; Ag 2d Asst 5th Apl to 19th June 1872; leave on urgent pri affairs from 1st Feb to 31st July 1873; Ag 2nd Asst on forest demarcation work at Kolaba, 11th Aug 1873 to 7th Apl 1874; furl M C 4th May 1874 to 3rd Nov 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Kolaba, 27th Nov 1875 to 1st May 1876; Supy Asst in Sind, and Ag Edl Insp 8th May 1876; Ag Judge Hyderabad, 1st Aug, to 5th Dec 1876; furl on M C 17th Aug 1877 to 12th Aug 1878; Asst Coll and Ag Asst Comr and Branch Insp Genl of Regn in Sind 20th Aug 1878; also Eduel Insp 21st Nov 1878.

1869. THOMAS SHARP HAMILTON.—Arrd 6th Nov 1869; placed under the Col Ahmednagar, 9th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 15th June 1870; Ag 2nd Asst Thana, 28th Aug 1873; Supy Asst Ahmednagar, 7th June 1874; furl m c 1st Sep 1874 to 27th May 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar 6th June 1876; 2nd gr Supdt of Police, 7th June 1876; Cantonment Mag 20th June 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Colr Ahmednagar 14th Oct 1878; Supdt of Police 29th Nov to 5th Dec 1878; Ag 1st Asst (while on leave) 17th May 1879.

1869. HENRY FAURE ASTON.—Arrd 9th Oct 1869; placed under the Colr of Poona 16th Oct 1869; Supy Asst 15th Dec 1869; placed under the Pol Agent Kathiawar 29th Dec 1870; Supy Asst Pol Agent 1st Apl 1871; 4th Pol Asst N D 1st Apl to 22nd May 1871; Ag 4th Pol Asst E D 2nd Jan to 29th Feb 1872; Spl Asst Pol Agent in charge of the Gondal State 8th May to 9th June 1872; 3rd Pol Asst E D 14th June 1872 to 8th July 1873; Ag 4th Asst Pol Agent, 13th Nov 1873; Ag 2nd Asst Surat 14th June 1874; Ag 3rd gr Asst Judge Surat 8th Nov 1874; Ag 2nd gr 13th Feb to 2nd Sept 1876, 15th Sept to 2nd Dec 1875, 3rd Feb to 18th Apl 1876, 22nd May to 19th June 1876, 1st to 18th Sept 1876; Ag 1st gr Judge 3rd to 14th Sept 1876, and 19th Sept 1866; Ag Judge Surat from 4th to 31st Jan 1876; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge 19th Dec 1876; Ag 1st gr 5th Jan 1877; Ag Railway Mag on the G I P Railway 17th Feb 1877; Asst Colr on famine duty Sholapur 26th Sept 1877; Asst Colr Nasik and Railway Mag Cantonment Mag Devlali 14th Dec 1877; Ag Judl Asst to the Pol Agent in Kathiawar 15th May 1878; 3rd gr Asst Judge Thana, Ag Judl Asst to the Pol Agent Kathiawar 28th Sept 1878.

1869. ARTHUR HAMILTON UNWIN.—Arrd 8th Nov 1869; placed under the Mag Poona 12th Nov 1869; Supy Asst 15th June 1870; Asst Comr 3rd gr in British Burmah 8th Feb 1873; Ag Asst Comr 1st gr 28th Apl 1874; Insp of Schools British Burmah and Asst Comr 3rd gr 11th June 1874; Ag Judge S C Court British Burmah, 23rd June to 25th Aug 1875; Ag Dir of Pub Inst 15th Dec 1875 to 8th Feb 1876; Spl leave private affairs 4th Aug 1876 to 12th Jan 1877; resumed charge of his office 13th Jan 1877; Ag Dir of Pub Inst 3rd Mar 1877 to 25th Mar 1878; fur for twenty months Apr 1878.

1870. JAMES MONTEATH, M.A.—Arrd 5th Nov 1870; placed under the Coll Dharwar, 7th Nov 1870, Supy Asst 17th July 1871; Kanara, 7th Oct 1871; 2nd Asst 13th Apr to 23rd Aug 1873; on special duty with the Kanara land assessment case, 17th Nov 1873; Under-Secy to Govt, Rev, Finl and Genl Depts 30th Apr to 27th July 1874; reverted Kanara, 21st Feb 1875; Ag 2nd Asst 10th Mar 1875; Ag Under Secy to Govt

Pol, Judl and Edul Dept and Secy to Leg Council 21st Mar to 18th June 1878; Ag 2nd Asst 19th June 1878; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Poona, 21st June 1878; Ag 2nd gr 8th Juy 1878; Ag Under-Secy to Govt Pol Judl and Edul Dept and Secy to Council 14th July 1878; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge 10th Oct 1878; Ag Asst Judge Thana, 17th Oct 1878; Ag Undr-Secy to Govt in the Pol and Judl Dept and Secy to the Council of 7th Apl 1879; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge on spl duty in the Pol, &c., Dept 10th Apr 1879; Ag 2nd gr on spl duty, 23rd Apr 1879; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge on the special duty, 24th May 1879.

1870. FREDERICK AUGUSTUS HUGH ELLIOT.—Arr 21st Nov 1870; placed under the Coll of Satara 26th Nov 1870; Supy Asst Ratnagiri 15th Mar 1871; Edul Ins Hyderabad Assigned Dist Berar 9th June 1873; Ag Dir of Pub Inst Berar, 4th Sept to 13th Oct 1873; Edul Insp Hyderabad Assigned Dis Berar, 14th Oct 1873; Principal Raja's School, Tutor and Govr of the Gaekwar, 10th Dec 1875.

1870. JERVOISE ATHELSTANE BAINES.—Arrd 12th Nov 1870; placed under the Coll Surat 16th Nov 1870; Supy Asst 18th Nov 1870; Ag 2nd Asst 27th Feb to 25th May 1873; Asst to Pol Ag Rewa Kantha 12th Aug 1873; Ag Edu Insp N D., 19th Dec 1873; furl for 21 months 9th Mar 1874; Ag Supy Asst 20th Dec 1875; Supy Asst Surat 23rd Feb 1876; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge 11th Mar to 12th Apr 1876; Supy Asst Nasik 15th Apr 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Nasik 9th Nov 1876; Cant and Rail Mag. Thal Ghat 25th Apr to 13th Nov 1876 and Devlali 31st Jan to 16th Feb 1877; Ag 1st Asst Collr 19th May 1878; Ag 2nd Asst 1st June 1878; Ag 1st Asst Nasik 10th July 1878; on spl duty at Bombay as Compiler of the Genl Admn Report of the Bombay Presy 2nd Sept 1878; Ag 2nd Asst special duty 1st Nov 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Nasik 10th Dec 1878; Ag 1st Asst 1st Apr 1879.

1870. ARTHUR BENNET STEWARD, B.A., Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 5th Nov 1870; placed under the Collr Belgaum. 7th Nov 1870; Supy Asst 15th Mar 1871; Dharwar 26th Mar 1873; Ag 2nd Asst 19th Aug 1873; Ag 1st Asst Belgaum 11th Apr 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 5th Jan 1877; Ag 1st Asst 18th Mar 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 4th Apr 1877; Ag Asst Pol Agt Kolhapur and South Maratha Country 2nd Mar 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum 22nd Nov 1878; Ag 1st Asst 17th May 1879; Sholapur 13th June 1879.

1870. WILLIAM HENRY HORSLEY.—Arrd 31st Oct 1870; placed under the Collr Poona 31st Oct 1870; Supy Asst 15th Mar 1871; Asst Collr and in charge of the forests in Kandesh 1st Oct 1872 to 18th Feb 1874; placed at the disposal of the Govt of India for service in the famine districts of Bengal 1st Mar 1874; at Dinagepore 5th Mar to 9th Oct 1874; Supy Asst Collr on forest demarcation work 22nd Oct 1874; Extra 2nd Asst 28th Oct to 4th Nov 1874, and 19th June 1875; Ag 1st Asst 20th May to 18th June 1875, and 5th Nov to 4th Dec 1875; Ag 1st Asst Khandesh 28th Aug to 3rd Sep 1876, and from 13th Sep to 14th Dec 1876; Asst Collr on forest demarcation work 15th Dec 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 16th May 1877; Ag 2nd Asst on famine duty at Kaladgi 2nd Aug 1877; Asst Collr on famine duty 14th Nov 1877; Asst Mag on forest demarcation work Kandesh 27th Dec 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 21st Mar 1878; Forest Settlement Officer Kanara 11th Nov 1878.

1870. CHARLES FALKINER MACCARTIE.—Arrd 21st Nov 1870; placed under the Collr Ahmedabad 21st Nov 1870; Supy Asst 21st Mar 1871; City Survey 1st Sept to 10th Nov 1872; Asst Mag Kistna Districts Madras Presy 12th Dec 1872; Ag Head Asst Kistna Districts, 22nd July to 6th Oct 1873; furl 4th June 1874 to 29th Oct 1875.

1870. HERBERT BATTY, B.A. (Cantab).—Arrd 31st Oct 1870; placed under the Collr Satara 8th Nov 1870; Supy Asst 22nd Apr 1871; Ag 3rd gr Professor Deccan College Poona 30th July 1872; protem 8th Nov 1874 to 25th June 1875; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Khandesh 10th July to 30th Nov 1875, 23rd Feb to 16th Apr 1876 and 12th Sep 1876 to 23rd Jan 1877; Ag 3rd gr Asst Judge 1st Dec 1875 to 22nd Feb 1876, 17th Apl to 18th May and 16th July to 11th Sep 1876; Judge Khandesh 20th Feb to 13th Mar from 19th May to 15th July 1876; from 30th Aug to 5th Sep 1876; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Thana, 24th Feb 1877; Ag 1st gr 21st Apr 1877; 2nd gr 4th July 1877; 1st gr 12th Sep 1877; Ag 2nd gr Judge Ahmednagar, 3rd Aug 1878; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge 30th Sep 1878; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 3rd Oct 1878; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge Thana, 4th Jan 1879; Ag Sr Asst Judge Sholapur, 30th Jan 1879; furl for 2 years 5th Mar 1879.

1870. JAMES RICHARD FITZGERALD.—Arr 5th Nov 1870; placed under Mag Belgaum, 7th Nov 1870; Supy Asst 15th Mar 1871; sick leave 14th Apl to 13th Nov

1871; Supy Asst Belgaum, 29th Nov 1871; Ag 2nd Asst Sholapur, 5th July 1875; services placed at the dis of the Gov of India, 31st Aug 1875.

1870. EDWIN McCALLUM.—Arrd 31st Oct 1870; placed under the Collr Nasik, 3rd Nov 1870; furl on m c 1st Apr 1871 to 31st Mar 1874; extraordinary leave 1st Apl to 4th Dec 1874; placed under the Collr of Dharwar 9th Dec 1874; Supy Asst 18th Oct 1875; Mag 2nd Cl 18th Nov 1876; 1st Cl 17th May 1878; Asst Collr Kanara, 6th May 1878 Ag 2nd Asst 19th to 31st May 1878, and from 17th Aug to 21st Oct 1878; Supt of Police, Kanara, 3rd Sept to 22nd Oct 1878; Ag 2nd Asst May 1879; doing duty at Kanara.

1870. CHARLES EVITT FROST.—Arrd 31st Oct 1870; placed under the Collr Poona, 31st Oct 1870; Supy Asst Satara 22nd Apl 1871; Thana, 9th June 1873; 2nd Asst Thana, 14th July to 15th Aug 1875, 19th Sept to 17th Nov 1875, Ag 2nd Asst Sholapur, 25th Mar 1876; Ag Pol Agent Sholapur, 1st May 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Sholapur, 12th June 1876, and Surat, 22nd Nov 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Railway Mag Thana 5th Sep to 24th Nov 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 2nd Dec 1877; Nasik 5th Sept 1878 Surat 20th Dec 1878; furl for 18 months 5th May 1879.

1870. HENRY TRAVERS OMMANNEY.—Arrd 12th Nov 1870; placed under the Mag Dharwar 13th Nov 1870; Supy Asst 17th July 1871; 2nd Asst 24th Jan to 29th Apl 1873; Supy Asst Nasik 6th Oct 1874; Railway Mag Thal Ghat and Cant Mag Devlali 13th Nov 1874; Supy Asst Khandesh 19th June 1875; Ag Extra 2nd Asst 2nd Oct 1875; Ag 1st Asst 3rd Aug 1876; Ag 2nd Asst 28th Aug 1876 to 11th Aug 1877 and from 29th Aug 1877; Ag 1st Asst 15th Aug 1878; Ag 2nd Asst 24th Oct 1878; Ag Jur Colr 2nd Mar 1879; Ag 2nd Asst 20th Mar 1879; Ag 1st Asst 5th May 1879.

1870.
