WILLIAM JOHN CUNNINGHAM.—Arrd 21st Nov 1870; placed under the Colr Dharwar 30th Nov 1871; Supy Asst Kanara 19th Feb 1873; Asst Comr 3rd gr on spl duty Bangalore 28th Aug 1873; on spl duty Chitaldrug 29th Oct 1873; Ag Dy Comr 4th cl 3rd to 26th Mar 1875; 23rd Apl to 22nd June 1875; 19th Apl to 18th July 1876; spl leave 13th July 1877 to 8th Jan 1878; Ag Dy Comr 22nd Jan to 7th Apl 1878, and 19th Apl to 28th May 1878; Addl Secy Famine Dept 2nd Aug to 15th Dec 1878; Ag Secy to the Chief Comr, Genl Dept 21st Jan 1879; confirmed 1st May 1879.

1870. HARRY ARBUTHNOT ACWORTH, Bar-Law.—Arrd, placed under the Colr Ahmednagar, 31st Oct 1870; Supy Asst Mag 23rd June 1871; furl on m c 11th Mar 1872 to 2nd July 1873; Supy Asst Poona, 9th July 1873; Kaira, and Ag 2nd Asst and Asst Ag to the Govr Panch Mahals, 19th Nov 1873; Ag Extra, 1st Asst Panch Mahals, 16th Aug to 30th Sept 1874 and 23rd Nov 1874 to 22nd Feb 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Panch Mahals, 2nd to 22nd Nov 1874 and from 23rd Feb 1875; Sholapur 17th Nov 1876; Asst Colr 9th July 1877; Ag Colr 31st Dec 1877 to 9th Jan 1878; Asst Mag Panch Mahals, 29th Mar 1878; Ag Extra 1st Asst Kaira, Colr of Stamp Rev Panch Mahals, 15th Apl 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Panch Mahals, 17th June 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Panch Mahals, 9th Nov 1878.

Class V of 4 years' standing.

1871. JOHN POLLEN, B. A.—Arrd 22nd Oct 1871; placed under the Mag Khandests 24th Oct 1871; Supy Asst 15th Jan 1872; Railway Mag Bhusaval from 20th Oh, 1873 to 25th Feb 1874; placed at the disposal of the Govt of India in the famine disct of Bengal, 1st Mar 1874; of Dinagepore 14th Mar 1874; Asst Colr Khandesh, 17th Oct 1874; Ag 2nd Asst 4th Nov 1874; Railway Mag Bhusaval, 9th Dec 1874 to 17th Jan 1875; and from 13th Mar to 8th June 1876; Asst Colr Khandesh, 9th July 1877; Ag 2nd Asst Mag 24th Nov 1877.

1871. CHARLES EDWARD GORDON CRAWFORD.—Arrd 2nd Jan 1872; placed under the Colr Ahmedabad, 3rd Jan 1872; Supy Asst 12th July 1872; Ag 2nd Asst 2nd to 31st Oct 1875 and 12th Apl to 10th June 1876; Ag 4th Asst Pol Agent Kathiawar 12th June to 6th Nov 1876; Railway Mag Bhusaval and Cant Mag Devlali 14th Nov 1876; Ag Asst Colr Sholapur 1st Feb 1877; Ag 2nd Asst 29th Mar 1878; District Supdt of Police, 19th Aug to 23rd Oct 1878; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Poona, 20th Jan 1879; Ag Asst Judge Thana in the same gr 6th Feb 1879.

1871. HILLERSDEN WOODWARD.—Arrd 28th Oct 1871; placed under the Colr Nasik 31st Oct 1871; Supy Asst Poona 8th Aug 1872; Nasik 6th Dec 1872; Ratmagiri 21st May 1873; Khandesh 4th Nov 1873; Ag Railway Mag Bhusaval 2nd Feb 1874; Ag 2nd Asst Khandesh and Ag Rail Mag Bhusaval 26th Aug 1874; Supy Asst and Ag Railway Mag Bhusaval 4th Nov 1874; Supy Asst, Khandesh, 19th Dec 1874; Ag Extra 2nd Asst, 1st Feb to 7th Apl 1875, and 11th May to 17th June 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Collr,

Khandesh, 2nd to 23rd Dec 1877, and from 20th Feb 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst Kaladgi, 21st Mar 1879.

1872. SHRIPAD BABAJI THAKUR, B.A.—Arrd 23rd Dec 1872 ; placed under the Collr Surat, 31st Dec 1872 ; Supy Asst 8th July 1873 ; North Kanara, 23rd Oct 1873 ; 2nd Asst 6th May to 5th June 1875 ; Ag 2nd Asst Kanara, 22nd Apr 1877 ; Asst Collr, 9th July 1877 ; Asst Mag at Thana, 12th Jan Sholapur, 25th Mar 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst 25th Apr 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst 4th July 1878 ; from 1st to 28th Apr 1879 and from 1st May 1879.

1872. EDWARD CHARLES OZANNE.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872 ; placed under the Colr of Satara, 14th Nov 1872 ; Supy Asst 6th Feb 1873 ; Poona, 12th Nov 1873 ; placed at the disposal of the Govt of India for ser in the famine dist Bengal, 1st Mar 1874 ; Tirhoot, 19th Mar 1874 ; Supy Asst Mag Poona, 17th Nov 1874 ; 2nd Asst Sholapur 10th Sept to 21st Oct 1875 ; Ag Supy Asst 8th Aug 1876 returned to Poona, 7th Nov 1876 ; at the disposal of the Govt of India for employment on famine duty in Mysore, 19th Oct 1877 ; Asst Colr 16th Aug 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum, 29th Aug 1878 ; on spel famine duty in Kathiawar, 15th Mar 1879.

1872. ARCHIBALD FRANCIS WOODBURN.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872 ; placed under the Colr of Bombay, 13th Nov 1872 ; Supy Asst Surat, 5th Feb 1873 ; Ahmednagar, 2nd Sept 1874 ; Ag 2nd Asst 15th Sept 1874 to 23rd Jan 1875 ; Supt of Police, 8th to 22nd Mar 1875 ; 2nd Asst Colr and 12th Oct to 16th Nov 1875 ; 2nd gr Supt of Police, 22nd June to 26th Aug, 6th to 23rd Sept and from 3rd to 22nd Jan 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst Ahmednagar, 1st Apr 1878 ; Khandeish 16th Aug, 1873 ; Asst Collr, 22nd Nov 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst from 19th Feb 1879.

1872. JAMES DAVIDSON.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872 ; placed under the Collr of Satara, 22nd Nov 1872 ; Supry Asst 25th June 1873 ; Sholapur 5th July 1874 ; 2nd Asst, 26th Apr to 30th May 1875, 13th June to 4th July 1875, 31st Aug to 9th Sep 1875, 27th Feb to 24th Mar 1876, and from 1st May to 11th June 1876 ; tempy at the disposal of the Govt of India for on fam duty in Mysore 21st Oct 1877 to 13th Aug 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst Panch Mahals, 26th Aug 1878 ; Asst Magt 1st Nov 1878 ; Asst Collr Nasik, and Cant Magt, Devlal 4th Mar 1879 ; Asst Collr Sholapur, 3rd Apr 1879 ; Ag 2nd Asst 1st May 1879.

1872. GEORGE GLADSTONE TURNER.—Arrd 22nd Nov 1872 ; placed under the Collr of Bombay, 6th Dec 1872 ; Supy Asst Surat 3rd Feb 1873 ; Broach, 4th Nov 1873 ; Surat, 31st Mar 1874 ; 2nd Asst 7th Nov to 20th Dec 1874, 12th to 30th Apr 1875, 1st Asst 28th May to 5th June 1875 ; furl for 15 months on m c 30th July 1875 ; Supy Asst Surat, 25th Oct 1876 ; Asst Collr Thana, 10th Feb 1877 ; furl on m c for 20 months from 20th Apr 1877 ; Asst Collr Ahmedabad, 13th Dec 1878 ; Ag 2nd Asst 2nd Mar 1879.

1872. CHARLES EDWARD LAWSON.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872 ; placed under Magt Satara, 22nd Nov 1872 ; Supy Asst Sholapur, 5th Feb 1873 ; Belgaum, 19th Feb 1873 ; Kaladgi, 26th Nov 1874 ; furl on m c for 3 years and 8 months 24th Apr 1876.

1872. GILMOUR McCORKELL.—Arrd 11th Nov 1872 ; placed under the Collr Belgaum, 23rd Nov 1872 ; Supy Asst 15th Oct 1873 ; Edul Insp, S. D., 12th Nov to 26th Dec 1873 ; on sick leave 4th May to 27th Oct 1874 ; Supy Asst Belgaum, 7th Nov 1874 ; Magt 2nd cl 2nd Nov 1875 ; Dist Supt of Police, 7th to 13th June 1876 ; Magt 1st Class, 28th Oct 1876 ; Ag 2nd Asst Belgaum, 15th Aug to 4th Oct 1878.

1873. CHARLES HENRY JOPP, B.A.—Arrd 19th Oct 1873 ; placed under the Collr Satara, 28th Oct 1878 ; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1874 ; Nasik, 1st June 1874 ; Satara, Ag 2nd Asst 4th May 1876 ; furl on m c for 2 years and 6 months from 29th June 1877.

1873. ARTHUR LUKE PENNYCUICK LARKEN.—Arrd 27th Sep 1873 ; placed under the Collr Poona, 3rd Oct 1873 ; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1874 ; furl on m c 14th Aug 1874 to 9th Feb 1875 ; Supy 2nd Asst Poona, 12th Feb 1875 ; Ag Professor, 4th gr in the Deccan College 24th Nov 1875 ; 2nd Asst Poona, 24th Mar to 11th June 1876 ; Supy Asst Poona, 12th June 1876 ; Magt 1st Class, 4th May 1878 ; Ag 2nd gr Asst Judge Ahmedabad, 21st June 1878 ; Ag 1st gr 2nd Aug 1878 ; Ag 2nd gr Judge 14th to 24th Sep 1878 ; Ag 1st gr Asst Judge, 20th Jan 1879 ; 2nd gr 23rd Apr 1879 ; 1st gr 24th May 1879.

1873. ALEXANDER SHEWAN.—Arrd 23rd Oct 1873 ; placed under the Collr Poonah 31st Oct 1873 ; Supy Asst 21st Jan 1874 ; Ahmednagar, 23rd Dec 1874 ; Satara, 27th Feb 1875 ; 2nd Asst 8th May to 5th Aug 1875 ; Extra 2nd Asst Jath State, 23rd Sep to 16th Dec 1875, 4th Jan to 10th Feb 1876 ; 2nd Asst Satara, 28th Mar to 3rd May

1876; Asst Pol Agent in charge Jath State, 11th Apl 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Satara, 1st July to 20th Nov 1878 and 2nd Mar 1879 Jath State.

1873. CHARLES BLAKE WINCHESTER. Bar-at-Law.—Arrd 23rd Oct 1873; placed under the Collr of Surat, 28th Oct 1873; Supy Asst Surat, 21st Jan 1874; Ratnagiri, 18th Jan 1875; Ag 2nd Asst Kolaba, 8th May 1876 to 2nd Jan 1877; Ag Supy Asst Collr, Kolaba, 3rd Jan 1877; Ag Asst Collr, Sholapur, 14th Mar 1877; Asst Collr on famine duty, Kaladgi, 7th Sep 1877; Asst Magt Ratnagiri, 3rd Jan 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Ratnagiri, 11th Apl 1878; Dist Supt of Police, 24th Apl to 21st July 1878; Ag 2nd Asst Collr, 3rd Mar 1879.

1874. HENRY FOSTER SILCOCK.—Arrd 24th Nov 1874; placed under the Collr of Belgaum 25th Nov 1874; Supy Asst 22nd Apl 1875; Dist Supt of Police, 7th Mar to 10th Apl 1876; 15th May to 6th June 1876; Supy Asst Kaladgi, 2nd June 1876; Ag 2nd Asst Dharwar, 11th June to 18th July 1876; Ag Supt of Police, Kaladgi, 1st Aug to 1st Sep 1876; Ag 1st Asst Kaladgi, 8th to 19th Sep 1876; Supt of Police, Kaladgi, 11th Oct to 27th Nov 1877; Ag 2nd Asst Kaladgi, 29th Apl 1878; 2nd Asst Collr 7th Aug to 16th Oct 1878; Ag 2nd Asst 21st Oct 1878 and from 6th May 1879.

1874. ROBERT COURTENAY.—Arrd 24th Nov 1874; placed under the Collr Surat, 25th Nov 1874; Supy Asst 23rd Apl 1875; Ag Supy Asst Ahmedabad, Sholapur, and Kolaba, 2nd Nov 1876; 1st Feb and 6th Mar 1877 respectively; Ag Jr Collr Kolaba, 15th Sep to 11th Nov 1877; Jr Magt Kolaba, 24th Apl to 22nd May 1878; Jr Collr Kolaba, 23rd Dec 1878 to 20th Jan 1879.

1874. ALEXANDER CUMINE.—Arrd 28th Oct 1874; placed under the Collr of Thana, 2nd Nov 1874; Supy, Asst, 19th Jan 1875; Supt of Police, Thana. 2nd to 11th June 1875; 2nd Asst 16th Nov 1876 to 4th Jan 1877; Asst Collr Sholapur, 12th Feb 1877; Asst Collr and Railway Magt Thana, 5th Jan to 1st Mar 1878; Asst Collr 2nd Mar 1878; Railway Magt 19th May to 16th July 1878.

Class VI under 4 years' standing.

1876. WILLIAM POWELL SYMONDS.—Arrd 16th Nov 1876; placed under the Collr of Poona, 17th Nov 1876; under the Rev and Police Comr, N D 20th Dec 1876; Asst Collr 3rd Class Poona, 21st Feb 1877; Magt 2nd Class, 12th Aug 1877; 1st Class, 12th Feb 1878.

1876. JOHN BACKHOUSE ALCOCK.—Arrd 10th Nov 1876; placed under the Collr of Nasik, 17th Nov 1876; Asst Collr 3rd Class 9th Feb 1877; Asst Magt 2nd Class 15th Jan 1878; 1st Class 18th Oct 1878.

1876. JOHN WILLIAM PITT MUIR-MACKENZIE.—Arrd 28th Nov 1876; placed under the Collr of Satara, 28th Nov 1876; Asst Mag 3rd Class 14th Feb 1877; Magt 2nd Class 9th Apl 1877; 1st Class 13th Feb 1878; Asst Pol Agent Jath State, 1st Mar to 31st May 1878.

1876. EDWARD HENRY MOSCARDI.—Arrd 7th Nov 1876; placed under the Collr of Ahmedabad, 28th Nov 1876; Asst Magt 3rd Class, 14th Feb 1877; 2nd Class, 25th Jan 1878; 1st Class 4th May 1878 Asst Collr Ahmednagar, 4th Apl 1879; Ahmedabad.

1877. ROBERT MUIRHEAD KENNEDY.—Arrd 16th Nov 1877; placed under the Collr of Satara, 30th Nov 1877; Asst Magt 3rd Class, 15th May 1878; Magt 2nd Class, 15th Nov 1878; 1st Class, 15th May 1879.

1877. ARTHUR DELAVAL YOUNGHUSBAND.—Arrd 9th Dec 1877; placed under the Collr of Surat, 9th Dec 1877; Asst Magt 3rd Class, 17th May 1878; 2nd Class, 17th Nov 1878; 1st Class 17th May 1879.

1878. EDWARD LAWRENCE, B.A.—Arrd 12th Nov 1878; placed under the Collr of Poona, 13th Nov 1878; Asst Magt 3rd Class, 16th Jan 1879; Asst Magt Thana.

1878. JAMES ADAIR CRAWFORD.—Arrd 17th Sep 1878; placed under the Collr of Ratnagiri 29th Sep 1878; Asst Magt 3rd Class 15th Nov 1878; Magt 2nd Class 20th May 1879; Asst Magt Poona, spl duty under the Supt of Police, Asst Collr Khandesh.

1878. EVELYN GRAY.—Arrd 27th Dec 1878; placed under the Collr of Bombay, 27th Dec 1878; Asst Mag 3rd Class, Poona, 5th May 1879.

BENGAL.Before 1856 all Civilians were appointed from Haileybury.1856.

After 1857 all Civilians were appointed by Competition.

In Madras all Civilians up to 1857 inclusive were appointed from Haileybury and from 1860 inclusive by Competition. No Civilians were appointed to Madras between 1857 and 1860.
